Aaron Wan-Bissaka.name: Aaron Wan-Bissaka
Aaron Wan-Bissaka.summary: Aaron Wan-Bissaka (born 26 November 1997) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back for EFL Championship club West Ham United. Born in England, he plays for the DR Congo national team.
Aaron Wan-Bissaka.note: Wan-Bissaka gives DR Congo elite one-on-one defending, especially when quick wingers attack the outside lane.
Aaron Wan-Bissaka.noteZh: 万-比萨卡给刚果民主共和国顶级一对一防守，尤其适合应对快速边锋冲击外线。

Abbosbek Fayzullaev.name: Abbosbek Fayzullaev
Abbosbek Fayzullaev.summary: Abbosbek Sayidjon ugli Fayzullaev (Uzbek: Abbosbek Sayidjon oʻgʻli Fayzullayev; born 3 October 2003) is an Uzbek professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or winger for Süper Lig club İstanbul Başakşehir and the Uzbekistan national team.
Abbosbek Fayzullaev.note: Fayzullaev is Uzbekistan's creative spark, finding pockets and turning carries into final passes.
Abbosbek Fayzullaev.noteZh: 法伊祖拉耶夫是乌兹别克斯坦创造火花，能找到空当并把带球转成最后一传。

Abdukodir Khusanov.name: Abdukodir Khusanov
Abdukodir Khusanov.summary: Abdukodir Khikmatzhon ugli Khusanov (Uzbek: Abduqodir Xikmatjon oʻgʻli Xusanov; born 29 February 2004) is an Uzbek professional footballer who plays as a centre-back and right-back for Premier League club Manchester City and the Uzbekistan national team.
Abdukodir Khusanov.note: Khusanov gives Uzbekistan elite defensive upside, fast enough to defend space behind the line.
Abdukodir Khusanov.noteZh: 胡萨诺夫给乌兹别克斯坦顶级防守潜力，速度足以防守身后空间。

Abduvohid Nematov.name: Abduvohid Nematov
Abduvohid Nematov.summary: Abduvohid Nematov (Uzbek: Abduvohid Neʼmatov, Абдувоҳид Неъматов; born 20 March 2001) is an Uzbek professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Nasaf and the Uzbekistan national team.
Abduvohid Nematov.note: Nematov gives Uzbekistan a commanding goalkeeper base, important when pressure comes through crosses.
Abduvohid Nematov.noteZh: 内马托夫给乌兹别克斯坦有指挥力的门将基础，当压力来自传中时很重要。

Achraf Hakimi.name: Achraf Hakimi
Achraf Hakimi.summary: Achraf Hakimi Mouh (Arabic: أشرف حكيمي موح, pronounced [ˈʔaʃraf ħaˈkiːmiː ˈmuːħ]; born 4 November 1998) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Ligue 1 club Paris Saint-Germain and captains the Morocco national team.
Achraf Hakimi.note: Morocco's right-side captain, driving overlaps, recovery sprints, and the transition threat that turns defense into attack.
Achraf Hakimi.noteZh: 阿什拉夫·哈基米是摩洛哥右路队长，能推动套边、回追冲刺，并把防守转换成进攻威胁。

Adalberto Carrasquilla.name: Adalberto Carrasquilla
Adalberto Carrasquilla.summary: Adalberto Eliécer Carrasquilla Alcázar (born 28 November 1998), commonly known as Coco Carrasquilla is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Liga MX club Pumas UNAM and the Panama national team.
Adalberto Carrasquilla.note: Carrasquilla is Panama's midfield escape valve, able to carry through pressure and find the next runner.
Adalberto Carrasquilla.noteZh: 卡拉斯基利亚是巴拿马中场摆脱阀，能带球穿过压力并找到下一名跑动者。

Adam Hlozek.name: Adam Hlozek
Adam Hlozek.summary: Adam Hložek (born 25 July 2002) is a Czech professional footballer who plays as a forward for Bundesliga club TSG Hoffenheim and the Czech Republic national team.
Adam Hlozek.note: Czechia's roaming forward, useful for dropping between lines, combining near Schick, and turning loose balls into shots.
Adam Hlozek.noteZh: 亚当·赫洛热克是捷克游动型前锋，能回撤到线间、在希克身边配合，并把松散球权转化为射门。

Agustin Canobbio.name: Agustin Canobbio
Agustin Canobbio.summary: Agustín Canobbio Graviz (born 1 October 1998) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or winger for Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club Fluminense and the Uruguay national team.
Agustin Canobbio.note: A busy wide attacker for Uruguay, useful when the press needs edge and the far-side run has to arrive early.
Agustin Canobbio.noteZh: 卡诺比奥是乌拉圭勤奋的边路攻击手，当压迫需要强度、远侧跑动需要提前到位时很有用。

Akram Afif.name: Akram Afif
Akram Afif.summary: Akram Hassan Afif Yahya Afif (Arabic: أَكْرَم حَسَن عَفِيف يَحْيَى عَفِيف; born 18 November 1996) is a Qatari professional footballer who plays as a left winger for Qatar Stars League club Al Sadd and the Qatar national team.
Akram Afif.note: Qatar's main creative winger, turning left-side touches into dribbles, set-piece service, and final passes for runners.
Akram Afif.noteZh: 阿克拉姆·阿菲夫是卡塔尔主要创造型边锋，能把左路触球转化为带球突破、定位球输送，以及给前插队友的最后一传。

Alex Freeman.name: Alex Freeman
Alex Freeman.summary: Alexander Michael Freeman (born August 9, 2004) is an American professional soccer player who plays as a right-back, right winger, or center back for La Liga club Villarreal and the United States national team.
Alex Freeman.note: United States' young right-side runner, useful for pushing the line higher and recovering wide space.
Alex Freeman.noteZh: 亚历克斯·弗里曼是美国年轻的右路跑动点，适合把边路位置推高并回追边路空间。

Alexander Isak.name: Alexander Isak
Alexander Isak.summary: Alexander Isak (Swedish pronunciation: [alɛkˈsǎnːdɛr ˈîːsak]; born 21 September 1999) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a striker for Premier League club Liverpool and the Sweden national team.
Alexander Isak.note: Sweden's reference striker, able to glide away from markers and turn half-chances into calm finishes.
Alexander Isak.noteZh: 亚历山大·伊萨克是瑞典的核心中锋，能优雅摆脱盯防并把半机会冷静转化为进球。

Ali Jasim.name: Ali Jasim
Ali Jasim.summary: Ali Jasim Elaibi Al-Tameemi (Arabic: علي جاسم لعيبي التميمي; born 20 January 2004) is an Iraqi professional footballer who plays as a forward for Saudi Pro League club Al-Najma, on loan from Serie A club Como, and the Iraq national team.
Ali Jasim.note: Iraq's sharp wide creator, dangerous when he drives inside and attacks unsettled defenders.
Ali Jasim.noteZh: 阿里·贾西姆是伊拉克锐利的边路创造者，内切推进并冲击未站稳防守者时很危险。

Ali Olwan.name: Ali Olwan
Ali Olwan.summary: Ali Iyad Ali Olwan (Arabic: علي إياد علي علوان; born 26 March 2000) is a Jordanian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Qatar Stars League club Al-Sailiya and the Jordan national team.
Ali Olwan.note: Olwan gives Jordan their central finishing threat, pressing first and attacking the near post when service arrives.
Ali Olwan.noteZh: 奥尔万给约旦中路终结威胁，能率先压迫，并在传球到来时冲击前点。

Alireza Jahanbakhsh.name: Alireza Jahanbakhsh
Alireza Jahanbakhsh.summary: Alireza Jahanbakhsh (Persian: علیرضا جهانبخش, romanized: Alirezâ Jahânbaxš, pronounced [æliːɾezɑː dʒæhɑːnˈbæxʃ]; born 11 August 1993) is an Iranian professional footballer who plays as a winger for Belgian Pro League club Dender and captains the Iran national...
Alireza Jahanbakhsh.note: Jahanbakhsh gives Iran experience from wide areas and a right foot that can punish loose clearances.
Alireza Jahanbakhsh.noteZh: 贾汉巴赫什给伊朗边路带来经验，他的右脚能惩罚松散解围。

Almoez Ali.name: Almoez Ali
Almoez Ali.summary: Almoez Ali Zainalabedeen Mohamed Abdulla (Arabic: الْمُعِزّ عَلِيّ زَيْن الْعَابِدِين مُحَمَّد عَبْدُ اللّٰه; born 19 August 1996) is a professional footballer who plays as a striker for Qatar Stars League club Al-Duhail, which he currently captains.
Almoez Ali.note: Qatar's central scoring reference, giving them penalty-box runs, quick combinations, and proven finishing in tournament matches.
Almoez Ali.noteZh: 阿尔莫埃兹·阿里是卡塔尔中路得分支点，能提供禁区跑动、快速配合，以及大赛中证明过的终结能力。

Alphonso Davies.name: Alphonso Davies
Alphonso Davies.summary: Alphonso Boyle Davies (born November 2, 2000) is a professional soccer player who plays as a left-back, winger, or wing-back for Bundesliga club Bayern Munich and captains the Canada national team.
Alphonso Davies.note: Alphonso Davies is Canada's left-side accelerator, turning recoveries into breaks and forcing opponents to defend deeper.
Alphonso Davies.noteZh: 阿方索·戴维斯是加拿大左路的加速器，能把夺回球权转化为反击，并迫使对手防线后撤。

Amad Diallo.name: Amad Diallo
Amad Diallo.summary: Amad Diallo (born 11 July 2002), sometimes known mononymously as Amad, is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a winger or attacking midfielder for Premier League club Manchester United and the Ivory Coast national team.
Amad Diallo.note: Côte d'Ivoire's sharp right-side creator, dangerous when he cuts inside and links fast around the box.
Amad Diallo.noteZh: 阿马德·迪亚洛是科特迪瓦锐利的右路创造者，内切后在禁区周围快速配合时最有威胁。

Amine Gouiri.name: Amine Gouiri
Amine Gouiri.summary: Amine Ferid Gouiri (Arabic: أمين فريد قويري; born 16 February 2000) is a professional footballer who plays as a striker or left winger for Ligue 1 club Marseille. Born in France, he plays for the Algeria national team.
Amine Gouiri.note: Gouiri gives Algeria a forward who can connect attacks, drift inside, and still finish around the box.
Amine Gouiri.noteZh: 古伊里给阿尔及利亚能串联进攻的前锋，可内收活动，也能在禁区附近终结。

Andy Robertson.name: Andy Robertson
Andy Robertson.summary: Andrew Henry Robertson (born 11 March 1994) is a Scottish professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Premier League club Liverpool and captains the Scotland national team.
Andy Robertson.note: Scotland's captain and left-side engine, giving them crossing volume, recovery runs, and emotional control in tense stretches.
Andy Robertson.noteZh: 安迪·罗伯逊是苏格兰队长和左路发动机，能提供大量传中、回追跑动，以及紧张阶段的情绪控制。

Anthony Elanga.name: Anthony Elanga
Anthony Elanga.summary: Anthony David Junior Elanga (born 27 April 2002) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a forward or winger for Premier League club Newcastle United and the Sweden national team.
Anthony Elanga.note: Sweden's transition accelerator, dangerous when he can attack space before the back line is set.
Anthony Elanga.noteZh: 安东尼·埃兰加是瑞典的转换加速器，在防线站稳前冲击空间时很危险。

Antoine Semenyo.name: Antoine Semenyo
Antoine Semenyo.summary: Antoine Selorm Semenyo (born 7 January 2000) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger or wide midfielder for Premier League club Manchester City. Born in England, he plays for the Ghana national team.
Antoine Semenyo.note: Semenyo gives Ghana power from the right, carrying through contact and turning wide attacks into shots.
Antoine Semenyo.noteZh: 塞梅尼奥给加纳右路力量，能顶着身体接触推进，并把边路进攻变成射门。

Antonio Nusa.name: Antonio Nusa
Antonio Nusa.summary: Antonio Eromonsele Nordby Nusa (born 17 April 2005) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a winger or attacking midfielder for Bundesliga club RB Leipzig and the Norway national team.
Antonio Nusa.note: Norway's isolation winger, able to turn one loose touch into a sprint at the back line.
Antonio Nusa.noteZh: 安东尼奥·努萨是挪威一对一边锋，能把一次松散触球变成冲向防线的冲刺。

Arda Guler.name: Arda Guler
Arda Guler.summary: Arda Güler (Turkish pronunciation: [aɾˈda ˈɟylæɾ] ; born 25 February 2005) is a Turkish professional footballer who primarily plays as an attacking midfielder for La Liga club Real Madrid and the Turkey national team.
Arda Guler.note: Türkiye's main creative spark, dangerous when he drifts inside and turns one touch into a final pass or shot.
Arda Guler.noteZh: 阿尔达·居莱尔是土耳其主要创造火花，内收到中路并用一脚触球变成最后一传或射门时很危险。

Ayase Ueda.name: Ayase Ueda
Ayase Ueda.summary: Ayase Ueda (上田 綺世, Ueda Ayase; born 28 August 1998) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a striker for Eredivisie club Feyenoord and the Japan national team.
Ayase Ueda.note: Japan's penalty-box striker, sharp at finding separation and turning crosses into clean chances.
Ayase Ueda.noteZh: 上田绮世是日本的禁区中锋，擅长摆脱防守并把传中转化为清晰机会。

Aymen Hussein.name: Aymen Hussein
Aymen Hussein.summary: Aymen Hussein Ghadhban Al-Mafraje (Arabic: أيمن حسين غضبان المفرجي; born 22 March 1996), nicknamed Abu Tubar (Arabic: أبو طبر, lit.
Aymen Hussein.note: Iraq's reference striker, built for crosses, contact, and decisive penalty-box moments.
Aymen Hussein.noteZh: 艾曼·侯赛因是伊拉克参照型中锋，适合传中、身体接触和关键禁区时刻。

Ayoub El Kaabi.name: Ayoub El Kaabi
Ayoub El Kaabi.summary: Ayoub El Kaabi (Arabic: أَيُّوب الْكَعْبِيّ, Berber languages: ⴰⵢⵓⴱ ⴻⵍ ⴽⴰⴰⴱⵉ; born 25 June 1993) is a Moroccan professional footballer who plays as a striker for Super League Greece club Olympiacos and the Morocco national team.
Ayoub El Kaabi.note: Morocco's penalty-box reference, living on near-post runs, first-time finishes, and little movements between centre-backs.
Ayoub El Kaabi.noteZh: 阿尤布·埃尔卡比是摩洛哥禁区支点，依靠前点冲刺、第一时间终结，以及中卫之间的小幅移动制造机会。

Bradley Barcola.name: Bradley Barcola
Bradley Barcola.summary: Bradley Jean-Manuel Essolisam Addo Barcola (French pronunciation: [bʁɑdlɛ bɑʁkɔlɑ]; born 2 September 2002) is a French professional footballer who plays as a forward for Ligue 1 club Paris Saint-Germain and the France national team.
Bradley Barcola.note: France's left-wing accelerator, dangerous when he isolates a full-back and turns the byline into cutbacks.
Bradley Barcola.noteZh: 布拉德利·巴尔科拉是法国左路加速点，一对一面对边后卫并把底线位置变成倒三角时很危险。

Brahim Diaz.name: Brahim Diaz
Brahim Diaz.summary: Brahim Abdelkader Díaz (born 3 August 1999), also known mononymously as Brahim, is a professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or winger for La Liga club Real Madrid. Born in Spain, he plays for the Morocco national team.
Brahim Diaz.note: Morocco's half-space creator, using quick feet, disguised passes, and cut-inside shots to turn control into chances.
Brahim Diaz.noteZh: 布拉欣·迪亚斯是摩洛哥肋部创造者，能用快速脚下、隐蔽传球和内切射门，把控球转化为机会。

Breel Embolo.name: Breel Embolo
Breel Embolo.summary: Breel Donald Embolo (born 14 February 1997) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Ligue 1 club Rennes and the Switzerland national team.
Breel Embolo.note: Breel Embolo gives Switzerland a powerful reference point up front, turning direct service into hold-up play and box pressure.
Breel Embolo.noteZh: 布雷尔·恩博洛为瑞士提供强力的锋线支点，把直接传球转化为背身拿球和禁区压力。

Brian Brobbey.name: Brian Brobbey
Brian Brobbey.summary: Brian Ebenezer Adjei Brobbey (born 1 February 2002) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a striker for Premier League club Sunderland and the Netherlands national team.
Brian Brobbey.note: Netherlands' power striker option, useful for pinning centre-backs and turning scrappy service into shots.
Brian Brobbey.noteZh: 布赖恩·布罗贝是荷兰力量型中锋选择，能压住中卫并把零散传球转化为射门。

Bruno Fernandes.name: Bruno Fernandes
Bruno Fernandes.summary: Bruno Miguel Borges Fernandes (European Portuguese: [ˈbɾunu fɨɾˈnɐ̃dɨʃ]; born 8 September 1994) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Premier League club Manchester United, which he captains, and the Portugal national...
Bruno Fernandes.note: Bruno gives Portugal vertical creativity, always looking for the pass that turns control into a chance.
Bruno Fernandes.noteZh: 布鲁诺给葡萄牙纵向创造力，总是在寻找把控制转成机会的传球。

Caleb Yirenkyi.name: Caleb Yirenkyi
Caleb Yirenkyi.summary: Caleb Marfo Yirenkyi (born 15 January 2006) is a Ghanaian footballer who plays as a midfielder for Danish Superliga club Nordsjælland and the Ghana national team.
Caleb Yirenkyi.note: Yirenkyi gives Ghana young midfield legs, carrying forward and arriving late when attacks need one more runner.
Caleb Yirenkyi.noteZh: 伊伦基给加纳年轻中场跑动力，能向前带球，并在进攻需要多一个人时后插上。

Cameron Burgess.name: Cameron Burgess
Cameron Burgess.summary: Cameron Robert Burgess (born 21 October 1995) is a professional soccer player who plays as a centre-back for EFL Championship club Swansea City. Born in Scotland, he represents the Australia national team.
Cameron Burgess.note: Australia's left-sided centre-back option, useful for clearing crosses and defending deep pressure.
Cameron Burgess.noteZh: 卡梅伦·伯吉斯是澳大利亚左侧中卫选择，适合解围传中并防守深位压力。

Casemiro.name: Casemiro
Casemiro.summary: Carlos Henrique Casimiro (born 23 February 1992), also known mononymously as Casemiro [ka.zeˈmi.ɾu], is a Brazilian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Premier League club Manchester United and the Brazil national team.
Casemiro.note: Brazil's midfield safety lock, closing counter lanes, organizing second balls, and still threatening the box on set pieces.
Casemiro.noteZh: 卡塞米罗是巴西中场的安全锁，能封住反击线路、组织第二落点，并在定位球中继续威胁禁区。

Chris Wood.name: Chris Wood
Chris Wood.summary: Christopher Grant Wood (born 7 December 1991) is a New Zealand professional footballer who plays as a forward for Premier League club Nottingham Forest and captains the New Zealand national team.
Chris Wood.note: Wood is New Zealand's reference point, turning crosses and set pieces into real scoring pressure.
Chris Wood.noteZh: 克里斯·伍德是新西兰支点，能把传中和定位球转成真正的得分压力。

Christian Pulisic.name: Christian Pulisic
Christian Pulisic.summary: Christian Mate Pulisic (Croatian: Pulišić; born September 18, 1998) is an American professional soccer player who plays as a winger, attacking midfielder and forward for Serie A club AC Milan and the United States national team.
Christian Pulisic.note: United States' headline attacker, most dangerous when he isolates a defender and drives into shooting zones.
Christian Pulisic.noteZh: 克里斯蒂安·普利西奇是美国头号攻击手，一对一面对防守者并推进到射门区域时最危险。

Christian Volpato.name: Christian Volpato
Christian Volpato.summary: Cristian Volpato (born 15 November 2003) is an Australian professional soccer player who plays as an attacking midfielder or winger for Serie A club Sassuolo and the Australia national team.
Christian Volpato.note: Australia's creative upside player, dangerous when he receives between lines and carries onto his left foot.
Christian Volpato.noteZh: 克里斯蒂安·沃尔帕托是澳大利亚有创造上限的球员，在线间接球并带到左脚时很危险。

Cody Gakpo.name: Cody Gakpo
Cody Gakpo.summary: Cody Mathès Gakpo (Dutch: ['koːdi 'ɣɑkpoː]; born 7 May 1999) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a left winger or centre forward for Premier League club Liverpool and the Netherlands national team.
Cody Gakpo.note: Netherlands' left-side scoring threat, dangerous when he drives inside or appears late at the far post.
Cody Gakpo.noteZh: 科迪·加克波是荷兰左路进球威胁，内切推进或后点后插上时很危险。

Connor Metcalfe.name: Connor Metcalfe
Connor Metcalfe.summary: Connor Isaac Metcalfe (born 5 November 1999) is an Australian professional soccer player who plays as a central midfielder for 2. Bundesliga club FC St. Pauli and the Australia national team.
Connor Metcalfe.note: Australia's hard-running central midfielder, useful for joining attacks and immediately pressing after loss.
Connor Metcalfe.noteZh: 康纳·梅特卡夫是澳大利亚勤奋跑动的中场，适合参与进攻并在丢球后立刻反抢。

Cristiano Ronaldo.name: Cristiano Ronaldo
Cristiano Ronaldo.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo dos Santos Aveiro (born 5 February 1985), nicknamed CR7, is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a forward for and captains both Saudi Pro League club Al-Nassr and the Portugal national team.
Cristiano Ronaldo.note: Ronaldo remains Portugal's penalty-box reference, built for crosses, rebounds, and decisive touches.
Cristiano Ronaldo.noteZh: C罗仍是葡萄牙禁区参照点，适合传中、反弹球和决定性触球。

Crysencio Summerville.name: Crysencio Summerville
Crysencio Summerville.summary: Crysencio Jilbert Sylverio Cirro Summerville (born 30 October 2001) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a winger for EFL Championship football club West Ham United and the Netherlands national team.
Crysencio Summerville.note: Netherlands' isolation winger, able to beat a full-back and turn the byline into cutbacks.
Crysencio Summerville.noteZh: 克里森西奥·萨默维尔是荷兰一对一边锋，能突破边后卫并把底线位置变成倒三角传球。

Cyle Larin.name: Cyle Larin
Cyle Larin.summary: Cyle Christopher Larin (; born April 17, 1995) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a forward for EFL Championship club Southampton and the Canada national team.
Cyle Larin.note: Cyle Larin gives Canada a seasoned penalty-area target, helping crosses, layoffs, and loose balls become real chances.
Cyle Larin.noteZh: 赛尔·拉林为加拿大提供经验丰富的禁区支点，帮助传中、做球和二点球转化为真正机会。

Daichi Kamada.name: Daichi Kamada
Daichi Kamada.summary: Daichi Kamada (鎌田 大地, Kamada Daichi; born 5 August 1996) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Premier League club Crystal Palace and the Japan national team.
Daichi Kamada.note: Japan's between-lines organizer, able to receive on the half-turn and connect midfield to the front line.
Daichi Kamada.noteZh: 镰田大地是日本的线间组织者，能半转身接球并把中场和锋线连接起来。

Damian Bobadilla.name: Damian Bobadilla
Damian Bobadilla.summary: Damián Josué Bobadilla Benítez (born 11 July 2001) is a Paraguayan professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club São Paulo and the Paraguay national team.
Damian Bobadilla.note: Paraguay's box-to-box runner, valuable for arriving late and still doing the recovery work afterward.
Damian Bobadilla.noteZh: 达米安·博瓦迪利亚是巴拉圭双向跑动型中场，能后插上，并在之后继续完成回防工作。

Daniel Munoz.name: Daniel Munoz
Daniel Munoz.summary: Daniel Muñoz Mejía (born 26 May 1996) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a right-back or right wing-back for Premier League club Crystal Palace and the Colombia national team.
Daniel Munoz.note: Muñoz gives Colombia a right-side engine, arriving in the box while still covering transition defense.
Daniel Munoz.noteZh: 穆尼奥斯给哥伦比亚右侧发动机，能进入禁区，也能覆盖转换防守。

Darwin Nunez.name: Darwin Nunez
Darwin Nunez.summary: Darwin Gabriel Núñez Ribeiro (Spanish pronunciation: [ˈdaɾwin ˈnuɲeθ]; born 24 June 1999) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a striker for Saudi Pro League club Al-Hilal and the Uruguay national team. Nicknamed "La Pantera" (lit.
Darwin Nunez.note: Uruguay's chaos forward, dangerous when he attacks space first and forces defenders into recovery runs.
Darwin Nunez.noteZh: 努涅斯是乌拉圭制造混乱的前锋，先冲击空间并迫使后卫回追时最危险。

David Alaba.name: David Alaba
David Alaba.summary: David Alaba (Austrian German: [ˈdeɪvɪd ˈalaba, ˈdaːv-] ; born 24 June 1992) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for La Liga club Real Madrid and captains the Austria national team.
David Alaba.note: Alaba remains Austria's organiser, bringing left-footed passing and calm leadership across the back line.
David Alaba.noteZh: 阿拉巴仍是奥地利组织者，给后防带来左脚传球和冷静领导力。

Declan Rice.name: Declan Rice
Declan Rice.summary: Declan Rice (born 14 January 1999) is an English professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Premier League club Arsenal and the England national team.
Declan Rice.note: Rice is England's midfield insurance, protecting transitions and carrying the ball out of pressure.
Declan Rice.noteZh: 赖斯是英格兰中场保险，能保护转换并带球摆脱压力。

Deniz Undav.name: Deniz Undav
Deniz Undav.summary: Deniz Undav (German pronunciation: [ˈdɛnɪs ˈʊndaːf]; born 19 July 1996) is a German professional footballer who plays as a forward for Bundesliga club VfB Stuttgart and the Germany national team.
Deniz Undav.note: Germany's compact forward finisher, sharp around loose balls and clever enough to combine near the box.
Deniz Undav.noteZh: 德尼兹·翁达夫是德国紧凑型终结前锋，善于抓住松散球权，也能在禁区附近聪明配合。

Duckens Nazon.name: Duckens Nazon
Duckens Nazon.summary: Duckens Moïse Nazon (born 7 April 1994) is a professional footballer who plays as a striker for Persian Gulf Pro League club Esteghlal.
Duckens Nazon.note: Haiti's all-time scoring reference, giving them penalty-box power, direct shooting, and belief from very little service.
Duckens Nazon.noteZh: 杜肯斯·纳松是海地历史得分支点，能在禁区内提供力量、直接射门，并从很少的传球中制造信心。

Edin Dzeko.name: Edin Dzeko
Edin Dzeko.summary: Edin Džeko (Bosnian pronunciation: [ědin dʒêːko]; born 17 March 1986) is a Bosnian professional footballer who plays as a striker for Bundesliga club Schalke 04 and captains the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Edin Dzeko.note: Bosnia's captain and reference striker, turning direct service into hold-up play, box finishing, and calm leadership late in matches.
Edin Dzeko.noteZh: 埃丁·哲科是波黑队长和锋线支点，能把直接传球转化为背身拿球、禁区终结，以及比赛后段的冷静领导力。

Edson Alvarez.name: Edson Alvarez
Edson Alvarez.summary: Edson Omar Álvarez Velázquez (Spanish pronunciation: [ˈedson ˈalβaɾes]; born 24 October 1997) is a Mexican professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder or centre-back for Süper Lig club Fenerbahçe, on loan from EFL Championship club West Ham...
Edson Alvarez.club: Fenerbahçe (on loan from West Ham United)
Edson Alvarez.note: Mexico's midfield anchor, slowing counters, protecting the back line, and dropping into defense when needed.
Edson Alvarez.noteZh: 埃德松·阿尔瓦雷斯是墨西哥中场锚点，能拖慢反击、保护防线，并在需要时回撤到后防。

Eldor Shomurodov.name: Eldor Shomurodov
Eldor Shomurodov.summary: Eldor Azamat oʻgʻli Shomurodov (born 29 June 1995) is an Uzbek professional footballer who plays as a forward for Süper Lig club İstanbul Başakşehir and captains the Uzbekistan national team.
Eldor Shomurodov.note: Shomurodov is Uzbekistan's attacking reference, giving them a target and a penalty-box finisher.
Eldor Shomurodov.noteZh: 绍穆罗多夫是乌兹别克斯坦进攻参照点，提供支点和禁区终结。

Elias Saad.name: Elias Saad
Elias Saad.summary: Elias Saad (Arabic: إِلْيَاس سَعْد; born 27 December 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as a left winger for 2. Bundesliga club Hannover 96 on loan from FC Augsburg.
Elias Saad.note: Tunisia's left-side accelerator, dangerous when he drives inside before the defense is settled.
Elias Saad.noteZh: 埃利亚斯·萨阿德是突尼斯左路加速点，在防守站稳前内切推进时很危险。

Elijah Just.name: Elijah Just
Elijah Just.summary: Elijah Henry Just (born 1 May 2000) is a New Zealand professional footballer who plays as a winger for Scottish Premiership club Motherwell and the New Zealand national team.
Elijah Just.note: Just gives New Zealand tidy wide work, pressing hard and slipping inside for quick combinations.
Elijah Just.noteZh: 贾斯特给新西兰带来整洁的边路工作，能强力压迫并内收快速配合。

Ellyes Skhiri.name: Ellyes Skhiri
Ellyes Skhiri.summary: Ellyes Joris Skhiri (Arabic: إلياس السخيري; born 10 May 1995) is a professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Bundesliga club Eintracht Frankfurt. Born in France, he plays for the Tunisia national team.
Ellyes Skhiri.note: Tunisia's midfield anchor, built to protect the centre and move the next pass without fuss.
Ellyes Skhiri.noteZh: 埃利斯·斯希里是突尼斯中场锚点，负责保护中路并干净利落地推进下一脚传球。

Emam Ashour.name: Emam Ashour
Emam Ashour.summary: Emam Ashour Metwally Abdel Ghany (born 20 February 1998) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Egyptian Premier League club Al Ahly and the Egypt national team.
Emam Ashour.note: Emam is Egypt's forward-running midfielder, arriving late while still helping the press bite.
Emam Ashour.noteZh: 埃马姆是埃及向前跑动的中场，能后插上到位，同时帮助压迫更有力度。

Enner Valencia.name: Enner Valencia
Enner Valencia.summary: Enner Remberto Valencia Lastra (born 4 November 1989) is an Ecuadorian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Liga MX club Pachuca and captains the Ecuador national team.
Enner Valencia.note: Ecuador's captain and historic scorer, still the player they trust most to turn one clear chance into a goal.
Enner Valencia.noteZh: 恩纳·瓦伦西亚是厄瓜多尔队长和历史射手，依然是球队最信任、能把一次清晰机会转成进球的人。

Enzo Fernandez.name: Enzo Fernandez
Enzo Fernandez.summary: Enzo Jeremías Fernández (born 17 January 2001) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Chelsea and the Argentina national team.
Enzo Fernandez.note: Fernández gives Argentina vertical passing from midfield, helping attacks move forward before defenses reset.
Enzo Fernandez.noteZh: 恩佐·费尔南德斯给阿根廷中场纵向传球，帮助进攻在防线重组前向前推进。

Erling Haaland.name: Erling Haaland
Erling Haaland.summary: Erling Braut Haaland (né Håland, Urban East Norwegian: [ˈæ̂ːlɪŋ ˈhòːlɑn]; born 21 July 2000) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a striker for Premier League club Manchester City and the Norway national team.
Erling Haaland.note: Norway's match-warping striker, built to turn one clean service lane into a goal before defenders settle.
Erling Haaland.noteZh: 埃尔林·哈兰德是挪威能改变比赛结构的中锋，能在防守者站稳前把一条干净传球线路变成进球。

Ermin Mahmic.name: Ermin Mahmic
Ermin Mahmic.summary: Ermin Mahmić (pronounced [ěrmin mâːxmitɕ]; born 14 March 2005) is a professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Czech First League club Slovan Liberec. Born in Austria, he plays for the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Ermin Mahmic.note: Bosnia's young attacking midfielder, useful for receiving between lines, turning quickly, and slipping passes into runners.
Ermin Mahmic.noteZh: 埃尔明·马赫米奇是波黑年轻攻击型中场，能在两线之间接球、快速转身，并把传球塞给前插队友。

Esmir Bajraktarevic.name: Esmir Bajraktarevic
Esmir Bajraktarevic.summary: Esmir Bajraktarević (pronounced [ěsmir bajraktâːreʋitɕ]; born 10 March 2005) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger for Eredivisie club PSV. Born in the United States, he plays for the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Esmir Bajraktarevic.note: Bosnia's creative winger, giving them one-on-one threat, left-footed service, and quick transition carries from wide areas.
Esmir Bajraktarevic.noteZh: 埃斯米尔·巴伊拉克塔雷维奇是波黑创造型边锋，能提供一对一威胁、左脚输送，以及从边路发起的快速转换推进。

Evann Guessand.name: Evann Guessand
Evann Guessand.summary: Evann Ludovic Vidjannagni Guessand (born 1 July 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward or attacking midfielder for Premier League club Aston Villa. Born in France, he represents the Ivory Coast national team.
Evann Guessand.note: Côte d'Ivoire's flexible forward connector, comfortable dropping short before bursting into the channels.
Evann Guessand.noteZh: 埃万·盖桑是科特迪瓦灵活的锋线连接点，能回撤接应后再突然冲入边中通道。

Federico Valverde.name: Federico Valverde
Federico Valverde.summary: Federico Santiago Valverde Dipetta (Spanish pronunciation: [feðeˈɾiko βalˈβeɾðe]; born 22 July 1998) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for La Liga club Real Madrid and the Uruguay national team.
Federico Valverde.note: Uruguay's engine and tone-setter, able to turn a defensive recovery into a forward surge almost instantly.
Federico Valverde.noteZh: 巴尔韦德是乌拉圭的发动机和节奏标尺，几乎能立刻把防守回收转成向前冲刺。

Felix Nmecha.name: Felix Nmecha
Felix Nmecha.summary: Felix Kalu Nmecha (born 10 October 2000) is a German professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Bundesliga club Borussia Dortmund and the Germany national team.
Felix Nmecha.note: Germany's rangy midfield runner, adding carries, physical duels, and arrivals beyond the first wave.
Felix Nmecha.noteZh: 费利克斯·恩梅查是德国覆盖范围大的中场跑动点，能带球、对抗，并在第一波进攻后继续前插。

Finn Surman.name: Finn Surman
Finn Surman.summary: Finn Surman (born 23 September 2003) is a professional footballer who plays as a central defender for the Portland Timbers. Born in Wales, he represents the New Zealand national team.
Finn Surman.note: Surman gives New Zealand a composed young centre-back who can defend the box and pass forward.
Finn Surman.noteZh: 瑟曼给新西兰带来冷静的年轻中卫，能防守禁区，也能向前传球。

Firas Al-Buraikan.name: Firas Al-Buraikan
Firas Al-Buraikan.summary: Firas Tariq Nasser Al-Buraikan (Arabic: فِرَاس طَارِق نَاصِر الْبُرَيْكَان; born 14 May 2000), simply known as Feras, is a Saudi Arabian professional footballer who plays as a striker or winger for Saudi Professional League side Al-Ahli and the Saudi Arabia...
Firas Al-Buraikan.note: A mobile centre-forward for Saudi Arabia, dangerous when he links play and then attacks the next cross.
Firas Al-Buraikan.noteZh: 菲拉斯·布赖坎是沙特机动中锋，先串联进攻再冲击下一脚传中时很危险。

Florian Wirtz.name: Florian Wirtz
Florian Wirtz.summary: Florian Richard Wirtz (German pronunciation: [ˈfloːriːˌɑːn ˈvɪɾt͡s]; born 3 May 2003) is a German professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or left midfielder for Premier League club Liverpool and the Germany national team.
Florian Wirtz.note: Germany's main creative lock-picker, dangerous when he receives between lines and releases runners early.
Florian Wirtz.noteZh: 弗洛里安·维尔茨是德国主要的破密集创造者，在线间接球并提前释放跑动队友时最危险。

Folarin Balogun.name: Folarin Balogun
Folarin Balogun.summary: Folarin Jerry Balogun (born July 3, 2001) is a professional soccer player who plays as a striker for Ligue 1 club Monaco and the United States national team.
Folarin Balogun.note: United States' line-stretching striker, dangerous when he bends runs behind and finishes early.
Folarin Balogun.noteZh: 福拉林·巴洛贡是美国拉扯防线的中锋，弯线冲到身后并提前终结时很危险。

Franck Kessie.name: Franck Kessie
Franck Kessie.summary: Franck Yannick Kessié (born 19 December 1996) is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Saudi Pro League club Al-Ahli and the Ivory Coast national team.
Franck Kessie.note: Côte d'Ivoire's midfield governor, blending strength, calm penalty-box timing, and leadership in tense spells.
Franck Kessie.noteZh: 弗兰克·凯西耶是科特迪瓦中场掌控者，结合力量、禁区时机和紧张阶段的领导力。

Frantzdy Pierrot.name: Frantzdy Pierrot
Frantzdy Pierrot.summary: Frantzdy Pierrot (born 29 March 1995) is a Haitian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Süper Lig club Çaykur Rizespor, on loan from AEK Athens, and the Haiti national team.
Frantzdy Pierrot.club: Çaykur Rizespor (on loan from AEK Athens)
Frantzdy Pierrot.note: Haiti's powerful target forward, built for aerial service, hold-up touches, and occupying centre-backs near goal.
Frantzdy Pierrot.noteZh: 弗朗茨迪·皮埃罗是海地强力支点前锋，适合接应高空球、背身做球，并在门前牵制中卫。

Frenkie de Jong.name: Frenkie de Jong
Frenkie de Jong.summary: Frenkie de Jong (Dutch pronunciation: [ˈfrɛŋki də ˈjɔŋ]; born 12 May 1997) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for La Liga club Barcelona and the Netherlands national team.
Frenkie de Jong.note: Netherlands' tempo setter, able to carry through pressure and make possession feel calmer.
Frenkie de Jong.noteZh: 弗朗基·德容是荷兰节奏设定者，能带球穿过压力并让控球变得更冷静。

Giovanni Reyna.name: Giovanni Reyna
Giovanni Reyna.summary: Giovanni Alejandro Reyna (born November 13, 2002) is an American professional soccer player who plays for Bundesliga club Borussia Mönchengladbach and the United States national team.
Giovanni Reyna.note: United States' central creator, able to slow the game down, pick the final pass, and change rhythm.
Giovanni Reyna.noteZh: 乔瓦尼·雷纳是美国中路创造者，能放慢比赛、选择最后一传并改变节奏。

Granit Xhaka.name: Granit Xhaka
Granit Xhaka.summary: Granit Xhaka (Albanian: [gɾanit d͡ʒaka], born 27 September 1992) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for and captains both Premier League club Sunderland and the Switzerland national team.
Granit Xhaka.note: Granit Xhaka is Switzerland's tempo setter, using his passing range to organize possession and tilt the game into better areas.
Granit Xhaka.noteZh: 格拉尼特·扎卡是瑞士的节奏掌控者，依靠传球范围组织控球，并把比赛引向更有利的区域。

Gustavo Gomez.name: Gustavo Gomez
Gustavo Gomez.summary: Gustavo Raúl Gómez Portillo (born 6 May 1993) is a Paraguayan professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for and captains both Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club Palmeiras and the Paraguay national team.
Gustavo Gomez.note: Paraguay's defensive captain, the main voice in the back line and a major set-piece target.
Gustavo Gomez.noteZh: 古斯塔沃·戈麦斯是巴拉圭防守队长，是后防线主要声音，也是重要定位球目标。

Hakan Calhanoglu.name: Hakan Calhanoglu
Hakan Calhanoglu.summary: Hakan Çalhanoğlu (Turkish pronunciation: [ˈhaːkan ˈtʃaɫhanoːɫu], born 8 February 1994) is a professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Serie A club Inter Milan. Born in Germany, he plays for and captains the Turkey national team.
Hakan Calhanoglu.note: Türkiye's captain and tempo setter, shaping attacks from deep and making every restart feel dangerous.
Hakan Calhanoglu.noteZh: 哈坎·恰尔汗奥卢是土耳其队长和节奏设定者，能从后场塑造进攻，并让每次定位球都显得危险。

Hannibal Mejbri.name: Hannibal Mejbri
Hannibal Mejbri.summary: Hannibal Mejbri (Arabic: حَنِّبَعْل المجبري; born 21 January 2003), also known mononymously as Hannibal, is a French-born, Tunisian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for EFL Championship club Burnley and the Tunisia national team.
Hannibal Mejbri.note: Tunisia's high-intensity midfielder, able to lift the tempo with pressure, carries, and aggressive passes.
Hannibal Mejbri.noteZh: 汉尼拔·梅布里是突尼斯高强度中场，能用压迫、带球和积极传球提升节奏。

Harry Kane.name: Harry Kane
Harry Kane.summary: Harry Edward Kane (born 28 July 1993) is an English professional footballer who plays as a striker for Bundesliga club Bayern Munich and captains the England national team.
Harry Kane.note: Kane is England's forward hub, dropping in to create before arriving to finish.
Harry Kane.noteZh: 凯恩是英格兰前场枢纽，能回撤创造，再到位终结。

Helio Varela.name: Helio Varela
Helio Varela.summary: Hélio Sandro Oliveira Alves Varela (Portuguese: [ˈɛ.li.u ˈsɐ̃.dɾu o.li.ˈvej.ɾɐ ˈal.vɨʒ vɐ.ˈɾɛ.lɐ]; born 3 May 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger for Israeli Premier League club Maccabi Tel Aviv.
Helio Varela.note: Cabo Verde's explosive left-side threat, dangerous when he attacks a full-back and cuts service back.
Helio Varela.noteZh: 埃利奥·瓦雷拉是佛得角爆发型左路威胁，冲击边后卫并倒三角传球时很危险。

Homam Ahmed.name: Homam Ahmed
Homam Ahmed.summary: Homam El-Amin Mohamed Ahmed (Arabic: همام الأمين محمد أحمد; born 25 August 1999) is a Qatari professional footballer who plays as a left back for Al-Duhail and the Qatar national team.
Homam Ahmed.note: Qatar's left-back outlet, giving them overlap runs, recovery pace, and low delivery when attacks reach the byline.
Homam Ahmed.noteZh: 胡马姆·艾哈迈德是卡塔尔左后卫出口，能套边前插、快速回追，并在进攻推进到底线时送出低平传中。

Houssem Aouar.name: Houssem Aouar
Houssem Aouar.summary: Houssem-Eddine Chaâbane Aouar (Arabic: حُسَام الدِّين شَعْبَان عَوَار; born 30 June 1998) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Saudi Pro League club Al-Ittihad. Born in France, he plays for the Algeria national team.
Houssem Aouar.note: Aouar gives Algeria between-lines craft, turning controlled possession into late runs and final passes.
Houssem Aouar.noteZh: 奥亚尔给阿尔及利亚两线之间的技术，能把控球转成后插上和最后一传。

Ibrahim Mbaye.name: Ibrahim Mbaye
Ibrahim Mbaye.summary: Ibrahim Mbaye (born 24 January 2008) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Ligue 1 club Paris Saint-Germain. Born in France, he plays for the Senegal national team.
Ibrahim Mbaye.note: Senegal's teenage wide spark, dangerous when he can isolate a defender and run directly at goal.
Ibrahim Mbaye.noteZh: 易卜拉欣·姆巴耶是塞内加尔青少年边路火花，能一对一面对防守者并直接冲向球门时很危险。

Inaki Williams.name: Inaki Williams
Inaki Williams.summary: Iñaki Williams Arthuer (born 15 June 1994) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for La Liga club Athletic Bilbao, where he is captain, and the Ghana national team.
Inaki Williams.note: Williams gives Ghana vertical forward speed, running behind early and turning service into quick shots.
Inaki Williams.noteZh: 伊尼亚基·威廉姆斯给加纳纵向锋线速度，能早点冲到身后，并把传球变成快速射门。

Ismael Diaz.name: Ismael Diaz
Ismael Diaz.summary: Ismael Díaz de León (born 12 May 1997) is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays as a left winger for Liga MX club León and the Panama national team.
Ismael Diaz.note: Díaz gives Panama sharp movement near goal, especially when he can slip between centre-backs.
Ismael Diaz.noteZh: 迪亚斯给巴拿马门前敏锐跑动，尤其能钻进两名中卫之间时很危险。

Ismael Saibari.name: Ismael Saibari
Ismael Saibari.summary: Ismael Saibari (born 28 January 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a attacking midfielder or forward for Eredivisie club PSV Eindhoven. Born in Spain, he represents the Morocco national team.
Ismael Saibari.note: Morocco's attacking midfield runner, turning combinations into late box arrivals and real scoring pressure.
Ismael Saibari.noteZh: 伊斯梅尔·赛巴里是摩洛哥前腰跑动点，能把配合转化为后插上进禁区，并形成真实得分压力。

Ismaila Sarr.name: Ismaila Sarr
Ismaila Sarr.summary: Ismaïla Sarr (born 25 February 1998) is a Senegalese professional footballer who plays as a forward or winger for Premier League club Crystal Palace and the Senegal national team.
Ismaila Sarr.note: Senegal's vertical winger, dangerous when he can run beyond the full-back before the defense resets.
Ismaila Sarr.noteZh: 伊斯梅拉·萨尔是塞内加尔纵向边锋，能在防线重整前冲到边后卫身后时很危险。

Jackson Irvine.name: Jackson Irvine
Jackson Irvine.summary: Jackson Alexander Irvine (born 7 March 1993) is an Australian professional soccer player who plays as a central midfielder for Bundesliga club FC St. Pauli, which he captains, and the Australia national team.
Jackson Irvine.note: Australia's midfield captain figure, valuable for late runs, leadership, and awkward aerial duels.
Jackson Irvine.noteZh: 杰克逊·欧文是澳大利亚中场队长型人物，对后插上、领导力和棘手空中对抗很有价值。

Jamal Musiala.name: Jamal Musiala
Jamal Musiala.summary: Jamal Musiala (German pronunciation: [ˈdʒaːmal muˈzi̯aːla]; born 26 February 2003) is a German professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Bundesliga club Bayern Munich and the Germany national team.
Jamal Musiala.note: Germany's slalom dribbler, able to slip through crowded midfield zones and turn half-openings into shots.
Jamal Musiala.noteZh: 贾马尔·穆西亚拉是德国的蛇形盘带手，能穿过拥挤中场区域，并把半机会变成射门。

James Rodriguez.name: James Rodriguez
James Rodriguez.summary: James David Rodríguez Rubio (born 12 July 1991) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or winger and captains the Colombia national team.
James Rodriguez.note: James remains Colombia's creative reference, shaping chances with set pieces and left-footed passes.
James Rodriguez.noteZh: 哈梅斯仍是哥伦比亚创造核心，用定位球和左脚传球塑造机会。

Jaminton Campaz.name: Jaminton Campaz
Jaminton Campaz.summary: Jaminton Leandro Campaz (born 24 May 2000) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Argentine Primera División club Rosario Central and the Colombia national team.
Jaminton Campaz.note: Campaz gives Colombia a low-center creative option, slipping between lines and feeding runners.
Jaminton Campaz.noteZh: 坎帕斯给哥伦比亚低重心创造点，能钻入两线之间并喂给跑动者。

Jean-Ricner Bellegarde.name: Jean-Ricner Bellegarde
Jean-Ricner Bellegarde.summary: Jean-Ricner Bellegarde (French pronunciation: [ʒɑ̃ʁiknɛʁ bɛlɡaʁd]; born 27 June 1998) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for EFL Championship club Wolverhampton Wanderers. Born in France, he represents the Haiti national team.
Jean-Ricner Bellegarde.note: Haiti's highest-level midfield connector, carrying out of pressure and linking counters before opponents can crowd him.
Jean-Ricner Bellegarde.noteZh: 让-里克内尔·贝勒加德是海地最高级别的中场连接点，能带球摆脱压力，并在对手合围前串联反击。

Jeremy Doku.name: Jeremy Doku
Jeremy Doku.summary: Jérémy Baffour Doku (French pronunciation: [ʒeʁemi bafuʁ dɔku]; born 27 May 2002) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a winger for Premier League club Manchester City and the Belgium national team.
Jeremy Doku.note: Doku is Belgium's pure isolator, turning one defender into a full defensive emergency.
Jeremy Doku.noteZh: 多库是比利时纯粹的一对一爆点，能把一个防守者变成整条防线的警报。

Joao Neves.name: Joao Neves
Joao Neves.summary: João Pedro Gonçalves Neves (Portuguese pronunciation: [ʒuˈɐ̃w̃ˈnɛvɨʃ]; born 27 September 2004) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Ligue 1 club Paris Saint-Germain and the Portugal national team.
Joao Neves.note: Neves gives Portugal midfield intensity, winning duels and keeping the next pass forward.
Joao Neves.noteZh: 若昂·内维斯给葡萄牙中场强度，能赢下对抗并让下一脚向前。

Johan Manzambi.name: Johan Manzambi
Johan Manzambi.summary: Johan Manzambi (born 14 October 2005) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Bundesliga club SC Freiburg and the Switzerland national team.
Johan Manzambi.note: Johan Manzambi adds carrying power to Switzerland's midfield, helping break pressure and push the team into the final third.
Johan Manzambi.noteZh: 约翰·曼赞比为瑞士中场增加带球推进能力，帮助球队摆脱压迫并进入进攻三区。

John McGinn.name: John McGinn
John McGinn.summary: John McGinn (born 18 October 1994) is a Scottish footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Aston Villa, which he captains, and the Scotland national team. Having grown up in a footballing family, McGinn started his career with St Mirren.
John McGinn.note: Scotland's midfield driver, turning shoulder checks and ball shielding into forward carries and late runs into scoring areas.
John McGinn.noteZh: 约翰·麦金是苏格兰中场推进器，能用观察和护球转化为向前带球，并后插上进入得分区域。

Jonathan David.name: Jonathan David
Jonathan David.summary: Jonathan Christian David (born January 14, 2000) is a professional soccer player who plays as a forward for Serie A club Juventus. Born in the United States, he represents the Canada national team.
Jonathan David.note: Jonathan David is Canada's sharpest central scorer, finding pockets early and finishing before the back line can reset.
Jonathan David.noteZh: 乔纳森·戴维是加拿大最犀利的中路得分点，能提前找到空当，并在防线重组前完成终结。

Jordan Ayew.name: Jordan Ayew
Jordan Ayew.summary: Jordan Pierre Ayew (born 11 September 1991) is a professional footballer who last played as a winger or forward for EFL League One club Leicester City. Born in France, he plays for the Ghana national team.
Jordan Ayew.note: Ayew gives Ghana veteran forward craft, slowing frantic moments and winning useful territory in attack.
Jordan Ayew.noteZh: 乔丹·阿尤给加纳老练锋线技巧，能放慢混乱时刻，并在进攻中赢得有用区域。

Joshua Kimmich.name: Joshua Kimmich
Joshua Kimmich.summary: Joshua Walter Kimmich (German pronunciation: [ˈjoːzu̯aː ˈkɪmɪç]; born 8 February 1995) is a German professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder or right-back for Bundesliga club Bayern Munich and captains the Germany national team.
Joshua Kimmich.note: Germany's tactical reference point, important for tempo, set pieces, and deciding when the team presses.
Joshua Kimmich.noteZh: 约书亚·基米希是德国战术参照点，对节奏、定位球和球队何时压迫的判断都很重要。

Josko Gvardiol.name: Josko Gvardiol
Josko Gvardiol.summary: Joško Gvardiol (Croatian pronunciation: [jôʃko ɡʋârdioːl]; born 23 January 2002) is a Croatian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or left-back for Premier League club Manchester City and the Croatia national team.
Josko Gvardiol.note: Gvardiol is Croatia's left-side force, able to defend huge spaces and carry into midfield.
Josko Gvardiol.noteZh: 格瓦迪奥尔是克罗地亚左侧力量，能防守大片空间并带球进入中场。

Jovo Lukic.name: Jovo Lukic
Jovo Lukic.summary: Jovo Lukić (Serbian Cyrillic: Јово Лукић, Serbian pronunciation: [jôːʋo lǔkitɕ]; born 28 November 1998) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Liga I club Universitatea Cluj.
Jovo Lukic.note: Bosnia's physical forward option, giving them hold-up strength, short layoff passes, and a body to attack crowded penalty areas.
Jovo Lukic.noteZh: 约沃·卢基奇是波黑力量型锋线选择，能背身拿球、做出短距离回做，并在拥挤禁区里提供冲击点。

Jude Bellingham.name: Jude Bellingham
Jude Bellingham.summary: Jude Victor William Bellingham (born 29 June 2003) is an English professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for La Liga club Real Madrid and the England national team. He is regarded as one of the best players in the world.
Jude Bellingham.note: Bellingham gives England force between midfield and attack, arriving as both creator and scorer.
Jude Bellingham.noteZh: 贝林厄姆给英格兰中前场之间带来力量，既能创造，也能作为得分点到位。

Julian Alvarez.name: Julian Alvarez
Julian Alvarez.summary: Julián Alvarez (Spanish pronunciation: [xuˈljan ˈalbaɾeθ]; born 31 January 2000) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a forward for La Liga club Atlético Madrid and the Argentina national team.
Julian Alvarez.note: Álvarez gives Argentina relentless forward work, pressing from the front and still arriving to finish.
Julian Alvarez.noteZh: 阿尔瓦雷斯给阿根廷不间断的锋线工作量，能从前场压迫，也能及时到位终结。

Julian Quinones.name: Julian Quinones
Julian Quinones.summary: Julián Andrés Quiñones Quiñones (born 24 March 1997) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward or winger for Saudi Pro League club Al-Qadsiah. Born in Colombia, he represents the Mexico national team.
Julian Quinones.note: Mexico's powerful forward runner, attacking channels, finishing through contact, and giving the front line vertical force.
Julian Quinones.noteZh: 胡利安·基尼奥内斯是墨西哥强力前场跑动点，能冲击通道、对抗中终结，并给锋线带来纵向力量。

Julian Ryerson.name: Julian Ryerson
Julian Ryerson.summary: Julian Ryerson (Norwegian pronunciation: [ˈryːərsɔn]; born 17 November 1997) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a full-back or wing-back for Bundesliga club Borussia Dortmund and the Norway national team.
Julian Ryerson.note: Norway's high-intensity full-back, trusted for duels and relentless wide running.
Julian Ryerson.noteZh: 尤利安·吕尔松是挪威高强度边后卫，边路对抗和持续跑动都值得信任。

Julio Enciso.name: Julio Enciso
Julio Enciso.summary: Julio César Enciso Espínola (born 23 January 2004) is a Paraguayan professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or left winger for Ligue 1 club Strasbourg and the Paraguay national team.
Julio Enciso.note: Paraguay's spark player between the lines, capable of changing a match with one dribble or long shot.
Julio Enciso.noteZh: 胡利奥·恩西索是巴拉圭线间火花型球员，能用一次盘带或远射改变比赛。

Juninho Bacuna.name: Juninho Bacuna
Juninho Bacuna.summary: Juninho Bacuna (born 7 August 1997) is a professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Eerste Divisie club Volendam on loan from Turkish club Gaziantep. Born in the Netherlands, he represents the Curaçao national team.
Juninho Bacuna.note: Curaçao's midfield driver, able to carry through contact and threaten from distance or restarts.
Juninho Bacuna.noteZh: 朱尼尼奥·巴库纳是库拉索中场推进器，能带球穿过对抗，并用远射或定位球制造威胁。

Junya Ito.name: Junya Ito
Junya Ito.summary: Junya Itō (伊東 純也, Itō Jun'ya; born 9 March 1993) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a winger or a forward for Belgian Pro League club Genk and the Japan national team.
Junya Ito.note: Japan's veteran wide runner, still valuable for direct speed and early service from the right.
Junya Ito.noteZh: 伊东纯也是日本老练的边路冲刺点，仍能用直接速度和右路早传提供价值。

Kai Havertz.name: Kai Havertz
Kai Havertz.summary: Kai Lukas Havertz (German pronunciation: [kaɪ̯ ˈhaːvɛʁts]; born 11 June 1999) is a German professional footballer who plays as a forward or attacking midfielder for Premier League club Arsenal and the Germany national team.
Kai Havertz.note: Germany's hybrid forward, linking play as a false nine and arriving late to attack crosses or cutbacks.
Kai Havertz.noteZh: 凯·哈弗茨是德国混合型前锋，能像伪九号一样串联，并后插上攻击传中或倒三角。

Kalidou Koulibaly.name: Kalidou Koulibaly
Kalidou Koulibaly.summary: Kalidou Koulibaly (born 20 June 1991) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Saudi Pro League club Al-Hilal. Born in France, he plays for and captains the Senegal national team.
Kalidou Koulibaly.note: Senegal's defensive leader, still the voice and physical anchor of the back line.
Kalidou Koulibaly.noteZh: 卡利杜·库利巴利是塞内加尔防守领袖，仍然是后防线的声音和身体支柱。

Keito Nakamura.name: Keito Nakamura
Keito Nakamura.summary: Keito Nakamura (中村 敬斗, Nakamura Keito; born 28 July 2000) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays for Ligue 2 club Reims and the Japan national team. He plays either as a left winger or a forward.
Keito Nakamura.note: Japan's left-side goal threat, dangerous when he drives inside or ghosts toward the far post.
Keito Nakamura.noteZh: 中村敬斗是日本左路进球威胁，内切推进或悄悄移动到远门柱时很危险。

Kenan Yildiz.name: Kenan Yildiz
Kenan Yildiz.summary: Kenan Yıldız (Turkish pronunciation: [ceˈnan ˈjɯɫdɯz]; born 4 May 2005) is a professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or winger for Serie A club Juventus. Born in Regensburg, Germany, he plays for the Turkey national team.
Kenan Yildiz.note: Türkiye's elegant inside-left creator, able to glide past pressure and turn tight touches into shots.
Kenan Yildiz.noteZh: 凯南·伊尔迪兹是土耳其优雅的左肋创造者，能滑过压力并把狭小空间触球变成射门。

Kevin De Bruyne.name: Kevin De Bruyne
Kevin De Bruyne.summary: Kevin De Bruyne (Dutch pronunciation: [ˈkɛvɪn də ˈbrœynə]; born 28 June 1991) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie A club Napoli and the Belgium national team.
Kevin De Bruyne.note: De Bruyne remains Belgium's chance engine, able to turn one clean look into a Lukaku chance.
Kevin De Bruyne.noteZh: 德布劳内仍是比利时机会发动机，能把一次干净观察变成卢卡库机会。

Kevin Pina.name: Kevin Pina
Kevin Pina.summary: Kevin Lenini Gonçalves Pereira de Pina (Portuguese: [ˈkɛ.vin le.ˈni.ni ɡõ.ˈsal.vɨʃ pɨ.ˈɾej.ɾɐ dɨ ˈpi.nɐ]; born 27 January 1997) is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Russian club Krasnodar and the Cape Verde national...
Kevin Pina.note: Cabo Verde's midfield anchor, useful for winning second balls and moving the next pass safely.
Kevin Pina.noteZh: 凯文·皮纳是佛得角中场锚点，适合赢下第二落点并安全送出下一脚传球。

Kim Min-jae.name: Kim Min-jae
Kim Min-jae.summary: Kim Min-jae is a South Korea centre-back from Bayern Munich who gives the national team elite defending, recovery speed, and line-breaking passes.
Kim Min-jae.note: South Korea's defensive anchor, able to defend high space, win duels, and start attacks with aggressive passes.
Kim Min-jae.noteZh: 金玟哉是韩国防线锚点，能防守高位空间、赢下对抗，并用有侵略性的传球发起进攻。

Konrad Laimer.name: Konrad Laimer
Konrad Laimer.summary: Konrad Laimer (born 27 May 1997) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder or full-back for Bundesliga club Bayern Munich and the Austria national team. He was selected as Austrian Footballer of the Year in 2025.
Konrad Laimer.note: Laimer is Austria's pressing engine, turning loose touches into forward momentum.
Konrad Laimer.noteZh: 莱默是奥地利压迫发动机，能把对手松散触球变成向前势头。

Kylian Mbappe.name: Kylian Mbappe
Kylian Mbappe.summary: Kylian Mbappé Lottin (born 20 December 1998) is a French professional footballer who plays as a forward for La Liga club Real Madrid and captains the France national team.
Kylian Mbappe.note: France's game-breaking forward, most frightening when he attacks the left channel before the block is set.
Kylian Mbappe.noteZh: 基利安·姆巴佩是法国打破比赛的前锋，在防线站稳前冲击左侧通道时最可怕。

Ladislav Krejci.name: Ladislav Krejci
Ladislav Krejci.summary: Ladislav Krejčí (born 20 April 1999) is a Czech professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or defensive midfielder for EFL Championship club Wolverhampton Wanderers, on loan from Segunda División club Girona, and captains the Czech Republic national...
Ladislav Krejci.note: Czechia's left-footed defensive leader, combining centre-back security with set-piece danger and midfield edge.
Ladislav Krejci.noteZh: 拉迪斯拉夫·克雷伊奇是捷克左脚防线领袖，能兼具中卫安全感、定位球威胁和中场硬度。

Lamine Yamal.name: Lamine Yamal
Lamine Yamal.summary: Lamine Yamal Nasraoui Ebana (born 13 July 2007) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a right winger or right midfielder for La Liga club Barcelona and the Spain national team. He is regarded as one of the best players in the world.
Lamine Yamal.note: Yamal is Spain's matchup breaker, able to freeze a full-back and turn one touch into a chance.
Lamine Yamal.noteZh: 亚马尔是西班牙打破对位的人，能定住边后卫，并把一次触球变成机会。

Leandro Bacuna.name: Leandro Bacuna
Leandro Bacuna.summary: Leandro Jones Johan Bacuna (born 21 August 1991) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder or right-back for TFF First League club Iğdır FK. Born in the Netherlands, he represents the Curaçao national team.
Leandro Bacuna.note: Curaçao's senior leader, able to cover multiple roles and shape games with set pieces and experience.
Leandro Bacuna.noteZh: 莱安德罗·巴库纳是库拉索资深领袖，能覆盖多个位置，并用定位球和经验影响比赛。

Leandro Trossard.name: Leandro Trossard
Leandro Trossard.summary: Leandro Trossard (born 4 December 1994) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a forward or left winger for Premier League club Arsenal and the Belgium national team.
Leandro Trossard.note: Trossard gives Belgium a clever inside forward, sharp when attacks need a short-touch finish.
Leandro Trossard.noteZh: 特罗萨德给比利时聪明的内收前锋，当进攻需要短触终结时很敏锐。

Lee Kang-in.name: Lee Kang-in
Lee Kang-in.summary: Lee Kang-in is a South Korea attacking midfielder from Paris Saint-Germain who adds elite ball security, left-footed creation, and set-piece delivery.
Lee Kang-in.note: Lee Kang-in is Korea's cleanest creator, able to protect the ball and bend the final pass from crowded zones.
Lee Kang-in.noteZh: 李刚仁是韩国最细腻的创造者，能护住球，并在拥挤区域弯出最后一传。

Leo Ostigard.name: Leo Ostigard
Leo Ostigard.summary: Leo Skiri Østigård (born 28 November 1999) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Serie A club Genoa and the Norway national team.
Leo Ostigard.note: Norway's aggressive centre-back, bringing edge, aerial contact, and set-piece threat.
Leo Ostigard.noteZh: 莱奥·厄斯蒂高是挪威积极型中卫，能带来强硬度、空中对抗和定位球威胁。

Liberato Cacace.name: Liberato Cacace
Liberato Cacace.summary: Liberato Gianpaolo Cacace ( kə-KAH-chee; born 27 September 2000) is a New Zealand professional footballer who plays as a left-back for EFL Championship club Wrexham and the New Zealand national team.
Liberato Cacace.note: Cacace is New Zealand's left-side engine, driving forward while still covering the recovery lane.
Liberato Cacace.noteZh: 卡卡切是新西兰左路发动机，能向前推进，也能覆盖回追线路。

Lionel Messi.name: Lionel Messi
Lionel Messi.summary: Lionel Andrés "Leo" Messi (born 24 June 1987) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a forward for and captains both Major League Soccer club Inter Miami and the Argentina national team.
Lionel Messi.note: Messi remains Argentina's central problem-solver, turning small pockets into the pass or shot others cannot see.
Lionel Messi.noteZh: 梅西仍是阿根廷中路解题者，能把狭小空间变成别人看不到的传球或射门。

Livano Comenencia.name: Livano Comenencia
Livano Comenencia.summary: Livano Shyron Liomar Comenencia (born 3 February 2004) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Swiss Super League club Zürich. Born in the Netherlands, he plays for the Curaçao national team.
Livano Comenencia.note: Curaçao's young right-back engine, giving them forward support and enough recovery speed behind it.
Livano Comenencia.noteZh: 利瓦诺·科梅嫩西亚是库拉索年轻右后卫发动机，能提供前插支援，并有足够回追速度补身后。

Luis Chavez.name: Luis Chavez
Luis Chavez.summary: Luis Gerardo Chávez Magallón (born 15 January 1996) is a Mexican professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Russian Premier League club Dynamo Moscow and the Mexico national team.
Luis Chavez.note: Mexico's left-footed launcher, valuable for diagonal passing, long-range shots, and dead-ball delivery.
Luis Chavez.noteZh: 路易斯·查韦斯是墨西哥左脚发射器，斜传、远射和定位球传球都很有价值。

Luis Diaz.name: Luis Diaz
Luis Diaz.summary: Luis Fernando Díaz Marulanda (born 13 January 1997) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder and winger for Bundesliga club Bayern Munich and the Colombia national team.
Luis Diaz.note: Díaz is Colombia's main isolation threat, turning the left wing into shots and cutbacks.
Luis Diaz.noteZh: 路易斯·迪亚斯是哥伦比亚主要一对一威胁，能把左路变成射门和倒三角。

Luis Romo.name: Luis Romo
Luis Romo.summary: Luis Francisco Romo Barrón (Spanish pronunciation: [luˈis fɾansˈisko ɾɾˈomo baɾɾˈon]; born 5 June 1995) is a Mexican professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder or centre-back for Liga MX club Guadalajara and the Mexico national team.
Luis Romo.note: Mexico's hybrid midfielder, able to cover defensive gaps, step into duels, and arrive late around the box.
Luis Romo.noteZh: 路易斯·罗莫是墨西哥混合型中场，能补防空当、进入对抗，并后插上到禁区周围。

Luis Suarez.name: Luis Suarez
Luis Suarez.summary: Luis Javier Suárez Charris (born 2 December 1997) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Primeira Liga club Sporting CP and the Colombia national team.
Luis Suarez.note: Suárez gives Colombia another penalty-box runner, sharp when service comes early behind the line.
Luis Suarez.noteZh: 苏亚雷斯给哥伦比亚另一名禁区跑动点，当传球早早打到防线身后时很敏锐。

Luka Modric.name: Luka Modric
Luka Modric.summary: Luka Modrić (Croatian pronunciation: [lûːka mǒːdritɕ]; born 9 September 1985) is a Croatian professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Serie A club AC Milan and captains the Croatia national team.
Luka Modric.note: Modrić is still Croatia's rhythm keeper, turning pressure into calm and then into the next angle.
Luka Modric.noteZh: 莫德里奇仍是克罗地亚节奏守护者，能把压力转成冷静，再转成下一条线路。

Lyle Foster.name: Lyle Foster
Lyle Foster.summary: Lyle Brent Foster (born 3 September 2000) is a South African professional soccer player who plays as a forward for EFL Championship club Burnley and the South Africa national team.
Lyle Foster.note: South Africa's highest-profile forward, running channels, holding up direct balls, and carrying the main scoring burden.
Lyle Foster.noteZh: 莱尔·福斯特是南非最受关注的前锋，能冲击通道、背身拿住直传，并承担主要进球责任。

Manuel Akanji.name: Manuel Akanji
Manuel Akanji.summary: Manuel Obafemi Akanji (Swiss Standard German pronunciation: [ˈmaː.nu.ɛl aˈkan.dʒi]; born 19 July 1995) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a defender for Serie A club Inter Milan, on loan from Premier League club Manchester City, and the...
Manuel Akanji.club: Inter Milan (on loan from Manchester City)
Manuel Akanji.note: Manuel Akanji anchors Switzerland's back line with recovery pace, duels, and the calm first pass that starts attacks.
Manuel Akanji.noteZh: 曼努埃尔·阿坎吉用回追速度、对抗和冷静的第一脚传球支撑瑞士后防，并开启进攻。

Marcel Sabitzer.name: Marcel Sabitzer
Marcel Sabitzer.summary: Marcel Sabitzer (born 17 March 1994) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Bundesliga club Borussia Dortmund and the Austria national team.
Marcel Sabitzer.note: Sabitzer gives Austria midfield punch, especially through set pieces, late runs, and shots from range.
Marcel Sabitzer.noteZh: 萨比策给奥地利中场冲击，尤其体现在定位球、后插上和远射。

Marcus Holmgren Pedersen.name: Marcus Holmgren Pedersen
Marcus Holmgren Pedersen.summary: Marcus Holmgren Pedersen (born 16 July 2000) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Serie A club Torino and the Norway national team.
Marcus Holmgren Pedersen.note: Norway's right-back speed outlet, useful for overlap bursts and chasing transitions.
Marcus Holmgren Pedersen.noteZh: 马库斯·霍姆格伦·佩德森是挪威右后卫速度出口，适合突然套边和追赶转换。

Marcus Rashford.name: Marcus Rashford
Marcus Rashford.summary: Marcus Rashford (born 31 October 1997) is an English professional footballer who plays as a forward for La Liga club Barcelona, on loan from Premier League club Manchester United, and the England national team.
Marcus Rashford.club: Barcelona (on loan from Manchester United F.C., Manchester United)
Marcus Rashford.note: Rashford gives England vertical threat, stretching the back line before the pass is played.
Marcus Rashford.noteZh: 拉什福德给英格兰纵向威胁，在传球送出前就能拉扯防线。

Marko Arnautovic.name: Marko Arnautovic
Marko Arnautovic.summary: Marko Arnautović (Serbian Cyrillic: Марко Арнаутовић; born 19 April 1989) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a striker for Serbian SuperLiga club Red Star Belgrade and the Austria national team.
Marko Arnautovic.note: Arnautović gives Austria a veteran focal point, able to pin defenders and finish direct service.
Marko Arnautovic.noteZh: 阿瑙托维奇给奥地利老练支点，能牵制后卫并终结直接输送。

Martin Baturina.name: Martin Baturina
Martin Baturina.summary: Martin Baturina (born 16 February 2003) is a professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Serie A club Como. Born in Switzerland, he plays for the Croatia national team.
Martin Baturina.note: Baturina gives Croatia a young creator who can receive between lines and quicken the attack.
Martin Baturina.noteZh: 巴图里纳给克罗地亚年轻创造者，能在两线之间接球并加快进攻。

Martin Odegaard.name: Martin Odegaard
Martin Odegaard.summary: Martin Ødegaard (Norwegian pronunciation: [ˈmɑ̀ʈːɪn ˈø̀ːdəˌɡoːɾ]; born 17 December 1998) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for and captains both Premier League club Arsenal and the Norway national team.
Martin Odegaard.note: Norway's captain and creative brain, shaping the timing of attacks before the killer pass.
Martin Odegaard.noteZh: 马丁·厄德高是挪威队长和创造大脑，在致命传球前塑造进攻时机。

Mateo Kovacic.name: Mateo Kovacic
Mateo Kovacic.summary: Mateo Kovačić (Croatian pronunciation: [matěo kǒʋatʃitɕ]; born 6 May 1994) is a professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Premier League club Manchester City and the Croatia national team.
Mateo Kovacic.note: Kovačić lets Croatia escape pressure by carrying through the first challenge.
Mateo Kovacic.noteZh: 科瓦契奇让克罗地亚能通过带球穿过第一下对抗来摆脱压力。

Matheus Cunha.name: Matheus Cunha
Matheus Cunha.summary: Matheus Santos Carneiro da Cunha (Brazilian Portuguese: [maˈtews ˈkũ.ɲɐ], born 27 May 1999) is a Brazilian professional footballer who plays as a forward, attacking midfielder, or winger for Premier League club Manchester United and the Brazil national team.
Matheus Cunha.note: Brazil's roaming forward, linking with wide runners, carrying through central gaps, and arriving in the box at awkward angles.
Matheus Cunha.noteZh: 马特乌斯·库尼亚是巴西游动型前锋，能和边路跑动点衔接、从中路空当推进，并以刁钻角度进入禁区。

Mathew Ryan.name: Mathew Ryan
Mathew Ryan.summary: Mathew David Ryan (born 8 April 1992) is an Australian professional soccer player who currently plays as a goalkeeper for La Liga club Levante and captains the Australia national team.
Mathew Ryan.note: Australia's captain in goal, trusted for organization, reflex saves, and composed restarts.
Mathew Ryan.noteZh: 马修·瑞安是澳大利亚门线上的队长，组织、防守反应扑救和冷静重新发起进攻都值得信任。

Matias Galarza.name: Matias Galarza
Matias Galarza.summary: Matías Galarza Fonda (born 11 February 2002) is a Paraguayan professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Argentinian club River Plate and the Paraguay national team.
Matias Galarza.club: Atlanta United (on loan from River Plate)
Matias Galarza.note: Paraguay's high-intensity midfielder, useful for pressing forward and driving through contact.
Matias Galarza.noteZh: 马蒂亚斯·加拉萨是巴拉圭高强度中场，适合向前压迫并带球穿过对抗。

Mattias Svanberg.name: Mattias Svanberg
Mattias Svanberg.summary: Mattias Olof Svanberg (born 5 January 1999) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for 2. Bundesliga club VfL Wolfsburg and the Sweden national team.
Mattias Svanberg.note: Sweden's two-way midfielder, useful for balancing possession with late runs and shooting threat.
Mattias Svanberg.noteZh: 马蒂亚斯·斯万贝里是瑞典双向中场，能用后插上和射门威胁平衡控球。

Mauricio.name: Mauricio
Mauricio.summary: Maurício Magalhães Prado (born 22 June 2001), simply known as Maurício, is a professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or right midfielder for Série A club Palmeiras. Born in Brazil, he plays for the Paraguay national team.
Mauricio.note: Paraguay's between-lines option, useful for turning possession into final passes and late box runs.
Mauricio.noteZh: 毛里西奥是巴拉圭线间选择，能把控球转化为最后一传和后插上禁区跑动。

Maxi Araujo.name: Maxi Araujo
Maxi Araujo.summary: Maximiliano Javier Araújo Vilches (born 15 February 2000) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a left-winger or left-back for Primeira Liga club Sporting CP and the Uruguay national team.
Maxi Araujo.note: Araújo gives Uruguay vertical speed on the left, with the timing to arrive as a scorer rather than only a crosser.
Maxi Araujo.noteZh: 阿劳霍给乌拉圭左路带来纵向速度，也有作为得分点而不只是传中手的到位时机。

Mehdi Taremi.name: Mehdi Taremi
Mehdi Taremi.summary: Mehdi Taremi (born 18 July 1992) is an Iranian professional footballer who plays as a striker for Super League Greece club Olympiacos and the Iran national team.
Mehdi Taremi.note: Taremi is Iran's craftiest scorer, mixing clever layoffs with ruthless penalty-area timing.
Mehdi Taremi.noteZh: 塔雷米是伊朗最有技巧的得分手，既能巧妙做球，也有冷酷的禁区时机。

Michael Murillo.name: Michael Murillo
Michael Murillo.summary: Michael Amir Murillo Bermúdez (born 11 February 1996) is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Süper Lig club Beşiktaş and the Panama national team.
Michael Murillo.note: Murillo is Panama's powerful right-back, dangerous when his overlaps become box arrivals.
Michael Murillo.noteZh: 穆里略是巴拿马强力右后卫，当套边变成禁区到位时很危险。

Michael Olise.name: Michael Olise
Michael Olise.summary: Michael Akpovie Olise (; o-LEE-say; Urhobo: [à.k͡pɔ̀.vjɛ̀ ɔ̀.lí.sɛ̀]; French: [maikəl olisɛ]; born 12 December 2001) is a French professional footballer who plays as a winger or attacking midfielder for Bundesliga club Bayern Munich.
Michael Olise.note: France's left-footed right-side creator, dangerous when he pauses, cuts inside, and picks the final ball.
Michael Olise.noteZh: 迈克尔·奥利塞是法国左脚右路创造者，停顿、内切并选择最后一传时很危险。

Michal Sadilek.name: Michal Sadilek
Michal Sadilek.summary: Michal Sadílek (Czech pronunciation: [ˈmɪxal ˈsaɟiːlɛk]; born 31 May 1999) is a Czech professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Czech First League club Slavia Prague and the Czech Republic national team.
Michal Sadilek.note: Czechia's balance midfielder, helping circulation with his left foot and adding pressing work around second balls.
Michal Sadilek.noteZh: 米哈尔·萨迪莱克是捷克平衡型中场，能用左脚帮助传导，并围绕第二落点增加压迫。

Miguel Almiron.name: Miguel Almiron
Miguel Almiron.summary: Miguel Ángel Almirón Rejala (born 10 February 1994) is a Paraguayan professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or right winger for Major League Soccer club Atlanta United and the Paraguay national team.
Miguel Almiron.note: Paraguay's transition accelerator, dangerous when he drives inside from the right at retreating defenders.
Miguel Almiron.noteZh: 米格尔·阿尔米隆是巴拉圭转换加速器，从右路内切冲击后退防守者时很危险。

Mikel Oyarzabal.name: Mikel Oyarzabal
Mikel Oyarzabal.summary: Mikel Oyarzabal Ugarte (born 21 April 1997) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a forward for La Liga club Real Sociedad, which he captains, and the Spain national team.
Mikel Oyarzabal.note: Oyarzabal is Spain's clever front-line fixer, finding small spaces and finishing with little fuss.
Mikel Oyarzabal.noteZh: 奥亚萨瓦尔是西班牙聪明的前场修补者，能找到小空间并利落完成终结。

Miro Muheim.name: Miro Muheim
Miro Muheim.summary: Miro Max Maria Muheim (born 24 March 1998) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Bundesliga club Hamburger SV and the Switzerland national team.
Miro Muheim.note: Miro Muheim gives Switzerland a wide outlet, helping the team progress down the flank without losing defensive balance.
Miro Muheim.noteZh: 米罗·穆海姆为瑞士提供边路出球点，帮助球队沿边路推进，同时不失去防守平衡。

Mohamed Hany.name: Mohamed Hany
Mohamed Hany.summary: Mohamed Hany Gamal El-Demerdash (Arabic: محمد هاني جمال الدمرداش; born 2 February 1996) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Egyptian Premier League club Al Ahly and the Egypt national team.
Mohamed Hany.note: Hany is Egypt's steady right-back, balancing Salah-side support with the recovery run behind him.
Mohamed Hany.noteZh: 哈尼是埃及稳定右后卫，能平衡萨拉赫一侧的支援和身后的回追。

Mohamed Manai.name: Mohamed Manai
Mohamed Manai.summary: Mohamed Naceur Manai (Arabic: محمد مناعي‎; born 25 October 2002) is a Qatari professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Qatar Stars League club Al-Shamal, on loan from Al-Sadd, and the Qatar national team.
Mohamed Manai.note: Qatar's defensive-midfield depth, useful for screening the back line, timing tackles, and offering safe outlets under pressure.
Mohamed Manai.noteZh: 穆罕默德·马奈是卡塔尔防守型中场深度，能保护后防线、把握抢断时机，并在压力下提供安全接应。

Mohamed Salah.name: Mohamed Salah
Mohamed Salah.summary: Mohamed Salah Hamed Mahrous Ghaly (born 15 June 1992) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a right winger or right midfielder. He captains the Egypt national team.
Mohamed Salah.note: Salah is Egypt's gravity source, bending the whole defense before he even receives the ball.
Mohamed Salah.noteZh: 萨拉赫是埃及的牵制核心，甚至在接球前就能让整条防线倾斜。

Mohammad Mohebbi.name: Mohammad Mohebbi
Mohammad Mohebbi.summary: Mohammad Mehdi Mohebi (Persian: محمدمهدی محبی; born 10 February 2000), known as Mehdi Mohebi, is an Iranian footballer who plays as a winger for Iranian club Sepahan in the Persian Gulf Pro League and the Iran national team.
Mohammad Mohebbi.note: Mohebbi is a direct runner for Iran, dangerous when counters open the far-post lane.
Mohammad Mohebbi.noteZh: 莫赫比是伊朗直接跑动点，反击打开后点线路时很危险。

Mohammed Al-Owais.name: Mohammed Al-Owais
Mohammed Al-Owais.summary: Mohammed Khalil Ibrahim Al-Owais (Arabic: مُحَمَّد خَلِيل إِبْرَاهِيم الْعُوَيْس; born 10 October 1991) is a Saudi Arabian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for the Al-Ula and the Saudi Arabia national team.
Mohammed Al-Owais.note: Saudi Arabia's battle-tested goalkeeper, trusted for sharp saves and big-match composure.
Mohammed Al-Owais.noteZh: 穆罕默德·奥韦斯是沙特久经考验的门将，敏捷扑救和大场面稳定性值得信任。

Moises Caicedo.name: Moises Caicedo
Moises Caicedo.summary: Moisés Isaac Caicedo Corozo (born 2 November 2001) is an Ecuadorian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Chelsea and the Ecuador national team.
Moises Caicedo.note: Ecuador's midfield engine, built to win duels, escape pressure, and stop counters before they become dangerous.
Moises Caicedo.noteZh: 莫伊塞斯·凯塞多是厄瓜多尔中场发动机，擅长赢下对抗、摆脱压力，并在反击变危险前将其截停。

Mostafa Zico.name: Mostafa Zico
Mostafa Zico.summary: Mostafa Mohamed Zaky Abdelraouf (Arabic: مصطفى محمد زكي عبد الرؤوف; born 27 April 1997), known as Mostafa Ziko, is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a left winger for Egyptian Premier League club Pyramids and the Egypt national team.
Mostafa Zico.note: Zico gives Egypt a direct wide scorer, dangerous when he attacks the far post instead of staying outside.
Mostafa Zico.noteZh: 齐科给埃及带来直接的边路得分点，冲击后点而不是留在外线时很危险。

Mousa Al-Taamari.name: Mousa Al-Taamari
Mousa Al-Taamari.summary: Musa Mohammad Sulaiman Al-Taamari (Arabic: مُوسى مُحَمَّد مُوسى سُلَيْمَان التَعمري; born 10 June 1997), also spelled as Mousa Al-Tamari, is a Jordanian professional footballer of Palestinian origin who plays as a right winger for Ligue 1 club Rennes and the...
Mousa Al-Taamari.note: Al-Taamari is Jordan's breakaway weapon, carrying counters at speed and turning isolated defenders into chances.
Mousa Al-Taamari.noteZh: 塔马里是约旦的反击武器，能高速推进反击，并把被孤立的防守者变成机会。

Nadhir Benbouali.name: Nadhir Benbouali
Nadhir Benbouali.summary: Ahmed Nadhir Benbouali (Arabic: أحمد نذير بن بوعلي; born 17 April 2000) is an Algerian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Nemzeti Bajnokság I club Győr and the Algeria national team.
Nadhir Benbouali.note: Benbouali gives Algeria forward depth, pressing defenders and attacking loose balls around the box.
Nadhir Benbouali.noteZh: 本布阿利给阿尔及利亚锋线深度，能压迫后卫并攻击禁区附近松散球。

Nathan Saliba.name: Nathan Saliba
Nathan Saliba.summary: Nathan-Dylan Saliba (born February 7, 2004) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays for Belgian Pro League club Anderlecht and the Canada national team.
Nathan Saliba.note: Nathan Saliba adds energy to Canada's midfield, contesting second balls and carrying play into better areas.
Nathan Saliba.noteZh: 内森·萨利巴为加拿大中场增加活力，能争抢第二落点，并把比赛带到更有利区域。

Nathaniel Brown.name: Nathaniel Brown
Nathaniel Brown.summary: Nathaniel Christopher Brown (born 16 June 2003) is a German professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Bundesliga club Eintracht Frankfurt and the Germany national team.
Nathaniel Brown.note: Germany's young left-back spark, offering forward support, quick recovery, and a fresher flank profile.
Nathaniel Brown.noteZh: 纳撒尼尔·布朗是德国年轻左后卫火花，能提供前插支援、快速回追和更有活力的边路选择。

Nestory Irankunda.name: Nestory Irankunda
Nestory Irankunda.summary: Nestory Irankunda (/nɛstəriː ɪrəŋkʊndɑ/ NEST-ər-EE ir-əng-KUN-da; Kirundi: [iɾaŋkunda]; born 9 February 2006) is a professional soccer player who plays as a winger for EFL Championship club Watford. Born in Tanzania, he plays for the Australia national team.
Nestory Irankunda.note: Australia's explosive wide threat, capable of turning one touch into a sprint or a violent shot.
Nestory Irankunda.noteZh: 内斯托里·伊兰昆达是澳大利亚爆发型边路威胁，能把一次触球变成冲刺或大力射门。

Neymar.name: Neymar
Neymar.summary: Neymar da Silva Santos Júnior (Brazilian Portuguese pronunciation: [nejˈmaʁ dɐ ˈsiwvɐ ˈsɐ̃tuz ˈʒuni.oʁ] ; born 5 February 1992), simply known as Neymar Júnior (shortened to Neymar Jr) or mononymously as Neymar, is a Brazilian professional footballer who plays...
Neymar.note: Brazil's late-game invention hub, drawing fouls, disguising final passes, and bending crowded attacks into one clean chance.
Neymar.noteZh: 内马尔是巴西比赛后段的创造核心，能制造犯规、隐藏最后一传，并把拥挤进攻拧成一次清晰机会。

Nico Schlotterbeck.name: Nico Schlotterbeck
Nico Schlotterbeck.summary: Nico Cédric Schlotterbeck (German pronunciation: [ˈniːko ˈʃlɔtɐˌbɛk]; born 1 December 1999) is a German professional footballer who plays primarily as a centre-back for Bundesliga club Borussia Dortmund and the Germany national team.
Nico Schlotterbeck.note: Germany's left-footed centre-back, valuable for stepping forward and passing through the first press.
Nico Schlotterbeck.noteZh: 尼科·施洛特贝克是德国左脚中卫，对前顶防守和穿过第一道压迫的传球很有价值。

Nico Williams.name: Nico Williams
Nico Williams.summary: Nicholas Williams Arthuer (born 12 July 2002) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a winger for La Liga club Athletic Bilbao and the Spain national team. He is recognised for his speed and dribbling skills.
Nico Williams.note: Nico stretches Spain's left side with raw speed, forcing help and opening cutback lanes.
Nico Williams.noteZh: 尼科用纯速度拉开西班牙左路，迫使对手协防并打开倒三角线路。

Nicolas Jackson.name: Nicolas Jackson
Nicolas Jackson.summary: Nicolas Jackson (born 20 June 2001) is a Senegalese professional footballer who plays as a striker and winger for Premier League club Chelsea, and the Senegal national team.
Nicolas Jackson.note: Senegal's restless striker, dangerous when he stretches centre-backs and attacks loose balls.
Nicolas Jackson.noteZh: 尼古拉斯·杰克逊是塞内加尔活跃中锋，拉扯中卫并冲击松散球时很危险。

Noah Sadiki.name: Noah Sadiki
Noah Sadiki.summary: Noah Junior Sadiki (born 17 December 2004) is a professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Premier League club Sunderland. Born in Belgium, he plays for the DR Congo national team.
Noah Sadiki.note: Sadiki gives DR Congo flexible midfield control, able to receive pressure and carry into space.
Noah Sadiki.noteZh: 萨迪基给刚果民主共和国灵活中场控制，能在压力下接球并带入空间。

Noor Al-Rawabdeh.name: Noor Al-Rawabdeh
Noor Al-Rawabdeh.summary: Noor Al-Deen Mahmoud Ali Al-Rawabdeh (Arabic: نُور الدِّيْن مَحمُود عَلِيّ الرَّوَّابدَة; born 24 February 1997) is a Jordanian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Malaysia Super League club Selangor and the Jordan national team.
Noor Al-Rawabdeh.note: Al-Rawabdeh gives Jordan midfield organization, keeping their counterattacking shape connected between clearances.
Noor Al-Rawabdeh.noteZh: 拉瓦布德给约旦中场组织，让反击阵型在解围之间保持衔接。

Nuno Mendes.name: Nuno Mendes
Nuno Mendes.summary: Nuno Alexandre Tavares Mendes (Portuguese pronunciation: [ˈnunu ˈmẽdɨʃ]; born 19 June 2002) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Ligue 1 club Paris Saint-Germain and the Portugal national team.
Nuno Mendes.note: Mendes gives Portugal elite left-side burst, carrying through pressure and recovering just as fast.
Nuno Mendes.noteZh: 努诺·门德斯给葡萄牙顶级左侧爆发，能带球穿压，也能同样快速回追。

Omar Marmoush.name: Omar Marmoush
Omar Marmoush.summary: Omar Khaled Mohamed Abdelsalam Marmoush (Egyptian Arabic: عمر خالد محمد عبد السلام مرموش; born 7 February 1999) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Premier League club Manchester City and the Egypt national team.
Omar Marmoush.note: Marmoush is Egypt's second-wave threat, flying off Salah's gravity and attacking unsettled defenders.
Omar Marmoush.noteZh: 马尔穆什是埃及第二波威胁，借萨拉赫的牵制启动并冲击未站稳的防守。

Omar Rekik.name: Omar Rekik
Omar Rekik.summary: Omar Rekik (Arabic: عمر رقيق; born 20 December 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Slovenian PrvaLiga club Maribor. Born in the Netherlands, he represents the Tunisia national team.
Omar Rekik.note: Tunisia's centre-back depth, giving them size, aerial cover, and another left-sided defensive option.
Omar Rekik.noteZh: 奥马尔·雷基克是突尼斯中卫深度选择，能提供身材、空中覆盖和另一名左侧防守选择。

Ousmane Dembele.name: Ousmane Dembele
Ousmane Dembele.summary: Masour Ousmane Dembélé (French pronunciation: [us.man dɛm.be.le]; born 15 May 1997) is a French professional footballer who plays as a forward or right winger for Ligue 1 club Paris Saint-Germain and the France national team.
Ousmane Dembele.note: France's two-footed chaos maker, able to unbalance a settled defense from either side.
Ousmane Dembele.noteZh: 奥斯曼·登贝莱是法国双脚混乱制造者，能从任一侧打乱已经站稳的防线。

Patrik Schick.name: Patrik Schick
Patrik Schick.summary: Patrik Schick (born 24 January 1996) is a Czech professional footballer who plays as a striker for Bundesliga club Bayer Leverkusen and the Czech Republic national team.
Patrik Schick.note: Czechia's headline finisher, dangerous with left-footed shots, clever box timing, and chances that barely look open.
Patrik Schick.noteZh: 帕特里克·希克是捷克头号终结者，左脚射门、禁区时机和半机会把握都很有威胁。

Pedri.name: Pedri
Pedri.summary: Pedro González López (born 25 November 2002), more commonly known as Pedri, is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for La Liga club Barcelona and the Spain national team. Pedri is considered one of the best midfielders in the world.
Pedri.note: Pedri is Spain's soft-touch controller, turning tight midfield spaces into cleaner attacking rhythm.
Pedri.noteZh: 佩德里是西班牙细腻的控场者，能把狭小中场空间转成更干净的进攻节奏。

Petar Musa.name: Petar Musa
Petar Musa.summary: Petar Musa (Croatian pronunciation: [pětar mûsa]; born 4 March 1998) is a Croatian professional footballer who plays as a striker for Major League Soccer club FC Dallas and the Croatia national team.
