Petar Musa.note: Musa gives Croatia another penalty-box forward, useful when the match turns toward crosses.
Petar Musa.noteZh: 穆萨给克罗地亚又一名禁区前锋，当比赛转向传中时很有用。

Piero Hincapie.name: Piero Hincapie
Piero Hincapie.summary: Piero Martín Hincapié Reyna (Spanish pronunciation: [ˈpjeɾo iŋkaˈpje]; born 9 January 2002) is an Ecuadorian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or left-back for Premier League club Arsenal, on loan from Bundesliga club Bayer Leverkusen, and the...
Piero Hincapie.note: Ecuador's left-footed defensive leader, comfortable at centre-back or left-back and calm passing out.
Piero Hincapie.noteZh: 皮耶罗·因卡皮耶是厄瓜多尔左脚防线领袖，能踢中卫或左后卫，并冷静完成后场出球。

Rafael Leao.name: Rafael Leao
Rafael Leao.summary: Rafael "Rafa" Alexandre da Conceição Leão (Portuguese pronunciation: [ʁɐfɐˈɛl ˈljɐ̃w]; born 10 June 1999) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a left winger and forward for Serie A club AC Milan and the Portugal national team.
Rafael Leao.note: Leão gives Portugal a game-breaking left wing, devastating when he can run into open grass.
Rafael Leao.noteZh: 莱奥给葡萄牙能打破比赛的左翼，当他能冲进开阔空间时极具破坏力。

Ramin Rezaeian.name: Ramin Rezaeian
Ramin Rezaeian.summary: Ramin Rezaeian Semeskandi (born 21 March 1990) is an Iranian professional footballer who plays as a defender for Persian Gulf Pro League club Esteghlal and the Iran national team. He started his career as a right-back, but he often plays as a winger.
Ramin Rezaeian.note: Rezaeian gives Iran veteran right-side service, especially from early crosses and restarts.
Ramin Rezaeian.noteZh: 雷扎扬给伊朗右路带来老练传递，尤其来自早传和定位球。

Raul Jimenez.name: Raul Jimenez
Raul Jimenez.summary: Raúl Alonso Jiménez Rodríguez (Latin American Spanish: [raˈul xiˈmenes]; born 5 May 1991) is a Mexican professional footballer who plays as a striker for EFL Championship club Wolverhampton Wanderers and the Mexico national team.
Raul Jimenez.note: Mexico's veteran striker reference, using hold-up craft, penalty-box timing, and experience to steady the front line.
Raul Jimenez.noteZh: 劳尔·希门尼斯是墨西哥老将锋线支点，能用背身技术、禁区时机和经验稳住前场。

Ritsu Doan.name: Ritsu Doan
Ritsu Doan.summary: Ritsu Dōan (堂安 律, Dōan Ritsu; born 16 June 1998) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a right winger for Bundesliga club Eintracht Frankfurt and the Japan national team.
Ritsu Doan.note: Japan's left-footed right-side weapon, dangerous when he cuts inside or shapes a restart.
Ritsu Doan.noteZh: 堂安律是日本右路左脚武器，内切或处理定位球时都很危险。

Riyad Mahrez.name: Riyad Mahrez
Riyad Mahrez.summary: Riyad Karim Mahrez (born 21 February 1991) is a professional footballer who plays as a right winger for Al-Ahli. Born in France, he captains the Algeria national team.
Riyad Mahrez.note: Mahrez remains Algeria's creative reference, shaping attacks with his left foot and calm final ball.
Riyad Mahrez.noteZh: 马赫雷斯仍是阿尔及利亚创造核心，用左脚和冷静最后一传塑造进攻。

Roberto Lopes.name: Roberto Lopes
Roberto Lopes.summary: Roberto Carlos Lopes (Portuguese: [ʀu.ˈbɛ.tu ˈkaɾ.luʒ ˈlɔpɨʃ]; born 17 June 1992), also known as Pico (Kabuverdianu: [ˈpi.ku]), is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Shamrock Rovers.
Roberto Lopes.note: Cabo Verde's veteran centre-back, trusted for aerial duels and organizing deep defensive spells.
Roberto Lopes.noteZh: 罗伯托·洛佩斯是佛得角老将中卫，空中对抗和组织深位防守阶段都值得信任。

Romano Schmid.name: Romano Schmid
Romano Schmid.summary: Romano Christian Schmid (born 27 January 2000) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Bundesliga club Werder Bremen and the Austria national team.
Romano Schmid.note: Schmid gives Austria short-touch creativity, useful when combinations have to open a narrow block.
Romano Schmid.noteZh: 施密德给奥地利短传创造力，当配合需要打开狭窄防线时很有用。

Romelu Lukaku.name: Romelu Lukaku
Romelu Lukaku.summary: Romelu Lukaku Bolingoli (Dutch pronunciation: [ˈroːmeːlu luˈkaːku]; born 13 May 1993) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a striker for Serie A club Napoli and the Belgium national team.
Romelu Lukaku.note: Lukaku is Belgium's penalty-box reference, still built to turn service into high-value shots.
Romelu Lukaku.noteZh: 卢卡库是比利时禁区支点，依然适合把传球转成高价值射门。

Ronald Araujo.name: Ronald Araujo
Ronald Araujo.summary: Ronald Federico Araújo da Silva (Spanish pronunciation: [roˈnald aɾaˈuxo]; born 7 March 1999) is an Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for La Liga club Barcelona, whom he captains, and the Uruguay national team.
Ronald Araujo.note: Araújo is Uruguay's emergency brake, able to defend huge spaces and still win the physical duel.
Ronald Araujo.noteZh: 罗纳德·阿劳霍是乌拉圭的紧急刹车，能防守大片空间并赢下身体对抗。

Ronwen Williams.name: Ronwen Williams
Ronwen Williams.summary: Ronwen Hayden Williams (born 21 January 1992) is a South African soccer player who plays as a goalkeeper for Premier Soccer League club Mamelodi Sundowns and captains the South Africa national team.
Ronwen Williams.note: South Africa's captain and goalkeeper anchor, trusted for penalty saves, distribution calm, and defensive command.
Ronwen Williams.noteZh: 龙文·威廉姆斯是南非队长和门将核心，点球扑救、冷静出球和防线指挥都值得信任。

Ruben Dias.name: Ruben Dias
Ruben Dias.summary: Rúben dos Santos Gato Alves Dias (born 14 May 1997) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Premier League club Manchester City and the Portugal national team. He is regarded as one of the best centre-backs in the world.
Ruben Dias.note: Dias gives Portugal defensive authority, organising the box and demanding clean details.
Ruben Dias.noteZh: 鲁本·迪亚斯给葡萄牙防守权威，能组织禁区并要求细节干净。

Ruben Vargas.name: Ruben Vargas
Ruben Vargas.summary: Rubén Estephan Vargas Martínez (born 5 August 1998) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a winger or attacking midfielder for Spanish La Liga club Sevilla and the Switzerland national team.
Ruben Vargas.note: Ruben Vargas gives Switzerland one-v-one threat from wide areas, turning settled attacks into sudden box entries.
Ruben Vargas.noteZh: 鲁本·巴尔加斯为瑞士在边路提供一对一威胁，把阵地进攻突然转化为禁区突破。

Rustamjon Ashurmatov.name: Rustamjon Ashurmatov
Rustamjon Ashurmatov.summary: Rustam Ashurmatov (Uzbek: Рустам Ашурматов; born 7 July 1996), sometimes spelt as Rustamjon Ashurmatov, is an Uzbek footballer who plays as a defender for Iranian club Esteghlal and the Uzbekistan national team.
Rustamjon Ashurmatov.note: Ashurmatov gives Uzbekistan centre-back authority, organising the line and winning first contacts.
Rustamjon Ashurmatov.noteZh: 阿舒尔马托夫给乌兹别克斯坦中卫权威，能组织防线并赢下第一点。

Ryan Mendes.name: Ryan Mendes
Ryan Mendes.summary: Ryan Isaac Mendes da Graça (Portuguese: [ʀi.ˈɐ̃ i.ˈzak ˈmẽ.dɨʒ dɐ ˈɡɾa.sɐ]; born 8 January 1990) is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a winger for TFF 1. Lig club Iğdır and the Cape Verde national team.
Ryan Mendes.note: Cabo Verde's veteran attacker, useful for timing runs and finding pockets near goal.
Ryan Mendes.noteZh: 瑞安·门德斯是佛得角老将攻击手，适合掌握跑动时机并在门前附近找到空间。

Sadio Mane.name: Sadio Mane
Sadio Mane.summary: Sadio Mané (born 10 April 1992) is a Senegalese professional footballer who plays as a left winger for Saudi Pro League club Al-Nassr and the Senegal national team.
Sadio Mane.note: Senegal's attacking reference point, still valuable for movement, timing, and decisive box touches.
Sadio Mane.noteZh: 萨迪奥·马内是塞内加尔进攻参照点，在跑动、时机和禁区关键触球上依然很有价值。

Salem Al-Dawsari.name: Salem Al-Dawsari
Salem Al-Dawsari.summary: Salem Mohammed Shafi Al-Dawsari (Arabic: سَالِم مُحَمَّد شَافِي الدَّوْسَرِيّ; born 19 August 1991) is a Saudi Arabian professional footballer who plays as a left winger and captains both Saudi Pro League club Al-Hilal and the Saudi Arabia national team.
Salem Al-Dawsari.note: Saudi Arabia's decisive wide attacker, dangerous when he carries inside and turns possession into a shot.
Salem Al-Dawsari.noteZh: 萨勒姆·达乌萨里是沙特关键边路攻击手，内切带球并把控球转化为射门时很危险。

Saman Ghoddos.name: Saman Ghoddos
Saman Ghoddos.summary: Saman Ghoddos (Persian: سامان قدّوس; born 6 September 1993), known as Seyed Saman Ghoddoos in Iran, is a professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or striker for the Iran national team and Kalba in UAE Pro League.
Saman Ghoddos.note: Ghoddos is Iran's connective creator, finding final passes without needing much space.
Saman Ghoddos.noteZh: 古多斯是伊朗连接型创造者，不需要太多空间就能找到最后一传。

Santiago Gimenez.name: Santiago Gimenez
Santiago Gimenez.summary: Santiago Tomás “Santi” Giménez Zolotarchuk (Spanish pronunciation: [sanˈtjaɣo toˈmas xiˈmenes]; born 18 April 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a striker for Serie A club AC Milan. Born in Argentina, he represents the Mexico national team.
Santiago Gimenez.note: Mexico's prime-age No. 9, built for penalty-box movement, first-time finishes, and carrying the main scoring burden.
Santiago Gimenez.noteZh: 圣地亚哥·希门尼斯是墨西哥黄金年龄九号位，擅长禁区跑动、第一时间射门，并承担主要进球责任。

Sarpreet Singh.name: Sarpreet Singh
Sarpreet Singh.summary: Sarpreet Singh (born 20 February 1999) is a New Zealand professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for A-League Men club Wellington Phoenix, on loan from Serbian SuperLiga club TSC and the New Zealand national team.
Sarpreet Singh.note: Singh is New Zealand's creative connector, useful when possession needs a sharper final pass.
Sarpreet Singh.noteZh: 辛格是新西兰创造型连接点，当控球需要更犀利的最后一传时很有用。

Scott McTominay.name: Scott McTominay
Scott McTominay.summary: Scott Francis McTominay (born 8 December 1996) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie A club Napoli. Born in England, he plays for the Scotland national team.
Scott McTominay.note: Scotland's power midfielder, turning late box runs, long-range shots, and physical duels into their clearest attacking surges.
Scott McTominay.noteZh: 斯科特·麦克托米奈是苏格兰力量型中场，能把后插上、远射和身体对抗转化为最直接的进攻冲击。

Sead Kolasinac.name: Sead Kolasinac
Sead Kolasinac.summary: Sead Kolašinac (pronounced [sěad kolaʃîːnats]; born 20 June 1993) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Serie A club Atalanta. Born in Germany, he plays for the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Sead Kolasinac.note: Bosnia's powerful left-sided defender, giving them duel strength, recovery cover, and the ability to carry out of pressure.
Sead Kolasinac.noteZh: 塞亚德·科拉希纳茨是波黑强力左侧后卫，能提供对抗强度、回追保护，并带球摆脱压力。

Simon Adingra.name: Simon Adingra
Simon Adingra.summary: Simon Adingra (born 1 January 2002) is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a winger for Ligue 1 club Monaco, on loan from Premier League club Sunderland, and the Ivory Coast national team.
Simon Adingra.note: Côte d'Ivoire's isolation winger, excellent at attacking a full-back and turning the byline into cutbacks.
Simon Adingra.noteZh: 西蒙·阿丁格拉是科特迪瓦一对一边锋，擅长冲击边后卫并把底线位置转化为倒三角传球。

Son Heung-min.name: Son Heung-min
Son Heung-min.summary: Son Heung-min is South Korea's captain and Los Angeles FC forward, giving the national team elite movement, two-footed finishing, and transition threat.
Son Heung-min.note: South Korea's captain and main shot threat, still most dangerous when he can sprint into space behind defenders.
Son Heung-min.noteZh: 孙兴慜是韩国队长和主要射门威胁，在能冲到后卫身后空间时依然最危险。

Stephen Eustaquio.name: Stephen Eustaquio
Stephen Eustaquio.summary: Stephen Antunes Eustáquio ( STEF-ən; born 21 December 1996) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a midfielder for Major League Soccer club Los Angeles FC, on loan from Primeira Liga club Porto, and vice-captains the Canada national team.
Stephen Eustaquio.club: Los Angeles FC (on loan from Porto)
Stephen Eustaquio.note: Stephen Eustáquio gives Canada midfield calm, setting the tempo and finding passes that move pressure into the final third.
Stephen Eustaquio.noteZh: 斯蒂芬·欧斯塔基奥为加拿大中场带来冷静，能控制节奏，并找到把压力推进到进攻三区的传球。

Tahith Chong.name: Tahith Chong
Tahith Chong.summary: Tahith Jose Girigorio Djorkaef Chong (born 4 December 1999) is a Curaçaoan professional footballer who plays as a wide midfielder or attacking midfielder for EFL Championship club Sheffield United and the Curaçao national team.
Tahith Chong.note: Curaçao's high-profile winger, bringing left-footed carries, positional flexibility, and top-league experience.
Tahith Chong.noteZh: 塔希特·钟是库拉索最受关注的边锋，能带来左脚推进、位置灵活性和顶级联赛经验。

Takefusa Kubo.name: Takefusa Kubo
Takefusa Kubo.summary: Takefusa Kubo (born 4 June 2001), commonly known as Take Kubo, is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a right winger for La Liga club Real Sociedad and the Japan national team.
Takefusa Kubo.note: Japan's highest-upside creator, able to unbalance a block with one dribble or a disguised final pass.
Takefusa Kubo.noteZh: 久保建英是日本上限最高的创造者，能用一次盘带或隐蔽的最后一传打乱防线。

Teboho Mokoena.name: Teboho Mokoena
Teboho Mokoena.summary: Teboho Mokoena (born 24 January 1997) is a South African professional soccer player who plays as a midfielder for Premiership side Mamelodi Sundowns and the South Africa national team.
Teboho Mokoena.note: South Africa's midfield reference point, dangerous from range and important for set pieces and tempo.
Teboho Mokoena.noteZh: 特博霍·莫科纳是南非中场参照点，远射有威胁，也对定位球和节奏很重要。

Thomas Partey.name: Thomas Partey
Thomas Partey.summary: Thomas Teye Partey (born 13 June 1993) is a Ghanaian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for La Liga club Villarreal and the Ghana national team.
Thomas Partey.note: Partey gives Ghana their midfield reference, screening counters and turning recoveries into forward passes.
Thomas Partey.noteZh: 托马斯·帕尔特伊给加纳中场基准点，能保护反击路线，并把夺回球权变成向前传球。

Tomas Soucek.name: Tomas Soucek
Tomas Soucek.summary: Tomáš Souček (Czech pronunciation: [ˈtomaːʃ ˈsoutʃɛk]; born 27 February 1995) is a Czech professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for EFL Championship club West Ham United and the Czech Republic national team.
Tomas Soucek.note: Czechia's aerial midfield force, built for late box runs, set-piece pressure, and turning direct play into chances.
Tomas Soucek.noteZh: 托马什·绍切克是捷克空中型中场力量，擅长后插上进禁区、定位球压迫，并把直接打法转化为机会。

Trezeguet.name: Trezeguet
Trezeguet.summary: Mahmoud Ahmed Ibrahim Hassan (Arabic: محمود أحمد إبراهيم حسن; born 1 October 1994), commonly known as Trézéguet (Arabic: تريزيجيه), is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a left winger for Egyptian Premier League club Al Ahly and the Egypt...
Trezeguet.note: Trezeguet is Egypt's experienced left-side scorer, always looking to arrive when Salah draws attention.
Trezeguet.noteZh: 特雷泽盖是埃及经验型左侧得分手，总会在萨拉赫吸引注意时寻找到位机会。

Tyler Adams.name: Tyler Adams
Tyler Adams.summary: Tyler Shaan Adams (born February 14, 1999) is an American professional soccer player who plays for Premier League club Bournemouth and the United States national team.
Tyler Adams.note: United States' midfield alarm bell, built to stop counters early and organize the press around him.
Tyler Adams.noteZh: 泰勒·亚当斯是美国中场警报器，负责提前阻断反击并组织身边的压迫。

Viktor Gyokeres.name: Viktor Gyokeres
Viktor Gyokeres.summary: Viktor Einar Gyökeres (Swedish: [ˈvɪ̌kːtɔr ˈjø̂ːkɛrɛs]; born 4 June 1998) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a striker for Premier League club Arsenal and the Sweden national team.
Viktor Gyokeres.note: Sweden's power striker, able to carry through contact and finish chances before defenders settle.
Viktor Gyokeres.noteZh: 维克托·哲凯赖什是瑞典力量型中锋，能带球穿过对抗并在后卫站稳前完成终结。

Vinicius Junior.name: Vinicius Junior
Vinicius Junior.summary: Vinícius José Paixão de Oliveira Júnior (Brazilian Portuguese: [viˈni.sjuz ʒoˈzɛ pajˈʃɐ̃w̃ dʒi oliˈvej.ɾɐ ˈʒu.njoʁ]; born 12 July 2000), commonly known as Vinícius Júnior or Vini Jr., is a Brazilian professional footballer who plays as a forward for La Liga...
Vinicius Junior.note: Brazil's main isolation weapon, stretching the left side with explosive dribbles, transition runs, and sharp finishes after contact.
Vinicius Junior.noteZh: 维尼修斯·儒尼奥尔是巴西主要的一对一武器，能用爆发带球、转换冲刺，以及对抗后的敏锐终结拉开左路。

Virgil van Dijk.name: Virgil van Dijk
Virgil van Dijk.summary: Virgil van Dijk (Dutch pronunciation: [ˈvɪrdʑɪl vɑn ˈdɛik]; born 8 July 1991) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for and captains both Premier League club Liverpool and the Netherlands national team.
Virgil van Dijk.note: Netherlands' defensive captain, still the voice and aerial anchor of the back line.
Virgil van Dijk.noteZh: 维吉尔·范戴克是荷兰防守队长，仍然是防线声音和空中支柱。

Vitinha.name: Vitinha
Vitinha.summary: Vítor Machado Ferreira (born 13 February 2000), known as Vitinha (Portuguese pronunciation: [viˈtiɲɐ]), is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Ligue 1 club Paris Saint-Germain and the Portugal national team.
Vitinha.note: Vitinha gives Portugal elite midfield rhythm, escaping pressure and connecting attacks with short passes.
Vitinha.noteZh: 维蒂尼亚给葡萄牙顶级中场节奏，能摆脱压力并用短传衔接进攻。

Vozinha.name: Vozinha
Vozinha.summary: Vozinha is a Cabo Verde goalkeeper from Chaves who gives the national team veteran command, shot stopping, and tournament experience.
Vozinha.note: Cabo Verde's veteran goalkeeper, trusted for leadership and saves in crowded penalty areas.
Vozinha.noteZh: 沃齐尼亚是佛得角老将门将，领导力和拥挤禁区中的扑救都值得信任。

Weston McKennie.name: Weston McKennie
Weston McKennie.summary: Weston James Earl McKennie (born August 28, 1998) is an American professional soccer player who plays primarily as a midfielder for Serie A club Juventus and the United States national team.
Weston McKennie.note: United States' box-to-box force, dangerous when he arrives late or turns set pieces into messy chances.
Weston McKennie.noteZh: 韦斯顿·麦肯尼是美国双向中场力量点，后插上或把定位球变成混乱机会时很危险。

William Saliba.name: William Saliba
William Saliba.summary: William Alain André Gabriel Saliba (French: [wiljam saliba]; born 24 March 2001) is a French professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Premier League club Arsenal and the France national team.
William Saliba.note: France's calm defensive cornerstone, trusted to win duels without making the game look frantic.
William Saliba.noteZh: 威廉·萨利巴是法国冷静的防守基石，能赢下对抗而不让比赛显得慌乱。

Yasin Ayari.name: Yasin Ayari
Yasin Ayari.summary: Yasin Ayari (Arabic: ياسين عباس عياري; born 6 October 2003) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Brighton & Hove Albion and the Sweden national team.
Yasin Ayari.note: Sweden's progressive midfield carrier, useful for escaping pressure and supporting attacks around the box.
Yasin Ayari.noteZh: 亚辛·阿亚里是瑞典推进型中场，适合摆脱压力并在禁区周围支援进攻。

Yoane Wissa.name: Yoane Wissa
Yoane Wissa.summary: Yoane Wissa (born 3 September 1996) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward or left winger for Premier League club Newcastle United. Born in France, he plays for the DR Congo national team.
Yoane Wissa.note: Wissa gives DR Congo Premier League sharpness, pressing hard and attacking the box from the left.
Yoane Wissa.noteZh: 维萨给刚果民主共和国英超级别的锐度，能强力压迫并从左侧攻击禁区。

Zidane Iqbal.name: Zidane Iqbal
Zidane Iqbal.summary: Zidane Aamar Iqbal (Arabic: زيدان عمار إقبال; Urdu: زیدان عمار اقبال; born 27 April 2003) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Eredivisie club Utrecht. Born in England, he plays for the Iraq national team.
Zidane Iqbal.note: Iraq's technical midfield carrier, able to receive under pressure and move play forward.
Zidane Iqbal.noteZh: 齐达内·伊克巴尔是伊拉克技术型中场推进者，能在压力下接球并把比赛向前推进。

Ante Budimir.name: Ante Budimir
Ante Budimir.summary: Ante Budimir (Croatian pronunciation: [ǎːnte bûdimiːr]; born 22 July 1991) is a professional footballer who plays as a striker for La Liga club Osasuna. Born in Bosnia and Herzegovina, he plays for the Croatia national team.
Ante Budimir.note: Budimir is Croatia's penalty-box reference, strongest when service arrives early and high.
Ante Budimir.noteZh: 布迪米尔是克罗地亚禁区支点，早传和高球送到时最强。

Ardon Jashari.name: Ardon Jashari
Ardon Jashari.summary: Ardon Jashari (born 30 July 2002) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Serie A club AC Milan and the Switzerland national team.
Ardon Jashari.note: Ardon Jashari gives Switzerland a press-resistant midfield outlet, helping them keep the ball moving when opponents squeeze the center.
Ardon Jashari.noteZh: 阿尔东·贾沙里为瑞士提供抗压的中场出球点，帮助球队在对手压缩中路时继续流畅推进。

Aurele Amenda.name: Aurele Amenda
Aurele Amenda.summary: Aurèle Florian Amenda (born 31 July 2003) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Bundesliga club Eintracht Frankfurt and the Switzerland national team.
Aurele Amenda.note: Aurèle Amenda gives Switzerland another calm centre-back option, useful when they need fresh legs without losing build-up security.
Aurele Amenda.noteZh: 奥雷勒·阿门达为瑞士增加一名冷静的中卫选择，在球队需要换上新鲜体能但仍保持后场组织安全时很有价值。

Cedric Itten.name: Cedric Itten
Cedric Itten.summary: Cedric Jan Itten (born 27 December 1996) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a centre forward for German 3. Liga club Fortuna Düsseldorf and the Switzerland national team. He will join Bundesliga club Werder Bremen on 1 July 2026.
Cedric Itten.note: Cedric Itten gives Switzerland a penalty-area striker who can attack crosses and keep centre-backs occupied late in games.
Cedric Itten.noteZh: 塞德里克·伊滕为瑞士提供禁区型前锋，能够冲击传中，并在比赛后段持续牵制中卫。

Christian Fassnacht.name: Christian Fassnacht
Christian Fassnacht.summary: Christian Andreas Fassnacht (born 11 November 1993) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a right winger for Swiss Super League club Young Boys and the Switzerland national team.
Christian Fassnacht.note: Christian Fassnacht gives Switzerland a disciplined attacking runner, arriving from midfield zones to add numbers around the box.
Christian Fassnacht.noteZh: 克里斯蒂安·法斯纳赫特为瑞士提供纪律性很强的进攻跑动，从中场区域前插，为禁区周围增加人数。

Dan Ndoye.name: Dan Ndoye
Dan Ndoye.summary: Dan Assane Ndoye (born 25 October 2000) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as winger for Premier League club Nottingham Forest and the Switzerland national team.
Dan Ndoye.note: Dan Ndoye brings Switzerland vertical speed, stretching the back line and turning transitions into immediate danger.
Dan Ndoye.noteZh: 丹·恩多耶为瑞士带来纵向速度，拉伸对方防线，并把转换进攻变成即时威胁。

Denis Zakaria.name: Denis Zakaria
Denis Zakaria.summary: Denis Lemi Zakaria Lako Lado (born 20 November 1996) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Ligue 1 club Monaco, whom he captains, and the Switzerland national team.
Denis Zakaria.note: Denis Zakaria gives Switzerland ball-winning range in midfield, closing space quickly and carrying play out of pressure.
Denis Zakaria.noteZh: 丹尼斯·扎卡里亚为瑞士提供覆盖范围很大的中场抢断能力，能快速封锁空间并带球摆脱压力。

Djibril Sow.name: Djibril Sow
Djibril Sow.summary: Mohameth Djibril Ibrahima Sow (born 6 February 1997) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for La Liga club Sevilla and the Switzerland national team.
Djibril Sow.note: Djibril Sow helps Switzerland stabilize the middle, linking defensive recoveries to cleaner forward passes.
Djibril Sow.noteZh: 吉布里尔·索乌帮助瑞士稳住中场，把防守夺回球权衔接成更干净的向前传球。

Eray Coemert.name: Eray Coemert
Eray Coemert.summary: Eray Ervin Cömert (born 4 February 1998) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Spanish club Valencia and the Switzerland national team.
Eray Coemert.note: Eray Cömert gives Switzerland a sturdy centre-back option, useful for protecting the box and restarting attacks with simple passes.
Eray Coemert.noteZh: 埃赖·居梅尔特为瑞士提供稳健的中卫选择，适合保护禁区，并用简洁传球重新发起进攻。

Fabian Rieder.name: Fabian Rieder
Fabian Rieder.summary: Fabian Rieder (born 16 February 2002) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for German Bundesliga club FC Augsburg and the Switzerland national team.
Fabian Rieder.note: Fabian Rieder gives Switzerland a creative set-piece and final-pass option when they need one cleaner action near the box.
Fabian Rieder.noteZh: 法比安·里德为瑞士提供定位球和最后一传的创造力，在球队需要禁区附近一次更干净处理时很关键。

Gregor Kobel.name: Gregor Kobel
Gregor Kobel.summary: Gregor Kobel (born 6 December 1997) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Bundesliga club Borussia Dortmund and the Switzerland national team.
Gregor Kobel.note: Gregor Kobel gives Switzerland elite shot-stopping behind the block, keeping them alive when pressure reaches their box.
Gregor Kobel.noteZh: 格雷戈尔·科贝尔为瑞士防线身后提供顶级扑救能力，在压力进入禁区时帮助球队保住比赛。

Hassan Alhaydos.name: Hassan Alhaydos
Hassan Alhaydos.summary: Hassan Khalid Hassan Al-Haydos (Arabic: حَسَن خَالِد حَسَن الْهَيْدُوس; born 11 December 1990) is a Qatari professional footballer who plays as a forward for and captains Qatar Stars League club Al Sadd and the Qatar national team.
Hassan Alhaydos.note: Qatar's veteran attacking leader, useful for calm final passes, set-piece delivery, and late runs into scoring spots.
Hassan Alhaydos.noteZh: 哈桑·海多斯是卡塔尔经验丰富的进攻领袖，能提供冷静的最后一传、定位球输送，以及后插上进入得分位置的跑动。

Kerim Alajbegovic.name: Kerim Alajbegovic
Kerim Alajbegovic.summary: Kerim Alajbegović (pronounced [kěrim alajbêːgoʋitɕ]; born 21 September 2007) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger for Austrian Bundesliga club Red Bull Salzburg.
Kerim Alajbegovic.note: Bosnia's teenage winger, useful for sudden acceleration, cutting inside from the flank, and adding invention around the box.
Kerim Alajbegovic.noteZh: 克里姆·阿拉伊贝戈维奇是波黑年轻边锋，能突然加速、从边路内切，并在禁区周围增加创造力。

Lenny Joseph.name: Lenny Joseph
Lenny Joseph.summary: Lenny Joseph (born 12 October 2000) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Hungarian club Ferencváros. Born in France, he plays for the Haiti national team.
Lenny Joseph.note: Haiti's mobile centre-forward, attacking channels, pressing loose touches, and finishing quickly when space appears.
Lenny Joseph.noteZh: 莱尼·约瑟夫是海地机动中锋，能冲击通道、压迫松散触球，并在空间出现时快速终结。

Luca Jaquez.name: Luca Jaquez
Luca Jaquez.summary: Luca Antony Jaquez (born 2 June 2003) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for German Bundesliga club VfB Stuttgart and the Switzerland national team.
Luca Jaquez.note: Luca Jaquez gives Switzerland a young defensive option who can hold the line and keep possession simple under pressure.
Luca Jaquez.noteZh: 卢卡·雅克斯为瑞士提供年轻的防守选择，能够稳住防线，并在压力下保持简单控球。

Mahmoud Abunada.name: Mahmoud Abunada
Mahmoud Abunada.summary: Mahmud Ibrahim Abunada (Arabic: محمود إبراهيم أبو ندى; born 5 February 2000) is a Qatari professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Qatari Stars League club Al-Rayyan and the Qatar national team.
Mahmoud Abunada.note: Qatar's shot-stopping goalkeeper, giving the team box control and a steadier platform when pressure reaches the area.
Mahmoud Abunada.noteZh: 马哈茂德·阿布纳达是卡塔尔的扑救型门将，在压力进入禁区时帮助球队控制禁区，并提供更稳定的出球基础。

Marvin Keller.name: Marvin Keller
Marvin Keller.summary: Marvin Keller (born 3 July 2002) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Swiss club Young Boys and the Switzerland national team.
Marvin Keller.note: Marvin Keller gives Switzerland a young goalkeeping option, ready to add shot-stopping depth behind the senior choices.
Marvin Keller.noteZh: 马尔文·凯勒为瑞士提供年轻门将选择，在主力门将之后增加扑救深度。

Michel Aebischer.name: Michel Aebischer
Michel Aebischer.summary: Michel Aebischer (born 6 January 1997) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Serie B club Pisa, on loan from Serie A club Bologna, and the Switzerland national team.
Michel Aebischer.note: Michel Aebischer helps Switzerland connect midfield control to sharper final-third passes and late box runs.
Michel Aebischer.noteZh: 米歇尔·埃比舍帮助瑞士把中场控制衔接成更锐利的进攻三区传球和后插上禁区跑动。

Nico Elvedi.name: Nico Elvedi
Nico Elvedi.summary: Nico Elvedi (born 30 September 1996) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Bundesliga club Borussia Mönchengladbach and the Switzerland national team.
Nico Elvedi.note: Nico Elvedi gives Switzerland a reliable centre-back presence, strong in defensive positioning and calm circulation.
Nico Elvedi.noteZh: 尼科·埃尔韦迪为瑞士提供可靠的中卫存在感，防守站位稳健，传导也冷静。

Noah Okafor.name: Noah Okafor
Noah Okafor.summary: Noah Arinzechukwu Okafor (born 24 May 2000) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a forward for Premier League club Leeds United and the Switzerland national team.
Noah Okafor.note: Noah Okafor gives Switzerland acceleration in attack, threatening space behind defenders and changing the rhythm off the bench.
Noah Okafor.noteZh: 诺阿·奥卡福为瑞士进攻带来加速能力，威胁后卫身后空间，并能替补登场改变节奏。

Promise David.name: Promise David
Promise David.summary: Promise Oluwatobi Emmanuel David Akinpelu (born July 3, 2001) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a striker for Belgian Pro League club Union SG and the Canada national team.
Promise David.note: Promise David gives Canada a powerful forward alternative, pinning centre-backs and attacking loose balls in the area.
Promise David.noteZh: 普罗米斯·戴维为加拿大提供强力的锋线选择，能牵制中卫，并冲击禁区里的二点机会。

Remo Freuler.name: Remo Freuler
Remo Freuler.summary: Remo Marco Freuler (Swiss Standard German pronunciation: [ˈreː.mo ˈfrɔɪ.lər]; born 15 April 1992) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie A club Bologna and the Switzerland national team.
Remo Freuler.note: Remo Freuler gives Switzerland midfield order, reading second balls and keeping attacks connected after recoveries.
Remo Freuler.noteZh: 雷莫·弗罗伊勒为瑞士带来中场秩序，判断第二落点，并在夺回球权后保持进攻衔接。

Ricardo Rodriguez.name: Ricardo Rodriguez
Ricardo Rodriguez.summary: Ricardo Iván Rodríguez Araya (born 25 August 1992) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a left-back for La Liga club Real Betis and the Switzerland national team.
Ricardo Rodriguez.note: Ricardo Rodríguez gives Switzerland experienced defensive control, especially when they need composure around their own box.
Ricardo Rodriguez.noteZh: 里卡多·罗德里格斯为瑞士提供经验丰富的防守控制，尤其在本方禁区周围需要冷静处理时很重要。

Silvan Widmer.name: Silvan Widmer
Silvan Widmer.summary: Silvan Dominic Widmer (born 5 March 1993) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Bundesliga club Mainz 05, whom he captains, and the Switzerland national team.
Silvan Widmer.note: Silvan Widmer gives Switzerland a seasoned right-sided defender, balancing overlap timing with recovery runs.
Silvan Widmer.noteZh: 西尔万·维德默为瑞士提供经验丰富的右路防守者，能平衡套边时机和回追跑动。

Yvon Mvogo.name: Yvon Mvogo
Yvon Mvogo.summary: Yvon Landry Mvogo Nganoma (born 6 June 1994) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Ligue 1 club Lorient. Born in Cameroon, he plays for the Switzerland national team.
Yvon Mvogo.note: Yvon Mvogo gives Switzerland experienced goalkeeping cover, steadying the box when the match becomes stretched.
Yvon Mvogo.noteZh: 伊冯·姆沃戈为瑞士提供经验丰富的门将保障，在比赛变得拉开时帮助禁区保持稳定。

Zeki Amdouni.name: Zeki Amdouni
Zeki Amdouni.summary: Mohamed Zeki Amdouni (born 4 December 2000) is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or forward for EFL Championship club Burnley and the Switzerland national team.
Zeki Amdouni.note: Zeki Amdouni gives Switzerland a clever forward link, drifting between lines to combine and still threaten the finish.
Zeki Amdouni.noteZh: 泽基·阿姆杜尼为瑞士提供聪明的锋线衔接，在两线之间游走配合，同时保持终结威胁。

Ali Ahmed.name: Ali Ahmed
Ali Ahmed.summary: Ali Ahmed (born October 10, 2000) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a wide midfielder or winger for EFL Championship club Norwich City and the Canada national team.
Ali Ahmed.note: Ali Ahmed gives Canada a flexible wide midfielder, carrying through pressure and linking quick combinations on the flank.
Ali Ahmed.noteZh: 阿里·艾哈迈德为加拿大提供灵活的边路中场，能在压力下带球推进，并在边路串联快速配合。

Alistair Johnston.name: Alistair Johnston
Alistair Johnston.summary: Alistair William Johnston (born October 8, 1998) is a Canadian professional football player who plays as a right-back for Scottish Premiership club Celtic and the Canada national team. Johnston began his senior career with Vaughan Azzurri.
Alistair Johnston.note: Alistair Johnston steadies Canada's right side, mixing tight defending with well-timed overlaps when the attack needs width.
Alistair Johnston.noteZh: 阿利斯泰尔·约翰斯顿稳住加拿大右路，把紧凑防守和恰到好处的套边结合起来，在进攻需要宽度时很有用。

Derek Cornelius.name: Derek Cornelius
Derek Cornelius.summary: Derek Austin Cornelius (born 25 November 1997) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a centre-back for Ligue 1 club Marseille and the Canada national team.
Derek Cornelius.note: Derek Cornelius gives Canada a left-sided centre-back presence, helping them defend the box and start attacks from deeper zones.
Derek Cornelius.noteZh: 德里克·科尼利厄斯为加拿大提供左脚中卫存在感，帮助球队保护禁区，并从更靠后的区域发动进攻。

Ismael Kone.name: Ismael Kone
Ismael Kone.summary: Ismaël Kenneth Jordan Koné (born June 16, 2002) is a professional soccer player who plays as a midfielder for Serie A club Sassuolo. Born in the Ivory Coast, he plays for the Canada national team.
Ismael Kone.note: Ismaël Koné gives Canada midfield surge, breaking pressure with carries and turning recoveries into forward passes.
Ismael Kone.noteZh: 伊斯梅尔·科内为加拿大带来中场冲击力，能用带球摆脱压力，并把夺回球权转化为向前传球。

Jacob Shaffelburg.name: Jacob Shaffelburg
Jacob Shaffelburg.summary: Jacob Everett Shaffelburg (born November 26, 1999) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a winger for Major League Soccer club Los Angeles FC and the Canada national team.
Jacob Shaffelburg.note: Jacob Shaffelburg changes Canada's tempo from the left, attacking space early and forcing defenders to turn toward goal.
Jacob Shaffelburg.noteZh: 雅各布·沙费尔伯格从左路改变加拿大节奏，提前冲击空间，并迫使防守球员转身面对本方球门。

Joel Waterman.name: Joel Waterman
Joel Waterman.summary: Joel Robert Waterman (born January 24, 1996) is a Canadian soccer player who plays as a centre-back, right-back or defensive midfielder for Chicago Fire of Major League Soccer and the Canada national team.
Joel Waterman.note: Joel Waterman gives Canada a composed defensive option, useful for holding shape and keeping possession simple under pressure.
Joel Waterman.noteZh: 乔尔·沃特曼为加拿大提供冷静的防守选择，适合保持阵型，并在压力下用简洁传导稳住球权。

Jonathan Osorio.name: Jonathan Osorio
Jonathan Osorio.summary: Jonathan Osorio (born June 12, 1992) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a midfielder for Major League Soccer club Toronto FC, which he captains, and the Canada national team. Osorio holds the Toronto FC club record for most appearances.
Jonathan Osorio.note: Jonathan Osorio gives Canada experienced midfield timing, arriving late around the box and keeping attacks connected.
Jonathan Osorio.noteZh: 乔纳森·奥索里奥为加拿大提供经验丰富的中场时机感，能后插上到禁区周围，并保持进攻衔接。

Liam Millar.name: Liam Millar
Liam Millar.summary: Liam Alan Millar (born September 27, 1999) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as an attacking midfielder or left winger for Premier League club Hull City and the Canada national team.
Liam Millar.note: Liam Millar gives Canada a natural wide outlet, stretching the left side and creating service before defenses settle.
Liam Millar.noteZh: 利亚姆·米勒为加拿大提供天然的边路出口，拉开左路宽度，并在防线站稳前创造传中服务。

Luc De Fougerolles.name: Luc De Fougerolles
Luc De Fougerolles.summary: Luc Rollet de Fougerolles (French pronunciation: [lyk d (ə) fuʒʁɔl]; born 12 October 2005) is a professional football player who plays as a defender for Belgian Pro League club Dender EH, on loan from Fulham.
Luc De Fougerolles.note: Luc de Fougerolles gives Canada young defensive depth, helping cover space when the back line has to defend bigger gaps.
Luc De Fougerolles.noteZh: 吕克·德富热罗勒为加拿大提供年轻的防线深度，在后防需要覆盖更大空间时能帮助补位。

Mathieu Choiniere.name: Mathieu Choiniere
Mathieu Choiniere.summary: Mathieu Choinière (born February 7, 1999) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a central midfielder, defensive midfielder or right winger for Major League Soccer club Los Angeles FC and the Canada national team.
Mathieu Choiniere.note: Mathieu Choinière gives Canada a useful midfield utility piece, covering ground and keeping the next pass available.
Mathieu Choiniere.noteZh: 马蒂厄·舒瓦尼埃为加拿大提供实用的中场多面手，能覆盖空间，并让下一脚传球始终有出口。

Maxime Crepeau.name: Maxime Crepeau
Maxime Crepeau.summary: Maxime Crépeau (born May 11, 1994) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a goalkeeper for Major League Soccer club Orlando City and the Canada national team.
Maxime Crepeau.note: Maxime Crépeau gives Canada an experienced voice in goal, organizing the box and handling pressure moments calmly.
Maxime Crepeau.noteZh: 马克西姆·克雷波为加拿大球门带来有经验的指挥声音，能组织禁区，并冷静处理高压时刻。

Moise Bombito.name: Moise Bombito
Moise Bombito.summary: Moïse Bombito Lumpungu (born March 30, 2000) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a centre-back for Ligue 1 club Nice and the Canada national team.
Moise Bombito.note: Moïse Bombito gives Canada recovery speed at centre-back, important when their press leaves space behind the line.
Moise Bombito.noteZh: 莫伊兹·邦比托为加拿大中卫位置带来回追速度，在球队压迫后防线身后留下空间时很重要。

Niko Sigur.name: Niko Sigur
Niko Sigur.summary: Niko Kristian Sigur (born September 9, 2003) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a defensive midfielder or right-back for HNL club Hajduk Split and the Canada national team.
Niko Sigur.note: Niko Sigur gives Canada flexible defensive cover, able to protect midfield lanes or slide across to the right side.
Niko Sigur.noteZh: 尼科·西古尔为加拿大提供灵活的防守保护，既能守住中场通道，也能横移到右路补位。

Owen Goodman.name: Owen Goodman
Owen Goodman.summary: Owen Olamidayo Goodman (born 27 November 2003) is a British Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a goalkeeper for Premier League club Crystal Palace. Born in England, he represents the Canada national team.
Owen Goodman.note: Owen Goodman gives Canada a young goalkeeping option, useful for reach, box control, and longer distribution.
Owen Goodman.noteZh: 欧文·古德曼为加拿大提供年轻门将选择，适合利用臂展、控制禁区，并完成较长距离出球。

Richie Laryea.name: Richie Laryea
Richie Laryea.summary: Richmond Mamah Laryea ( La-RAY-a; Ga: LAH-yee; born January 7, 1995) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as a right-back or midfielder for Major League Soccer club Toronto and the Canada national team.
Richie Laryea.note: Richie Laryea gives Canada a direct right-side runner, pushing the ball forward and recovering quickly when attacks break down.
Richie Laryea.noteZh: 里奇·拉耶阿为加拿大提供直接的右路推进者，能把球向前带，并在进攻中断后快速回追。

Tajon Buchanan.name: Tajon Buchanan
Tajon Buchanan.summary: Tajon Trevor Buchanan (born February 8, 1999) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays for La Liga club Villarreal and the Canada national team.
Tajon Buchanan.note: Tajon Buchanan gives Canada explosive one-v-one threat, driving into the box from wide positions before help arrives.
Tajon Buchanan.noteZh: 塔琼·布坎南为加拿大提供爆发力很强的一对一威胁，能在协防到位前从边路带球杀入禁区。

Tani Oluwaseyi.name: Tani Oluwaseyi
Tani Oluwaseyi.summary: Tanitoluwa Oluwatimilehin Oluwaseyi (born May 15, 2000) is a professional soccer player who plays as a forward for La Liga club Villarreal. Born in Nigeria, he represents the Canada national team.
Tani Oluwaseyi.note: Tani Oluwaseyi gives Canada vertical forward running, stretching centre-backs and turning early passes into chances.
Tani Oluwaseyi.noteZh: 塔尼·奥卢瓦塞伊为加拿大提供纵向前锋跑动，拉伸中卫，并把早传球转化为机会。

Alfie Jones.name: Alfie Jones
Alfie Jones.summary: Alfie Charles Jones (born 7 October 1997) is a professional footballer who plays as a defender or midfielder for EFL Championship club Middlesbrough. Born in England, he plays for the Canada national team.
Alfie Jones.note: Alfie Jones gives Canada a strong defensive connector, useful for aerial duels, covering space, and moving play out cleanly.
Alfie Jones.noteZh: 阿尔菲·琼斯为加拿大提供强硬的防守衔接点，适合争顶、补位覆盖，并把球干净地带出后场。

Dayne St. Clair.name: Dayne St. Clair
Dayne St. Clair.summary: Dayne Tristan St. Clair (born May 9, 1997) is a Canadian professional soccer player who currently plays as a goalkeeper for Major League Soccer club Inter Miami and the Canada national team.
Dayne St. Clair.note: Dayne St. Clair gives Canada another high-reflex goalkeeper, useful when the match turns into saves and fast restarts.
Dayne St. Clair.noteZh: 戴恩·圣克莱尔为加拿大提供另一名反应很快的门将，在比赛变成连续扑救和快速再发动时很有价值。

Marcelo Flores.name: Marcelo Flores
Marcelo Flores.summary: Marcelo Flores Dorrell (born 1 October 2003) is a Canadian professional soccer player who plays as an attacking midfielder or winger for Liga MX club Tigres UANL and the Canada national team.
Marcelo Flores.note: Marcelo Flores gives Canada a crafty final-third option, drifting inside to combine, dribble, and slip passes into runners.
Marcelo Flores.noteZh: 马塞洛·弗洛雷斯为加拿大提供灵巧的进攻三区选择，能内收配合、带球突破，并把传球送到前插队友脚下。

Wilson Isidor.name: Wilson Isidor
Wilson Isidor.summary: Wilson Isidor (born 27 August 2000) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Premier League club Sunderland. Born in France, he represents the Haiti national team.
Wilson Isidor.note: Haiti's direct striker, giving them sharp runs behind the back line, penalty-area movement, and first-time finishing when chances arrive.
Wilson Isidor.noteZh: 威尔逊·伊西多是海地直接型前锋，能冲击防线身后，在禁区内找到接应位置，并在机会出现时完成第一时间终结。

Yassine Bounou.name: Yassine Bounou
Yassine Bounou.summary: Yassine Bounou (born 5 April 1991), also known mononymously as Bono, is a Moroccan professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Saudi Pro League club Al Hilal and the Morocco national team. Bono began his youth career in Morocco, playing for Wydad AC.
Yassine Bounou.note: Morocco's established goalkeeper, giving them reflex saves, penalty-area command, and calm distribution after pressure.
Yassine Bounou.noteZh: 亚辛·布努是摩洛哥主力门将，能提供反应扑救、禁区指挥，以及受压后的冷静出球。

Amar Dedic.name: Amar Dedic
Amar Dedic.summary: Amar Dedić (pronounced [ǎmar dêːditɕ]; born 18 August 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Primeira Liga club Benfica. Born in Austria, he plays for the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Amar Dedic.note: Bosnia's high-energy right-back, useful for carrying play up the flank, recovering quickly, and serving early balls into the box.
Amar Dedic.noteZh: 阿马尔·德迪奇是波黑高能量右后卫，能沿边路推进、快速回追，并早早把球送入禁区。

Amar Memic.name: Amar Memic
Amar Memic.summary: Amar Memić (pronounced [ǎmar měmitɕ]; born 20 January 2001) is a Bosnian professional footballer who plays as a winger for Czech First League club Viktoria Plzeň and the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Amar Memic.note: Bosnia's direct wide runner, giving them dribbles from the flank, diagonal movement inside, and pressure on opposing full-backs.
Amar Memic.noteZh: 阿马尔·梅米奇是波黑直接型边路球员，能从边路带球、斜插内线，并向对方边后卫施压。

Amir Hadziahmetovic.name: Amir Hadziahmetovic
Amir Hadziahmetovic.summary: Amir Hadžiahmetović (pronounced [âːmir xadʒiaxmêːtoʋitɕ]; born 8 March 1997) is a professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Premier League club Hull City, on loan from Beşiktaş.
Amir Hadziahmetovic.note: Bosnia's midfield stabilizer, useful for screening counterattacks, playing the first forward pass, and calming possession after pressure.
Amir Hadziahmetovic.noteZh: 阿米尔·哈季艾哈迈托维奇是波黑中场稳定器，能保护反击路线、送出第一脚向前传球，并在受压后稳住控球。

Arjan Malic.name: Arjan Malic
Arjan Malic.summary: Arjan Malić (pronounced [ǎrjan mâːlitɕ]; born 28 August 2005) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Austrian Bundesliga club Sturm Graz. Born in Slovenia, he plays for the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Arjan Malic.note: Bosnia's young right-back option, helping with timed challenges, overlap support, and back-post cover when the far side is overloaded.
Arjan Malic.noteZh: 阿尔扬·马利奇是波黑年轻右后卫选择，能把握抢断时机、支援套边，并在远端被压制时保护后点。

Armin Gigovic.name: Armin Gigovic
Armin Gigovic.summary: Armin Gigović (pronounced [ǎrmin ɡîːgoʋitɕ]; born 6 April 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Swiss Super League club Young Boys. Born in Sweden, he plays for the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Armin Gigovic.note: Bosnia's box-to-box runner, giving them second-ball energy, vertical midfield support, and late arrivals around the penalty area.
Armin Gigovic.noteZh: 阿明·吉戈维奇是波黑的往返型中场，能争抢第二落点、纵向支援中场，并后插上到禁区周围。

Benjamin Tahirovic.name: Benjamin Tahirovic
Benjamin Tahirovic.summary: Benjamin Tahirović (pronounced [běɲamin tâːxiroʋitɕ]; born 3 March 2003) is a professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Danish Superliga club Brøndby. Born in Sweden, he plays for the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Benjamin Tahirovic.note: Bosnia's holding midfielder, useful for protecting the centre, switching play, and adding height when midfield duels become physical.
Benjamin Tahirovic.noteZh: 本亚明·塔希罗维奇是波黑的拖后中场，能保护中路、转移进攻，并在中场对抗变得强硬时增加高度。

Dennis Hadzikadunic.name: Dennis Hadzikadunic
Dennis Hadzikadunic.summary: Dennis Hadžikadunić (pronounced [dêːnis xǎdʒikadunitɕ]; born 9 July 1998) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Serie B club Sampdoria, on loan from Rostov. Born in Sweden, he plays for the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Dennis Hadzikadunic.note: Bosnia's centre-back marker, giving them duel strength, a steadier defensive line, and reliable set-piece defending.
Dennis Hadzikadunic.noteZh: 丹尼斯·哈季卡杜尼奇是波黑中卫盯防者，能提供对抗强度、更稳定的防线，以及可靠的定位球防守。

Dzenis Burnic.name: Dzenis Burnic
Dzenis Burnic.summary: Dženis Burnić (pronounced [dʒêːnis bǔrnitɕ]; born 22 May 1998) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for 2. Bundesliga club Karlsruher SC. Born in Germany, he plays for the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Dzenis Burnic.note: Bosnia's combative midfielder, useful for disrupting rhythm, keeping short passes moving, and playing through pressure in central areas.
Dzenis Burnic.noteZh: 杰尼斯·布尔尼奇是波黑强硬型中场，能打断对手节奏、保持短传流动，并在中路压力下完成出球。

Ermedin Demirovic.name: Ermedin Demirovic
Ermedin Demirovic.summary: Ermedin Demirović (pronounced [ermědin děmiroʋitɕ]; born 25 March 1998) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Bundesliga club VfB Stuttgart. Born in Germany, he plays for the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Ermedin Demirovic.note: Bosnia's mobile forward, giving them front-line pressing, clean link play, and aggressive near-post movement when crosses arrive.
Ermedin Demirovic.noteZh: 埃尔梅丁·德米罗维奇是波黑机动型前锋，能前场压迫、清晰衔接进攻，并在传中到来时冲击前点。

Haris Tabakovic.name: Haris Tabakovic
Haris Tabakovic.summary: Haris Tabaković (pronounced [xâːris tǎbakoʋitɕ]; born 20 June 1994) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Bundesliga club Borussia Mönchengladbach, on loan from TSG Hoffenheim.
Haris Tabakovic.club: Borussia Mönchengladbach (on loan from TSG Hoffenheim)
Haris Tabakovic.note: Bosnia's penalty-area finisher, useful for attacking crosses, finding space between centre-backs, and shooting from loose second phases.
Haris Tabakovic.noteZh: 哈里斯·塔巴科维奇是波黑禁区终结者，能冲击传中、在中卫之间找空间，并在二次进攻乱战中完成射门。

Ivan Basic.name: Ivan Basic
Ivan Basic.summary: Ivan Bašić (pronounced [ǐʋan bǎʃitɕ]; born 30 April 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Kazakhstan Premier League club Astana. Born in Croatia, he plays for the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Ivan Basic.note: Bosnia's central connector, helping the midfield carry into space, offer safer passing angles, and keep attacks from breaking down.
Ivan Basic.noteZh: 伊万·巴希奇是波黑中路连接点，能帮助中场带球进入空间、提供更安全的传球角度，并避免进攻轻易中断。

Ivan Sunjic.name: Ivan Sunjic
Ivan Sunjic.summary: Ivan Šunjić (born 9 October 1996) is a Bosnian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Cyprus First Division club Pafos and the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Ivan Sunjic.note: Bosnia's defensive-midfield shield, useful for winning loose balls, blocking central lanes, and moving possession on simply.
Ivan Sunjic.noteZh: 伊万·舒尼奇是波黑防守型中场屏障，能争回散落球、封住中路线路，并用简洁传球继续控球。

Martin Zlomislic.name: Martin Zlomislic
Martin Zlomislic.summary: Martin Zlomislić (born 16 August 1998) is a Bosnian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Azerbaijan Premier League club Qarabağ FK and Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Martin Zlomislic.note: Bosnia's goalkeeping option, giving them shot-stopping depth, cross claiming, and calmer restarts after defensive pressure.
Martin Zlomislic.noteZh: 马丁·兹洛米斯利奇是波黑门将选择，能提供扑救深度、摘下传中，并在防守受压后冷静重新开球。

Mladen Jurkas.name: Mladen Jurkas
Mladen Jurkas.summary: Mladen Jurkas (born 7 October 2007) is a Bosnian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Bosnian Premier League club Borac Banja Luka and the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Mladen Jurkas.note: Bosnia's young goalkeeper, useful for his reach, shot-stopping base, and added depth behind the senior keeper group.
Mladen Jurkas.noteZh: 姆拉登·尤尔卡斯是波黑年轻门将，能依靠臂展和扑救基础，为资深门将组身后增加深度。

Nihad Mujakic.name: Nihad Mujakic
Nihad Mujakic.summary: Nihad Mujakić (pronounced [nǐxad mǔjakitɕ]; born 15 April 1998) is a Bosnian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Süper Lig club Gaziantep, on loan from Partizan, and the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Nihad Mujakic.note: Bosnia's left-sided centre-back, helping them defend aerially, cover space behind the full-back, and clear pressure from the box.
Nihad Mujakic.noteZh: 尼哈德·穆亚基奇是波黑左侧中卫，能争顶防守、覆盖边后卫身后空间，并把禁区压力解围出去。

Nikola Katic.name: Nikola Katic
Nikola Katic.summary: Nikola Katić (pronounced [nǐkola kâtitɕ]; born 10 October 1996) is a Bosnian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Bundesliga club Schalke 04 and the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Nikola Katic.note: Bosnia's aggressive centre-back, giving them aerial defending, set-piece presence, and front-foot challenges against target forwards.
Nikola Katic.noteZh: 尼科拉·卡蒂奇是波黑主动型中卫，能提供空中防守、定位球存在感，并前压对抗支点前锋。

Nikola Vasilj.name: Nikola Vasilj
Nikola Vasilj.summary: Nikola Vasilj (pronounced [nǐkola ʋǎsiʎ]; born 2 December 1995) is a Bosnian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for 2. Bundesliga club FC St. Pauli and the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Nikola Vasilj.note: Bosnia's senior goalkeeper, giving the back line reflex saves, area control, and a reliable first pass after saves.
Nikola Vasilj.noteZh: 尼科拉·瓦西利是波黑资深门将，能为防线提供反应扑救、禁区控制，以及扑救后的可靠第一脚传球。

Samed Bazdar.name: Samed Bazdar
Samed Bazdar.summary: Samed Baždar (pronounced [sǎmed bǎʒdar]; born 31 January 2004) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Spanish club Real Zaragoza. Born in Serbia, he plays for the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Samed Bazdar.note: Bosnia's sharp forward runner, useful for attacking channels, pressing centre-backs, and finishing before defenders can reset.
Samed Bazdar.noteZh: 萨梅德·巴日达尔是波黑犀利的前插型前锋，能冲击肋部通道、压迫中卫，并在防守重组前完成终结。

Stjepan Radeljic.name: Stjepan Radeljic
Stjepan Radeljic.summary: Stjepan Radeljić (pronounced [stjêpan rǎdeʎitɕ]; born 5 September 1997) is a Bosnian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Croatian Football League club Rijeka and the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Stjepan Radeljic.note: Bosnia's reliable centre-back depth, useful for aerial clearances, compact defending, and simple passes into midfield.
Stjepan Radeljic.noteZh: 斯捷潘·拉德利奇是波黑可靠的中卫深度，能完成空中解围、保持紧凑防守，并把球简单传入中场。

Tarik Muharemovic.name: Tarik Muharemovic
Tarik Muharemovic.summary: Tarik Muharemović (pronounced [tâːrik muxâːremoʋitɕ]; born 28 February 2003) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Serie A club Sassuolo. Born in Slovenia, he plays for the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team.
Tarik Muharemovic.note: Bosnia's composed young centre-back, giving them progressive passing, recovery speed, and another calm option under pressure.
Tarik Muharemovic.noteZh: 塔里克·穆哈雷莫维奇是波黑冷静的年轻中卫，能提供向前传球、回追速度，以及受压时的另一名稳定选择。

Abdulaziz Hatem.name: Abdulaziz Hatem
Abdulaziz Hatem.summary: Abdulaziz Hatem Mohammed Abdullah (Arabic: عَبْد الْعَزِيز حَاتِم مُحَمَّد عَبْد الله; born 1 January 1990) is a Qatari professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Al Rayyan and captains the Qatar national team.
Abdulaziz Hatem.note: Qatar's experienced midfield captain, useful for switching play, steadying possession, and arriving late for shots around the box.
Abdulaziz Hatem.noteZh: 阿卜杜勒阿齐兹·哈特姆是卡塔尔经验丰富的中场队长，能转移进攻、稳住控球，并后插上到禁区周围射门。

Ahmed Alaaeldin.name: Ahmed Alaaeldin
Ahmed Alaaeldin.summary: Ahmed Alaaeldin Abdelmotaal (Arabic: أحمد علاء الدين عبد المتعال; born 31 January 1993), simply known as Ahmed Alaaeldin or Alaa, is a professional footballer who plays for Al-Rayyan. Born in Egypt, he plays for the Qatar national team.
Ahmed Alaaeldin.note: Qatar's forward runner, giving them pressing from the front, direct movement beyond defenders, and quick finishes from loose chances.
Ahmed Alaaeldin.noteZh: 艾哈迈德·阿拉埃尔丁是卡塔尔前场跑动点，能从前场压迫、直接冲到后卫身后，并把零散机会快速终结。

Ahmed Alganehi.name: Ahmed Alganehi
Ahmed Alganehi.summary: Ahmed Al-Ganehi is a Qatari professional footballer who plays as a right winger for Al-Gharafa and the Qatar national team.
Ahmed Alganehi.note: Qatar's right-sided winger, useful for stretching the touchline, attacking full-backs one-on-one, and cutting low balls across goal.
Ahmed Alganehi.noteZh: 艾哈迈德·阿尔-加内希是卡塔尔右路边锋，能拉开边线宽度、一对一冲击边后卫，并把低平球横扫到门前。

Ahmed Fathy.name: Ahmed Fathy
Ahmed Fathy.summary: Ahmed Fathy Mansi Abdulla (also spelled Fatehi, Arabic: أحمد فتحي, born 25 January 1993) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Al-Arabi. Born in Egypt, he represents the Qatar national team.
Ahmed Fathy.note: Qatar's defensive-midfield organiser, helping them win second balls, block central lanes, and keep short passes moving under pressure.
Ahmed Fathy.noteZh: 艾哈迈德·法蒂是卡塔尔防守型中场组织者，能争回第二落点、封住中路线路，并在压力下保持短传运转。

Alhashmi Alhussein.name: Alhashmi Alhussein
Alhashmi Alhussein.summary: Al-Hashmi Al-Hussain Mohialdin (Arabic: الهاشمي الحسين محي الدين; born 15 August 2003) is a Qatari professional footballer who plays as a defender for Qatar Stars League club Al-Arabi and the Qatar national team.
Alhashmi Alhussein.note: Qatar's young centre-back, useful for defensive duels, aerial cover, and simple first passes when the back line resets.
Alhashmi Alhussein.noteZh: 阿尔-哈什米·阿尔-侯赛因是卡塔尔年轻中卫，能完成防守对抗、提供空中保护，并在防线重组时送出简洁第一传。

Assim Madibo.name: Assim Madibo
Assim Madibo.summary: Assim Omer Al Haj Madibo (Arabic: عاصم ماديبو; born 22 October 1996) is a footballer who plays as a midfielder for Al-Wakrah, on loan from Al-Duhail. Born in Sudan, he plays for the Qatar national team.
Assim Madibo.note: Qatar's ball-winning midfielder, helping them cover pressure, break up counters, and restart attacks with simple passes.
Assim Madibo.noteZh: 阿西姆·马迪博是卡塔尔抢断型中场，能补位压力区域、打断反击，并用简单传球重新发起进攻。

Ayoub Aloui.name: Ayoub Aloui
Ayoub Aloui.summary: Ayoub Mohamed Aloui is a Qatari defender who plays for Al-Gharafa and has represented Qatar at youth and senior national-team level.
Ayoub Aloui.note: Qatar's young defender, useful for recovery runs, covering wide spaces, and adding size when defending crosses.
Ayoub Aloui.noteZh: 阿尤布·阿卢伊是卡塔尔年轻后卫，能完成回追、覆盖边路空间，并在防守传中时增加身高对抗。

Boualem Khoukhi.name: Boualem Khoukhi
Boualem Khoukhi.summary: Boualem Khoukhi (Arabic: بوعلام خوخي; born 9 July 1990) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Al Sadd in the Qatar Stars League. Born in Algeria, he represents the Qatar national team.
Boualem Khoukhi.note: Qatar's experienced hybrid defender, giving them aerial strength, cover at centre-back, and the option to step into midfield.
Boualem Khoukhi.noteZh: 布阿莱姆·胡希是卡塔尔经验丰富的多功能防守者，能提供空中力量、中卫保护，并在需要时前提到中场。

Edmilson Junior.name: Edmilson Junior
Edmilson Junior.summary: Edmilson Paulo da Silva Junior (born 19 August 1994) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger for Qatari club Al-Duhail. Born in Belgium, he plays for the Qatar national team.
Edmilson Junior.note: Qatar's explosive winger, useful for accelerating past markers, cutting inside, and carrying attacks into shooting areas.
Edmilson Junior.noteZh: 埃德米尔森·儒尼奥尔是卡塔尔爆发型边锋，能加速摆脱盯防、内切推进，并把进攻带入射门区域。

Issa Laye.name: Issa Laye
Issa Laye.summary: Gueye Seydinaissa Laye (Arabic: عيسى لاي; born 22 December 1997) is a professional footballer who plays as a center back or defensive midfielder for Qatar Stars League club Al-Arabi. Born in Senegal, he represents the Qatar national team.
Issa Laye.note: Qatar's centre-back and midfield cover, useful for aerial duels, protecting the central channel, and closing games with extra structure.
Issa Laye.noteZh: 伊萨·拉耶是卡塔尔中卫和中场保护选择，能争顶对抗、保护中路通道，并在收比赛时增加阵型稳定。

Jassem Gaber.name: Jassem Gaber
Jassem Gaber.summary: Jassem Gaber El-Sayed Abdulsalam (Arabic: جَاسِم جَابِر السَّيِّد عَبْد السَّلَام; born 20 February 2002), commonly known as Jassem Gaber, is a Qatari professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or defensive midfielder for Qatar Stars League club...
Jassem Gaber.note: Qatar's flexible defender, giving them centre-back passing, defensive-midfield cover, and early reads against counterattacks.
Jassem Gaber.noteZh: 贾西姆·加伯是卡塔尔灵活防守者，能提供中卫出球、防守型中场保护，并提前判断对手反击。

Karim Boudiaf.name: Karim Boudiaf
Karim Boudiaf.summary: Karim Boudiaf (Arabic: كريم بوضياف; born 16 September 1990) is a professional footballer who plays for Al-Duhail in the Qatar Stars League. He can play as a central defender and as a defensive midfielder.
Karim Boudiaf.note: Qatar's veteran defensive utility player, helping them shift between midfield and defence while keeping aerial cover and experience.
Karim Boudiaf.noteZh: 卡里姆·布迪亚夫是卡塔尔老练的防守多面手，能在中场和防线之间切换，同时提供空中保护和经验。

Lucas Mendes.name: Lucas Mendes
Lucas Mendes.summary: Lucas Michel Mendes (born 3 July 1990) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or left-back for Qatari club Al-Wakrah. Born in Brazil, he plays for the Qatar national team.
Lucas Mendes.note: Qatar's left-sided defensive organiser, useful for back-line communication, left-footed exits, and longer passes into wide runners.
Lucas Mendes.noteZh: 卢卡斯·门德斯是卡塔尔左侧防线组织者，能指挥后防、用左脚出球，并把长传送到边路跑动点。

Meshaal Barsham.name: Meshaal Barsham
Meshaal Barsham.summary: Meshaal Essa Barsham (Arabic: مَشْعَل عِيسَى بَرْشَم; born 14 February 1998) is a football player who plays as a goalkeeper for Al Sadd. Born in Qatar, he plays for the Qatar national team.
Meshaal Barsham.note: Qatar's established goalkeeper, giving them reflex saves, penalty confidence, and quick restarts after claiming the ball.
Meshaal Barsham.noteZh: 梅沙尔·巴沙姆是卡塔尔主力级门将，能提供反应扑救、点球时刻的信心，并在拿到球后快速重新发动。

Mohammed Muntari.name: Mohammed Muntari
Mohammed Muntari.summary: Mohammed Muntari (Arabic: محمد مونتاري; born 20 December 1993) is a professional footballer who currently plays as a striker for Al-Gharafa. Born in Ghana, he plays for the Qatar national team.
Mohammed Muntari.note: Qatar's physical striker option, giving them a target for direct balls, aerial finishing, and presence against packed boxes.
Mohammed Muntari.noteZh: 穆罕默德·蒙塔里是卡塔尔力量型中锋选择，能接应直接传球、完成头球终结，并在密集禁区里提供存在感。

Pedro Miguel.name: Pedro Miguel
Pedro Miguel.summary: Pedro Miguel Carvalho Deus Correia (Arabic: بيدرو ميغيل كارفاليو ديوس كورييا; born 6 August 1990), known as Pedro Miguel and also Ró-Ró (Arabic: رُو رُو), is a professional footballer who plays for Al Sadd and the Qatar national team as a right-back or a...
Pedro Miguel.note: Qatar's powerful right-back, useful for defending crosses, winning back-post duels, and adding size on attacking set pieces.
Pedro Miguel.noteZh: 佩德罗·米格尔是卡塔尔强力右后卫，能防守传中、赢下后点对抗，并在进攻定位球中增加高度。

Salah Zakaria.name: Salah Zakaria
Salah Zakaria.summary: Salah Zakaria Hassan (born 24 April 1999) is a Qatari professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Al-Duhail and the Qatar national team.
Salah Zakaria.note: Qatar's goalkeeper depth, giving them another shot-stopping option and extra security when managing the penalty area.
Salah Zakaria.noteZh: 萨拉赫·扎卡里亚是卡塔尔门将深度，能提供另一名扑救选择，并在管理禁区时增加安全感。

Sultan Albrake.name: Sultan Albrake
Sultan Albrake.summary: Sultan Hussain Al-Brake (Arabic: سلطان البريكي; born 7 April 1996) is a Qatari professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Qatari club Al-Duhail and the Qatar national team. Al-Brake was part of the Qatar squad that won the 2023 AFC Asian Cup.
Sultan Albrake.note: Qatar's left-back cover, useful for timing overlaps, recovering into the defensive line, and protecting the far post.
Sultan Albrake.noteZh: 苏丹·布拉克是卡塔尔左后卫保护选择，能把握套边时机、回收到防线，并保护远端后点。

Tahsin Mohammed.name: Tahsin Mohammed
Tahsin Mohammed.summary: Tahsin Mohammed Jamshid (born 16 June 2006) is a Qatari professional footballer who plays as a winger for Qatar Stars League club Al-Duhail and the Qatar national team.
Tahsin Mohammed.note: Qatar's young winger, giving them acceleration from wide areas, fearless dribbling, and fresh energy as matches open up.
Tahsin Mohammed.noteZh: 塔赫辛·穆罕默德·贾姆希德是卡塔尔年轻边锋，能从边路加速、无畏带球，并在比赛拉开后带来新鲜活力。

Yusuf Abdurisag.name: Yusuf Abdurisag
Yusuf Abdurisag.summary: Yusuf Abdurisag Yusuf (Somali: Yusuf Abdirisaq Yusuf, born 6 August 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger for Qatar Stars League side Al-Wakrah, on loan from Al Sadd. Born in Somalia, he plays for the Qatar national team.
Yusuf Abdurisag.note: Qatar's wide forward option, useful for pressing full-backs, making diagonal runs, and supporting counters from the flank.
Yusuf Abdurisag.noteZh: 优素福·阿卜杜里萨格是卡塔尔边路前锋选择，能压迫边后卫、斜线前插，并从边路支援反击。

Aaron Hickey.name: Aaron Hickey
Aaron Hickey.summary: Aaron Buchanan Hickey (born 10 June 2002) is a Scottish professional footballer who plays as a full-back for Premier League club Brentford and the Scotland national team.
Aaron Hickey.note: Scotland's flexible full-back, useful on either side for recovery runs, underlaps, and carrying pressure into midfield.
Aaron Hickey.noteZh: 阿伦·希基是苏格兰灵活的边后卫，左右两侧都能回追、内切套跑，并把压力带入中场。

Angus Gunn.name: Angus Gunn
Angus Gunn.summary: Angus Gunn is a Scotland goalkeeper who most recently played for Nottingham Forest and has been Scotland's first-choice keeper during the 2026 World Cup.
Angus Gunn.note: Scotland's first-choice goalkeeper, giving them shot-stopping, clear defensive calls, and calm restarts after saves.
Angus Gunn.noteZh: 安格斯·冈恩是苏格兰一号门将，能提供扑救、清晰的防线指挥，以及扑救后的冷静重新开球。

Anthony Ralston.name: Anthony Ralston
Anthony Ralston.summary: Anthony Ralston (born 16 November 1998) is a Scottish professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Scottish Premiership club Celtic and the Scotland national team.
Anthony Ralston.note: Scotland's rugged right-back, useful for back-post defending, close-range duels, and adding edge on set pieces.
Anthony Ralston.noteZh: 安东尼·拉尔斯顿是苏格兰硬朗右后卫，能防守后点、完成近距离对抗，并在定位球中增加强度。

Che Adams.name: Che Adams
Che Adams.summary: Che Sac Everton Fred Adams (born 13 July 1996), known as Ché Adams, is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Serie A club Torino and the Scotland national team.
Che Adams.note: Scotland's mobile forward, useful for running channels, linking attacks quickly, and pressing centre-backs before they settle.
Che Adams.noteZh: 切·亚当斯是苏格兰机动型前锋，能冲击肋部通道、快速衔接进攻，并在中卫站稳前完成压迫。

Craig Gordon.name: Craig Gordon
Craig Gordon.summary: Craig Sinclair Gordon (born 31 December 1982) is a Scottish professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Scottish Premiership club Heart of Midlothian and the Scotland national team.
Craig Gordon.note: Scotland's veteran goalkeeper, giving the squad reflex saves, box command, and experience if the game turns chaotic.
Craig Gordon.noteZh: 克雷格·戈登是苏格兰老将门将，能在比赛变乱时提供反应扑救、禁区指挥和经验。

Dominic Hyam.name: Dominic Hyam
