Ayyoub Bouaddi.noteZh: 阿尤布·布阿迪是摩洛哥沉稳的年轻中场，能在压力下接球、保持中路传递，并让混乱比赛降速。

Azzedine Ounahi.name: Azzedine Ounahi
Azzedine Ounahi.summary: Azzedine Ounahi (Arabic: عز الدين أوناحي, pronounced [ʕiz ʔad.di:n u:na:ħi:]; born 19 April 2000) is a Moroccan professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Segunda División club Girona and the Morocco national team.
Azzedine Ounahi.note: Morocco's gliding midfielder, carrying through pressure, breaking lines, and giving their possession a smoother rhythm.
Azzedine Ounahi.noteZh: 阿泽丁·乌纳希是摩洛哥灵动的中场，能带球穿过压力、打破防线，并让球队控球节奏更顺。

Chadi Riad.name: Chadi Riad
Chadi Riad.summary: Chadi Riad Dnanou (Arabic: شادي رياض دنانو; born 17 June 2003) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Premier League club Crystal Palace. Born in Spain, he plays for the Morocco national team.
Chadi Riad.note: Morocco's left-footed centre-back, useful for progressive passes, aerial cover, and keeping the back line composed.
Chadi Riad.noteZh: 查迪·里亚德是摩洛哥左脚中卫，能送出推进传球、提供空中保护，并让后防线保持镇定。

Chemsdine Talbi.name: Chemsdine Talbi
Chemsdine Talbi.summary: Chemsdine Talbi (Arabic: شَمْس الدِّين الطَّالِبِيّ; born 9 May 2005) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger for Premier League club Sunderland. Born in Belgium, he plays for the Morocco national team.
Chemsdine Talbi.note: Morocco's explosive right winger, stretching full-backs with one-on-one pace and early balls before defenses can set.
Chemsdine Talbi.noteZh: 谢姆斯丁·塔尔比是摩洛哥爆发力强的右边锋，能用一对一速度拉扯边后卫，并在防线站稳前早早传球。

Gessime Yassine.name: Gessime Yassine
Gessime Yassine.summary: Gessime Ben Youssef Mustapha Yassine (born 22 November 2005) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger for Ligue 1 club Strasbourg. Born in France, he represents the Morocco national team.
Gessime Yassine.note: Morocco's young transition winger, giving them right-side speed, direct dribbling, and carries into open grass.
Gessime Yassine.noteZh: 杰西姆·亚辛是摩洛哥年轻的转换边锋，能提供右路速度、直接盘带，并带球冲入开阔空间。

Issa Diop.name: Issa Diop
Issa Diop.summary: Issa Diop is a Morocco centre-back who plays for Fulham and adds aerial defending, physical duels, and back-line depth to the national team.
Issa Diop.note: Morocco's physical centre-back depth, useful for aerial defending, late-game duels, and protecting the box under direct pressure.
Issa Diop.noteZh: 伊萨·迪奥普是摩洛哥身体型中卫深度，能在直接压力下争顶、防守比赛后段对抗，并保护禁区。

Marwane Saadane.name: Marwane Saadane
Marwane Saadane.summary: Marwane Saâdane (Arabic: مروان سعدان; born 17 January 1992) is a Moroccan professional football player who plays for Saudi Professional League club Al-Fateh and the Morocco national team.
Marwane Saadane.note: Morocco's experienced defensive cover, able to handle aerial duels and step into midfield if the game needs protection.
Marwane Saadane.noteZh: 马尔万·萨阿丹是摩洛哥经验型防守替补，能处理空中对抗，并在比赛需要保护时顶到中场。

Noussair Mazraoui.name: Noussair Mazraoui
Noussair Mazraoui.summary: Noussair Mazraoui (Arabic: نُصَيْر مَزرَاوِيّ; born 14 November 1997) is a professional footballer who plays as a defender for Premier League club Manchester United and the Morocco national team.
Noussair Mazraoui.note: Morocco's adaptable full-back, comfortable on either side while stepping inside to help buildup and calm defensive possessions.
Noussair Mazraoui.noteZh: 努赛尔·马兹拉维是摩洛哥适应性强的边后卫，左右两侧都能胜任，也能内收帮助出球并稳定防守回合。

Redouane Halhal.name: Redouane Halhal
Redouane Halhal.summary: Redouane Halhal (Arabic: رضوان حلحل; born 5 March 2003) is a footballer who plays as a defender for Belgian club Mechelen. Born in France, he represents the Morocco national team.
Redouane Halhal.note: Morocco's young centre-back option, giving them reach in aerial duels and simple exits when they need to reset the game.
Redouane Halhal.noteZh: 雷杜安·哈尔哈尔是摩洛哥年轻中卫选择，能在空中对抗中提供覆盖范围，并用简洁出球重置比赛。

Sofyan Amrabat.name: Sofyan Amrabat
Sofyan Amrabat.summary: Sofyan Amrabat (Arabic: سفيان أمرابط, Berber languages: ⵙⵓⴼⵢⴰⵏ ⴰⵎⵕⴰⴱⵟ; born 21 August 1996) is a professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for La Liga club Real Betis, on loan from Süper Lig side Fenerbahçe, and the Morocco national team.
Sofyan Amrabat.note: Morocco's midfield shield, slowing counters, winning loose balls, and keeping possession connected through tense spells.
Sofyan Amrabat.noteZh: 索菲扬·阿姆拉巴特是摩洛哥中场屏障，能拖慢反击、赢下第二落点，并在紧张阶段保持控球连接。

Youssef Belammari.name: Youssef Belammari
Youssef Belammari.summary: Youssef Belammari (Arabic: يُوسُف بَلْعُمَرِيّ; born 20 September 1998) is a Moroccan professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Egyptian Premier League club Al Ahly and the Morocco national team.
Youssef Belammari.note: Morocco's left-side cover, useful for wide defending, support runs, and keeping the flank secure in rotation.
Youssef Belammari.noteZh: 优素福·贝拉马里是摩洛哥左路替补保障，能完成边路防守、支援跑动，并在轮换时稳住这一侧。

Bilal El Khannouss.name: Bilal El Khannouss
Bilal El Khannouss.summary: Bilal El Khannouss (Arabic: بلال الخنوس; born 10 May 2004) is a professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Bundesliga club VfB Stuttgart and the Morocco national team.
Bilal El Khannouss.note: Morocco's young final-third passer, receiving between lines and finding the next touch before defenders can close him.
Bilal El Khannouss.noteZh: 比拉尔·埃尔哈努斯是摩洛哥年轻的前场传球手，能在线间接球，并在后卫靠近前找到下一脚处理。

Munir El Kajoui.name: Munir El Kajoui
Munir El Kajoui.summary: Munir El Kajoui (Arabic: منير الكجوي; born 10 May 1989), known as Munir, is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Botola Pro club RS Berkane, whom he captains, and the Morocco national team.
Munir El Kajoui.note: Morocco's veteran goalkeeper cover, bringing tournament experience, box command, and a steady option behind Bounou.
Munir El Kajoui.noteZh: 穆尼尔·埃尔卡朱伊是摩洛哥老将门将替补，能带来大赛经验、禁区指挥，并在布努身后提供稳定选择。

Neil El Aynaoui.name: Neil El Aynaoui
Neil El Aynaoui.summary: Neil Yoni El Aynaoui (Arabic: نائل العيناوي; born 2 July 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie A club Roma and the Morocco national team.
Neil El Aynaoui.note: Morocco's two-way midfielder, helping them win contact, carry out of pressure, and support the tempo next to Amrabat.
Neil El Aynaoui.noteZh: 尼尔·埃尔艾纳维是摩洛哥攻守兼备的中场，能赢下身体接触、带球摆脱压力，并在阿姆拉巴特身边支撑节奏。

Samir El Mourabet.name: Samir El Mourabet
Samir El Mourabet.summary: Samir El Mourabet (Arabic: سمير المرابط; born 6 October 2005) is a professional football player who plays as a midfielder for Ligue 1 club Strasbourg. Born in France, he represents the Morocco national team.
Samir El Mourabet.note: Morocco's young central midfielder, giving them mobility, press resistance, and extra ball-winning energy late in games.
Samir El Mourabet.noteZh: 萨米尔·埃尔穆拉贝特是摩洛哥年轻中场，能提供机动性、抗压接球，以及比赛后段额外的抢球能量。

Soufiane Rahimi.name: Soufiane Rahimi
Soufiane Rahimi.summary: Soufiane Rahimi (Arabic: سُفْيَان رَحِيمِيّ; born 2 June 1996) is a Moroccan professional footballer who plays as a forward for UAE Pro League club Al Ain and the Morocco national team.
Soufiane Rahimi.note: Morocco's direct forward runner, dangerous from wide-forward lanes, transition breaks, and quick finishes after the first touch.
Soufiane Rahimi.noteZh: 苏菲安·拉希米是摩洛哥直接型前锋跑动点，能从边锋通道、转换反击和第一脚后的快速终结制造危险。

Zakaria El Ouahdi.name: Zakaria El Ouahdi
Zakaria El Ouahdi.summary: Zakaria El Ouahdi (Moroccan Arabic: زكرياء الواحدي; born 31 December 2001), is a professional footballer who plays as a right winger or a right-back for Belgian Pro League club Genk. Born in Belgium, he plays for the Morocco national team.
Zakaria El Ouahdi.note: Morocco's energetic right-back option, useful for wide recovery, underlapping support, and keeping pressure on tired flanks.
Zakaria El Ouahdi.noteZh: 扎卡里亚·埃尔瓦赫迪是摩洛哥活力型右后卫选择，能回追边路、内切支援，并持续压迫疲劳的边路。

Alexandre Pierre.name: Alexandre Pierre
Alexandre Pierre.summary: Alexandre Pierre (born 25 February 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Ligue 2 club Sochaux. Born in France, he plays for the Haiti national team.
Alexandre Pierre.note: Haiti's tall goalkeeper option, giving them shot-stopping depth, box presence, and a calm reset when pressure builds.
Alexandre Pierre.noteZh: 亚历山大·皮埃尔是海地高大门将选择，能提供扑救深度、禁区存在感，并在压力增加时冷静重新组织。

Carl Sainte.name: Carl Sainte
Carl Sainte.summary: Carl Fred Sainté (born 9 August 2002) is a Haitian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for USL Championship club El Paso Locomotive and the Haiti national team.
Carl Sainte.note: Haiti's midfield screen, useful for breaking up second balls, protecting the centre-backs, and keeping the next pass simple.
Carl Sainte.noteZh: 卡尔·圣特是海地的中场屏障，能破坏第二落点、保护中卫，并把下一脚传球处理得简单。

Carlens Arcus.name: Carlens Arcus
Carlens Arcus.summary: Carlens Arcus (born 28 June 1996) is a Haitian professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Ligue 1 club Angers and the Haiti national team.
Carlens Arcus.note: Haiti's senior right-back, giving them recovery runs, overlap timing, and reliable defending against stronger wide players.
Carlens Arcus.noteZh: 卡伦斯·阿尔屈斯是海地经验丰富的右后卫，能回追、把握套边时机，并可靠地防守强势边路球员。

Danley Jean Jacques.name: Danley Jean Jacques
Danley Jean Jacques.summary: Danley Jean Jacques (born 20 May 2000) is a Haitian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Major League Soccer club Philadelphia Union and the Haiti national team. He usually plays as a central midfielder or defensive midfielder.
Danley Jean Jacques.note: Haiti's central ball-winner, covering space in front of the defense and turning regain moments into forward passes.
Danley Jean Jacques.noteZh: 丹利·让-雅克是海地中路抢球手，能覆盖防线身前空间，并把夺回球权的瞬间转化为向前传球。

Derrick Etienne.name: Derrick Etienne
Derrick Etienne.summary: Derrick Etienne Jr. is a Haiti winger who plays for Toronto FC and gives the national team direct carrying, left-side width, and transition speed.
Derrick Etienne.note: Haiti's direct wide runner, able to carry out of pressure, attack space early, and serve strikers before the block resets.
Derrick Etienne.noteZh: 德里克·艾蒂安二世是海地直接型边路跑动点，能带球摆脱压力、提前攻击空间，并在防线重组前给前锋送球。

Dominique Simon.name: Dominique Simon
Dominique Simon.summary: Dominique Célidor Simon (born 29 July 2000) is a professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Slovak First Football League club Tatran Prešov. Born in France, he plays for the Haiti national team.
Dominique Simon.note: Haiti's defensive midfield cover, helping them chase second balls, close central gaps, and keep short passes moving.
Dominique Simon.noteZh: 多米尼克·西蒙是海地防守型中场轮换，能追抢第二落点、封住中路空当，并保持短传运转。

Garven Metusala.name: Garven Metusala
Garven Metusala.summary: Garven-Michée Metusala (born 31 December 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for USL Championship club Colorado Springs Switchbacks. Born in Canada, he plays for the Haiti national team.
Garven Metusala.note: Haiti's centre-back depth, useful for aerial duels, set-piece marking, and staying compact when defending long spells.
Garven Metusala.noteZh: 加文·梅图萨拉是海地中卫深度，能争顶、防守定位球，并在长时间防守时保持阵型紧凑。

Hannes Delcroix.name: Hannes Delcroix
Hannes Delcroix.summary: Hannes Piterson Delcroix (born 28 February 1999) is a Haitian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or left-back for Swiss Super League club Lugano and the Haiti national team.
Hannes Delcroix.note: Haiti's left-footed defender, giving them wide cover, back-line recovery, and cleaner exits under pressure.
Hannes Delcroix.noteZh: 汉内斯·德尔克鲁瓦是海地左脚后卫，能提供边路覆盖、防线回追，并在压力下更干净地出球。

Jean-Kevin Duverne.name: Jean-Kevin Duverne
Jean-Kevin Duverne.summary: Jean-Kévin Duverne (born 12 July 1997) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Belgian Pro League club Gent on loan from French club Nantes. Born in France, he plays for the Haiti national team.
Jean-Kevin Duverne.note: Haiti's versatile defender, able to cover centre-back or right-back while giving the back line recovery speed.
Jean-Kevin Duverne.noteZh: 让-凯文·杜韦纳是海地多面后卫，能覆盖中卫或右后卫位置，并为防线提供回追速度。

Johny Placide.name: Johny Placide
Johny Placide.summary: Johny Placide (born 29 January 1988) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper. Born in France, he plays for and captains the Haiti national team since 2011.
Johny Placide.note: Haiti's veteran goalkeeper, bringing shot-stopping, penalty experience, and a loud organizing voice behind the defense.
Johny Placide.noteZh: 约翰尼·普拉西德是海地老将门将，能提供扑救、点球经验，以及防线身后清晰的指挥声音。

Josue Casimir.name: Josue Casimir
Josue Casimir.summary: Josué Casimir (born 24 September 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back, right wing-back or striker for French Ligue 1 club Auxerre. Born in Guadeloupe, he represents the Haiti national team.
Josue Casimir.note: Haiti's right-side runner, useful as a winger or wing-back for early crosses and repeated recovery sprints.
Josue Casimir.noteZh: 若苏埃·卡西米尔是海地右路跑动点，能踢边锋或翼卫，送出早传中并反复回追冲刺。

Josue Duverger.name: Josue Duverger
Josue Duverger.summary: Josué Duverger (born 27 April 2000) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Rheinlandliga club Cosmos Koblenz. Born in Canada, he plays for the Haiti national team.
Josue Duverger.note: Haiti's third goalkeeper option, giving the squad penalty reactions, patience in low blocks, and emergency depth.
Josue Duverger.noteZh: 若苏埃·杜韦尔热是海地第三门将选择，能提供点球反应、低位防守中的耐心，以及应急深度。

Keeto Thermoncy.name: Keeto Thermoncy
Keeto Thermoncy.summary: Keeto Thermoncy (born 29 March 2006) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for the U21 team of Young Boys in the Promotion League. Born in Switzerland, he plays for the Haiti national team.
Keeto Thermoncy.note: Haiti's young centre-back, giving them aerial reach, defensive depth, and a long-term profile in a demanding tournament.
Keeto Thermoncy.noteZh: 基托·特蒙西是海地年轻中卫，能提供空中覆盖、防守深度，以及大赛中的长期培养价值。

Louicius Deedson.name: Louicius Deedson
Louicius Deedson.summary: Don Deedson Louicius (born 11 February 2001), commonly known as Louicius Deedson, is a Haitian professional footballer who plays as a right winger for MLS club FC Dallas and the Haiti national team.
Louicius Deedson.note: Haiti's right-wing outlet, stretching transition attacks and looking for cutbacks when defenders overcommit.
Louicius Deedson.noteZh: 路易修斯·迪德森是海地右路出口，能拉开转换进攻，并在防守人扑过头时寻找倒三角传球。

Markhus Lacroix.name: Markhus Lacroix
Markhus Lacroix.summary: Markhus "Duke" Lacroix (born 14 October 1993) is a professional footballer who plays as a full-back for Colorado Springs Switchbacks in the USL Championship. Born in the United States, he plays for the Haiti national team.
Markhus Lacroix.note: Haiti's experienced left-sided option, known as Duke, giving them wide defending, set-piece delivery, and tournament calm.
Markhus Lacroix.noteZh: 马库斯·“杜克”·拉克鲁瓦是海地经验丰富的左路选择，能提供边路防守、定位球传球和大赛冷静。

Martin Experience.name: Martin Experience
Martin Experience.summary: Martin Yves Expérience (born 9 March 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as a left-back for French Ligue 2 club Nancy. Born in France, he plays for the Haiti national team.
Martin Experience.note: Haiti's left-back runner, useful for recovery sprints, overlap support, and surviving repeated wide duels.
Martin Experience.noteZh: 马丁·埃克斯佩里昂斯是海地左后卫跑动点，能回追冲刺、支援套边，并应对反复的边路对抗。

Ricardo Ade.name: Ricardo Ade
Ricardo Ade.summary: Ricardo Adé Kat (born 21 May 1990) is a Haitian professional footballer who plays as a defender for Ecuadorian club L.D.U. Quito and the Haiti national team.
Ricardo Ade.note: Haiti's veteran centre-back, bringing aerial power, defensive leadership, and a rugged presence inside the box.
Ricardo Ade.noteZh: 里卡多·阿德是海地老将中卫，能带来空中力量、防守领导力，以及禁区内的强硬存在感。

Ruben Providence.name: Ruben Providence
Ruben Providence.summary: Ruben Fritzner Providence (born 7 July 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger or forward for Dutch Eerste Divisie club Almere City. Born in France, he plays for the Haiti national team.
Ruben Providence.note: Haiti's left-wing counter outlet, stretching space with pace and carrying forward before the opponent can recover shape.
Ruben Providence.noteZh: 鲁本·普罗维登斯是海地左路反击出口，能用速度拉开空间，并在对手恢复阵型前向前推进。

Wilguens Paugain.name: Wilguens Paugain
Wilguens Paugain.summary: Wilguens Raphael Polynice Paugain (born 24 August 2001) is a Haitian professional football player who plays as right-back for Zulte Waregem. A former youth international for France, he plays for the Haiti national team.
Wilguens Paugain.note: Haiti's right-back energy option, giving them wide tackling, support runs, and fresh legs against late pressure.
Wilguens Paugain.noteZh: 威尔根斯·波甘是海地活力型右后卫选择，能完成边路抢断、支援跑动，并在后段压力下提供新鲜体能。

Woodensky Pierre.name: Woodensky Pierre
Woodensky Pierre.summary: Olivier Woodensky Pierre (born 30 December 2004) is a Haitian footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Ligue Haïtienne team Violette AC and the Haiti national team.
Woodensky Pierre.note: Haiti's domestic midfield stopper, useful for ball-winning, protective positioning, and giving the squad a home-league edge.
Woodensky Pierre.noteZh: 伍登斯基·皮埃尔是海地本土联赛的中场拦截者，能抢球、站位保护，并给阵容带来本土联赛特质。

Yassin Fortune.name: Yassin Fortune
Yassin Fortune.summary: Yassin Enzo Fortuné (born 30 January 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Liga Portugal 2 club Vizela. Born in France, he represents the Haiti national team.
Yassin Fortune.note: Haiti's flexible forward option, able to run beyond, drop between lines, and add late attacking movement.
Yassin Fortune.noteZh: 亚辛·福尔蒂内是海地灵活的前场选择，能前插身后、回撤到线间，并增加后段进攻跑动。

Alexandr Sojka.name: Alexandr Sojka
Alexandr Sojka.summary: Alexandr Sojka (born 2 April 2003) is a Czech professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Viktoria Plzeň and the Czech Republic national team.
Alexandr Sojka.note: Czechia's young midfield passer, helping them keep possession connected and escape pressure through short combinations.
Alexandr Sojka.noteZh: 亚历山大·索伊卡是捷克年轻中场传球手，能帮助球队保持控球连接，并通过短传配合摆脱压力。

David Doudera.name: David Doudera
David Doudera.summary: David Douděra (born 31 May 1998) is a Czech professional footballer who plays as a right midfielder for Czech First League side Slavia Prague and the Czech Republic national team.
David Doudera.note: Czechia's right-side runner, giving them repeated overlaps, early delivery, and enough stamina to recover after attacks.
David Doudera.noteZh: 大卫·杜德拉是捷克右路跑动点，能反复套边、早早传中，并有体能在进攻后回追。

David Jurasek.name: David Jurasek
David Jurasek.summary: David Jurásek (born 7 August 2000) is a Czech professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Czech First League club Slavia Prague. He also represents the Czech Republic national team.
David Jurasek.note: Czechia's left-back outlet, stretching the flank with width, crossing from deeper zones, and recovering into the back line.
David Jurasek.noteZh: 大卫·尤拉塞克是捷克左后卫出口，能用宽度拉开边路、从更深位置传中，并回收到防线。

David Zima.name: David Zima
David Zima.summary: David Zima (born 8 November 2000) is a Czech professional footballer who plays as a defender for Slavia Prague and the Czech Republic national team.
David Zima.note: Czechia's composed centre-back, useful for aerial clearances, simple first passes, and keeping the defensive line organized.
David Zima.noteZh: 大卫·齐马是捷克沉稳中卫，能完成空中解围、送出简洁第一传，并保持防线组织。

Denis Visinsky.name: Denis Visinsky
Denis Visinsky.summary: Denis Višinský (born 21 March 2003) is a Czech professional footballer who plays as a winger for Viktoria Plzeň and the Czech Republic national team.
Denis Visinsky.note: Czechia's creative midfield spark, bringing quick combinations, late runs, and fresh ideas when a match tightens.
Denis Visinsky.noteZh: 丹尼斯·维辛斯基是捷克中场创造火花，能带来快速配合、后插上跑动，并在比赛变紧时提供新想法。

Hugo Sochurek.name: Hugo Sochurek
Hugo Sochurek.summary: Hugo Sochůrek is a Czechia central midfielder from Sparta Prague who adds youthful passing range, pressure resistance, and long-term upside to the squad.
Hugo Sochurek.note: Czechia's teenage midfield wildcard, able to receive under pressure, pass forward early, and change the team's rhythm.
Hugo Sochurek.noteZh: 雨果·索胡雷克是捷克年轻中场变数，能在压力下接球、提前向前传，并改变球队节奏。

Jan Kuchta.name: Jan Kuchta
Jan Kuchta.summary: Jan Kuchta (born 8 January 1997) is a Czech professional footballer who plays as a forward for Sparta Prague and the Czech Republic national team.
Jan Kuchta.note: Czechia's hard-running forward, useful for pressing centre-backs, attacking channels, and keeping defenders busy near Schick.

Olwethu Makhanya.name: Olwethu Makhanya
Olwethu Makhanya.summary: Olwethu Mpilwenhle Makhanya (born 30 April 2004) is a South African professional soccer player who plays as a defender for the Philadelphia Union of Major League Soccer and the South Africa national team.
Olwethu Makhanya.note: South Africa's athletic defensive option, giving them recovery speed, centre-back depth, and a higher ceiling.
Olwethu Makhanya.noteZh: 奥尔韦图·马坎亚是南非运动能力强的防守选择，能提供回追速度、中卫深度和更高潜力。

Oswin Appollis.name: Oswin Appollis
Oswin Appollis.summary: Oswin Reagan Appollis (born 25 August 2001) is a South African soccer player who currently plays as a winger or attacking midfielder for South African Premiership club Orlando Pirates and the South Africa national team.
Oswin Appollis.note: South Africa's attacking spark, able to beat the first defender and slip the final pass when space opens.
Oswin Appollis.noteZh: 奥斯温·阿波利斯是南非进攻火花，能过掉第一名防守人，并在空间出现时送出最后一传。

Relebohile Mofokeng.name: Relebohile Mofokeng
Relebohile Mofokeng.summary: Relebohile Mofokeng (né Ratomo; born 23 October 2004) is a South African professional soccer player who plays as an attacking midfielder or winger for Orlando Pirates and the South Africa national team.
Relebohile Mofokeng.note: South Africa's fearless young creator, bringing quick feet, left-side carries, and invention against deep blocks.
Relebohile Mofokeng.noteZh: 雷莱博希莱·莫福肯是南非无畏的年轻创造者，能用快脚、左路带球和灵感冲击低位防守。

Ricardo Goss.name: Ricardo Goss
Ricardo Goss.summary: Stuart Ricardo Goss (born 2 April 1994) is a South African soccer player who plays as a goalkeeper for South African Premier Division club SuperSport United on loan from Mamelodi Sundowns and the South Africa national team.
Ricardo Goss.note: South Africa's goalkeeper cover, giving them shot-stopping depth and a vocal option behind Williams.
Ricardo Goss.noteZh: 里卡多·戈斯是南非门将保障，能在威廉姆斯身后提供扑救深度和清晰指挥。

Samukele Kabini.name: Samukele Kabini
Samukele Kabini.summary: Samukele Alucious Kabini (born 15 March 2004) is a South African professional soccer player who plays as a defender for Eliteserien club Molde FK and the South Africa national team.
Samukele Kabini.note: South Africa's European-based left-back, giving them recovery speed, wide defending, and a fresher outlet.
Samukele Kabini.noteZh: 萨穆凯莱·卡比尼是南非效力欧洲的左后卫，能提供回追速度、边路防守和更有活力的出口。

Sipho Chaine.name: Sipho Chaine
Sipho Chaine.summary: Sipho Justin Chaine (born 14 December 1996) is a South African soccer player who plays as a goalkeeper for Orlando Pirates in the South African Premier Division and the South Africa national team.
Sipho Chaine.note: South Africa's domestic goalkeeper option, useful for reaction saves and keeping the back line organized.
Sipho Chaine.noteZh: 西福·查伊内是南非本土门将选择，能完成反应扑救，并保持后防线组织。

Sphephelo Sithole.name: Sphephelo Sithole
Sphephelo Sithole.summary: Sphephelo S'Miso "Yaya" Sithole (born 3 March 1999) is a South African professional soccer player who plays as a midfielder for Primeira Liga club CD Tondela and the South Africa national team.
Sphephelo Sithole.note: South Africa's rangy midfielder, using size, ball-winning, and simple tempo control to steady the middle.
Sphephelo Sithole.noteZh: 斯菲费洛·西托莱是南非覆盖范围大的中场，能用身材、抢球和简洁节奏控制稳住中路。

Thabang Matuludi.name: Thabang Matuludi
Thabang Matuludi.summary: Tholo Thabang Matuludi (born 14 January 1999) is a South African soccer player who plays as a right back for Polokwane City in the Premier Soccer League and the South Africa national team.
Thabang Matuludi.note: South Africa's right-back cover, useful for wide tackling, support runs, and late-game defensive energy.
Thabang Matuludi.noteZh: 塔邦·马图卢迪是南非右后卫保障，能边路抢断、支援跑动，并在比赛后段提供防守体能。

Thalente Mbatha.name: Thalente Mbatha
Thalente Mbatha.summary: Thalente Wandile Mbatha (born 6 March 2000) is a South African soccer player who plays as a defensive midfielder for Premier Soccer League side Orlando Pirates and the South Africa national team. Mbatha scored on his international debut in 2024 against Uganda.
Thalente Mbatha.note: South Africa's defensive midfield bite, helping them press counters early and recycle possession quickly.
Thalente Mbatha.noteZh: 塔伦特·姆巴塔是南非防守型中场硬度来源，能提前压制反击并快速回收球权。

Thapelo Maseko.name: Thapelo Maseko
Thapelo Maseko.summary: Thapelo Maseko (born 11 November 2003) is a South African professional soccer player who plays as a forward for Mamelodi Sundowns and the South Africa national team.
Thapelo Maseko.note: South Africa's wide-speed threat, useful for direct dribbling, transition runs, and stretching tired full-backs.
Thapelo Maseko.noteZh: 塔佩洛·马塞科是南非边路速度威胁，能直接盘带、转换冲刺，并拉扯疲劳边后卫。

Themba Zwane.name: Themba Zwane
Themba Zwane.summary: Themba Zwane (born 3 August 1989), also known as Mshishi, is a South African professional soccer player who plays as an attacking midfielder for Premier Soccer League club Mamelodi Sundowns and the South Africa national team.
Themba Zwane.note: South Africa's veteran creator, bringing calm touches between lines and better decisions near the box.
Themba Zwane.noteZh: 滕巴·兹瓦内是南非老将创造者，能在线间冷静触球，并在禁区附近做出更好选择。

Tshepang Moremi.name: Tshepang Moremi
Tshepang Moremi.summary: Tshepang Moremi (born 2 October 2000) is a South African soccer player who plays as a winger for Premier Soccer League club Orlando Pirates and the South Africa national team.
Tshepang Moremi.note: South Africa's bench-speed winger, able to carry directly and test defenders once the match opens up.
Tshepang Moremi.noteZh: 采潘·莫雷米是南非替补速度型边锋，能直接带球，并在比赛打开后考验防守人。

Jens Castrop.name: Jens Castrop
Jens Castrop.summary: Jens Castrop is a South Korea central midfielder from Borussia Mönchengladbach who adds Bundesliga intensity, duel pressure, and two-way running.
Jens Castrop.note: Castrop gives South Korea midfield bite, adding duels, counter-pressure, and hard running without slowing possession.
Jens Castrop.noteZh: 卡斯特罗普为韩国中场增加硬度，带来对抗、反抢和持续跑动，同时不会拖慢控球。

Bae Jun-ho.name: Bae Jun-ho
Bae Jun-ho.summary: Bae Jun-ho is a South Korea attacking midfielder from Stoke City who adds half-turn receiving, tight-space passing, and final-third invention.
Bae Jun-ho.note: South Korea's creative connector, comfortable receiving between lines and slipping quick passes before the block resets.
Bae Jun-ho.noteZh: 裴俊浩是韩国的创造型连接点，擅长在线间接球，并在防守阵型重置前送出快速传球。

Cho Gue-sung.name: Cho Gue-sung
Cho Gue-sung.summary: Cho Gue-sung is a South Korea centre-forward from FC Midtjylland who gives the national team aerial presence, hold-up play, and penalty-box finishing.
Cho Gue-sung.note: South Korea's aerial striker, giving them a clear target for crosses, direct balls, and late pressure in the box.
Cho Gue-sung.noteZh: 曹圭成是韩国的空中型前锋，能在传中、直传和禁区后段施压时提供明确支点。

Cho Wi-je.name: Cho Wi-je
Cho Wi-je.summary: Cho Wi-je is a South Korea centre-back from Jeonbuk Hyundai Motors who adds size, man-marking, and aerial defending to the squad.
Cho Wi-je.note: South Korea's physical centre-back cover, useful when they need height, tight marking, and cleaner box defending.
Cho Wi-je.noteZh: 曹维济是韩国的身体型中卫保障，在球队需要高度、紧密盯人和更干净的禁区防守时很有用。

Eom Ji-sung.name: Eom Ji-sung
Eom Ji-sung.summary: Eom Ji-sung is a South Korea winger from Swansea City who adds one-on-one dribbling, inside carries, and bench attacking tempo.
Eom Ji-sung.note: South Korea can use Eom as a late wide spark, especially for dribbling inside and changing the attack's rhythm.
Eom Ji-sung.noteZh: 韩国可以把严志成用作后段边路火花，尤其适合内切带球并改变进攻节奏。

Hwang Hee-chan.name: Hwang Hee-chan
Hwang Hee-chan.summary: Hwang Hee-chan is a South Korea forward from Wolverhampton Wanderers who adds explosive pressing, channel running, and direct penalty-box threat.
Hwang Hee-chan.note: Hwang gives South Korea vertical force, pressing centre-backs and turning loose transitions into direct shots.
Hwang Hee-chan.noteZh: 黄喜灿为韩国提供纵向冲击，能压迫中卫，并把松散转换变成直接射门。

Hwang In-beom.name: Hwang In-beom
Hwang In-beom.summary: Hwang In-beom is a South Korea midfielder from Feyenoord who gives the national team build-up passing, pressure resistance, and set-piece quality.
Hwang In-beom.note: South Korea's midfield organizer, trusted to receive under pressure and make the first forward pass cleaner.
Hwang In-beom.noteZh: 黄仁范是韩国的中场组织者，能在压力下接球，并把第一脚向前传得更干净。

Jo Hyeon-woo.name: Jo Hyeon-woo
Jo Hyeon-woo.summary: Jo Hyeon-woo is a South Korea goalkeeper from Ulsan HD who adds reflex saves, tournament experience, and command of the box.
Jo Hyeon-woo.note: Jo is the experienced keeper option, valuable for reaction saves and calm organization when games get stretched.
Jo Hyeon-woo.noteZh: 赵贤祐是经验丰富的门将选择，在比赛拉开时能提供反应扑救和冷静组织。

Kim Jin-gyu.name: Kim Jin-gyu
Kim Jin-gyu.summary: Kim Jin-gyu is a South Korea central midfielder from Jeonbuk Hyundai Motors who adds simple circulation, late support, and domestic rhythm.
Kim Jin-gyu.note: Kim Jin-gyu keeps midfield possessions tidy, offering short passing, second-ball support, and steady central balance.
Kim Jin-gyu.noteZh: 金镇圭能让韩国中场控球更整洁，提供短传、第二落点支援和稳定的中路平衡。

Kim Moon-hwan.name: Kim Moon-hwan
Kim Moon-hwan.summary: Kim Moon-hwan is a South Korea right-back from Daejeon Hana Citizen who adds overlap timing, wide defending, and tournament experience.
Kim Moon-hwan.note: Kim Moon-hwan is a reliable right-side runner, helping Korea overlap, recover, and keep wide duels honest.
Kim Moon-hwan.noteZh: 金文焕是韩国可靠的右路跑动点，能帮助球队套边、回追，并稳住边路对抗。

Kim Seung-gyu.name: Kim Seung-gyu
Kim Seung-gyu.summary: Kim Seung-gyu is a South Korea goalkeeper from FC Tokyo who brings experience, distribution, and shot-stopping command.
Kim Seung-gyu.note: Kim Seung-gyu is the senior goalkeeping presence, important for distribution choices and organizing a tense back line.
Kim Seung-gyu.noteZh: 金承奎是韩国资深门将，对出球选择和组织紧张防线都很重要。

Kim Tae-hyeon.name: Kim Tae-hyeon
Kim Tae-hyeon.summary: Kim Tae-hyeon is a South Korea defender from Kashima Antlers who adds left-footed centre-back cover, recovery defending, and aerial strength.
Kim Tae-hyeon.note: Kim Tae-hyeon gives South Korea left-footed defensive cover, useful for back-line balance and emergency recovery runs.
Kim Tae-hyeon.noteZh: 金太铉为韩国提供左脚防守保障，有助于防线平衡和紧急回追。

Lee Dong-gyeong.name: Lee Dong-gyeong
Lee Dong-gyeong.summary: Lee Dong-gyeong is a South Korea attacking midfielder from Ulsan HD who adds left-footed passing, shooting range, and between-lines creativity.
Lee Dong-gyeong.note: Lee Dong-gyeong is a left-footed creator who can speed up Korea's attacks with switches and shots from range.
Lee Dong-gyeong.noteZh: 李东炅是左脚创造者，能通过转移球和远射加快韩国进攻。

Lee Gi-hyuk.name: Lee Gi-hyuk
Lee Gi-hyuk.summary: Lee Gi-hyuk is a South Korea defender from Gangwon FC who adds left-footed centre-back play, composure, and flexible build-up options.
Lee Gi-hyuk.note: Lee Gi-hyuk helps Korea build from the back, giving them a left-footed passer who can still defend the channel.
Lee Gi-hyuk.noteZh: 李基赫帮助韩国从后场组织，提供能传球的左脚中卫，同时还能防守边中通道。

Lee Han-beom.name: Lee Han-beom
Lee Han-beom.summary: Lee Han-beom is a South Korea centre-back from FC Midtjylland who adds European experience, aerial defending, and recovery power.
Lee Han-beom.note: Lee Han-beom gives the back line younger legs, aerial size, and experience defending in a faster European league.
Lee Han-beom.noteZh: 李韩汎让韩国防线拥有更年轻的腿脚、空中高度，以及在更快欧洲联赛防守的经验。

Lee Jae-sung.name: Lee Jae-sung
Lee Jae-sung.summary: Lee Jae-sung is a South Korea attacking midfielder from Mainz 05 who adds pressing intelligence, link play, and late box arrivals.
Lee Jae-sung.note: Lee Jae-sung is Korea's veteran connector, pressing smartly and arriving late when Son or Lee Kang-in draw attention.
Lee Jae-sung.noteZh: 李在城是韩国的老练连接点，能聪明压迫，并在孙兴慜或李刚仁吸引注意后后插上。

Lee Tae-seok.name: Lee Tae-seok
Lee Tae-seok.summary: Lee Tae-seok is a South Korea left-back from Austria Wien who adds width, crossing range, and progressive carries down the flank.
Lee Tae-seok.note: Lee Tae-seok stretches Korea's left side, carrying into space and serving crosses before defenses settle.
Lee Tae-seok.noteZh: 李泰锡能拉开韩国左路，带球进入空间，并在防线站稳前送出传中。

Oh Hyeon-gyu.name: Oh Hyeon-gyu
Oh Hyeon-gyu.summary: Oh Hyeon-gyu is a South Korea centre-forward from Beşiktaş who adds strength, penalty-box movement, and direct finishing.
Oh Hyeon-gyu.note: Oh gives Korea a stronger No. 9 profile, attacking near-post space and finishing through contact.
Oh Hyeon-gyu.noteZh: 吴贤揆为韩国提供更强壮的九号位形态，能冲击前点空间并在对抗中完成终结。

Paik Seung-ho.name: Paik Seung-ho
Paik Seung-ho.summary: Paik Seung-ho is a South Korea central midfielder from Birmingham City who adds deep passing, tempo control, and ball-winning balance.
Paik Seung-ho.note: Paik steadies Korea's midfield base, keeping passes moving and adding enough bite to protect transitions.
Paik Seung-ho.noteZh: 白昇浩稳住韩国中场底座，能保持传球流动，并增加足够硬度来保护攻守转换。

Park Jin-seob.name: Park Jin-seob
Park Jin-seob.summary: Park Jin-seob is a South Korea defensive midfielder from Zhejiang FC who adds screening, centre-back cover, and aerial bite.
Park Jin-seob.note: Park Jin-seob is Korea's defensive plug, able to sit in midfield or drop into the back line when needed.
Park Jin-seob.noteZh: 朴镇燮是韩国的防守补丁，能坐镇中场，也能在需要时回落到防线。

Seol Young-woo.name: Seol Young-woo
Seol Young-woo.summary: Seol Young-woo is a South Korea right-back from Red Star Belgrade who adds two-sided full-back cover, recovery speed, and attacking support.
Seol Young-woo.note: Seol gives Korea flexible full-back coverage, with enough recovery pace to support attacks and still retreat.
Seol Young-woo.noteZh: 薛英佑为韩国提供灵活的边后卫覆盖，有足够回追速度去支援进攻后再退回防守。

Song Bum-keun.name: Song Bum-keun
Song Bum-keun.summary: Song Bum-keun is a South Korea goalkeeper from Jeonbuk Hyundai Motors who adds shot-stopping depth, size, and domestic rhythm.
Song Bum-keun.note: Song is the goalkeeper safety net, giving Korea a big shot-stopper with regular K League rhythm.
Song Bum-keun.noteZh: 宋范根是韩国的门将安全网，提供身材高大的扑救选择，并保持稳定的K联赛节奏。

Yang Hyun-jun.name: Yang Hyun-jun
Yang Hyun-jun.summary: Yang Hyun-jun is a South Korea winger from Celtic who adds direct dribbling, right-side speed, and one-on-one pressure.
Yang Hyun-jun.note: Yang is Korea's direct wide runner, useful for isolating full-backs and forcing defenders to turn.
Yang Hyun-jun.noteZh: 梁贤俊是韩国的直接型边路跑动点，适合单挑边后卫并迫使防守者转身。

Alan Franco.name: Alan Franco
Alan Franco.summary: Alan Steven Franco Palma (born 21 August 1998) is an Ecuadorian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club Atlético Mineiro and the Ecuador national team.
Alan Franco.note: Ecuador's steady midfield balancer, useful for closing central gaps and keeping the next pass simple.
Alan Franco.noteZh: 阿兰·弗朗科是厄瓜多尔稳定的中场平衡点，能封住中路空当，并把下一脚传球处理得简洁。

Alan Minda.name: Alan Minda
Alan Minda.summary: Alan Steve Minda García (born 14 May 2003) is an Ecuadorian professional footballer who plays as a winger for Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club Atlético Mineiro and the Ecuador national team.
Alan Minda.note: Ecuador's quick wide runner, able to attack tired full-backs and turn loose transitions into carries.
Alan Minda.noteZh: 阿兰·明达是厄瓜多尔速度型边路跑动点，能冲击疲劳的边后卫，并把松散转换变成带球推进。

Angelo Preciado.name: Angelo Preciado
Angelo Preciado.summary: Ángelo Smit Preciado Quiñónez (born 18 February 1998) is an Ecuadorian professional footballer who plays as a right-back or winger for Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club Atlético Mineiro and the Ecuador national team.
Angelo Preciado.note: Ecuador's attacking right-back, giving them overlaps, recovery pace, and a real crossing lane from deep.
Angelo Preciado.noteZh: 安赫洛·普雷西亚多是厄瓜多尔进攻型右后卫，能提供套边、回追速度和来自深处的真实传中通道。

Anthony Valencia.name: Anthony Valencia
Anthony Valencia.summary: Anthony Lenín Valencia Bajaña (born 21 July 2003) is an Ecuadorian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Belgian club Royal Antwerp and the Ecuador national team.
Anthony Valencia.note: Ecuador's mobile midfield option, useful for pressing support and carrying the ball through the first line.
Anthony Valencia.noteZh: 安东尼·瓦伦西亚是厄瓜多尔机动型中场选择，能支援压迫，并带球穿过第一道防线。

Denil Castillo.name: Denil Castillo
Denil Castillo.summary: Denil Daniel Castillo Preciado (born 24 March 2004) is an Ecuadorian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for FC Midtjylland and the Ecuador national team.
Denil Castillo.note: Ecuador's young holding midfielder, adding size, long passing, and protection in front of the centre-backs.
Denil Castillo.noteZh: 德尼尔·卡斯蒂略是厄瓜多尔年轻后腰，能增加身材、长传和中卫身前的保护。

Felix Torres.name: Felix Torres
Felix Torres.summary: Félix Eduardo Torres Caicedo (born 11 January 1997) is an Ecuadorian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Campeonato Brasileiro Serie A club Internacional on loan from Corinthians and the Ecuador national team.
Felix Torres.note: Ecuador's physical centre-back, important for aerial clearances, tight marking, and attacking set pieces.
Felix Torres.noteZh: 费利克斯·托雷斯是厄瓜多尔身体型中卫，对空中解围、紧密盯人和进攻定位球都很重要。

Gonzalo Plata.name: Gonzalo Plata
Gonzalo Plata.summary: Gonzalo Jordy Plata Jiménez (born 1 November 2000) is an Ecuadorian professional footballer who plays as a right winger for Campeonato Brasileiro Serie A club Flamengo and the Ecuador national team.
Gonzalo Plata.note: Ecuador's right-side creator, dangerous when he isolates a defender and cuts inside onto his stronger actions.
Gonzalo Plata.noteZh: 贡萨洛·普拉塔是厄瓜多尔右路创造者，在单挑防守人并内切做出强势动作时最有威胁。

Gonzalo Valle.name: Gonzalo Valle
Gonzalo Valle.summary: Gonzalo Roberto Valle Bustamante (born 28 February 1996) is an Ecuadorian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Ecuadorian Serie A side L.D.U. Quito and the Ecuador national team.
Gonzalo Valle.note: Ecuador's goalkeeper cover, bringing domestic rhythm and a reliable shot-stopping option behind the starters.
Gonzalo Valle.noteZh: 贡萨洛·巴列是厄瓜多尔门将保障，带来本土比赛节奏，并在主力身后提供可靠扑救选择。

Hernan Galindez.name: Hernan Galindez
Hernan Galindez.summary: Hernán Ismael Galíndez (born 30 March 1987) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Argentine Primera División club Huracán. Born in Argentina, he represents the Ecuador national team.
Hernan Galindez.note: Ecuador's veteran keeper, trusted for command, tournament calm, and saves when the back line bends.
Hernan Galindez.noteZh: 埃尔南·加林德斯是厄瓜多尔老练门将，在指挥、大赛冷静和防线承压时的扑救上值得信任。

Jackson Porozo.name: Jackson Porozo
Jackson Porozo.summary: Jackson Gabriel Porozo Vernaza (born 4 August 2000) is an Ecuadorian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Liga MX club Tijuana and the Ecuador national team.
Jackson Porozo.note: Ecuador's athletic centre-back depth, useful when they need size and recovery speed against direct forwards.
Jackson Porozo.noteZh: 杰克逊·波罗索是厄瓜多尔运动能力强的中卫深度，在面对直接型前锋时能提供身材和回追速度。

Jeremy Arevalo.name: Jeremy Arevalo
Jeremy Arevalo.summary: Jeremy Alberto Arévalo Mera (born 19 March 2005) is a footballer who plays as a forward for German Bundesliga club VfB Stuttgart. Born in Spain, he plays for the Ecuador national team.
Jeremy Arevalo.note: Ecuador's young striker option, bringing pressing runs, penalty-box movement, and fresh energy off the bench.
Jeremy Arevalo.noteZh: 杰里米·阿雷瓦洛是厄瓜多尔年轻前锋选择，能带来压迫跑动、禁区走位和替补席上的新鲜活力。

Joel Ordonez.name: Joel Ordonez
Joel Ordonez.summary: Joel Leandro Ordóñez Guerrero (born 21 April 2004) is an Ecuadorian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Belgian Pro League club Club Brugge and the Ecuador national team.
Joel Ordonez.note: Ecuador's high-upside centre-back, giving them aerial power, calm defending, and passes that beat pressure.
Joel Ordonez.noteZh: 乔尔·奥多涅斯是厄瓜多尔高潜力中卫，能提供空中力量、冷静防守和穿透压力的传球。

John Yeboah.name: John Yeboah
John Yeboah.summary: John Yeboah Zamora (born 23 June 2000) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger for Serie A club Venezia. Born in Germany, he plays for the Ecuador national team.
John Yeboah.note: Ecuador's left-footed wide threat, useful for fast breaks, sharp changes of direction, and final-third invention.
John Yeboah.noteZh: 约翰·耶博阿是厄瓜多尔左脚边路威胁，适合快攻、突然变向和前场创造。

Jordy Alcivar.name: Jordy Alcivar
Jordy Alcivar.summary: Jordy José Alcívar Macías (born 5 August 1999) is an Ecuadorian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder or defender for Independiente del Valle and the Ecuador national team.
Jordy Alcivar.note: Ecuador's domestic midfield controller, helping with tackles, restarts, and a calmer rhythm when games get frantic.
Jordy Alcivar.noteZh: 约尔迪·阿尔西瓦尔是厄瓜多尔本土中场控制者，能在比赛变乱时提供抢断、定位球和更冷静的节奏。

Jordy Caicedo.name: Jordy Caicedo

Sontje Hansen.noteZh: 松杰·汉森是库拉索敏捷的右边锋，能用快脚、前场火花和摆脱紧盯防守来制造威胁。

Trevor Doornbusch.name: Trevor Doornbusch
Trevor Doornbusch.summary: Trevor Irving Doornbusch (born 6 July 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Eerste Divisie club VVV-Venlo. Born in the Netherlands, he plays for the Curaçao national team.
Trevor Doornbusch.note: Curaçao's goalkeeper depth, giving them a tall shot-stopper and cover behind Room.
Trevor Doornbusch.noteZh: 特雷弗·多恩布施是库拉索门将深度，在鲁姆身后提供高大扑救选择和保障。

Tyrese Noslin.name: Tyrese Noslin
Tyrese Noslin.summary: Tyrese Noslin (born 11 September 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back or right midfielder for Eredivisie club Telstar. Born in the Netherlands, he plays for the Curaçao national team.
Tyrese Noslin.note: Curaçao's right-side runner, useful for carrying forward and supporting midfield pressure on the flank.
Tyrese Noslin.noteZh: 泰里斯·诺斯林是库拉索右路跑动点，能向前带球，并在边路支援中场压迫。

Tyrick Bodak.name: Tyrick Bodak
Tyrick Bodak.summary: Tyrick Bodak (born 15 May 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Eredivisie club Telstar. Born in the Netherlands, he plays for the Curaçao national team.
Tyrick Bodak.note: Curaçao's young goalkeeper cover, adding reaction saves and long-term depth to the squad.
Tyrick Bodak.noteZh: 泰里克·博达克是库拉索年轻门将保障，能提供反应扑救和长期深度。

Roshon van Eijma.name: Roshon van Eijma
Roshon van Eijma.summary: Róshón Felix Romar Jordan van Eijma (born 9 June 1998) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Eerste Divisie club RKC Waalwijk. Born in the Netherlands, he plays for the Curaçao national team.
Roshon van Eijma.note: Curaçao's centre-back organizer, useful for marking, aerial cover, and keeping the line connected.
Roshon van Eijma.noteZh: 罗申·范艾马是库拉索中卫组织者，能盯人、空中覆盖，并保持防线连接。

Alban Lafont.name: Alban Lafont
Alban Lafont.summary: Alban-Marc Lafont (born 23 January 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as goalkeeper for Ligue 2 club Nantes. Born in Burkina Faso and raised in France, he plays for the Ivory Coast national team.
Alban Lafont.note: Côte d'Ivoire's back-line organizer, valuable for calm restarts and saves through crowded penalty areas.
Alban Lafont.noteZh: 阿尔班·拉丰是科特迪瓦防线后的组织者，能带来冷静的重新发起进攻和禁区人群中的扑救。

Ange-Yoan Bonny.name: Ange-Yoan Bonny
Ange-Yoan Bonny.summary: Ange-Yoan Bonny is a Côte d'Ivoire centre-forward at Inter Milan who gives the national team hold-up play, box presence, and power running.
Ange-Yoan Bonny.note: Côte d'Ivoire's powerful centre-forward option, built for pinning centre-backs and attacking first-time chances.
Ange-Yoan Bonny.noteZh: 安热-约安·博尼是科特迪瓦力量型中锋选择，适合压住中卫并冲击第一时间机会。

Bazoumana Toure.name: Bazoumana Toure
Bazoumana Toure.summary: Bazoumana Touré (born 2 March 2006) is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a winger for German Bundesliga club TSG Hoffenheim and the Ivory Coast national team.
Bazoumana Toure.note: Côte d'Ivoire's young left-side accelerator, able to turn open grass into direct pressure on retreating defenders.
Bazoumana Toure.noteZh: 巴祖马纳·图雷是科特迪瓦年轻的左路加速点，能把开阔空间变成对回追后卫的直接压力。

Christ Inao Oulai.name: Christ Inao Oulai
Christ Inao Oulai.summary: Christ Ravynel Inao Oulaï (born 6 April 2006) is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Trabzonspor and the Ivory Coast national team.
Christ Inao Oulai.note: Côte d'Ivoire's high-energy central midfielder, useful for carrying through pressure and snapping into second balls.
Christ Inao Oulai.noteZh: 克里斯特·伊瑙·乌莱是科特迪瓦高能中场，适合在压力下推进并快速争抢第二落点。

Christopher Operi.name: Christopher Operi
Christopher Operi.summary: Christopher Téa Opéri (born 29 April 1997) is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Süper Lig club İstanbul Başakşehir and the Ivory Coast national team.
Christopher Operi.note: Côte d'Ivoire's left-back outlet, giving width with measured overlaps and early service from the flank.
Christopher Operi.noteZh: 克里斯托弗·奥佩里是科特迪瓦左后卫出口，能用有节奏的套边和早传提供边路宽度。

Elye Wahi.name: Elye Wahi
Elye Wahi.summary: Sepe Elye Delmas Wahi (born 2 January 2003) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Ligue 1 club Nice, on loan from Bundesliga club Eintracht Frankfurt. Born in France, he plays for the Ivory Coast national team.
Elye Wahi.note: Côte d'Ivoire's line-stretching forward, dangerous when he can sprint behind and finish before defenders reset.
Elye Wahi.noteZh: 埃利·瓦希是科特迪瓦拉扯防线的前锋，能冲到身后并在防守重整前完成终结。

Emmanuel Agbadou.name: Emmanuel Agbadou
Emmanuel Agbadou.summary: Badobre Emmanuel Elysee Djedje Agbadou (born 17 June 1997) is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Süper Lig club Beşiktaş and the Ivory Coast national team.
Emmanuel Agbadou.note: Côte d'Ivoire's physical centre-back, important for winning contact and playing assertive passes through pressure.
Emmanuel Agbadou.noteZh: 埃马纽埃尔·阿格巴杜是科特迪瓦身体型中卫，能赢下对抗并在压力中送出积极的穿透传球。

Evan Ndicka.name: Evan Ndicka
Evan Ndicka.summary: Obite Evan Ndicka (born 20 August 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Serie A club Roma. Born in France, he plays for the Ivory Coast national team.
Evan Ndicka.note: Côte d'Ivoire's composed left-sided centre-back, giving the back line balance and cleaner build-up angles.
Evan Ndicka.noteZh: 埃万·恩迪卡是科特迪瓦沉稳的左脚中卫，能让防线更平衡并提供更干净的出球角度。

Ghislain Konan.name: Ghislain Konan
Ghislain Konan.summary: Ghislain N'Clomande Konan (born 27 December 1995) is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Primeira Liga club Gil Vicente and the Ivory Coast national team.
Ghislain Konan.note: Côte d'Ivoire's steady left-back cover, useful when the team needs secure defending more than constant risk.
Ghislain Konan.noteZh: 吉斯兰·科南是科特迪瓦稳健的左后卫保障，适合球队更需要安全防守而不是持续冒险时使用。

Guela Doue.name: Guela Doue
Guela Doue.summary: Guéla Maho Lewis Doué (born 17 October 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Ligue 1 club Strasbourg. Born in France, he plays for the Ivory Coast national team.
Guela Doue.note: Côte d'Ivoire's right-side defensive hybrid, able to defend wide or tuck inside when the shape changes.
Guela Doue.noteZh: 盖拉·杜埃是科特迪瓦右路防守混合型球员，阵型变化时能守边路，也能内收到中路。

Ibrahim Sangare.name: Ibrahim Sangare
Ibrahim Sangare.summary: Ibrahim Sangaré (born 2 December 1997) is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Premier League club Nottingham Forest and the Ivory Coast national team.
Ibrahim Sangare.note: Côte d'Ivoire's central shield, built to break up counters and move the next pass before pressure arrives.
Ibrahim Sangare.noteZh: 易卜拉欣·桑加雷是科特迪瓦中路屏障，负责破坏反击并在压力到来前推进下一脚传球。

Jean Michael Seri.name: Jean Michael Seri
Jean Michael Seri.summary: Jean Michaël Seri (born 19 July 1991) is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Slovenian PrvaLiga club Maribor and the Ivory Coast national team.
Jean Michael Seri.note: Côte d'Ivoire's rhythm passer, useful for slowing a frantic match and finding the first forward angle.
Jean Michael Seri.noteZh: 让·米沙埃尔·塞里是科特迪瓦节奏传球手，能让混乱比赛降速并找到第一条向前线路。

Mohamed Kone.name: Mohamed Kone
Mohamed Kone.summary: Mohamed Koné (born 7 March 2002) is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Belgian club Charleroi and the Ivory Coast national team.
Mohamed Kone.note: Côte d'Ivoire's goalkeeper depth, offering quick reactions and direct distribution when games stretch.
Mohamed Kone.noteZh: 穆罕默德·科内是科特迪瓦门将深度选择，在比赛拉开时能提供快速反应和直接长传。

Nicolas Pepe.name: Nicolas Pepe
Nicolas Pepe.summary: Nicolas Pépé (born 29 May 1995) is a professional footballer who plays as a right winger or forward for La Liga club Villarreal. Born in France, he plays for the Ivory Coast national team.
Nicolas Pepe.note: Côte d'Ivoire's left-footed winger, still dangerous when isolated on the right or standing over restarts.
Nicolas Pepe.noteZh: 尼古拉·佩佩是科特迪瓦左脚边锋，在右路一对一或主罚定位球时依然很危险。

Odilon Kossounou.name: Odilon Kossounou
Odilon Kossounou.summary: Kouakou Odilon Dorgeless Kossounou ([ɔdilɔ̃ kɔsunu]; born 4 January 2001), better known as Odilon Kossounou, is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Serie A club Atalanta and the Ivory Coast national team.
Odilon Kossounou.note: Côte d'Ivoire's athletic defensive piece, strong enough for central duels and quick enough to cover space.
Odilon Kossounou.noteZh: 奥迪隆·科苏努是科特迪瓦运动能力出色的防守棋子，既能处理中路对抗，也能快速覆盖空间。

Oumar Diakite.name: Oumar Diakite
Oumar Diakite.summary: Oumar Diakité (born 20 December 2003) is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Belgian Pro League club Cercle Brugge, on loan from Ligue 2 club Reims, and the Ivory Coast national team.
Oumar Diakite.note: Côte d'Ivoire's restless forward option, valuable for chasing centre-backs and arriving late in the box.
Oumar Diakite.noteZh: 乌马尔·迪亚基特是科特迪瓦活跃的前锋选择，适合追压中卫并后插上进入禁区。

Ousmane Diomande.name: Ousmane Diomande
Ousmane Diomande.summary: Ousmane Diomande (born 4 December 2003) is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Primeira Liga club Sporting CP and the Ivory Coast national team.
Ousmane Diomande.note: Côte d'Ivoire's possession centre-back, able to step out with the ball and defend aggressively on the front foot.
Ousmane Diomande.noteZh: 乌斯曼·迪奥曼德是科特迪瓦控球型中卫，能带球前压，也能主动上抢防守。

Parfait Guiagon.name: Parfait Guiagon
Parfait Guiagon.summary: Parfait Guiagon is a Côte d'Ivoire left winger at Charleroi who gives the national team tight-space dribbling, left-side creativity, and quick combinations.
Parfait Guiagon.note: Côte d'Ivoire's close-control winger, useful for slipping through traffic and combining near the left half-space.
Parfait Guiagon.noteZh: 帕尔费·吉亚贡是科特迪瓦近距离控球型边锋，适合穿过密集区域并在左肋附近配合。

Seko Fofana.name: Seko Fofana
Seko Fofana.summary: Seko Mohamed Fofana (born 7 May 1995) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Primeira Liga club Porto, on loan from Ligue 1 club Rennes. Born in France, he plays for the Ivory Coast national team.
Seko Fofana.note: Côte d'Ivoire's midfield surge runner, capable of carrying through contact and turning loose balls into shots.
Seko Fofana.noteZh: 塞科·福法纳是科特迪瓦中场冲刺推进者，能带球穿过对抗，并把散落球转化为射门。

Wilfried Singo.name: Wilfried Singo
Wilfried Singo.summary: Wilfried Stephane Singo (born 25 December 2000) is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a defender for Süper Lig club Galatasaray and the Ivory Coast national team.
Wilfried Singo.note: Côte d'Ivoire's powerful right-side defender, giving the team speed, aerial bite, and back-post protection.
Wilfried Singo.noteZh: 威尔弗里德·辛戈是科特迪瓦力量型右路后卫，能提供速度、空中对抗和后点保护。

Yahia Fofana.name: Yahia Fofana
Yahia Fofana.summary: Yahia Fofana (born 21 August 2000) is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Süper Lig club Çaykur Rizespor. Born in France, he plays for the Ivory Coast national team.
Yahia Fofana.note: Côte d'Ivoire's reliable goalkeeper option, strong on reaction saves and steady when claiming crosses.
Yahia Fofana.noteZh: 亚希亚·福法纳是科特迪瓦可靠门将选择，反应扑救出色，摘传中时也很稳。

Yan Diomande.name: Yan Diomande
Yan Diomande.summary: Yan Diomande (born 14 November 2006) is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a winger for Bundesliga club RB Leipzig and the Ivory Coast national team.
Yan Diomande.note: Côte d'Ivoire's explosive young winger, able to change a possession with one carry or an early final ball.
Yan Diomande.noteZh: 扬·迪奥曼德是科特迪瓦爆发力很强的年轻边锋，能用一次带球或早传改变一次控球。

Ao Tanaka.name: Ao Tanaka
Ao Tanaka.summary: Ao Tanaka (田中 碧, Tanaka Ao; born 10 September 1998) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Leeds United and the Japan national team.
Ao Tanaka.note: Japan's midfield connector, useful for moving possession through pressure and arriving as a late option.
Ao Tanaka.noteZh: 田中碧是日本的中场连接者，能在压力下推进控球，并作为后插上的接应点出现。

Ayumu Seko.name: Ayumu Seko
Ayumu Seko.summary: Ayumu Seko (瀬古 歩夢, Seko Ayumu; born 7 June 2000) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays for Ligue 1 club Le Havre and the Japan national team.
Ayumu Seko.note: Japan's composed centre-back option, giving the back line calm passing and cleaner spacing under pressure.
Ayumu Seko.noteZh: 濑古步梦是日本沉稳的中卫选择，能在压力下提供冷静传球和更清晰的防线间距。

Daizen Maeda.name: Daizen Maeda
Daizen Maeda.summary: Daizen Maeda (前田 大然, Maeda Daizen; born 20 October 1997) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a forward for Scottish Premiership side Celtic and the Japan national team.
Daizen Maeda.note: Japan's pressing spark, built to chase defenders, stretch the left side, and crash the back post.
Daizen Maeda.noteZh: 前田大然是日本的压迫火花，适合追逼后卫、拉开左路，并冲击后点。

Hiroki Ito.name: Hiroki Ito
Hiroki Ito.summary: Hiroki Ito is a Japan left-footed centre-back at Bayern Munich who gives the national team passing balance, recovery cover, and aerial defending.
Hiroki Ito.note: Japan's left-footed centre-back, important for balanced build-up and covering space behind the line.
Hiroki Ito.noteZh: 伊藤洋辉是日本左脚中卫，对平衡出球和保护防线身后空间很重要。

Junnosuke Suzuki.name: Junnosuke Suzuki
Junnosuke Suzuki.summary: Junnosuke Suzuki (鈴木 淳之介, Suzuki Junnosuke; born 12 July 2003) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Copenhagen and the Japan national team.
Junnosuke Suzuki.note: Japan's young defensive hybrid, able to hold the line or step into midfield when the shape opens.
Junnosuke Suzuki.noteZh: 铃木淳之介是日本年轻的防守混合型球员，阵型打开时能守住防线，也能前顶到中场。

Kaishu Sano.name: Kaishu Sano
Kaishu Sano.summary: Kaishu Sano (佐野 海舟, Sano Kaishū; born 30 December 2000) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Bundesliga club Mainz 05 and the Japan national team.
Kaishu Sano.note: Japan's midfield shield, useful for stopping counters early and keeping the next pass clean.
Kaishu Sano.noteZh: 佐野海舟是日本的中场屏障，适合及早阻断反击并保持下一脚传球干净。

Keisuke Goto.name: Keisuke Goto
Keisuke Goto.summary: Keisuke Gotō (後藤 啓介, Gotō Keisuke; born 3 June 2005) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a forward for German Bundesliga club SC Freiburg and the Japan national team.
Keisuke Goto.note: Japan's young forward option, giving them channel running and a fresh penalty-box threat off the bench.
Keisuke Goto.noteZh: 后藤启介是日本年轻前锋选择，能提供肋部冲刺和替补登场后的禁区威胁。

Keisuke Osako.name: Keisuke Osako
Keisuke Osako.summary: Keisuke Ōsako (大迫 敬介, Ōsako Keisuke; born 28 July 1999) is a Japanese footballer who currently plays as a goalkeeper for J1 League club Sanfrecce Hiroshima and the Japan national team.
Keisuke Osako.note: Japan's reliable goalkeeper cover, bringing J1 rhythm, reaction saves, and calm penalty-area habits.
Keisuke Osako.noteZh: 大迫敬介是日本可靠的门将保障，带来J1比赛节奏、反应扑救和冷静的禁区习惯。

Kento Shiogai.name: Kento Shiogai
Kento Shiogai.summary: Kento Shiogai (塩貝 健人, Shiogai Kento; born 26 March 2005) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a forward for German 2. Bundesliga club VfL Wolfsburg and the Japan national team.
Kento Shiogai.note: Japan's young direct striker, useful for stretching tired centre-backs and pressing with fresh legs.
Kento Shiogai.noteZh: 盐贝健人是日本年轻的直接型前锋，适合拉扯疲惫中卫并用体能进行压迫。

Koki Ogawa.name: Koki Ogawa
Koki Ogawa.summary: Koki Ogawa is a Japan centre-forward at NEC Nijmegen who gives the national team penalty-box finishing, aerial presence, and striker depth.
Koki Ogawa.note: Japan's classic striker depth, valuable when they need a clearer target and more penalty-box gravity.
Koki Ogawa.noteZh: 小川航基是日本传统中锋深度选择，球队需要明确支点和更强禁区牵制时很有价值。

Kou Itakura.name: Kou Itakura
Kou Itakura.summary: Ko Itakura (板倉 滉, Itakura Kō; born 27 January 1997) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or defensive midfielder for Eredivisie club Ajax and captains the Japan national team.
Kou Itakura.note: Japan's defensive organizer, comfortable directing the line or stepping up to protect midfield space.
Kou Itakura.noteZh: 板仓滉是日本防守组织者，能指挥防线，也能前顶保护中场空间。

Shogo Taniguchi.name: Shogo Taniguchi
Shogo Taniguchi.summary: Shōgo Taniguchi (谷口 彰悟, Taniguchi Shōgo; born 15 July 1991) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Belgian Pro League club Sint-Truiden and the Japan national team.
Shogo Taniguchi.note: Japan's veteran defensive stabilizer, useful for late-game box defending and low-risk clearances.
Shogo Taniguchi.noteZh: 谷口彰悟是日本资深防守稳定器，适合比赛后段的禁区防守和低风险解围。

Shuto Machino.name: Shuto Machino
Shuto Machino.summary: Shūto Machino (町野 修斗, Machino Shūto; born 30 September 1999) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a striker for Bundesliga club Borussia Mönchengladbach and the Japan national team.
Shuto Machino.note: Japan's strong striker option, giving them a target for direct service and quick finishes near goal.
Shuto Machino.noteZh: 町野修斗是日本强壮的中锋选择，能接应直接传球并在门前快速终结。

Takehiro Tomiyasu.name: Takehiro Tomiyasu
Takehiro Tomiyasu.summary: Takehiro Tomiyasu (冨安 健洋, Tomiyasu Takehiro; born 5 November 1998) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a defender for Eredivisie club Ajax and the Japan national team. Mainly a full back, he can also be deployed as a centre-back.
Takehiro Tomiyasu.note: Japan's elite defensive multi-tool, able to cover across the back line and erase dangerous space.
Takehiro Tomiyasu.noteZh: 富安健洋是日本顶级防守多面手，能覆盖整条后防线并抹掉危险空间。

Tomoki Hayakawa.name: Tomoki Hayakawa
Tomoki Hayakawa.summary: Tomoki Hayakawa (早川 友基, Hayakawa Tomoki; born 3 March 1999) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for J1 League club Kashima Antlers and the Japan national team.
Tomoki Hayakawa.note: Japan's domestic goalkeeper option, offering sharp reactions and command built from regular J1 minutes.
Tomoki Hayakawa.noteZh: 早川友基是日本本土门将选择，依靠稳定J1出场带来敏捷反应和禁区指挥。

Tsuyoshi Watanabe.name: Tsuyoshi Watanabe
Tsuyoshi Watanabe.summary: Tsuyoshi Watanabe (渡辺 剛, Watanabe Tsuyoshi; born 5 February 1997) is a Japanese football player who plays as a defender for Eredivisie club Feyenoord and the Japan national team.
Tsuyoshi Watanabe.note: Japan's duel-first centre-back, valuable when opponents go direct and the match becomes more physical.
Tsuyoshi Watanabe.noteZh: 渡边刚是日本以对抗为先的中卫，对手直接冲击、比赛身体对抗增加时很有价值。

Yuito Suzuki.name: Yuito Suzuki
Yuito Suzuki.summary: Yuito Suzuki (鈴木 唯人, Suzuki Yuito; born 25 October 2001) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or a winger for German Bundesliga club SC Freiburg and the Japan national team.
Yuito Suzuki.note: Japan's flexible attacking midfielder, useful for linking moves and arriving late around the penalty spot.
Yuito Suzuki.noteZh: 铃木唯人是日本灵活的攻击型中场，能连接进攻并后插上到点球点附近。

Yukinari Sugawara.name: Yukinari Sugawara
Yukinari Sugawara.summary: Yukinari Sugawara (菅原 由勢, Sugawara Yukinari; born 28 June 2000) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a right-back for EFL Championship club Southampton and the Japan national team. Sugawara began his senior career at Nagoya Grampus.
Yukinari Sugawara.note: Japan's right-back supplier, giving the flank early crossing and reliable restart delivery.
Yukinari Sugawara.noteZh: 菅原由势是日本右后卫传球供应点，能提供边路早传和稳定的定位球传送。

Yuto Nagatomo.name: Yuto Nagatomo
Yuto Nagatomo.summary: Yūto Nagatomo (長友 佑都, Nagatomo Yūto; born 12 September 1986) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a full back for J1 League club FC Tokyo and the Japan national team.
Yuto Nagatomo.note: Japan's veteran full-back voice, valuable for leadership, late defensive cover, and tournament calm.
Yuto Nagatomo.noteZh: 长友佑都是日本资深边后卫声音，能带来领导力、比赛后段防守保障和大赛冷静。

Zion Suzuki.name: Zion Suzuki
Zion Suzuki.summary: Zion Suzuki (鈴木 彩艶, Suzuki Zaion; born 21 August 2002) is a Japanese professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Serie A club Parma. Born in the United States, he represents the Japan national team.
Zion Suzuki.note: Japan's modern goalkeeper, capable of brave passing choices and reflex saves when pressure spikes.
Zion Suzuki.noteZh: 铃木彩艳是日本现代型门将，能在压力升高时做出大胆传球选择和反应扑救。

Alexander Bernhardsson.name: Alexander Bernhardsson
Alexander Bernhardsson.summary: Alexander Olof Bernhardsson (born 8 September 1998) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a forward for 2. Bundesliga club Holstein Kiel and the Sweden national team.
Alexander Bernhardsson.note: Sweden's direct runner, useful for stretching the right side and turning loose transitions into pressure.
Alexander Bernhardsson.noteZh: 亚历山大·伯恩哈德松是瑞典的直接冲刺点，能拉开右路并把转换中的散落机会变成压力。

Benjamin Nygren.name: Benjamin Nygren
Benjamin Nygren.summary: Erik Benjamin Nygren (born 8 July 2001) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a winger or attacking midfielder for Scottish Premiership club Celtic and the Sweden national team.
Benjamin Nygren.note: Sweden's flexible attacking connector, able to drift wide, combine inside, and arrive late near goal.
Benjamin Nygren.noteZh: 本杰明·尼格伦是瑞典灵活的进攻连接者，能拉到边路、内收配合，并后插上到门前。

Besfort Zeneli.name: Besfort Zeneli
Besfort Zeneli.summary: Besfort Zeneli (born 21 November 2002) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Belgian Pro League club Union Saint-Gilloise and the Sweden national team.
Besfort Zeneli.note: Sweden's young midfield carrier, useful for escaping pressure and keeping quick moves alive.
Besfort Zeneli.noteZh: 贝斯福特·泽内利是瑞典年轻的中场推进者，适合摆脱压力并延续快速进攻。

Carl Starfelt.name: Carl Starfelt
Carl Starfelt.summary: Carl Anders Theodor Starfelt (born 1 June 1995) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for La Liga club Celta de Vigo and the Sweden national team.
Carl Starfelt.note: Sweden's experienced centre-back, valuable for aerial control and steady defending when games get direct.
Carl Starfelt.noteZh: 卡尔·斯塔费尔特是瑞典经验型中卫，在比赛变得直接时能提供空中控制和稳定防守。

Daniel Svensson.name: Daniel Svensson
Daniel Svensson.summary: Daniel Jonathan Svensson (born 12 February 2002) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder or left-back for Bundesliga club Borussia Dortmund and the Sweden national team.
Daniel Svensson.note: Sweden's left-side hybrid, able to support midfield possession or push forward from full-back zones.
Daniel Svensson.noteZh: 丹尼尔·斯文松是瑞典左路混合型球员，能支援中场控球，也能从边后卫区域前插。

Elliot Stroud.name: Elliot Stroud
Elliot Stroud.summary: Elliot Karl Stroud (born 22 June 2002) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Allsvenskan club Mjällby AIF and the Sweden national team.
Elliot Stroud.note: Sweden's left-side width option, giving the team running power and sharper crossing angles from deep.
Elliot Stroud.noteZh: 埃利奥特·斯特劳德是瑞典左路宽度选择，能从较深位置带来跑动力和更好的传中角度。

Eric Smith.name: Eric Smith
Eric Smith.summary: Eric Smith is a Sweden centre-back at St. Pauli who gives the national team defensive midfield cover, back-line calm, and long passing.
Eric Smith.note: Sweden's calm defensive passer, useful when they need a centre-back who can also protect midfield space.
Eric Smith.noteZh: 埃里克·史密斯是瑞典冷静的防守传球手，球队需要能兼顾中卫和中场保护的人时很有用。

Gabriel Gudmundsson.name: Gabriel Gudmundsson
Gabriel Gudmundsson.summary: Gabriel Johan Gudmundsson (born 29 April 1999) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Premier League club Leeds United and the Sweden national team.
Gabriel Gudmundsson.note: Sweden's left-back stabilizer, bringing recovery speed and enough forward support to balance the flank.
Gabriel Gudmundsson.noteZh: 加布里埃尔·古德蒙松是瑞典左后卫稳定点，能带来回追速度和足够的前插支援来平衡边路。

Gustaf Lagerbielke.name: Gustaf Lagerbielke
Gustaf Lagerbielke.summary: Gustaf Lagerbielke is a Sweden centre-back at Braga who gives the national team aerial defending, duel strength, and back-line depth.
Gustaf Lagerbielke.note: Sweden's aerial centre-back option, useful for defending crosses and attacking restarts at the other end.
Gustaf Lagerbielke.noteZh: 古斯塔夫·拉格比尔克是瑞典空中型中卫选择，适合防守传中并在另一端冲击定位球。

Gustaf Nilsson.name: Gustaf Nilsson
Gustaf Nilsson.summary: Gustaf Nilsson is a Sweden centre-forward at Club Brugge who gives the national team hold-up play, aerial presence, and penalty-box depth.
Gustaf Nilsson.note: Sweden's physical striker depth, valuable when they want a target for crosses and second balls.
Gustaf Nilsson.noteZh: 古斯塔夫·尼尔松是瑞典身体型中锋深度，球队需要传中目标和第二落点时很有价值。

Herman Johansson.name: Herman Johansson
Herman Johansson.summary: Herman Nils Johansson (born 16 October 1997) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a defender for MLS club FC Dallas and the Sweden national team.
Herman Johansson.note: Sweden's energetic right-back option, giving the flank recovery work and steady overlap support.
Herman Johansson.noteZh: 赫尔曼·约翰松是瑞典充满活力的右后卫选择，能给边路带来回追和稳定套边支援。

Hjalmar Ekdal.name: Hjalmar Ekdal
Hjalmar Ekdal.summary: Hjalmar Ekdal (Swedish: [ˈjǎlmar ˈêːkdɑːl]; born 21 October 1998) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for EFL Championship club Burnley and the Sweden national team. He is the younger brother of former footballer Albin Ekdal.
Hjalmar Ekdal.note: Sweden's reliable centre-back cover, suited to compact defending and long spells without the ball.
Hjalmar Ekdal.noteZh: 亚尔马尔·埃克达尔是瑞典可靠的中卫保障，适合紧凑防守和长时间无球阶段。

Isak Hien.name: Isak Hien
Isak Hien.summary: Isak Malcolm Kwaku Hien (born 13 January 1999) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Serie A club Atalanta and the Sweden national team.
Isak Hien.note: Sweden's aggressive centre-back, strong stepping into duels and quick enough to clean up behind him.
Isak Hien.noteZh: 伊萨克·希恩是瑞典主动型中卫，擅长前顶对抗，也有速度清理身后空间。

Jacob Widell Zetterstrom.name: Jacob Widell Zetterstrom
Jacob Widell Zetterstrom.summary: Jacob Mikael Widell Zetterström (born 11 July 1998) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for EFL Championship club Derby County and the Sweden national team.
Jacob Widell Zetterstrom.note: Sweden's goalkeeper depth, giving them size, reflexes, and a confident penalty-area presence.
Jacob Widell Zetterstrom.noteZh: 雅各布·维德尔·泽特斯特伦是瑞典门将深度选择，带来身材、反应和自信的禁区存在感。

Jesper Karlstrom.name: Jesper Karlstrom
Jesper Karlstrom.summary: Jesper Kewe Karlström (born 21 June 1995) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie A club Udinese, which he captains, and the Sweden national team.
Jesper Karlstrom.note: Sweden's midfield worker, useful for collecting second balls and keeping possession from getting loose.
Jesper Karlstrom.noteZh: 耶斯佩尔·卡尔斯特伦是瑞典中场工兵，适合争第二落点并避免控球变得松散。

Ken Sema.name: Ken Sema
Ken Sema.summary: Ken Nlata Sema (/ˈsɛmə/; born 30 September 1993) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a left midfielder for Cypriot First Division club Pafos and the Sweden national team.
Ken Sema.note: Sweden's experienced left-side option, able to defend as a wing-back and still deliver from wide areas.
Ken Sema.noteZh: 肯·塞马是瑞典经验丰富的左路选择，能像翼卫一样防守，也能从边路送出传中。

Kristoffer Nordfeldt.name: Kristoffer Nordfeldt
Kristoffer Nordfeldt.summary: Bo Kristoffer Nordfeldt (born 23 June 1989) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Allsvenskan club AIK and the Sweden national team.
Kristoffer Nordfeldt.note: Sweden's veteran goalkeeper cover, trusted for calm decisions and steady shot-stopping depth.
Kristoffer Nordfeldt.noteZh: 克里斯托弗·诺德费尔特是瑞典资深门将保障，能带来冷静决策和稳定扑救深度。

Lucas Bergvall.name: Lucas Bergvall
Lucas Bergvall.summary: Lucas Erik Holger Bergvall (Swedish: [ˈlu:kɑs bæ̌ɾj:vɑl]; born 2 February 2006) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Tottenham Hotspur and the Sweden national team.
Lucas Bergvall.note: Sweden's high-ceiling midfield talent, able to carry forward and add imagination between the lines.
Lucas Bergvall.noteZh: 卢卡斯·贝里瓦尔是瑞典上限很高的中场天才，能向前带球并在线间增加想象力。

Taha Ali.name: Taha Ali
Taha Ali.summary: Taha Abdi Ali (born 1 July 1998) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a left winger for Allsvenskan club Malmö FF and the Sweden national team.
Taha Ali.note: Sweden's dribbling spark, capable of changing the tempo with a direct carry from the left.
Taha Ali.noteZh: 塔哈·阿里是瑞典的盘带火花，能从左路直接带球改变比赛节奏。

Victor Lindelof.name: Victor Lindelof
Victor Lindelof.summary: Victor Jörgen Nilsson Lindelöf (Swedish: [ˈvɪk.tɔr ˈlɪn.dɛˌløːv]; born 17 July 1994) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Premier League club Aston Villa and captains the Sweden national team.
Victor Lindelof.note: Sweden's defensive leader, still central to organizing the line and passing out calmly.
Victor Lindelof.noteZh: 维克托·林德洛夫是瑞典防守领袖，仍然是组织防线和冷静出球的核心。

Viktor Johansson.name: Viktor Johansson
Viktor Johansson.summary: Tobias Viktor Johansson (born 14 September 1998) is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for EFL Championship club Stoke City and the Sweden national team.
Viktor Johansson.note: Sweden's in-form goalkeeper option, bringing reflex saves and clear command when the box gets crowded.
Viktor Johansson.noteZh: 维克托·约翰松是瑞典状态出色的门将选择，禁区拥挤时能带来反应扑救和清晰指挥。

Adam Arous.name: Adam Arous
Adam Arous.summary: Adem Arous (Arabic: آدم عروس; born 17 July 2004) is a Tunisian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Süper Lig club Kasımpaşa. Born in Saudi Arabia, he plays for the Tunisia national team.
Adam Arous.note: Tunisia's young centre-back option, useful for front-foot defending and covering space behind the line.
Adam Arous.noteZh: 阿德姆·阿鲁斯是突尼斯年轻中卫选择，适合主动上抢并保护防线身后空间。

Ali Abdi.name: Ali Abdi
Ali Abdi.summary: Ali Abdi is a Tunisia left-back at Nice who gives the national team overlap timing, crossing quality, and wide defending.
Ali Abdi.note: Tunisia's experienced left-back outlet, able to defend the flank and still add early service forward.
Ali Abdi.noteZh: 阿里·阿卜迪是突尼斯经验丰富的左后卫出口，能防守边路，也能向前送出早传。

Amine Ben Hmida.name: Amine Ben Hmida
Amine Ben Hmida.summary: Mohamed Amine Ben Hamida is a Tunisia left-back at Espérance de Tunis who gives the national team defensive width, left-footed balance, and tournament experience.
Amine Ben Hmida.note: Tunisia's left-back stabilizer, important for defensive width and safer possession on the outside.
Amine Ben Hmida.noteZh: 穆罕默德·阿明·本·哈米达是突尼斯左后卫稳定点，对防守宽度和边路安全控球很重要。

Anis Slimane.name: Anis Slimane
Anis Slimane.summary: Anis Ben Slimane is a Tunisia attacking midfielder at Norwich City who gives the national team carrying power, between-lines receiving, and midfield height.
Anis Slimane.note: Tunisia's rangy attacking midfielder, useful for carrying through pressure and joining the front line late.
Anis Slimane.noteZh: 阿尼斯·本·斯利曼是突尼斯高大型攻击中场，适合在压力下带球推进并后插上支援锋线。

Aymen Dahmen.name: Aymen Dahmen
Aymen Dahmen.summary: Aymen Dahmen (Arabic: أَيْمَن دَحمَان; born 28 January 1997) is a Tunisian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for CS Sfaxien and the Tunisia national team.
Aymen Dahmen.note: Tunisia's steady goalkeeper option, trusted for box command and calm handling in long defensive spells.
Aymen Dahmen.noteZh: 艾门·达门是突尼斯稳健的门将选择，长时间防守时能提供禁区指挥和冷静处理。

Dylan Bronn.name: Dylan Bronn
Dylan Bronn.summary: Dylan Daniel Mahmoud Bronn (Arabic: دِيلاَن دَانِيَال مَحْمُود بْرون; born 19 June 1995) is a professional footballer who plays as a defender for Swiss Super League club Servette. Born in France, he plays for the Tunisia national team.
Dylan Bronn.note: Tunisia's experienced centre-back, valuable for organizing the line and winning direct balls into the box.
Dylan Bronn.noteZh: 迪伦·布隆是突尼斯经验型中卫，能组织防线并赢下打入禁区的直接球。

Elias Achouri.name: Elias Achouri
Elias Achouri.summary: Mohamed Elias Achouri (Arabic: مُحَمَّد إِلْيَاس عَاشُورِيّ; born 10 February 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Danish Superliga club Copenhagen.
Elias Achouri.note: Tunisia's lively wide creator, able to combine quickly and keep full-backs under pressure.
Elias Achouri.noteZh: 埃利亚斯·阿舒里是突尼斯活跃的边路创造者，能快速配合并持续压迫边后卫。

Firas Chaouat.name: Firas Chaouat
Firas Chaouat.summary: Firas Chaouat (Arabic: فراس شواط, born 8 May 1996) is a Tunisian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Club Africain and the Tunisia national team.
Firas Chaouat.note: Tunisia's penalty-box striker option, useful when they need a target and a simpler route to goal.
Firas Chaouat.noteZh: 菲拉斯·绍瓦特是突尼斯禁区中锋选择，球队需要支点和更直接的进球路线时很有用。

Hazem Mastouri.name: Hazem Mastouri
Hazem Mastouri.summary: Hazem Mastouri (Arabic: حازم المستوري; born 18 June 1997) is a Tunisian professional footballer who plays as a striker for Russian club Dynamo Makhachkala and the Tunisia national team.
Hazem Mastouri.note: Tunisia's mobile striker, useful for chasing centre-backs and arriving quickly around loose balls.
Hazem Mastouri.noteZh: 哈泽姆·马斯图里是突尼斯机动型前锋，适合追压中卫并快速赶到散落球附近。

Ismael Gharbi.name: Ismael Gharbi
Ismael Gharbi.summary: Ismaël Seifallah Gharbi (Tunisian Arabic: إسماعيل سيفالله غربي; born 10 April 2004) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Bundesliga club FC Augsburg, on loan from Primeira Liga club Braga.
Ismael Gharbi.note: Tunisia's technical attacking midfielder, able to add quick feet and small-space passing around the box.
Ismael Gharbi.noteZh: 伊斯梅尔·加尔比是突尼斯技术型攻击中场，能在禁区周围带来快脚和小空间传球。

Khalil Ayari.name: Khalil Ayari
Khalil Ayari.summary: Khalil Ayari (Arabic: خليل العياري; born 2 February 2005) is a Tunisian professional footballer who plays as a winger for Ligue 1 club Paris Saint-Germain, on loan from Tunisian Ligue Professionnelle 1 club Stade Tunisien, and the Tunisia national team.
Khalil Ayari.club: Paris Saint-Germain (on loan from Stade Tunisien)
Khalil Ayari.note: Tunisia's young winger, useful for changing the rhythm with direct carries and fearless isolation play.
Khalil Ayari.noteZh: 哈利勒·阿亚里是突尼斯年轻边锋，能用直接带球和大胆一对一改变节奏。

Mohamed Hadj Mahmoud.name: Mohamed Hadj Mahmoud
Mohamed Hadj Mahmoud.summary: Mohamed Belhadj Mahmoud (Arabic: مُحَمَّد بَلْحَاجّ مَحْمُود; born 24 April 2000) is a Tunisian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Swiss Super League club Lugano and the Tunisia national team.
Mohamed Hadj Mahmoud.note: Tunisia's central midfield cover, valuable for second balls and keeping possession from breaking open.
Mohamed Hadj Mahmoud.noteZh: 穆罕默德·贝勒哈吉·马哈茂德是突尼斯中场保护选择，能争第二落点并避免控球被打散。

Montassar Talbi.name: Montassar Talbi
Montassar Talbi.summary: Montassar Omar Talbi (Arabic: مُنْتَصِر عُمَر الطَّالِبِيّ; born 26 May 1998) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Ligue 1 club Lorient. Born in France, he plays for the Tunisia national team.
Montassar Talbi.note: Tunisia's defensive leader, important for organizing the line and handling aerial pressure.
Montassar Talbi.noteZh: 蒙塔萨尔·塔尔比是突尼斯防守领袖，对组织防线和处理空中压力很重要。

Mortadha Ben Ouanes.name: Mortadha Ben Ouanes
Mortadha Ben Ouanes.summary: Ahmed Mortadha Ouanes (Arabic: مرتضى بن وناس; born 2 July 1994) is a Tunisian professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Süper Lig club Kasımpaşa and the Tunisia national team.
Mortadha Ben Ouanes.note: Tunisia's left-side runner, able to play high or deep and keep the flank moving forward.
Mortadha Ben Ouanes.noteZh: 穆尔塔达·本·瓦内斯是突尼斯左路跑动点，能踢高位或低位，并让边路持续向前。

Mouhib Chamakh.name: Mouhib Chamakh
Mouhib Chamakh.summary: Abdelmouhib Chamakh is a Tunisia goalkeeper at Club Africain who gives the national team shot-stopping depth, height, and domestic title-winning rhythm.
Mouhib Chamakh.note: Tunisia's tall goalkeeper option, bringing shot-stopping depth and confidence from a strong club season.
Mouhib Chamakh.noteZh: 阿卜杜勒穆希卜·沙马克是突尼斯高大门将选择，带来扑救深度和强势俱乐部赛季后的信心。

Moutaz Neffati.name: Moutaz Neffati
Moutaz Neffati.summary: Moutaz Neffati (Arabic: معتز نفّاتي; born 4 September 2004) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back for the Superettan club IFK Norrköping. Born in Sweden, he plays for the Tunisia national team.
Moutaz Neffati.note: Tunisia's young right-back option, useful for overlap support and recovery speed down the flank.
Moutaz Neffati.noteZh: 穆塔兹·内法蒂是突尼斯年轻右后卫选择，适合套边支援和边路回追。

Raed Chikhaoui.name: Raed Chikhaoui
Raed Chikhaoui.summary: Raed Chikhaoui is a Tunisia centre-back at US Monastir who gives the national team size, aerial defending, and fresh back-line depth.
Raed Chikhaoui.note: Tunisia's young centre-back depth, useful for adding size and contesting crosses late in matches.
Raed Chikhaoui.noteZh: 拉埃德·希哈维是突尼斯年轻中卫深度，适合增加身高并在比赛后段争顶传中。

Rani Khedira.name: Rani Khedira
Rani Khedira.summary: Rani Khedira (Arabic: راني خضيرة; born 27 January 1994) is a professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Bundesliga club Union Berlin. Born in Germany, he plays for the Tunisia national team.
Rani Khedira.note: Tunisia's disciplined midfield shield, useful for closing central lanes and calming difficult phases.
Rani Khedira.noteZh: 拉尼·赫迪拉是突尼斯纪律性强的中场屏障，适合封住中路线路并稳定困难阶段。

Rayan Elloumi.name: Rayan Elloumi
Rayan Elloumi.summary: Rayan Elloumi (Arabic: ريان اللومي; born 17 September 2007) is a footballer who plays for Vancouver Whitecaps FC in Major League Soccer. Born in Canada, he represents the Tunisia national team.
Rayan Elloumi.note: Tunisia's teenage forward runner, able to stretch tired defenders and press with fresh energy.
Rayan Elloumi.noteZh: 拉扬·埃卢米是突尼斯十几岁的前锋跑动点，能拉扯疲惫后卫并用新鲜体能压迫。

Sabri Ben Hessen.name: Sabri Ben Hessen
Sabri Ben Hessen.summary: Sabri Ben Hessen (Arabic: صبري بن حسن; born 13 June 1996) is a Tunisian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Tunisian Ligue Professionnelle 1 club ES Sahel, and the Tunisia national team.
Sabri Ben Hessen.note: Tunisia's domestic goalkeeper cover, bringing reaction saves and familiarity with tense local matches.
Sabri Ben Hessen.noteZh: 萨布里·本·赫森是突尼斯本土门将保障，带来反应扑救和紧张本土比赛经验。

Sebastian Tounekti.name: Sebastian Tounekti
Sebastian Tounekti.summary: Sebastian Tounekti (born 13 July 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger for Scottish Premiership club Celtic. Born in Norway, he plays for the Tunisia national team.
Sebastian Tounekti.note: Tunisia's flexible winger, able to carry directly and keep both touchline and inside routes alive.
Sebastian Tounekti.noteZh: 塞巴斯蒂安·图内克蒂是突尼斯灵活边锋，能直接带球并同时保持边线和内线路线。

Yan Valery.name: Yan Valery
Yan Valery.summary: Yan Valery (Arabic: يان فاليري; born 22 February 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back for EFL League One club Sheffield Wednesday. Born in France, he plays for the Tunisia national team.
Yan Valery.note: Tunisia's right-back power runner, useful for carrying up the flank and recovering into defensive duels.
Yan Valery.noteZh: 扬·瓦莱里是突尼斯力量型右后卫，适合沿边路推进并回到防守对抗中。

Bart Verbruggen.name: Bart Verbruggen
Bart Verbruggen.summary: Bart Verbruggen (born 18 August 2002) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Premier League club Brighton & Hove Albion and the Netherlands national team.
Bart Verbruggen.note: Netherlands' modern goalkeeper, comfortable starting attacks and reacting quickly when the line is high.
Bart Verbruggen.noteZh: 巴尔特·费布吕亨是荷兰现代型门将，能舒服地发起进攻，也能在防线前压时快速反应。

Denzel Dumfries.name: Denzel Dumfries
Denzel Dumfries.summary: Denzel Justus Morris Dumfries (born 18 April 1996) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a right-back or right wing-back for Serie A club Inter Milan and the Netherlands national team.
Denzel Dumfries.note: Netherlands' right-side power runner, famous for arriving at the back post like an extra forward.
Denzel Dumfries.noteZh: 丹泽尔·邓弗里斯是荷兰右路力量型跑动点，以像额外前锋一样冲到后点著称。

Donyell Malen.name: Donyell Malen
