Donyell Malen.summary: Donyell Malen (born 19 January 1999) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a winger or striker for Serie A club Roma and the Netherlands national team.
Donyell Malen.note: Netherlands' direct forward runner, useful for attacking space and finishing before defenders reset.
Donyell Malen.noteZh: 多尼尔·马伦是荷兰直接型前场跑动点，适合冲击空间并在防守重整前完成终结。

Guus Til.name: Guus Til
Guus Til.summary: Guus Berend Til (born 22 December 1997) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Eredivisie club PSV and the Netherlands national team.
Guus Til.note: Netherlands' box-arriving midfielder, valuable when they need a runner beyond the striker.
Guus Til.noteZh: 古斯·蒂尔是荷兰后插上进入禁区的中场，球队需要有人越过中锋冲击时很有价值。

Jan Paul van Hecke.name: Jan Paul van Hecke
Jan Paul van Hecke.summary: Jan Paul van Hecke (born 8 June 2000) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Premier League club Tottenham Hotspur and the Netherlands national team.
Jan Paul van Hecke.note: Netherlands' front-foot centre-back, comfortable stepping out to win duels and pass forward.
Jan Paul van Hecke.noteZh: 扬·保罗·范赫克是荷兰主动型中卫，能前顶赢下对抗并向前传球。

Jorrel Hato.name: Jorrel Hato
Jorrel Hato.summary: Jorrel Evan Hato (born 7 March 2006) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or left-back for Premier League club Chelsea and the Netherlands national team.
Jorrel Hato.note: Netherlands' young left-sided defender, giving them calm build-up from centre-back or full-back zones.
Jorrel Hato.noteZh: 约雷尔·哈托是荷兰年轻的左侧防守者，能从中卫或边后卫区域冷静出球。

Justin Kluivert.name: Justin Kluivert
Justin Kluivert.summary: Justin Dean Kluivert (born 5 May 1999) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or winger for Premier League club Bournemouth and the Netherlands national team.
Justin Kluivert.note: Netherlands' sharp attacking connector, useful for driving inside and supporting the striker near goal.
Justin Kluivert.noteZh: 贾斯廷·克鲁伊维特是荷兰锐利的进攻连接点，适合内切推进并在门前支援中锋。

Lutsharel Geertruida.name: Lutsharel Geertruida
Lutsharel Geertruida.summary: Lutsharel Emiliano Geertruida (Dutch pronunciation: [xeːrtrœyda]; born 18 July 2000) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays for Premier League club Sunderland, on loan from Bundesliga club RB Leipzig, and the Netherlands national team.
Lutsharel Geertruida.note: Netherlands' defensive hybrid, able to cover right-back, centre-back, or midfield protection.
Lutsharel Geertruida.noteZh: 卢特沙雷尔·海特勒伊达是荷兰防守混合型球员，能覆盖右后卫、中卫或中场保护。

Mark Flekken.name: Mark Flekken
Mark Flekken.summary: Mark Maria Hubertus Flekken (born 13 June 1993) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Bundesliga club Bayer Leverkusen and the Netherlands national team.
Mark Flekken.note: Netherlands' experienced goalkeeper option, bringing distribution range and calm penalty-area command.
Mark Flekken.noteZh: 马克·弗莱肯是荷兰经验型门将选择，带来传球范围和冷静的禁区指挥。

Marten de Roon.name: Marten de Roon
Marten de Roon.summary: Marten Elco de Roon (born 29 March 1991) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Serie A club Atalanta and the Netherlands national team.
Marten de Roon.note: Netherlands' pragmatic midfield screen, useful for closing counters and protecting attacking full-backs.
Marten de Roon.noteZh: 马滕·德容是荷兰务实的中场屏障，适合封住反击并保护前插的边后卫。

Mats Wieffer.name: Mats Wieffer
Mats Wieffer.summary: Mats Henrik Berne Wieffer (born 16 November 1999) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a right-back or defensive midfielder for Premier League club Brighton & Hove Albion and the Netherlands national team.
Mats Wieffer.note: Netherlands' midfield balance option, helping clean up second balls and keep possession moving.
Mats Wieffer.noteZh: 马茨·维弗是荷兰中场平衡选择，能清理第二落点并让控球继续流动。

Memphis Depay.name: Memphis Depay
Memphis Depay.summary: Memphis Depay (Dutch pronunciation: [ˈmɛɱfɪz dəˈpɑi]; born 13 February 1994), commonly known simply as Memphis, is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a forward for Corinthians in the Campeonato Brasileiro Série A and the Netherlands national team.
Memphis Depay.note: Netherlands' creative forward, still dangerous when he drops off, combines, or shapes a restart.
Memphis Depay.noteZh: 孟菲斯·德佩是荷兰创造型前锋，回撤配合或处理定位球时依然很危险。

Micky van de Ven.name: Micky van de Ven
Micky van de Ven.summary: Micky van de Ven (Dutch: [ˈmɪki vɑn də ˈvɛn]; born 19 April 2001) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays either as a centre-back or left-back for Premier League club Tottenham Hotspur and the Netherlands national team.
Micky van de Ven.note: Netherlands' recovery-speed defender, built to erase space behind a high line.
Micky van de Ven.noteZh: 米基·范德文是荷兰回追速度型后卫，适合抹掉高位防线身后的空间。

Nathan Ake.name: Nathan Ake
Nathan Ake.summary: Nathan Benjamin Aké (Dutch: ['naːtɑn 'aːkeː]; born 18 February 1995) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or left-back for Premier League club Manchester City and the Netherlands national team.
Nathan Ake.note: Netherlands' left-footed defensive stabilizer, comfortable covering centre-back or left-back roles.
Nathan Ake.noteZh: 内森·阿克是荷兰左脚防守稳定点，能舒服地覆盖中卫或左后卫职责。

Noa Lang.name: Noa Lang
Noa Lang.summary: Noa Noëll Lang (born 17 June 1999) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a left winger or left midfielder for Süper Lig club Galatasaray, on loan from Serie A club Napoli, and the Netherlands national team.
Noa Lang.note: Netherlands' rhythm-changing winger, capable of adding flair and hesitation moves from the left.
Noa Lang.noteZh: 诺阿·朗是荷兰改变节奏的边锋，能从左路带来灵感和节奏停顿动作。

Quinten Timber.name: Quinten Timber
Quinten Timber.summary: Quinten Ryan Crispito Timber (Dutch: [ˈkʋɪntə(n) ˈtɪmbər]; born 17 June 2001) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as midfielder for Ligue 1 club Marseille and the Netherlands national team.
Quinten Timber.note: Netherlands' energetic midfield carrier, useful for driving through contact and joining attacks.
Quinten Timber.noteZh: 昆滕·廷伯是荷兰充满能量的中场推进者，适合带球穿过对抗并参与进攻。

Robin Roefs.name: Robin Roefs
Robin Roefs.summary: Robin Gerardus Petrus Roefs (born 17 January 2003) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Premier League club Sunderland and the Netherlands national team.
Robin Roefs.note: Netherlands' high-upside goalkeeper depth, bringing reflexes and bravery in crowded areas.
Robin Roefs.noteZh: 罗宾·鲁夫斯是荷兰上限很高的门将深度，能在拥挤区域带来反应和勇气。

Ryan Gravenberch.name: Ryan Gravenberch
Ryan Gravenberch.summary: Ryan Jiro Gravenberch (Dutch pronunciation: [Ryɑn ɣrɑvɛnbɛrx]; born 16 May 2002) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Liverpool and the Netherlands national team.
Ryan Gravenberch.note: Netherlands' powerful midfield carrier, able to stride out of pressure and tilt the field forward.
Ryan Gravenberch.noteZh: 赖恩·赫拉芬贝赫是荷兰力量型中场推进者，能大步摆脱压力并把场面推向前方。

Teun Koopmeiners.name: Teun Koopmeiners
Teun Koopmeiners.summary: Teun Koopmeiners (Dutch pronunciation: [tøːŋ ˈkoːpmɛinərs]; born 28 February 1998) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie A club Juventus and the Netherlands national team.
Teun Koopmeiners.note: Netherlands' left-footed midfield passer, useful for switches, restarts, and shooting from the edge.
Teun Koopmeiners.noteZh: 特恩·库普梅纳斯是荷兰左脚中场传球手，适合转移球、定位球和禁区弧顶射门。

Tijjani Reijnders.name: Tijjani Reijnders
Tijjani Reijnders.summary: Tijjani Martinus Jan Reijnders (Dutch pronunciation: [tiˈdʒaːni ˈrɛi̯ndərs]; born 29 July 1998) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Manchester City and the Netherlands national team.
Tijjani Reijnders.note: Netherlands' gliding box-to-box midfielder, able to accelerate possession and arrive for shots.
Tijjani Reijnders.noteZh: 蒂贾尼·赖因德斯是荷兰流畅的双向中场，能加速控球并后插上射门。

Wout Weghorst.name: Wout Weghorst
Wout Weghorst.summary: Wout François Maria Weghorst (born 7 August 1992) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a striker for Eredivisie club Ajax and the Netherlands national team. Weghorst began his professional career in the second tier of Dutch football with Emmen.
Wout Weghorst.note: Netherlands' late-game target, useful for direct balls, aerial pressure, and turning matches messy.
Wout Weghorst.noteZh: 沃特·韦霍斯特是荷兰比赛后段的支点，适合直接球、空中压力和把比赛搅乱。

Abdulkerim Bardakci.name: Abdulkerim Bardakci
Abdulkerim Bardakci.summary: Abdülkerim Bardakcı (born 7 September 1994) is a Turkish professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Süper Lig club Galatasaray and the Turkey national team.
Abdulkerim Bardakci.note: Türkiye's left-sided centre-back anchor, useful for defending crosses and starting attacks without panic.
Abdulkerim Bardakci.noteZh: 阿卜杜勒凯里姆·巴尔达克哲是土耳其左侧中卫支柱，适合防守传中并冷静发起进攻。

Altay Bayindir.name: Altay Bayindir
Altay Bayindir.summary: Altay Bayındır (born 14 April 1998) is a Turkish professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Premier League club Manchester United and the Turkey national team. Bayındır began his career at Ankaragücü.
Altay Bayindir.note: Türkiye's tall goalkeeper option, bringing reach, quick reactions, and direct releases when games open up.
Altay Bayindir.noteZh: 阿尔泰·巴因德尔是土耳其高大门将选择，能在比赛拉开时提供覆盖范围、快速反应和直接出球。

Baris Alper Yilmaz.name: Baris Alper Yilmaz
Baris Alper Yilmaz.summary: Barış Alper Yılmaz (born 23 May 2000) is a Turkish professional footballer who plays as a winger for Süper Lig club Galatasaray and the Turkey national team.
Baris Alper Yilmaz.note: Türkiye's high-energy wide runner, able to stretch defenders, press hard, and carry the ball through contact.
Baris Alper Yilmaz.noteZh: 巴里什·阿尔佩尔·伊尔马兹是土耳其高能边路跑动点，能拉扯防守、强力压迫并带球穿过对抗。

Caglar Soyuncu.name: Caglar Soyuncu
Caglar Soyuncu.summary: Çağlar Söyüncü (Turkish pronunciation: [tʃaːˈɫaɾ sœjynˈdʒy]; born 23 May 1996) is a Turkish professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Süper Lig club Fenerbahçe and the Turkey national team.
Caglar Soyuncu.note: Türkiye's front-foot defender, trusted to step into duels and add bite when the back line is under pressure.
Caglar Soyuncu.noteZh: 恰拉尔·瑟云聚是土耳其主动型后卫，防线承压时能前顶对抗并增加强硬度。

Can Uzun.name: Can Uzun
Can Uzun.summary: Can Uzun is a Türkiye attacking midfielder from Eintracht Frankfurt who gives the national team between-lines receiving, sharp shooting, and young creative upside.
Can Uzun.note: Türkiye's young between-lines option, dangerous when he receives on the turn and shoots before pressure arrives.
Can Uzun.noteZh: 詹·乌尊是土耳其年轻的线间选择，转身接球并在压力到来前射门时很危险。

Deniz Gul.name: Deniz Gul
Deniz Gul.summary: Deniz Daniel Gül (born 2 July 2004) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Primeira Liga club Porto. Born in Sweden, he plays for the Turkish national team.
Deniz Gul.note: Türkiye's young striker depth, useful for fresh pressing and quick box movements late in matches.
Deniz Gul.noteZh: 德尼兹·居尔是土耳其年轻中锋深度，适合在比赛后段带来新鲜压迫和快速禁区跑动。

Eren Elmali.name: Eren Elmali
Eren Elmali.summary: Evren Eren Elmalı (born 7 July 2000) is a Turkish professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Süper Lig club Galatasaray and the Turkey national team.
Eren Elmali.note: Türkiye's left-back width provider, giving the attack overlaps while still recovering into defensive shape.
Eren Elmali.noteZh: 埃伦·埃尔马勒是土耳其左后卫宽度来源，能为进攻提供套边，同时回收到防守阵型。

Ferdi Kadioglu.name: Ferdi Kadioglu
Ferdi Kadioglu.summary: Ferdi Erenay Kadıoğlu (Turkish pronunciation: [fæɾˈdi eɾeˈnaj kaˈdɯoːɫu]; born 7 October 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as a full back, midfielder or winger for Premier League club Brighton & Hove Albion.
Ferdi Kadioglu.note: Türkiye's two-way full-back weapon, able to carry out of pressure and appear in several build-up lanes.
Ferdi Kadioglu.noteZh: 费尔迪·卡迪奥卢是土耳其双向边后卫武器，能带球摆脱压力并出现在多条组织线路上。

Ismail Yuksek.name: Ismail Yuksek
Ismail Yuksek.summary: İsmail Yüksek (born 26 January 1999) is a Turkish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Süper Lig side Fenerbahçe and the Turkey national team.
Ismail Yuksek.note: Türkiye's midfield ball-winner, important for killing counters and moving the next pass quickly.
Ismail Yuksek.noteZh: 伊斯梅尔·于克塞克是土耳其中场抢球手，对破坏反击并快速送出下一脚传球很重要。

Kaan Ayhan.name: Kaan Ayhan
Kaan Ayhan.summary: Kaan Ayhan (born 10 November 1994) is a professional footballer who plays as a defender for Süper Lig club Galatasaray. Born in Germany, he plays for the Turkey national team.
Kaan Ayhan.note: Türkiye's flexible defensive piece, able to cover centre-back, full-back, or midfield protection when needed.
Kaan Ayhan.noteZh: 卡安·艾汗是土耳其灵活的防守棋子，需要时能覆盖中卫、边后卫或中场保护。

Kerem Akturkoglu.name: Kerem Akturkoglu
Kerem Akturkoglu.summary: Muhammed Kerem Aktürkoğlu (Turkish pronunciation: [ceˈɾɛm akˈtyɾkoːɫu]; born 21 October 1998) is a Turkish professional footballer who plays as a winger or wide midfielder for Süper Lig club Fenerbahçe and the Turkey national team.
Kerem Akturkoglu.note: Türkiye's direct wide scorer, most useful when he can sprint into space and attack the far side of the box.
Kerem Akturkoglu.noteZh: 凯雷姆·阿克蒂尔科奥卢是土耳其直接型边路得分手，冲入空间并攻击禁区远侧时最有用。

Merih Demiral.name: Merih Demiral
Merih Demiral.summary: Merih Demiral (born 5 March 1998) is a Turkish professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Saudi Pro League club Al-Ahli and the Turkey national team.
Merih Demiral.note: Türkiye's physical centre-back leader, giving them aerial force in both penalty areas.
Merih Demiral.noteZh: 梅里赫·德米拉尔是土耳其身体型中卫领袖，能在两个禁区都提供空中力量。

Mert Gunok.name: Mert Gunok
Mert Gunok.summary: Fehmi Mert Günok (Turkish pronunciation: [mæɾt ˈɡynok]; born 1 March 1989) is a Turkish professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Süper Lig club Fenerbahçe and the Turkey national team.
Mert Gunok.note: Türkiye's veteran goalkeeper, trusted for reflex saves and calm organization in tense tournament spells.
Mert Gunok.noteZh: 梅尔特·居诺克是土耳其老将门将，在紧张的杯赛阶段，反应扑救和冷静组织都值得信任。

Mert Muldur.name: Mert Muldur
Mert Muldur.summary: Mert Müldür is a Türkiye right-back from Fenerbahçe who gives the national team full-back defending, recovery speed, and back-post coverage.
Mert Muldur.note: Türkiye's right-back cover runner, useful for recovering wide space and protecting the far post.
Mert Muldur.noteZh: 梅尔特·米尔迪尔是土耳其右后卫补位跑动点，适合回追边路空间并保护后点。

Oguz Aydin.name: Oguz Aydin
Oguz Aydin.summary: Oğuz Aydın is a Türkiye right winger from Fenerbahçe who gives the national team one-on-one dribbling, acceleration, and direct crossing.
Oguz Aydin.note: Türkiye's right-wing accelerator, able to attack a full-back early and turn the byline into service.
Oguz Aydin.noteZh: 奥乌兹·艾登是土耳其右路加速点，能早早冲击边后卫并把底线位置变成传中。

Orkun Kokcu.name: Orkun Kokcu
Orkun Kokcu.summary: Orkun Kökçü is a Türkiye central midfielder from Beşiktaş who gives the national team progressive passing, midfield shooting, and press-resistant control.
Orkun Kokcu.note: Türkiye's progressive midfield passer, useful for breaking pressure and striking from the edge when space opens.
Orkun Kokcu.noteZh: 奥尔昆·柯克曲是土耳其推进型中场传球手，适合破解压力，并在空间打开时从禁区边缘射门。

Ozan Kabak.name: Ozan Kabak
Ozan Kabak.summary: Ozan Kabak is a Türkiye centre-back from TSG Hoffenheim who gives the national team aggressive duels, aerial defending, and recovery cover.
Ozan Kabak.note: Türkiye's athletic centre-back option, built for contact, aerial work, and recovery defending behind pressure.
Ozan Kabak.noteZh: 奥赞·卡巴克是土耳其运动能力强的中卫选择，适合对抗、空中防守和压迫身后的回追。

Salih Ozcan.name: Salih Ozcan
Salih Ozcan.summary: Salih Özcan is a Türkiye defensive midfielder from Borussia Dortmund who gives the national team screening, duels, and disciplined possession support.
Salih Ozcan.note: Türkiye's disciplined midfield screen, useful for protecting creative players and cleaning up loose second balls.
Salih Ozcan.noteZh: 萨利赫·厄兹詹是土耳其纪律性中场屏障，适合保护创造型球员并清理松散的第二落点。

Samet Akaydin.name: Samet Akaydin
Samet Akaydin.summary: Samet Akaydin (born 13 March 1994) is a Turkish professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Süper Lig club Çaykur Rizespor and the Turkey national team.
Samet Akaydin.note: Türkiye's rugged centre-back depth, useful when the match asks for clearances and direct penalty-area defending.
Samet Akaydin.noteZh: 萨梅特·阿卡伊丁是土耳其强硬的中卫深度，比赛需要解围和直接禁区防守时很有用。

Ugurcan Cakir.name: Ugurcan Cakir
Ugurcan Cakir.summary: Uğurcan Çakır is a Türkiye goalkeeper from Galatasaray who gives the national team shot stopping, penalty-area command, and long distribution.
Ugurcan Cakir.note: Türkiye's commanding goalkeeper option, strong on reaction saves and brave when claiming crowded crosses.
Ugurcan Cakir.noteZh: 乌乌尔詹·恰克尔是土耳其指挥型门将选择，反应扑救出色，也敢于摘下拥挤区域的传中。

Yunus Akgun.name: Yunus Akgun
Yunus Akgun.summary: Yunus Akgün (born 7 July 2000) is a Turkish professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or right winger for Süper Lig club Galatasaray and the Turkey national team.
Yunus Akgun.note: Türkiye's right-side creator, capable of slipping inside and turning short passing moves into shots.
Yunus Akgun.noteZh: 尤努斯·阿克京是土耳其右路创造者，能内收到中路并把短传配合变成射门。

Zeki Celik.name: Zeki Celik
Zeki Celik.summary: Mehmet Zeki Çelik (Turkish pronunciation: [ˈzeci ˈtʃelik]; born 17 February 1997) is a Turkish professional footballer who plays for Serie A club Roma and the Turkey national team. Mainly a right-back, he can also be deployed as a centre-back in a back three.
Zeki Celik.note: Türkiye's experienced right-side defender, steady as a full-back and useful tucking into a back three.
Zeki Celik.noteZh: 泽基·切利克是土耳其经验丰富的右侧防守者，踢边后卫稳健，也能内收进入三中卫。

Irfan Can Kahveci.name: Irfan Can Kahveci
Irfan Can Kahveci.summary: İrfan Can Kahveci is a Türkiye right winger from Kasımpaşa who gives the national team left-footed crossing, combination play, and set-piece quality.
Irfan Can Kahveci.note: Türkiye's left-footed right-wing passer, valuable for clipped final balls, quick combinations, and restarts.
Irfan Can Kahveci.noteZh: 伊尔凡·詹·卡赫韦奇是土耳其左脚右路传球手，对挑传最后一传、快速配合和定位球很有价值。

Alex Zendejas.name: Alex Zendejas
Alex Zendejas.summary: Álex Zendejas is a United States right winger from América who gives the national team left-footed service, box arrivals, and Liga MX sharpness.
Alex Zendejas.note: United States' left-footed right winger, dangerous when he slips inside and serves early balls into the box.
Alex Zendejas.noteZh: 阿莱克斯·森德哈斯是美国左脚右边锋，内收到中路并提前把球送入禁区时很危险。

Antonee Robinson.name: Antonee Robinson
Antonee Robinson.summary: Antonee Robinson (born August 8, 1997) is a professional soccer player who plays as a left-back for Premier League club Fulham. Born in England, he represents the United States national team.
Antonee Robinson.note: United States' left-flank engine, able to create width repeatedly and still recover behind the ball.
Antonee Robinson.noteZh: 安东尼·罗宾逊是美国左路发动机，能反复制造宽度，并仍然回收到球后防守。

Auston Trusty.name: Auston Trusty
Auston Trusty.summary: Auston Levi-Jesaiah Trusty (born August 12, 1998) is an American professional soccer player who plays as a center-back for Scottish Premiership club Celtic and the United States national team.
Auston Trusty.note: United States' left-sided centre-back option, useful for aerial defending and covering space beside Robinson.
Auston Trusty.noteZh: 奥斯顿·特拉斯蒂是美国左侧中卫选择，适合空中防守并覆盖罗宾逊身旁的空间。

Brenden Aaronson.name: Brenden Aaronson
Brenden Aaronson.summary: Brenden Russell Aaronson (born October 22, 2000) is an American professional soccer player who plays as an attacking midfielder or winger for Premier League club Leeds United and the United States national team.
Brenden Aaronson.note: United States' pressing connector, valuable for turning loose touches into attacks before defenses reset.
Brenden Aaronson.noteZh: 布伦登·阿伦森是美国压迫连接点，能在防守重整前把松散触球变成进攻。

Chris Brady.name: Chris Brady
Chris Brady.summary: Christopher Keith Brady (born March 3, 2004) is an American professional soccer player who plays as a goalkeeper for Major League Soccer club Chicago Fire and the United States national team.
Chris Brady.note: United States' young goalkeeper depth, bringing reflexes and upside if the match gets stretched.
Chris Brady.noteZh: 克里斯·布雷迪是美国年轻门将深度，比赛被拉开时能带来反应和上升空间。

Chris Richards.name: Chris Richards
Chris Richards.summary: Christopher Jeffrey Richards (born March 28, 2000) is an American professional soccer player who plays as a center-back for Premier League club Crystal Palace and the United States national team.
Chris Richards.note: United States' athletic defensive anchor, trusted to defend space and attack first contacts on set pieces.
Chris Richards.noteZh: 克里斯·理查兹是美国运动能力强的防守支柱，能防守空间并在定位球中争抢第一点。

Cristian Roldan.name: Cristian Roldan
Cristian Roldan.summary: Cristian Roldan (born June 3, 1995) is an American professional soccer player who plays as a midfielder for Major League Soccer club Seattle Sounders FC, which he captains, and the United States national team.
Cristian Roldan.note: United States' steady midfield glue, useful for keeping attacks connected and closing transition leaks.
Cristian Roldan.noteZh: 克里斯蒂安·罗尔丹是美国稳健的中场粘合剂，适合保持进攻连接并堵住转换漏洞。

Haji Wright.name: Haji Wright
Haji Wright.summary: Haji Amir Wright (born March 27, 1998) is an American professional soccer player who plays as a forward or winger for Premier League club Coventry City and the United States national team.
Haji Wright.note: United States' power forward option, useful for channel runs and direct finishes when games open up.
Haji Wright.noteZh: 哈吉·赖特是美国力量型前锋选择，比赛拉开时适合通道跑动和直接终结。

Joe Scally.name: Joe Scally
Joe Scally.summary: Joseph Michael Scally (born December 31, 2002) is an American professional soccer player who plays as a full-back for Bundesliga club Borussia Mönchengladbach and the United States national team.
Joe Scally.note: United States' duel-focused full-back, valuable for staying attached to wingers and protecting the back post.
Joe Scally.noteZh: 乔·斯卡利是美国注重对抗的边后卫，对贴住边锋并保护后点很有价值。

Malik Tillman.name: Malik Tillman
Malik Tillman.summary: Malik Leon Tillman (born May 28, 2002) is a German-American professional soccer player who plays as an attacking midfielder for Bundesliga club Bayer Leverkusen. Born in Germany, he represents the United States national team.
Malik Tillman.note: United States' smooth attacking midfielder, useful for late box runs and composed touches around pressure.
Malik Tillman.noteZh: 马利克·蒂尔曼是美国流畅的攻击型中场，适合后插上进入禁区并在压力周围冷静触球。

Matt Freese.name: Matt Freese
Matt Freese.summary: Matthew Andrew Geary Freese (born September 2, 1998) is an American professional soccer player who plays as a goalkeeper for Major League Soccer club New York City FC and the United States national team.
Matt Freese.note: United States' in-form goalkeeper option, bringing sharp reactions and bravery in crowded areas.
Matt Freese.noteZh: 马特·弗里斯是美国状态正佳的门将选择，能在拥挤区域带来敏锐反应和勇气。

Matt Turner.name: Matt Turner
Matt Turner.summary: Matthew Charles Turner (born June 24, 1994) is an American professional soccer player who plays as a goalkeeper for Major League Soccer club New England Revolution, on loan from Ligue 1 club Lyon, and the United States national team.
Matt Turner.club: New England Revolution (on loan from Lyon)
Matt Turner.note: United States' experienced shot stopper, trusted for reflex saves and high-pressure goalkeeper moments.
Matt Turner.noteZh: 马特·特纳是美国经验丰富的扑救型门将，反应扑救和高压门将场景都值得信任。

Max Arfsten.name: Max Arfsten
Max Arfsten.summary: Maximilian Michael Arfsten (born April 19, 2001) is an American professional soccer player who plays as a winger for Major League Soccer club Columbus Crew and the United States national team.
Max Arfsten.note: United States' left-sided width option, useful for early service and arriving beyond the first attack.
Max Arfsten.noteZh: 马克斯·阿夫斯滕是美国左路宽度选择，适合提前传中并在第一波进攻后继续前插。

Miles Robinson.name: Miles Robinson
Miles Robinson.summary: Miles Gordon Robinson (born March 14, 1997) is an American professional soccer player who plays as a center-back for Major League Soccer club FC Cincinnati and the United States national team.
Miles Robinson.note: United States' recovery-speed centre-back, built to erase space when the defensive line gets stretched.
Miles Robinson.noteZh: 迈尔斯·罗宾逊是美国回追速度型中卫，防线被拉开时能抹掉身后的空间。

Ricardo Pepi.name: Ricardo Pepi
Ricardo Pepi.summary: Ricardo Daniel Pepi (born January 9, 2003) is an American professional soccer player who plays as a striker for Eredivisie club PSV and the United States national team.
Ricardo Pepi.note: United States' penalty-box finisher, sharp around near-post runs and loose balls inside the area.
Ricardo Pepi.noteZh: 里卡多·佩皮是美国禁区终结者，近门柱跑动和禁区内松散球处理都很敏锐。

Sebastian Berhalter.name: Sebastian Berhalter
Sebastian Berhalter.summary: Sebastian Matthew Berhalter (born May 10, 2001) is an American professional soccer player who plays as a midfielder for Major League Soccer club Vancouver Whitecaps and the United States national team.
Sebastian Berhalter.note: United States' set-piece and midfield passing option, useful when they need cleaner restarts and pressure after loss.
Sebastian Berhalter.noteZh: 塞巴斯蒂安·贝尔哈特是美国定位球和中场传球选择，球队需要更干净的定位球和丢球后压迫时很有用。

Sergino Dest.name: Sergino Dest
Sergino Dest.summary: Sergiño Gianni Dest (; born November 3, 2000) is a professional soccer player who plays as a full-back for Eredivisie club PSV Eindhoven. Born in the Netherlands, he represents the United States national team.
Sergino Dest.note: United States' dribbling full-back, able to turn right-side possession into central creation.
Sergino Dest.noteZh: 塞尔吉尼奥·德斯特是美国盘带型边后卫，能把右路控球变成中路创造。

Tim Ream.name: Tim Ream
Tim Ream.summary: Timothy Michael Ream (born October 5, 1987) is an American professional soccer player who plays as a center-back or left-back for Major League Soccer club Charlotte and captains the United States national team.
Tim Ream.note: United States' veteran back-line organizer, valuable for left-footed passing and calm defensive decisions.
Tim Ream.noteZh: 蒂姆·里姆是美国老将防线组织者，对左脚传球和冷静防守决策很有价值。

Timothy Weah.name: Timothy Weah
Timothy Weah.summary: Timothy Tarpeh Weah (born February 22, 2000) is an American professional soccer player who plays as a winger or right-back for Ligue 1 club Marseille, on loan from Serie A club Juventus, and the United States national team.
Timothy Weah.note: United States' vertical right-side runner, useful for stretching the field and covering multiple flank roles.
Timothy Weah.noteZh: 蒂莫西·维阿是美国纵向右路跑动点，适合拉长球场并覆盖多个边路职责。

Mark McKenzie.name: Mark McKenzie
Mark McKenzie.summary: Mark McKenzie is a United States centre-back from Toulouse who gives the national team recovery defending, clean passing, and aerial control.
Mark McKenzie.note: United States' composed centre-back option, useful for covering space and playing the first pass through pressure.
Mark McKenzie.noteZh: 马克·麦肯齐是美国沉稳的中卫选择，适合覆盖空间并在压力下送出第一脚传球。

Alex Arce.name: Alex Arce
Alex Arce.summary: Álex Adrián Arce Barrios (born 16 June 1995) is a Paraguayan professional footballer who plays as a striker for Argentine club Independiente Rivadavia and the Paraguay national team.
Alex Arce.note: Paraguay's penalty-box reference point, useful for direct service and first-time finishes under contact.
Alex Arce.noteZh: 阿莱克斯·阿尔塞是巴拉圭禁区参照点，适合直接传中和在对抗下第一时间终结。

Alexandro Maidana.name: Alexandro Maidana
Alexandro Maidana.summary: Alexandro Maidana Mendieta (born 26 July 2005) is a Paraguayan professional football player who plays as a left-back for Argentine Primera División club Talleres, and the Paraguay national team.
Alexandro Maidana.note: Paraguay's young left-back option, giving recovery legs and enough width to support long possessions.
Alexandro Maidana.noteZh: 亚历山德罗·迈达纳是巴拉圭年轻左后卫选择，能提供回追腿脚和支撑长时间控球所需的宽度。

Andres Cubas.name: Andres Cubas
Andres Cubas.summary: Adrián Andrés Cubas (born 11 May 1996) is a professional footballer who plays as midfielder for Major League Soccer club Vancouver Whitecaps. Born in Argentina, he plays for the Paraguay national team.
Andres Cubas.note: Paraguay's midfield stopper, built to break counters early and keep the centre from opening up.
Andres Cubas.noteZh: 安德烈斯·库巴斯是巴拉圭中场拦截者，负责提前破坏反击并避免中路被打开。

Antonio Sanabria.name: Antonio Sanabria
Antonio Sanabria.summary: Arnaldo Antonio Sanabria Ayala (born 4 March 1996), also known as Tony Sanabria, is a Paraguayan professional footballer who plays as a forward for Serie B club Cremonese and the Paraguay national team.
Antonio Sanabria.note: Paraguay's experienced forward connector, able to hold play, attack crosses, and finish loose chances.
Antonio Sanabria.noteZh: 安东尼奥·萨纳布里亚是巴拉圭经验丰富的前场连接点，能支住进攻、冲击传中并终结松散机会。

Braian Ojeda.name: Braian Ojeda
Braian Ojeda.summary: Braian Óscar Ojeda Rodríguez (born 27 June 2000) is a Paraguayan professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Major League Soccer club Orlando City and the Paraguay national team.
Braian Ojeda.note: Paraguay's mobile central midfielder, useful for carrying through pressure and joining second-ball fights.
Braian Ojeda.noteZh: 布赖恩·奥赫达是巴拉圭机动中场，适合带球穿过压力并加入第二落点争抢。

Diego Gomez.name: Diego Gomez
Diego Gomez.summary: Diego Gómez is a Paraguay central midfielder from Brighton & Hove Albion who gives the national team powerful carrying, midfield shooting, and box-to-box range.
Diego Gomez.note: Paraguay's forceful midfield driver, dangerous when he breaks lines and arrives near the box with momentum.
Diego Gomez.noteZh: 迭戈·戈麦斯是巴拉圭强力中场推进者，带球破线并带着冲势靠近禁区时很危险。

Fabian Balbuena.name: Fabian Balbuena
Fabian Balbuena.summary: Fabián Cornelio Balbuena González (born 23 August 1991) is a Paraguayan professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club Grêmio and the Paraguay national team.
Fabian Balbuena.note: Paraguay's veteran centre-back organizer, important for aerial clearances and managing deep defensive spells.
Fabian Balbuena.noteZh: 法维安·巴尔武埃纳是巴拉圭老将中卫组织者，对空中解围和管理深位防守阶段很重要。

Gabriel Avalos.name: Gabriel Avalos
Gabriel Avalos.summary: Gabriel Ávalos Stumpfs (born 9 July 1991) is a Paraguayan professional footballer who plays as a striker for Argentine Primera División club Independiente and the Paraguay national team.
Gabriel Avalos.note: Paraguay's target-forward alternative, useful when they need a stronger aerial presence near goal.
Gabriel Avalos.noteZh: 加布里埃尔·阿瓦洛斯是巴拉圭支点前锋替代选择，球队需要更强门前空中存在感时很有用。

Gaston Olveira.name: Gaston Olveira
Gaston Olveira.summary: Gastón Hernán Olveira Echeverría (born 21 April 1993) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Paraguayan Primera División club Club Olimpia. Born in Uruguay, he plays for the Paraguay national team.
Gaston Olveira.note: Paraguay's commanding goalkeeper option, comfortable claiming crosses and restarting play quickly.
Gaston Olveira.noteZh: 加斯顿·奥尔韦拉是巴拉圭指挥型门将选择，能舒服地摘传中并快速重新发起进攻。

Gatito Fernandez.name: Gatito Fernandez
Gatito Fernandez.summary: Roberto Júnior Fernández Torres (born 29 March 1988), better known as Gatito Fernández, is a Paraguayan professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Paraguayan Primera División club Cerro Porteño and the Paraguay national team.
Gatito Fernandez.note: Paraguay's veteran goalkeeper, trusted for brave penalty-area decisions and reflex stops.
Gatito Fernandez.noteZh: 加蒂托·费尔南德斯是巴拉圭老将门将，禁区内勇敢决策和反应扑救都值得信任。

Gustavo Caballero.name: Gustavo Caballero
Gustavo Caballero.summary: Gustavo Rubén Caballero González (born 21 September 2001) is a Paraguayan professional footballer who plays for EFL Championship club Portsmouth, on loan from Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club Santos, and the Paraguay national team.
Gustavo Caballero.note: Paraguay's hard-running wide option, useful for pressing full-backs and carrying into open grass.
Gustavo Caballero.noteZh: 古斯塔沃·卡瓦列罗是巴拉圭勤奋跑动的边路选择，适合压迫边后卫并带球冲向开阔空间。

Gustavo Velazquez.name: Gustavo Velazquez
Gustavo Velazquez.summary: Víctor Gustavo Velázquez Ramos (born 17 April 1991) is a Paraguayan professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Cerro Porteño and the Paraguay national team.
Gustavo Velazquez.note: Paraguay's no-frills centre-back depth, useful for direct duels and defending their own box.
Gustavo Velazquez.noteZh: 古斯塔沃·贝拉斯克斯是巴拉圭朴实型中卫深度，适合直接对抗和防守本方禁区。

Isidro Pitta.name: Isidro Pitta
Isidro Pitta.summary: Isidro Miguel Pitta Saldivar (born 14 August 1999) is a Paraguayan footballer who plays as a forward for Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club Red Bull Bragantino and the Paraguay national team.
Isidro Pitta.note: Paraguay's powerful forward runner, able to absorb contact and keep attacks alive near the box.
Isidro Pitta.noteZh: 伊西德罗·皮塔是巴拉圭力量型前锋跑动点，能承受对抗并在禁区附近延续进攻。

Jose Canale.name: Jose Canale
Jose Canale.summary: José María Canale Domínguez (born 20 July 1996) is a Paraguayan professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Argentine Primera División side Lanús and the Paraguay national team.
Jose Canale.note: Paraguay's centre-back cover option, giving balance and aerial help when the defensive group rotates.
Jose Canale.noteZh: 何塞·卡纳莱是巴拉圭中卫轮换选择，防守组合轮换时能提供平衡和空中帮助。

Juan Jose Caceres.name: Juan Jose Caceres
Juan Jose Caceres.summary: Juan José Cáceres (born 1 June 2000) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Russian Premier League club Dynamo Moscow. Born in Argentina, he plays for the Paraguay national team.
Juan Jose Caceres.note: Paraguay's disciplined right-back, valuable for staying connected and keeping wide duels under control.
Juan Jose Caceres.noteZh: 胡安·何塞·卡塞雷斯是巴拉圭纪律性右后卫，对保持阵型连接并控制边路对抗很有价值。

Junior Alonso.name: Junior Alonso
Junior Alonso.summary: Júnior Osmar Ignacio Alonso Mujica (born 9 February 1993) is a Paraguayan professional footballer who plays as a defender or left-back for Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club Atlético Mineiro and the Paraguay national team.
Junior Alonso.note: Paraguay's experienced left-sided defender, useful for covering the channel and winning aerial contact.
Junior Alonso.noteZh: 儒尼奥尔·阿隆索是巴拉圭经验丰富的左侧防守者，适合覆盖通道并赢下空中对抗。

Omar Alderete.name: Omar Alderete
Omar Alderete.summary: Omar Federico Alderete Fernández (born 26 December 1996) is a Paraguayan professional footballer who plays as a defender for Premier League club Sunderland and the Paraguay national team. Mainly a centre-back, he can also play as a left-back.
Omar Alderete.note: Paraguay's left-footed centre-back, valuable for aerial defending and opening the field with longer passes.
Omar Alderete.noteZh: 奥马尔·阿尔德雷特是巴拉圭左脚中卫，对空中防守和用长传打开球场很有价值。

Orlando Gill.name: Orlando Gill
Orlando Gill.summary: Orlando Daniel Gill Noldin (born 11 June 2000) is a Paraguayan professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for the Argentine Primera División club San Lorenzo and the Paraguay national team.
Orlando Gill.note: Paraguay's goalkeeper depth, bringing reach and reflexes if they need a different profile in goal.
Orlando Gill.noteZh: 奥兰多·吉尔是巴拉圭门将深度，如果需要不同类型门将，他能带来覆盖范围和反应。

Ramon Sosa.name: Ramon Sosa
Ramon Sosa.summary: Ramón Sosa Acosta (born 31 August 1999) is a Paraguayan professional footballer who plays as a winger for Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club Palmeiras, and the Paraguay national team.
Ramon Sosa.note: Paraguay's explosive winger, able to beat a defender wide and turn the byline into cutbacks.
Ramon Sosa.noteZh: 拉蒙·索萨是巴拉圭爆发型边锋，能在边路突破防守者并把底线位置变成倒三角。

Kaku.name: Kaku
Kaku.summary: Kaku is a Paraguay attacking midfielder from Al-Ain who gives the national team left-footed creativity, final passes, and set-piece service.
Kaku.note: Paraguay's left-footed creator, useful for unlocking a defense with clipped passes or a restart delivery.
Kaku.noteZh: 卡库是巴拉圭左脚创造者，适合用挑传或定位球传递撬开防线。

Aiden Oneill.name: Aiden Oneill
Aiden Oneill.summary: Aiden Connor O'Neill (born 4 July 1998) is an Australian professional soccer player who currently plays as a defensive midfielder for New York City FC and the Australia national team.
Aiden Oneill.note: Australia's defensive-midfield organizer, useful for protecting the back line and keeping passes moving.
Aiden Oneill.noteZh: 艾登·奥尼尔是澳大利亚防守型中场组织者，适合保护防线并保持传球流动。

Ajdin Hrustic.name: Ajdin Hrustic
Ajdin Hrustic.summary: Ajdin Hrustic (Bosnian: [ǎjdin xrǔstitɕ] EYE-din HROO-stich; born 5 July 1996) is an Australian professional soccer player who plays as a midfielder for Eerste Divisie club Heracles Almelo and the Australia national team.
Ajdin Hrustic.note: Australia's left-footed passer, valuable for restarts, switches, and calmer possession spells.
Ajdin Hrustic.noteZh: 阿伊丁·赫鲁斯蒂奇是澳大利亚左脚传球手，对定位球、转移球和更冷静的控球阶段很有价值。

Alessandro Circati.name: Alessandro Circati
Alessandro Circati.summary: Alessandro Circati (Italian: [alesˈsandro tʃirˈkaːti]; born 10 October 2003) is a professional soccer player who plays as a central defender for Serie A club Parma.
Alessandro Circati.note: Australia's young centre-back pillar, comfortable defending crosses and playing the first pass forward.
Alessandro Circati.noteZh: 亚历山德罗·奇尔卡蒂是澳大利亚年轻中卫支柱，能舒服地防守传中并向前送出第一脚传球。

Awer Mabil.name: Awer Mabil
Awer Mabil.summary: Awer Bul Mabil (born 15 September 1995) is a professional soccer player who plays as a winger for Segunda División club CD Castellón. Born in a Kenyan refugee camp to South Sudanese parents, he plays for the Australia national team.
Awer Mabil.note: Australia's pace winger, useful for stretching tired full-backs and attacking space in transition.
Awer Mabil.noteZh: 阿韦尔·马比尔是澳大利亚速度型边锋，适合拉扯疲劳边后卫并在转换中冲击空间。

Aziz Behich.name: Aziz Behich
Aziz Behich.summary: Aziz Behich (Turkish: [aˈziz eɾaɫˈtaj beˈhit͡ʃ], AZ-iz BAY-itch; born 16 December 1990) is an Australian professional soccer player who plays as a left back for A-League Men club Melbourne City and the Australia national team.
Aziz Behich.note: Australia's veteran left-back, trusted for wide duels and measured support runs.
Aziz Behich.noteZh: 阿齐兹·贝希奇是澳大利亚老将左后卫，边路对抗和有分寸的支援跑动都值得信任。

Cameron Devlin.name: Cameron Devlin
Cameron Devlin.summary: Cammy Devlin is an Australia central midfielder from Heart of Midlothian who gives the national team ball-winning bite, pressing range, and combative energy.
Cameron Devlin.note: Australia's midfield irritant, useful for pressing, tackling, and making opponents play faster than they want.
Cameron Devlin.noteZh: 卡米·德夫林是澳大利亚中场干扰点，适合压迫、铲抢，并迫使对手比自己想要的节奏更快出球。

Harry Souttar.name: Harry Souttar
Harry Souttar.summary: Harry James Souttar (born 22 October 1998) is a professional soccer player who plays as a centre-back for EFL League One club Leicester City. Born in Scotland, he plays for the Australia national team.
Harry Souttar.note: Australia's towering centre-back, a major aerial answer in both penalty areas.
Harry Souttar.noteZh: 哈里·苏塔尔是澳大利亚高大型中卫，是两个禁区里的重要空中答案。

Jacob Italiano.name: Jacob Italiano
Jacob Italiano.summary: Jacob Michael Italiano (born 30 July 2001) is an Australian professional football player who plays as a right back for Austrian Bundesliga club Grazer AK and the Australia national team.
Jacob Italiano.note: Australia's right-side support option, useful for recovery runs and cleaner crossing angles.
Jacob Italiano.noteZh: 雅各布·伊塔利亚诺是澳大利亚右路支援选择，适合回追跑动和更干净的传中角度。

Jason Geria.name: Jason Geria
Jason Geria.summary: Jason Kato Geria (born 10 May 1993) is an Australian professional soccer player who plays as a defender for Albirex Niigata in the J2 League and the Australia national team.
Jason Geria.note: Australia's disciplined right-back, valuable when the match calls for secure wide defending.
Jason Geria.noteZh: 杰森·格里亚是澳大利亚纪律性右后卫，比赛需要稳妥边路防守时很有价值。

Jordan Bos.name: Jordan Bos
Jordan Bos.summary: Jordan Jacob Bos (born 29 October 2002) is an Australian professional soccer player who plays as a left back for Eredivisie side Feyenoord and the Australia national team.
Jordan Bos.note: Australia's explosive left-back, able to turn a defensive regain into a long carry up the flank.
Jordan Bos.noteZh: 乔丹·博斯是澳大利亚爆发型左后卫，能把一次防守夺回变成长距离边路推进。

Kai Trewin.name: Kai Trewin
Kai Trewin.summary: Kai Clifton Trewin (; born 18 May 2001) is an Australian professional soccer player who plays as a central defender for Major League Soccer club New York City FC and the Australia national team.
Kai Trewin.note: Australia's flexible defensive passer, able to cover centre-back zones or step into midfield support.
Kai Trewin.noteZh: 凯·特鲁温是澳大利亚灵活的防守传球手，能覆盖中卫区域，也能前顶支援中场。

Lucas Herrington.name: Lucas Herrington
Lucas Herrington.summary: Lucas Herrington (born 5 September 2007) is an Australian professional soccer player who plays as a central defender for Major League Soccer club Colorado Rapids and the Australia national team.
Lucas Herrington.note: Australia's teenage centre-back project, bringing height, composure, and a high ceiling to the squad.
Lucas Herrington.noteZh: 卢卡斯·赫林顿是澳大利亚青少年中卫计划，能给名单带来身高、沉稳和很高上限。

Mathew Leckie.name: Mathew Leckie
Mathew Leckie.summary: Mathew Allan Leckie (born 4 February 1991) is an Australian soccer player who plays for A-League club Melbourne City and the Australia national team (whom he previously captained). Leckie, being a quick and agile player, is usually placed on the wing.
Mathew Leckie.note: Australia's veteran wide worker, useful for hard defensive shifts and direct runs into space.
Mathew Leckie.noteZh: 马修·莱基是澳大利亚老将边路工兵，适合艰苦防守轮转和直接冲击空间。

Milos Degenek.name: Milos Degenek
Milos Degenek.summary: Miloš Degenek ( MIL-osh DEG-ə-nek; Serbian Cyrillic: Милош Дегенек, born 28 April 1994) is a professional soccer player who plays as a centre-back for Cypriot First Division club APOEL. Born in Croatia, he represents the Australia national team.
Milos Degenek.note: Australia's experienced defensive cover, able to handle centre-back duels and tense tournament minutes.
Milos Degenek.noteZh: 米洛什·德格内克是澳大利亚经验丰富的防守保障，能处理中卫对抗和紧张的杯赛时间。

Mohamed Toure.name: Mohamed Toure
Mohamed Toure.summary: Mohamed Touré is an Australia centre-forward from Norwich City who gives the national team pace, penalty-box finishing, and direct channel runs.
Mohamed Toure.note: Australia's fast young striker, dangerous when he runs beyond centre-backs and finishes before they reset.
Mohamed Toure.noteZh: 穆罕默德·图雷是澳大利亚年轻速度型中锋，冲到中卫身后并在他们重整前终结时很危险。

Nishan Velupillay.name: Nishan Velupillay
Nishan Velupillay.summary: Nishan Matthew Velupillay (Tamil: நிஷான் மேத்யூ வேலுப்பிள்ளை, pronounced [niːʃɑːn ʋeːlupːiɭɭai]; born 7 May 2001) is an Australian professional soccer player who plays as a winger for Melbourne Victory and the Australia national team.
Nishan Velupillay.note: Australia's energetic winger, useful for pressing wide and arriving at the back post.
Nishan Velupillay.noteZh: 尼尚·韦卢皮莱是澳大利亚活力边锋，适合在边路压迫并冲到后点。

Patrick Beach.name: Patrick Beach
Patrick Beach.summary: Patrick Thomas Beach (born 6 August 2003) is an Australian professional soccer player who plays as a goalkeeper for A-League Men club Melbourne City and the Australia national team.
Patrick Beach.note: Australia's young goalkeeper depth, bringing reflexes and upside behind the senior options.
Patrick Beach.noteZh: 帕特里克·比奇是澳大利亚年轻门将深度，在资深选择身后提供反应和上升空间。

Paul Izzo.name: Paul Izzo
Paul Izzo.summary: Paul David Izzo (Italian: [ˈittso]; born 6 January 1995) is an Australian professional soccer player who plays as a goalkeeper for Danish Superliga side Randers and the Australia national team. He was selected to play in the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
Paul Izzo.note: Australia's experienced goalkeeper depth, useful for sharp reaction saves and steady tournament cover.
Paul Izzo.noteZh: 保罗·伊佐是澳大利亚经验型门将深度，适合快速反应扑救和稳定杯赛保障。

Paul Okon-Engstler.name: Paul Okon-Engstler
Paul Okon-Engstler.summary: Paul Michael Junior Okon-Engstler (West Flemish: [ˈoːkɔn ˈɛŋstlər]: born 24 January 2005), also known as Paul Okon Junior, is a professional soccer player who plays as a defensive midfielder for Sydney FC in the A-League Men.
Paul Okon-Engstler.note: Australia's young midfield shield, useful for simple circulation and learning the tempo of senior matches.
Paul Okon-Engstler.noteZh: 保罗·奥孔-恩斯特勒是澳大利亚年轻中场屏障，适合简单流转并适应成年队比赛节奏。

Tete Yengi.name: Tete Yengi
Tete Yengi.summary: Tete Owen Yengi (born 28 November 2000) is an Australian professional soccer player who plays as a striker for J1 League club Machida Zelvia, on loan from Scottish Championship club Livingston, and the Australia national team.
Tete Yengi.note: Australia's powerful striker option, useful for direct balls, channel runs, and making centre-backs uncomfortable.
Tete Yengi.noteZh: 特特·延吉是澳大利亚力量型中锋选择，适合直接球、通道跑动，并让中卫不舒服。

Alexander Sorloth.name: Alexander Sorloth
Alexander Sorloth.summary: Alexander Sørloth (born 5 December 1995) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a striker for La Liga club Atlético Madrid and the Norway national team.
Alexander Sorloth.note: Norway's power striker beside Haaland, useful for occupying centre-backs and finishing direct service.
Alexander Sorloth.noteZh: 亚历山大·索尔洛特是挪威在哈兰德身旁的力量型中锋，适合牵制中卫并终结直接传球。

Andreas Schjelderup.name: Andreas Schjelderup
Andreas Schjelderup.summary: Andreas Rædergård Schjelderup (born 1 June 2004) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a left winger or forward for Primeira Liga club Benfica and the Norway national team.
Andreas Schjelderup.note: Norway's young left-side creator, dangerous when he slides inside and combines around the box.
Andreas Schjelderup.noteZh: 安德烈亚斯·舍尔德鲁普是挪威年轻左路创造者，内收到中路并在禁区周围配合时很危险。

Egil Selvik.name: Egil Selvik
Egil Selvik.summary: Egil Selvik (born 30 July 1997) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for EFL Championship club Watford and the Norway national team.
Egil Selvik.note: Norway's goalkeeper depth, bringing quick reactions and direct distribution behind Nyland.
Egil Selvik.noteZh: 埃吉尔·塞尔维克是挪威门将深度，在尼兰身后提供快速反应和直接出球。

Fredrik Andre Bjorkan.name: Fredrik Andre Bjorkan
Fredrik Andre Bjorkan.summary: Fredrik André Bjørkan (born 21 August 1998) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Eliteserien club Bodø/Glimt and the Norway national team.
Fredrik Andre Bjorkan.note: Norway's left-back runner, useful for repeated overlaps and fast recovery when possession turns.
Fredrik Andre Bjorkan.noteZh: 弗雷德里克·安德烈·比约尔坎是挪威左后卫跑动点，适合反复套边并在球权转换时快速回追。

Fredrik Aursnes.name: Fredrik Aursnes
Fredrik Aursnes.summary: Fredrik Aursnes (born 10 December 1995) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays primarily as a midfielder for Primeira Liga club Benfica and the Norway national team.
Fredrik Aursnes.note: Norway's tactical problem-solver, able to balance midfield, full-back, or wide roles without fuss.
Fredrik Aursnes.noteZh: 弗雷德里克·奥尔斯内斯是挪威战术解题者，能自然平衡中场、边后卫或边路职责。

Henrik Falchener.name: Henrik Falchener
Henrik Falchener.summary: Henrik Sælebakke Falchener (born 8 May 2003) is a Norwegian footballer who plays as a centre-back for Viking and the Norway national team.
Henrik Falchener.note: Norway's tall young centre-back, useful for defending crosses and adding size to the back line.
Henrik Falchener.noteZh: 亨里克·法尔切内尔是挪威高大年轻中卫，适合防守传中并给后防增加身高。

Jens Petter Hauge.name: Jens Petter Hauge
Jens Petter Hauge.summary: Jens Petter Hauge (born 12 October 1999) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a left winger for Eliteserien club Bodø/Glimt and the Norway national team.
Jens Petter Hauge.note: Norway's returning wide creator, useful when they need a left-sided dribble into shooting positions.
Jens Petter Hauge.noteZh: 延斯·佩特尔·豪格是挪威回归型边路创造者，球队需要左路盘带进入射门位置时很有用。

Kristian Thorstvedt.name: Kristian Thorstvedt
Kristian Thorstvedt.summary: Kristian Thorstvedt (born 13 March 1999) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie A club Sassuolo and the Norway national team.
Kristian Thorstvedt.note: Norway's box-arriving midfielder, useful when attacks need a taller runner beyond the front line.
Kristian Thorstvedt.noteZh: 克里斯蒂安·托斯特维特是挪威后插上中场，进攻需要一个越过锋线的高大跑动点时很有用。

Kristoffer Ajer.name: Kristoffer Ajer
Kristoffer Ajer.summary: Kristoffer Vassbakk Köpp Ajer (born 17 April 1998) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays either as centre-back or right-back for Premier League club Brentford and the Norway national team.
Kristoffer Ajer.note: Norway's defensive hybrid, able to carry out from centre-back or cover the right side.
Kristoffer Ajer.noteZh: 克里斯托弗·阿耶尔是挪威防守混合型球员，能从中卫位置带球推进，也能覆盖右路。

Morten Thorsby.name: Morten Thorsby
Morten Thorsby.summary: Morten Thorsby (born 5 May 1996) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Serie B club Cremonese and the Norway national team.
Morten Thorsby.note: Norway's rugged midfield worker, useful for second balls and slowing opponents through contact.
Morten Thorsby.noteZh: 莫滕·托斯比是挪威强硬中场工兵，适合争抢第二落点并通过对抗拖慢对手。

Orjan Nyland.name: Orjan Nyland
Orjan Nyland.summary: Ørjan Nyland is a Norway goalkeeper from Sevilla FC who gives the national team veteran shot stopping, box command, and tournament experience.
Orjan Nyland.note: Norway's veteran goalkeeper, trusted for calm organization and saves through traffic.
Orjan Nyland.noteZh: 厄尔扬·尼兰是挪威老将门将，冷静组织和在人群中扑救都值得信任。

Oscar Bobb.name: Oscar Bobb
Oscar Bobb.summary: Oscar Bobb (born 12 July 2003) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder or winger for Premier League club Fulham and the Norway national team.
Oscar Bobb.note: Norway's silky right-side creator, dangerous when he receives between lines and slips past pressure.
Oscar Bobb.noteZh: 奥斯卡·鲍勃是挪威细腻的右路创造者，在线间接球并摆脱压力时很危险。

Patrick Berg.name: Patrick Berg
Patrick Berg.summary: Patrick Berg (born 24 November 1997) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Eliteserien club Bodø/Glimt and the Norway national team.
Patrick Berg.note: Norway's deep midfield controller, useful for screening counters and switching play early.
Patrick Berg.noteZh: 帕特里克·贝格是挪威后腰控制者，适合屏蔽反击并提前转移进攻方向。

Sander Berge.name: Sander Berge
Sander Berge.summary: Sander Gard Bolin Berge also known as Sandy Berge (born 14 February 1998) is a Norwegian professional footballer from Asker who plays as a defensive midfielder for Premier League club Fulham and the Norway national team.
Sander Berge.note: Norway's tall midfield carrier, able to stride through pressure and tilt possession forward.
Sander Berge.noteZh: 桑德尔·贝格是挪威高大型中场推进者，能大步穿过压力并把控球推向前场。

Sander Tangvik.name: Sander Tangvik
Sander Tangvik.summary: Sander Tangvik (born 29 November 2002) is a Norwegian footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for German Bundesliga club Hamburger SV and the Norway national team.
Sander Tangvik.note: Norway's younger goalkeeper option, bringing long-term upside and sharp reflexes.
Sander Tangvik.noteZh: 桑德尔·唐维克是挪威较年轻的门将选择，带来长期上限和敏锐反应。

Sondre Langas.name: Sondre Langas
Sondre Langas.summary: Sondre Klingen Langås (born 2 February 2001) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a defender for EFL Championship club Derby County and the Norway national team. Langås made his debut in the Norwegian Eliteserien for Viking.
Sondre Langas.note: Norway's centre-back depth, useful for aerial defending and keeping the back line fresh.
Sondre Langas.noteZh: 松德雷·朗戈斯是挪威中卫深度，适合空中防守并保持防线体能。

Thelo Aasgaard.name: Thelo Aasgaard
Thelo Aasgaard.summary: Thelonious "Thelo" Gerard Aasgaard (pronounced /ˈtɛloʊ ˈæzɡɑːrd/; TELL-oh AZ-gard; Norwegian pronunciation: [ˈtɛlːʊ ˈoːsɡoːr]; born 2 May 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Scottish Premiership club Rangers.
Thelo Aasgaard.note: Norway's midfield wild card, useful for late runs and shots when the first wave stalls.
Thelo Aasgaard.noteZh: 泰洛·奥斯加德是挪威中场变招，第一波进攻停滞时适合后插上和射门。

Torbjorn Heggem.name: Torbjorn Heggem
Torbjorn Heggem.summary: Torbjørn Lysaker Heggem (born 12 January 1999) is a Norwegian footballer who plays as a defender for Serie A club Bologna and the Norway national team. Primarily a centre-back, Heggem can also play as a left-back.
Torbjorn Heggem.note: Norway's left-sided defensive cover, steady at centre-back and useful sliding toward full-back zones.
Torbjorn Heggem.noteZh: 托尔比约恩·赫格姆是挪威左侧防守保障，踢中卫稳健，也能移动到边后卫区域。

David Moller Wolfe.name: David Moller Wolfe
David Moller Wolfe.summary: David Møller Wolfe (born 23 April 2002) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a left-back or left wing-back for EFL Championship club Wolverhampton Wanderers and the Norway national team.
David Moller Wolfe.note: Norway's left-sided outlet, useful for carrying out of pressure and giving the attack natural width.
David Moller Wolfe.noteZh: 大卫·默勒·沃尔夫是挪威左路出口，适合带球摆脱压力并给进攻提供自然宽度。

Jorgen Strand Larsen.name: Jorgen Strand Larsen
Jorgen Strand Larsen.summary: Jørgen Strand Larsen (Norwegian: [ˈjøːɾɡən strɑn ˈlɑːɾsən], born 6 February 2000) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a striker for Premier League club Crystal Palace and the Norway national team.
Jorgen Strand Larsen.note: Norway's second striker reference point, useful for linking play and keeping centre-backs occupied.
Jorgen Strand Larsen.noteZh: 约尔根·斯特兰德·拉森是挪威第二中锋参照点，适合串联进攻并持续牵制中卫。

Adrien Rabiot.name: Adrien Rabiot
Adrien Rabiot.summary: Adrien Thibault Marie Rabiot (French pronunciation: [adʁijɛ̃ tibo maʁi ʁabjo]; born 3 April 1995) is a French professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie A club AC Milan and the France national team.
Adrien Rabiot.note: France's left-sided midfield stabilizer, useful for adding height, balance, and late runs around the box.
Adrien Rabiot.noteZh: 阿德里安·拉比奥是法国左侧中场稳定器，能在禁区周围增加身高、平衡和后插上跑动。

Aurelien Tchouameni.name: Aurelien Tchouameni
Aurelien Tchouameni.summary: Aurélien Djani Tchouaméni (French pronunciation: [oʁeljɛ̃ dʒani tʃuameni, tʃwa-]; born 27 January 2000) is a French professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder or a centre-back for La Liga club Real Madrid and the France national team.
Aurelien Tchouameni.note: France's deep midfield shield, able to protect the centre and launch attacks with longer passes.
Aurelien Tchouameni.noteZh: 奥雷利安·楚阿梅尼是法国后腰屏障，能保护中路并用长传发动进攻。

Brice Samba.name: Brice Samba
Brice Samba.summary: Brice Lauriche Samba (born 25 April 1994) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Ligue 1 club Rennes. Born in the Republic of the Congo, he plays for the France national team.
Brice Samba.note: France's assertive goalkeeper option, bringing voice, reach, and confidence in crowded areas.
Brice Samba.noteZh: 布里斯·桑巴是法国强势门将选择，能在拥挤区域带来指挥、覆盖范围和信心。

Dayot Upamecano.name: Dayot Upamecano
Dayot Upamecano.summary: Dayotchanculle Oswald Upamecano (French: [upamekano]; born 27 October 1998) is a French professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Bundesliga club Bayern Munich and the France national team.
Dayot Upamecano.note: France's athletic centre-back, useful for defending big spaces and stepping forward with the ball.
Dayot Upamecano.noteZh: 达约·于帕梅卡诺是法国运动能力强的中卫，适合防守大片空间并带球前顶。

Desire Doue.name: Desire Doue
Desire Doue.summary: Désiré Nonka-Maho Doué (French pronunciation: [deziʁe dwe, -due]; born 3 June 2005) is a French professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or winger for Ligue 1 club Paris Saint-Germain and the France national team.
Desire Doue.note: France's young creative wildcard, able to receive between lines and make a defender miss.
Desire Doue.noteZh: 德西雷·杜埃是法国年轻创造型变招，能在线间接球并摆脱一名防守者。

Ibrahima Konate.name: Ibrahima Konate
Ibrahima Konate.summary: Ibrahima Konaté (French pronunciation: [ibʁaimˈa konatˈe]; born 25 May 1999) is a French professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Premier League club Liverpool and the France national team.
Ibrahima Konate.note: France's power centre-back, built for aerial contact and sprinting back into open space.
Ibrahima Konate.noteZh: 易卜拉希马·科纳特是法国力量型中卫，适合空中对抗并冲刺回追开阔空间。

Jean-Philippe Mateta.name: Jean-Philippe Mateta
Jean-Philippe Mateta.summary: Jean-Philippe Mateta (born 28 June 1997) is a French professional footballer who plays as a striker for Premier League club Crystal Palace and the France national team.
Jean-Philippe Mateta.note: France's direct centre-forward option, useful when they need a bigger body to finish or pin defenders.
Jean-Philippe Mateta.noteZh: 让-菲利普·马特塔是法国直接型中锋选择，球队需要更强壮身体来终结或压住防守者时很有用。

Jules Kounde.name: Jules Kounde
Jules Kounde.summary: Jules Olivier Koundé (French pronunciation: [ʒyl ɔlivje kunde]; born 12 November 1998) is a French professional footballer who plays as a defender for La Liga club Barcelona and the France national team.
Jules Kounde.note: France's right-side defensive controller, calm enough to defend wide or tuck inside.
Jules Kounde.noteZh: 朱尔·孔德是法国右侧防守控制者，既能冷静守边路，也能内收到中路。

Lucas Digne.name: Lucas Digne
Lucas Digne.summary: Lucas Digne (French pronunciation: [lyka diɲ]; born 20 July 1993) is a French professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Premier League club Aston Villa and the France national team.
Lucas Digne.note: France's experienced left-back option, useful for early crosses and reliable set-piece service.
Lucas Digne.noteZh: 卢卡斯·迪涅是法国经验型左后卫选择，适合早传和可靠的定位球传递。

Lucas Hernandez.name: Lucas Hernandez
Lucas Hernandez.summary: Lucas François Bernard Hernandez (French pronunciation: [lukas ɛʁnɑ̃dɛz, - ɛʁnandɛs]; born 14 February 1996) is a French professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or left-back for Ligue 1 club Paris Saint-Germain and the France national team.
Lucas Hernandez.note: France's left-sided defensive enforcer, able to cover centre-back or full-back zones with bite.
Lucas Hernandez.noteZh: 卢卡斯·埃尔南德斯是法国左侧防守强硬点，能强硬覆盖中卫或边后卫区域。

Maghnes Akliouche.name: Maghnes Akliouche
Maghnes Akliouche.summary: Maghnes Akliouche (born 25 February 2002) is a French professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Ligue 1 club Monaco and the France national team.
Maghnes Akliouche.note: France's subtle attacking connector, useful for tight touches and disguised passes near the box.
Maghnes Akliouche.noteZh: 马格内斯·阿克利乌什是法国细腻的进攻连接点，适合在禁区附近用小范围触球和隐蔽传球制造机会。

Malo Gusto.name: Malo Gusto
Malo Gusto.summary: Malo Arthur Gusto (born 19 May 2003) is a French professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Premier League club Chelsea and the France national team.
Malo Gusto.note: France's right-back runner, valuable for pushing high and still recovering into wide duels.
Malo Gusto.noteZh: 马洛·古斯托是法国右后卫跑动点，对高位前插并回到边路对抗很有价值。

Manu Kone.name: Manu Kone
Manu Kone.summary: Kouadio Emmanuel Boris Koné (born 17 May 2001) is a French professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie A club Roma and the France national team.
Manu Kone.note: France's physical midfield carrier, able to drive through contact and break pressure.
Manu Kone.noteZh: 马努·科内是法国身体型中场推进者，能带球穿过对抗并破解压力。

Marcus Thuram.name: Marcus Thuram
Marcus Thuram.summary: Marcus Lilian Thuram-Ulien (French pronunciation: [maʁkys tyʁam]; born 6 August 1997) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Serie A club Inter Milan. Born in Italy, he plays for the France national team.
Marcus Thuram.note: France's flexible forward runner, useful for drifting wide before attacking central space.
Marcus Thuram.noteZh: 马库斯·图拉姆是法国灵活的前锋跑动点，适合先拉到边路再冲击中路空间。

Maxence Lacroix.name: Maxence Lacroix
Maxence Lacroix.summary: Maxence Guy Lacroix (French pronunciation: [maksɑ̃s lakʁwa]; born 6 April 2000) is a French professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Premier League club Chelsea and the France national team.
Maxence Lacroix.note: France's quick centre-back depth, useful when the defensive line has to live high.
Maxence Lacroix.noteZh: 马克桑斯·拉克鲁瓦是法国速度型中卫深度，防线必须高位运转时很有用。

Mike Maignan.name: Mike Maignan
Mike Maignan.summary: Mike Peterson Maignan (French pronunciation: [mɛɲɑ̃]; born 3 July 1995) is a French professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Serie A club AC Milan, which he captains, and the France national team.
Mike Maignan.note: France's first-choice goalkeeper, giving them range, authority, and clean distribution.
Mike Maignan.noteZh: 迈克·迈尼昂是法国一号门将，能提供覆盖范围、权威感和干净出球。

Ngolo Kante.name: Ngolo Kante
Ngolo Kante.summary: N'Golo Kanté (born 29 March 1991) is a French professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Süper Lig club Fenerbahçe and the France national team.
Ngolo Kante.note: France's evergreen ball-winner, still able to sense danger early and erase counters.
Ngolo Kante.noteZh: 恩戈洛·坎特是法国常青抢球手，依然能提前感知危险并抹掉反击。

Rayan Cherki.name: Rayan Cherki
Rayan Cherki.summary: Mathis Rayan Cherki (born 17 August 2003) is a French professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or winger for Premier League club Manchester City and the France national team.
Rayan Cherki.note: France's improvising creator, dangerous when structure breaks and the match becomes a puzzle.
Rayan Cherki.noteZh: 拉扬·谢尔基是法国即兴创造者，当结构被打破、比赛变成解题时很危险。

Robin Risser.name: Robin Risser
Robin Risser.summary: Robin François Philippe Risser (born 2 December 2004) is a French professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Ligue 1 club Lens.
Robin Risser.note: France's young goalkeeper depth, bringing shot-stopping upside behind the senior options.
Robin Risser.noteZh: 罗宾·里塞尔是法国年轻门将深度，在资深选择身后提供扑救上限。

Theo Hernandez.name: Theo Hernandez
Theo Hernandez.summary: Théo Bernard François Hernandez (French pronunciation: [teo ɛʁnɑ̃dɛz, - ɛʁnandɛs]; born 6 October 1997) is a French professional footballer who plays primarily as a left-back for Saudi Pro League club Al Hilal and the France national team.
Theo Hernandez.note: France's explosive left-back runner, able to turn a defensive regain into a direct attack.
Theo Hernandez.noteZh: 特奥·埃尔南德斯是法国爆发型左后卫跑动点，能把一次防守夺回变成直接进攻。

Warren Zaire-Emery.name: Warren Zaire-Emery
Warren Zaire-Emery.summary: Warren Marie Jean-Pierre Zaïre-Emery (born 8 March 2006) is a French professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Ligue 1 club Paris Saint-Germain and the France national team.
Warren Zaire-Emery.note: France's young midfield connector, calm enough to progress play and press again after loss.
Warren Zaire-Emery.noteZh: 沃伦·扎伊尔-埃梅里是法国年轻中场连接点，能冷静推进，也能在丢球后再次压迫。

Abdoulaye Seck.name: Abdoulaye Seck
Abdoulaye Seck.summary: Abdoulaye Seck (born 4 June 1992) is a Senegalese professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Israeli Premier League club Maccabi Haifa and the Senegal national team.
Abdoulaye Seck.note: Senegal's physical centre-back option, useful for clearing crosses and attacking dead balls.
Abdoulaye Seck.noteZh: 阿卜杜拉耶·塞克是塞内加尔身体型中卫选择，适合解围传中并冲击定位球。

Antoine Mendy.name: Antoine Mendy
Antoine Mendy.summary: Antoine Alpha Mendy (born 27 May 2004) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back and centre-back for Ligue 1 club Nice. Born in France, he plays for the Senegal national team.
Antoine Mendy.note: Senegal's right-side defensive cover, able to defend wide or tuck inside when the shape changes.
Antoine Mendy.noteZh: 安托万·门迪是塞内加尔右侧防守保障，阵型变化时能守边路，也能内收到中路。

Assane Diao.name: Assane Diao
Assane Diao.summary: Assane Diao (born 7 September 2005) is a Senegalese professional footballer who plays as a winger for Serie A club Como and the Senegal national team.
Assane Diao.note: Senegal's direct wide runner, dangerous when space opens and he can attack at speed.
Assane Diao.noteZh: 阿萨内·迪奥是塞内加尔直接型边路跑动点，空间打开并能提速冲击时很危险。

Bamba Dieng.name: Bamba Dieng
Bamba Dieng.summary: Cheikh Ahmadou Bamba Mbacke Dieng (born 23 March 2000) is a Senegalese professional footballer who plays as a forward for Ligue 1 club Lorient and the Senegal national team.
Bamba Dieng.note: Senegal's lively forward option, useful for chasing centre-backs and snapping at loose chances.
Bamba Dieng.noteZh: 班巴·迪昂是塞内加尔活跃的前锋选择，适合追压中卫并抓住松散机会。

Cherif Ndiaye.name: Cherif Ndiaye
Cherif Ndiaye.summary: Pape Cherif Ndiaye (born 23 January 1996) is a Senegalese professional footballer who plays as a forward for Süper Lig club Samsunspor and the Senegal national team.
Cherif Ndiaye.note: Senegal's penalty-box forward, useful for holding off defenders and finishing service from wide areas.
Cherif Ndiaye.noteZh: 谢里夫·恩迪亚耶是塞内加尔禁区前锋，适合抗住防守者并终结来自边路的传球。

Edouard Mendy.name: Edouard Mendy
Edouard Mendy.summary: Édouard Osoque Mendy (born 1 March 1992) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for and captains Saudi Pro League club Al-Ahli. Born in France, he plays for the Senegal national team.
Edouard Mendy.note: Senegal's experienced goalkeeper, trusted for box command and calming long defensive stretches.
Edouard Mendy.noteZh: 爱德华·门迪是塞内加尔经验丰富的门将，禁区指挥和稳定漫长防守阶段都值得信任。

Habib Diarra.name: Habib Diarra
Habib Diarra.summary: Mouhamadou Habib Mbacke Diarra (born 3 January 2004) is a French-Senegalese professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Sunderland and the Senegal national team.
Habib Diarra.note: Senegal's powerful midfield carrier, useful for driving through contact and joining the attack late.
Habib Diarra.noteZh: 哈比卜·迪亚拉是塞内加尔力量型中场推进者，适合带球穿过对抗并后插上参与进攻。

Iliman Ndiaye.name: Iliman Ndiaye
Iliman Ndiaye.summary: Iliman Cheikh Baroy Ndiaye (born 6 March 2000) is a professional footballer who plays as a wide midfielder for Premier League club Everton. Born in France, he plays for the Senegal national team.
Iliman Ndiaye.note: Senegal's clever attacking connector, able to receive in traffic and slip into the box with short touches.
Iliman Ndiaye.noteZh: 伊利曼·恩迪亚耶是塞内加尔聪明的进攻连接点，能在人群中接球并用小范围触球钻入禁区。

Ismail Jakobs.name: Ismail Jakobs
Ismail Jakobs.summary: Ismail Joshua Jakobs (born 17 August 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Süper Lig club Galatasaray. Born in Germany, he plays for the Senegal national team.
Ismail Jakobs.note: Senegal's left-back runner, useful for overlaps and fast recovery against switches.
Ismail Jakobs.noteZh: 伊斯梅尔·雅各布斯是塞内加尔左后卫跑动点，适合套边并快速回追应对转移球。

Krepin Diatta.name: Krepin Diatta
Krepin Diatta.summary: Krépin Diatta (born 25 February 1999) is a Senegalese professional footballer who plays as a winger for Ligue 1 club Monaco and the Senegal national team.
Krepin Diatta.note: Senegal's tireless right-side runner, useful for shuttling between defense and attack.
Krepin Diatta.noteZh: 克雷潘·迪亚塔是塞内加尔不知疲倦的右路跑动点，适合在防守和进攻之间来回穿梭。

Lamine Camara.name: Lamine Camara
Lamine Camara.summary: Lamine Camara (born 1 January 2004) is a Senegalese professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Ligue 1 club Monaco and the Senegal national team.
Lamine Camara.note: Senegal's young midfield passer, able to progress play and threaten from restarts or distance.
Lamine Camara.noteZh: 拉明·卡马拉是塞内加尔年轻中场传球手，能推进进攻，并在定位球或远射中制造威胁。

Mamadou Sarr.name: Mamadou Sarr
Mamadou Sarr.summary: Mamadou Sarr (born 29 August 2005) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Premier League club Chelsea. Born in France, he plays for the Senegal national team.
Mamadou Sarr.note: Senegal's young centre-back option, useful for recovery defending and growing into physical duels.
Mamadou Sarr.noteZh: 马马杜·萨尔是塞内加尔年轻中卫选择，适合回追防守，并逐渐适应身体对抗。

Mory Diaw.name: Mory Diaw
Mory Diaw.summary: Mory Diaw (born 22 June 1993) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Ligue 1 club Le Havre. Born in France, he plays for the Senegal national team.
Mory Diaw.note: Senegal's goalkeeper depth, bringing reach and shot-stopping cover behind the senior options.
Mory Diaw.noteZh: 莫里·迪奥是塞内加尔门将深度，在资深选择身后提供覆盖范围和扑救保障。

Moussa Niakhate.name: Moussa Niakhate
Moussa Niakhate.summary: Moussa Niakhaté (born 8 March 1996) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Ligue 1 club Lyon. Born in France, he plays for the Senegal national team.
Moussa Niakhate.note: Senegal's left-footed defensive balance, useful for covering channels and passing out cleanly.
Moussa Niakhate.noteZh: 穆萨·尼亚哈特是塞内加尔左脚防守平衡点，适合覆盖通道并干净出球。

Pape Gueye.name: Pape Gueye
Pape Gueye.summary: Pape Alassane Gueye (born 24 January 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for La Liga club Villarreal. Born in France, he plays for the Senegal national team.
Pape Gueye.note: Senegal's big midfield screen, useful for winning contact and feeding the next pass forward.
Pape Gueye.noteZh: 帕普·盖耶是塞内加尔高大中场屏障，适合赢下对抗并向前送出下一脚传球。

Pathe Ciss.name: Pathe Ciss
Pathe Ciss.summary: Pathé Ismaël Ciss (born 16 March 1994) is a Senegalese professional footballer who plays as a central or defensive midfielder for La Liga club Rayo Vallecano and the Senegal national team.
Pathe Ciss.note: Senegal's midfield battler, useful for second balls and keeping possession moving after contact.
Pathe Ciss.noteZh: 帕特·西斯是塞内加尔中场斗士，适合争抢第二落点并在对抗后让控球继续流动。

Yehvann Diouf.name: Yehvann Diouf
Yehvann Diouf.summary: Yehvann Djibril Victor Diouf (born 16 November 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Ligue 1 club Nice. Born in France, he plays for the Senegal national team.
Yehvann Diouf.note: Senegal's athletic goalkeeper option, useful for reaction saves and confident penalty-area work.
Yehvann Diouf.noteZh: 耶万·迪乌夫是塞内加尔运动能力强的门将选择，适合反应扑救和自信处理禁区事务。

Bara Sapoko Ndiaye.name: Bara Sapoko Ndiaye
Bara Sapoko Ndiaye.summary: Bara Sapoko Ndiaye is a Senegal central midfielder from Bayern Munich who gives the national team youthful ball carrying, midfield mobility, and long-term upside.
Bara Sapoko Ndiaye.note: Senegal's teenage midfield wildcard, useful for fresh legs and brave carries through pressure.
Bara Sapoko Ndiaye.noteZh: 巴拉·萨波科·恩迪亚耶是塞内加尔青少年中场变招，适合带来新鲜腿脚并勇敢带球穿过压力。

El Hadji Malick Diouf.name: El Hadji Malick Diouf
El Hadji Malick Diouf.summary: El Hadji Malick Diouf (born 29 December 2004) is a Senegalese professional footballer who plays as a left-back or left wing-back for EFL Championship club West Ham United and the Senegal national team.
El Hadji Malick Diouf.note: Senegal's explosive left-sided runner, able to turn a recovery into a quick attack down the flank.
El Hadji Malick Diouf.noteZh: 埃尔·哈吉·马利克·迪乌夫是塞内加尔爆发型左路跑动点，能把一次回追变成边路快速进攻。

Idrissa Gueye.name: Idrissa Gueye
Idrissa Gueye.summary: Idrissa Gana Gueye (born 26 September 1989) is a Senegalese professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Premier League club Everton and the Senegal national team.
Idrissa Gueye.note: Senegal's veteran midfield reader, still valuable for sensing danger and stopping counters early.
Idrissa Gueye.noteZh: 伊德里萨·盖耶是塞内加尔老将中场阅读者，依然能提前感知危险并尽早阻断反击。

Pape Matar Sarr.name: Pape Matar Sarr
Pape Matar Sarr.summary: Pape Matar Sarr (French pronunciation: [pap matɑʁ sɑʁ]; born 14 September 2002) is a Senegalese professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Tottenham Hotspur and the Senegal national team.
Pape Matar Sarr.note: Senegal's box-to-box engine, able to carry through pressure and arrive beyond the first wave.
Pape Matar Sarr.noteZh: 帕普·马塔尔·萨尔是塞内加尔双向发动机，能带球穿过压力并在第一波进攻后继续前插。

Ahmed Basil.name: Ahmed Basil
Ahmed Basil.summary: Ahmed Basil Fadhil Al Fadhli (Arabic: أَحْمَد بَاسِل فَاضِل الْفَضْلِيّ; born 19 August 1996) is an Iraqi professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for the Iraq Stars League club Al-Shorta and the Iraq national team.
Ahmed Basil.note: Iraq's goalkeeper option, useful for quick reactions and organizing a deep defensive block.
Ahmed Basil.noteZh: 艾哈迈德·巴西勒·法迪勒是伊拉克门将选择，适合快速反应并组织深位防守。

Ahmed Qasem.name: Ahmed Qasem
Ahmed Qasem.summary: Ahmed Ihab Ahmed, known as Ahmed Qasem (Arabic: أحمد قاسم, romanized: ʾAḥmad Qāsim pronounced [ˈ(ʔ)aħmad ˈqaː.sɪm]; born 12 July 2003), is a professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Major League Soccer club Nashville SC.
Ahmed Qasem.note: Iraq's attacking midfield runner, useful for arriving between lines and shooting before pressure arrives.
Ahmed Qasem.noteZh: 艾哈迈德·卡西姆是伊拉克攻击型中场跑动点，适合在线间前插并在压力到来前射门。

Aimar Sher.name: Aimar Sher
Aimar Sher.summary: Aimar Hazar Anwar Sher (born 20 December 2002) is an Iraqi professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Sarpsborg 08 and the Iraq national team.
Aimar Sher.note: Iraq's mobile midfield carrier, able to move possession through contact and press again after loss.
Aimar Sher.noteZh: 艾马尔·谢尔是伊拉克机动中场推进者，能在对抗中推进控球，并在丢球后再次压迫。

Akam Hashim.name: Akam Hashim
Akam Hashim.summary: Akam Hashim Rahman (Arabic: اكام هاشم رحمن; Kurdish: ئاکام هاشم ڕەحمان; born 16 August 1998) is a Kurdish Iraqi professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or midfielder for Al-Zawraa and the Iraq national team.
Akam Hashim.note: Iraq's left-footed centre-back option, useful for direct duels and defending crosses.
Akam Hashim.noteZh: 阿卡姆·哈希姆是伊拉克左脚中卫选择，适合直接对抗和防守传中。

Ali Yousif.name: Ali Yousif
Ali Yousif.summary: Ali Yousif Hashim Najatee (Arabic: علي يوسف هاشم; born 19 January 1996) is an Iraqi professional footballer who plays as a forward for Al-Talaba and the Iraq national team.
Ali Yousif.note: Iraq's tall centre-forward option, useful for direct service and penalty-box contact.
Ali Yousif.noteZh: 阿里·优素福是伊拉克高大中锋选择，适合直接传球和禁区对抗。

Fahad Talib.name: Fahad Talib
Fahad Talib.summary: Fahad Talib Raheem (Arabic: فَهْد طَالِب رَحِيم; born 21 October 1994) is an Iraqi professional footballer who played as a goalkeeper for Iraq Stars League club Al Talaba and the Iraq national team.
Fahad Talib.note: Iraq's experienced goalkeeper depth, bringing reach and calm in crowded areas.
Fahad Talib.noteZh: 法哈德·塔利布是伊拉克经验型门将深度，能在拥挤区域带来覆盖范围和冷静。

Frans Putros.name: Frans Putros
Frans Putros.summary: Frans Dhia Jirjis Haddad (born 14 July 1993), commonly known as Frans Putros (Arabic: فرانس بطرس; Syriac: ܦܪܢܣ ܦܘܛܪܘܣ), is a professional footballer who plays as a Centre-back, Full-back or Defensive midfielder for Super League club Persib Bandung.
Frans Putros.note: Iraq's defensive utility piece, able to cover centre-back, full-back, or holding zones.
Frans Putros.noteZh: 弗兰斯·普特罗斯是伊拉克防守多面手，能覆盖中卫、边后卫或后腰区域。

Hussein Ali.name: Hussein Ali
Hussein Ali.summary: Hussein Ali Jasim Al Saedi (Arabic: حسين علي جاسم الساعدي; born 29 November 1996) is an Iraqi professional footballer who plays for Iraq Stars League club Al-Shorta and the Iraq national team.
Hussein Ali.note: Iraq's right-side worker, useful for connecting midfield to attack and pressing wide outlets.
Hussein Ali.noteZh: 侯赛因·阿里是伊拉克右路工兵，适合连接中场和进攻，并压迫边路出球点。

Ibrahim Bayesh.name: Ibrahim Bayesh
Ibrahim Bayesh.summary: Ibrahim Bayesh Kamil Al-Kaabawi (Arabic: إبرَاهِيْم بَايَش كَامِل الْكَعْبَاوِيّ; born 1 May 2000) is an Iraqi professional footballer who plays Al-Dhafra as a midfielder for UAE Pro League club Al-Dhafra and the Iraq national team.
Ibrahim Bayesh.note: Iraq's direct attacking runner, dangerous when he carries into space and shoots early.
Ibrahim Bayesh.noteZh: 易卜拉欣·巴耶什是伊拉克直接型进攻跑动点，带球进入空间并提前射门时很危险。

Jalal Hassan.name: Jalal Hassan
Jalal Hassan.summary: Jalal Hassan Hachem (Arabic: جَلَال حَسَن هَاشِم; born 18 May 1991) is an Iraqi professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for and captains both Al-Zawraa and the Iraq football team.
Jalal Hassan.note: Iraq's veteran captain in goal, trusted for communication and high-pressure saves.
Jalal Hassan.noteZh: 贾拉勒·哈桑是伊拉克门线上的老将队长，沟通和高压扑救都值得信任。

Kevin Yakob.name: Kevin Yakob
Kevin Yakob.summary: Kevin Enkido Yakob William (Syriac: ܟܒܢ ܝܥܩܘܒ, born 10 October 2000) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Danish Superliga club AGF. Born in Sweden, he plays for the Iraq national team.
Kevin Yakob.note: Iraq's composed midfield passer, useful for keeping the ball through pressure.
Kevin Yakob.noteZh: 凯文·雅各布是伊拉克沉稳的中场传球手，适合在压力下保持球权。

Marko Farji.name: Marko Farji
Marko Farji.summary: Marko Zana Hussein Farji (Arabic: ماركو زانا حسين فرج; Kurdish: Marko Zana Husên Fercî; born 16 March 2004) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Serie A club Venezia. Born in Norway, he plays for the Iraq national team.
Marko Farji.note: Iraq's young wide runner, useful for carrying into the box and attacking stretched defenders.
Marko Farji.noteZh: 马尔科·法尔吉是伊拉克年轻边路跑动点，适合带球进入禁区并冲击被拉开的防守者。

Merchas Doski.name: Merchas Doski
Merchas Doski.summary: Merchas Ghazi Salih Doski (Kurdish: مێرخاس غازی ساڵح دۆسکی, romanized: Mîrxas Qazî Salih Doskî, Arabic: ميرخاس غازي صالح دوسكي) is a professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Viktoria Plzeň. Born in Germany, he plays for the Iraq national team.
Merchas Doski.note: Iraq's left-back outlet, useful for defending wide and serving early balls up the line.
Merchas Doski.noteZh: 梅尔哈斯·多斯基是伊拉克左后卫出口，适合防守边路并沿边路提前送球。

Mohanad Ali.name: Mohanad Ali
Mohanad Ali.summary: Mohanad Ali Kadhim Al-Shammari (Arabic: مُهَنَّد عَلِيّ كَاظِم الشَّمَّرِيّ, born 20 June 2000), commonly known in Iraq as Mimi (Arabic: ميمي), is an Iraqi professional footballer who plays as a forward for UAE club Dibba and the Iraq national team.
Mohanad Ali.note: Iraq's penalty-box striker, useful for sharp movement and finishing loose chances.
Mohanad Ali.noteZh: 穆哈纳德·阿里是伊拉克禁区中锋，适合敏锐跑动并终结松散机会。

Munaf Younus.name: Munaf Younus
Munaf Younus.summary: Manaf Younus Hashim Al-Tekreeti (Arabic: مَنَاف يُونُس هَاشِم التِّكرِيْتِيّ; born 16 November 1996) is an Iraqi professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Iraq Stars League club Al-Shorta and the Iraq national team.
Munaf Younus.note: Iraq's physical centre-back, useful for direct defending and clearing crowded boxes.
Munaf Younus.noteZh: 马纳夫·尤尼斯是伊拉克身体型中卫，适合直接防守和解围拥挤禁区。

Mustafa Saadoon.name: Mustafa Saadoon
Mustafa Saadoon.summary: Mustafa Saadoon is an Iraq right-back from Al-Shorta who gives the national team wide defending, recovery speed, and overlap support.
Mustafa Saadoon.note: Iraq's right-back option, useful for recovery defending and careful support runs.
Mustafa Saadoon.noteZh: 穆斯塔法·萨阿敦是伊拉克右后卫选择，适合回追防守和谨慎支援跑动。

Rebin Sulaka.name: Rebin Sulaka
Rebin Sulaka.summary: Rebin Gharib Sulaka Adhamat (Arabic: ريبين غريب سولاقا عظمت; born 12 April 1992) is an Iraqi professional footballer who plays as a centre back for Thai League 1 club Port and the Iraq national team.
Rebin Sulaka.note: Iraq's experienced centre-back, useful for organizing the line and winning aerial contact.
Rebin Sulaka.noteZh: 雷宾·苏拉卡是伊拉克经验型中卫，适合组织防线并赢下空中对抗。

Youssef Amyn.name: Youssef Amyn
Youssef Amyn.summary: Youssef Wali Faeq Amyn (Arabic: يوسف والي فائق أمين; Kurdish: یوسف وەلی فائق ئەمین‎; born 21 August 2003) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger for Cypriot First Division club AEK Larnaca. Born in Germany, he plays for the Iraq national team.
Youssef Amyn.note: Iraq's quick winger, dangerous when he drives inside from wide areas in transition.
Youssef Amyn.noteZh: 优素福·阿明是伊拉克速度型边锋，在转换中从边路内切推进时很危险。

Zaid Tahseen.name: Zaid Tahseen
Zaid Tahseen.summary: Zaid Tahseen Abd Zaid Hantoosh (Arabic: زَيْد تَحْسِيْن عَبد زيد; born 29 January 2001) is an Iraqi footballer who plays as a center back for Pakhtakor in the Uzbekistan Super League and the Iraq national team.
Zaid Tahseen.note: Iraq's centre-back depth, useful for aerial defending and late-game protection.
Zaid Tahseen.noteZh: 扎伊德·塔赫辛是伊拉克中卫深度，适合空中防守和比赛后段保护。

Ahmed Maknzi.name: Ahmed Maknzi
Ahmed Maknzi.summary: Ahmed Maknzi is an Iraq left-back from Al-Karma who gives the national team wide defending, recovery runs, and defensive flexibility.
Ahmed Maknzi.note: Iraq's left-back cover, useful for recovery runs and keeping the far side protected.
Ahmed Maknzi.noteZh: 艾哈迈德·马克恩齐是伊拉克左后卫保障，适合回追跑动并保护远侧。

Ali Al-Hamadi.name: Ali Al-Hamadi
Ali Al-Hamadi.summary: Ali Al-Hamadi is an Iraq centre-forward from Luton Town who gives the national team hold-up play, runs in behind, and penalty-box finishing.
Ali Al-Hamadi.note: Iraq's main mobile striker, useful for stretching centre-backs and turning direct passes into shots.
Ali Al-Hamadi.noteZh: 阿里·阿尔-哈马迪是伊拉克主要机动中锋，适合拉扯中卫并把直接传球变成射门。

Amir Al-Ammari.name: Amir Al-Ammari
Amir Al-Ammari.summary: Amir Al-Ammari is an Iraq defensive midfielder from Cracovia who gives the national team screening, left-footed passing, and set-piece support.
Amir Al-Ammari.note: Iraq's left-footed midfield screen, useful for protecting transitions and moving the ball out cleanly.
Amir Al-Ammari.noteZh: 阿米尔·阿尔-阿马里是伊拉克左脚中场屏障，适合保护转换并干净出球。

Zaid Ismail.name: Zaid Ismail
Zaid Ismail.summary: Zaid Ismail is an Iraq defensive midfielder from Al-Talaba who gives the national team screening, duel work, and simple central passing.
