Zaid Ismail.note: Iraq's midfield shield, useful for protecting the centre and keeping the next pass simple.
Zaid Ismail.noteZh: 扎伊德·伊斯梅尔是伊拉克中场屏障，适合保护中路并保持下一脚传球简单。

Dailon Livramento.name: Dailon Livramento
Dailon Livramento.summary: Dailon Rocha Livramento do Rosario (Portuguese: [ˈdaj.lɔn ˈʀɔ.ʃɐ li.vɾɐ.ˈmẽ.tu du ʀu.ˈza.ɾi.u]; born 4 May 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Primeira Liga club Casa Pia, on loan from Serie B club Hellas Verona.
Dailon Livramento.club: Casa Pia (on loan from Hellas Verona)
Dailon Livramento.note: Cabo Verde's mobile striker, dangerous when he bends runs behind and attacks loose balls.
Dailon Livramento.noteZh: 戴隆·利夫拉门托是佛得角机动中锋，弯线冲到身后并攻击松散球时很危险。

Deroy Duarte.name: Deroy Duarte
Deroy Duarte.summary: Deroy d'Encarnação Duarte (Dutch: [də.ˈɾɔj] Portuguese: [dẽ.kɐɾ.nɐ.ˈsɐ̃w du.ˈaɾ.tɨ]; born 4 July 1999) is a professional football player who plays as a midfielder for Bulgarian First League club Ludogorets Razgrad.
Deroy Duarte.note: Cabo Verde's central ball carrier, able to move possession through pressure and connect attacks.
Deroy Duarte.noteZh: 德罗伊·杜阿尔特是佛得角中路带球推进者，能在压力下推进控球并连接进攻。

Diney Borges.name: Diney Borges
Diney Borges.summary: Edilson Alberto Monteiro Sanches Borges (Portuguese: [e.ˈdil.sɔn al.ˈbɛɾ.tu mõ.ˈtej.ɾu ˈsɐ̃.ʃɨʒ ˈbɔɾ.ʒɨʃ]; born 17 January 1995), known as Diney (Kabuverdianu: [di.ˈnej]), is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for UAE Pro League...
Diney Borges.note: Cabo Verde's sturdy defensive piece, useful for aerial duels and covering central spaces.
Diney Borges.noteZh: 迪内·博尔热斯是佛得角稳固的防守棋子，适合空中对抗并覆盖中路空间。

Garry Rodrigues.name: Garry Rodrigues
Garry Rodrigues.summary: Garry Mendes Rodrigues (Portuguese: [ɡa.ˈʀi ˈmẽ.dɨʒ ʀu.ˈdɾi.ɡɨʃ]; born 27 November 1990) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger for Cypriot First Division club Apollon Limassol. Born in the Netherlands, he plays for the Cape Verde national team.
Garry Rodrigues.note: Cabo Verde's experienced wide runner, still useful for direct carries into transition space.
Garry Rodrigues.noteZh: 加里·罗德里格斯是佛得角经验型边路跑动点，依然适合直接带球冲击转换空间。

Gilson Benchimol.name: Gilson Benchimol
Gilson Benchimol.summary: Gilson Benchimol Tavares (Portuguese: [ˈʒil.sɔn bẽ.ʃi.ˈmɔl ta.ˈva.ɾɨʃ]; born 29 December 2001) is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a striker for Russian club Akron Tolyatti and the Cape Verde national team.
Gilson Benchimol.note: Cabo Verde's bigger forward option, useful for holding service and attacking crosses.
Gilson Benchimol.noteZh: 吉尔森·本希莫尔是佛得角更高大的前锋选择，适合支住传球并冲击传中。

Jamiro Monteiro.name: Jamiro Monteiro
Jamiro Monteiro.summary: Jamiro Gregory Monteiro Alvarenga (Portuguese: [ʒɐ.ˈmi.ɾu ˈɡɾɛ.ɡɔ.ɾi mõ.ˈtej.ɾu al.vɐ.ˈɾẽ.ɡɐ]; born 23 November 1993), commonly known as Jamiro, is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Eredivisie club PEC Zwolle.
Jamiro Monteiro.note: Cabo Verde's midfield rhythm player, useful for calming possession and finding the first forward angle.
Jamiro Monteiro.noteZh: 贾米罗·蒙泰罗是佛得角中场节奏点，适合让控球冷静下来并找到第一条向前线路。

João Paulo.name: João Paulo
João Paulo.summary: João Paulo Moreira Fernandes (Portuguese: [ʒu.ˈɐ̃w ˈpaw.lu mu.ˈɾej.ɾɐ fɨɾ.ˈnɐ̃.dɨʃ]; born 26 May 1998), commonly known as João Paulo, is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a midfielder or a left-back for Liga I club FCSB and the Cape Verde...
João Paulo.note: Cabo Verde's flexible midfield shield, able to cover defensive zones and support restarts.
João Paulo.noteZh: 若昂·保罗是佛得角灵活的中场屏障，能覆盖防守区域并支援定位球。

Jovane Cabral.name: Jovane Cabral
Jovane Cabral.summary: Jovane Eduardo Borges Cabral (Portuguese: [ʒɔ.ˈvɐ.nɨ e.du.ˈaɾ.du ˈbɔɾ.ʒɨʃ kɐ.ˈbɾal]; born 14 June 1998) is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a winger for Primeira Liga club Estrela da Amadora and the Cape Verde national team.
Jovane Cabral.note: Cabo Verde's flair winger, dangerous when he cuts inside and shoots before the block settles.
Jovane Cabral.noteZh: 若瓦内·卡布拉尔是佛得角灵感型边锋，内切并在防线站稳前射门时很危险。

Kelvin Pires.name: Kelvin Pires
Kelvin Pires.summary: Kelvin Spencer Pires (Portuguese: [ˈkɛl.vin ˈspɛ̃.sɛɾ ˈpi.ɾɨʃ]; born 5 June 2000) is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a centre back for Veikkausliiga club SJK and the Cape Verde national team.
Kelvin Pires.note: Cabo Verde's tall defensive cover, useful for aerial duels and protecting the middle.
Kelvin Pires.noteZh: 凯尔文·皮雷斯是佛得角高大防守保障，适合空中对抗并保护中路。

Laros Duarte.name: Laros Duarte
Laros Duarte.summary: Laros Michael d'Encarnação Duarte (Dutch: [ˈla.ɾos mɪ.ˈxa.əl] Portuguese: [dẽ.kɐɾ.nɐ.ˈsɐ̃w du.ˈaɾ.tɨ]; born 28 February 1997) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Hungarian club Puskás Akadémia.
Laros Duarte.note: Cabo Verde's combative midfield option, useful for duels and short, practical passing.
Laros Duarte.noteZh: 拉罗斯·杜阿尔特是佛得角对抗型中场选择，适合对抗和简洁实用的短传。

Logan Costa.name: Logan Costa
Logan Costa.summary: Logan Evans Costa (Portuguese: [ˈlo.ɡɐn ˈɛ.vɐns ˈkɔʃ.tɐ]; born 1 April 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for La Liga club Villarreal. Born in France, he represents the Cape Verde national team.
Logan Costa.note: Cabo Verde's athletic centre-back, important for defending space and starting attacks cleanly.
Logan Costa.noteZh: 洛根·科斯塔是佛得角运动能力强的中卫，对防守空间和干净发起进攻很重要。

Marcio Rosa.name: Marcio Rosa
Marcio Rosa.summary: Márcio Salomão Brazão da Rosa (Portuguese: [ˈmaɾ.si.u sɐ.lu.ˈmɐ̃w bɾɐ.ˈzɐ̃w dɐ ˈʀɔ.zɐ]; born 23 February 1997) is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Bulgarian First League club Montana and the Cape Verde national team.
Marcio Rosa.note: Cabo Verde's goalkeeper depth, bringing reflexes and calm cover behind Vozinha.
Marcio Rosa.noteZh: 马尔西奥·罗萨是佛得角门将深度，在沃齐尼亚身后提供反应和冷静保障。

Steven Moreira.name: Steven Moreira
Steven Moreira.summary: Steven Moreira (Portuguese: [ˈsti˸.vən mu.ˈɾej.ɾɐ]; born 13 August 1994) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back or centre-back for Major League Soccer club Columbus Crew. Born in France, he plays for the Cape Verde national team.
Steven Moreira.note: Cabo Verde's experienced right-back, steady in wide duels and useful supporting the attack.
Steven Moreira.noteZh: 史蒂文·莫雷拉是佛得角经验型右后卫，边路对抗稳健，也能支援进攻。

Telmo Arcanjo.name: Telmo Arcanjo
Telmo Arcanjo.summary: Telmo Emanuel Gomes Arcanjo (Portuguese: [ˈtɛl.mu e.mɐ.nu.ˈɛl ˈɡo.mɨz ɐɾ.ˈkɐ̃.ʒu]; born 21 June 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder or winger for Vitória S.C. Born in Portugal, he plays for the Cape Verde national team.
Telmo Arcanjo.note: Cabo Verde's attacking connector, useful for final passes and set-piece service.
Telmo Arcanjo.noteZh: 特尔莫·阿尔坎若是佛得角进攻连接点，适合最后一传和定位球传递。

Wagner Pina.name: Wagner Pina
Wagner Pina.summary: Wagner Fabrício Cardoso de Pina (Portuguese: [ˈvag.nɛɾ fɐ.ˈbɾi.si.u kɐɾ.ˈdo.zu dɨ ˈpi.nɐ]; born 3 November 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Süper Lig club Trabzonspor. Born in Portugal, he plays for the Cape Verde national team.
Wagner Pina.note: Cabo Verde's energetic right-back, useful for overlaps and quick recovery runs.
Wagner Pina.noteZh: 瓦格纳·皮纳是佛得角活力右后卫，适合套边和快速回追跑动。

Willy Semedo.name: Willy Semedo
Willy Semedo.summary: Willy Johnson Semedo Afonso (Portuguese: [ˈwi.li ˈʤɔn.sɔn sɨ.ˈme.du ɐ.ˈfõ.su]; born 27 April 1994) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger. Born in France, he plays for the Cape Verde national team.
Willy Semedo.note: Cabo Verde's left-wing scorer, dangerous when he attacks inside and arrives near the far post.
Willy Semedo.noteZh: 威利·塞梅多是佛得角左路得分手，内切冲击并来到后点附近时很危险。

Yannick Semedo.name: Yannick Semedo
Yannick Semedo.summary: Jair Semedo Monteiro (Portuguese: [ʒɐ.ˈiɾ sɨ.ˈme.du mõ.ˈtej.ɾu]; born 29 December 1995), known as Yannick Semedo (Portuguese: [ja.ˈnik sɨ.ˈme.du]), is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Liga Portugal 2 club Farense and the...
Yannick Semedo.note: Cabo Verde's central midfield worker, useful for pressing range and keeping possession tidy.
Yannick Semedo.noteZh: 扬尼克·塞梅多是佛得角中场工兵，适合覆盖压迫范围并让控球保持整洁。

Nuno da Costa.name: Nuno da Costa
Nuno da Costa.summary: Nuno Miguel da Costa Jóia (Portuguese: [ˈnu.nu mi.ˈɡɛl dɐ ˈkɔʃ.tɐ ˈʒɔ.jɐ]; born 10 February 1991), known as Nuno da Costa, is a Cape Verdean professional footballer who plays as a forward or winger for Süper Lig club İstanbul Başakşehir and the Cape Verde...
Nuno da Costa.note: Cabo Verde's experienced forward connector, useful for linking play and attacking the channels.
Nuno da Costa.noteZh: 努诺·达科斯塔是佛得角经验型前场连接点，适合串联进攻并冲击通道。

Sidny Lopes Cabral.name: Sidny Lopes Cabral
Sidny Lopes Cabral.summary: Sidny Lopes Cabral (Portuguese: [ˈsid.ni ˈlɔ.pɨʃ kɐ.ˈbɾal]; born 18 September 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a full-back for Süper Lig club Trabzonspor. Born in the Netherlands, he plays for the Cape Verde national team.
Sidny Lopes Cabral.note: Cabo Verde's left-sided defensive runner, useful for covering space and adding power at full-back.
Sidny Lopes Cabral.noteZh: 西德尼·洛佩斯·卡布拉尔是佛得角左侧防守跑动点，适合覆盖空间并给边后卫位置增加力量。

CJ dos Santos.name: CJ dos Santos
CJ dos Santos.summary: Carlos Joaquim Antunes dos Santos (Portuguese: [ˈkaɾ.luʒ ʒu.ɐ.ˈkĩ ɐ̃.ˈtu.nɨʒ duʃ ˈsɐ̃.tuʃ]; born 24 August 2000), known as CJ dos Santos, is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Major League Soccer club San Diego FC.
CJ dos Santos.note: Cabo Verde's modern goalkeeper option, useful for short build-up and reaction saves.
CJ dos Santos.noteZh: CJ·多斯桑托斯是佛得角现代型门将选择，适合短传组织和反应扑救。

Stopira.name: Stopira
Stopira.summary: Stopira is a Cabo Verde centre-back from SC União Torreense who gives the national team veteran defending, left-footed balance, and set-piece toughness.
Stopira.note: Cabo Verde's veteran defensive organizer, useful for left-footed balance and set-piece battles.
Stopira.noteZh: 斯托皮拉是佛得角老将防守组织者，对左脚平衡和定位球对抗很有用。

Ali Lajami.name: Ali Lajami
Ali Lajami.summary: Ali Mohammed Lajami (Arabic: علي محمد لاجامي; born 24 April 1996) is a Saudi Arabian professional footballer who plays as a defender for Saudi Pro League club Al-Hilal and the Saudi Arabia national team.
Ali Lajami.note: A steady defensive cover piece, valuable when Saudi Arabia need clean headers and back-post protection.
Ali Lajami.noteZh: 阿里·拉贾米是稳定的防守保障，当沙特需要干净头球解围和后点保护时很有价值。

Ali Majrashi.name: Ali Majrashi
Ali Majrashi.summary: Ali Hassan Majrashi (Arabic: علي حسن مجرشي; born 2 October 1999) is a Saudi Arabian footballer who plays as a right back for Saudi Pro League side Al-Ahli and the Saudi Arabia national team.
Ali Majrashi.note: Majrashi adds right-side drive, especially when Saudi Arabia want overlaps without losing recovery speed.
Ali Majrashi.noteZh: 马杰拉希给沙特右路增加推进力，尤其适合既要套边又不能丢掉回追速度的场景。

Mohamed Kanno.name: Mohamed Kanno
Mohamed Kanno.summary: Mohamed Ibrahim Abdullah Kanno (Arabic: محمد إبراهيم عبد الله كنو; born 22 September 1994) is a Saudi Arabian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Saudi Pro League club Al Hilal and the Saudi Arabia national team.
Mohamed Kanno.note: Kanno gives the midfield height and force, with the range to carry through pressure and arrive late.
Mohamed Kanno.noteZh: 卡诺给中场带来身高和力量，也有能力在压力中带球推进并后插上。

Saud Abdulhamid.name: Saud Abdulhamid
Saud Abdulhamid.summary: Saud Abdullah Salem Abdulhamid (Arabic: سُعُود عَبْد الله سَالِم عَبْد الْحَمِيد; born 18 July 1999) is a Saudi Arabian professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Ligue 1 club Lens and the Saudi Arabia national team.
Saud Abdulhamid.note: Saud is Saudi Arabia's running power on the right, constantly turning full-back space into an outlet.
Saud Abdulhamid.noteZh: 沙特·阿卜杜勒哈米德是沙特右路奔跑动力，能不断把边后卫空间变成出球点。

Sultan Mandash.name: Sultan Mandash
Sultan Mandash.summary: Sultan Ahmed Mohammed Mandash (Arabic: سلطان مندش; born October 17, 1994), is a Saudi Arabian footballer who plays as a winger for Al Hilal and the Saudi Arabia national team.
Sultan Mandash.note: Mandash is a width-and-work-rate winger, useful when Saudi Arabia want the far side stretched.
Sultan Mandash.noteZh: 曼达什是提供宽度和跑动强度的边锋，当沙特需要拉开远侧宽度时很有用。

Abdulelah Al-Amri.name: Abdulelah Al-Amri
Abdulelah Al-Amri.summary: Abdulelah Ali Awadh Al-Amri (Arabic: عَبْد الْإِلَه عَلِيّ عَوَض الْعُمَرِيّ; born 15 January 1997) is a Saudi Arabian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Saudi Pro League club Al-Nassr and the Saudi Arabia national team.
Abdulelah Al-Amri.note: A front-foot Saudi centre-back, useful when the line steps up and has to contest early balls.
Abdulelah Al-Amri.noteZh: 阿卜杜勒拉·阿姆里是沙特主动上抢型中卫，当防线前压并需要争抢第一点时很有用。

Abdullah Al-Hamdan.name: Abdullah Al-Hamdan
Abdullah Al-Hamdan.summary: Abdullah Abdulrahman Al-Hamdan (Arabic: عَبْد الله عَبْد الرَّحْمٰن الْحَمْدَان; born 13 September 1999) is a Saudi Arabian football player who plays as a forward for Saudi Pro League club Al-Nassr and the Saudi Arabia national team.
Abdullah Al-Hamdan.note: He gives Saudi Arabia a selfless forward runner who presses, links short passes, and pulls centre-backs around.
Abdullah Al-Hamdan.noteZh: 阿卜杜拉·哈姆丹给沙特带来自我牺牲的前锋跑动，能压迫、短传串联，并牵动中卫。

Abdullah Al-Khaibari.name: Abdullah Al-Khaibari
Abdullah Al-Khaibari.summary: Abdullah Mohammed Al-Khaibari (Arabic: عبد الله محمد الخيبري, born 16 August 1996) is a Saudi Arabian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Saudi Pro League club Al-Nassr and the Saudi Arabia national team.
Abdullah Al-Khaibari.note: Saudi Arabia's holding-midfield stabilizer, important for screening counters and keeping the next pass simple.
Abdullah Al-Khaibari.noteZh: 阿卜杜拉·海巴里是沙特后腰稳定器，对保护反击和简洁处理下一脚传球很重要。

Ahmed Al-Kassar.name: Ahmed Al-Kassar
Ahmed Al-Kassar.summary: Ahmed Al-Kassar is a Saudi Arabia goalkeeper from Al-Qadsiah who brings experience, reaction saves, and penalty-area control.
Ahmed Al-Kassar.note: An experienced goalkeeper option, useful for calm box management and quick reaction stops.
Ahmed Al-Kassar.noteZh: 艾哈迈德·卡萨尔是经验型门将选择，适合冷静管理禁区并完成快速反应扑救。

Alaa Hejji.name: Alaa Hejji
Alaa Hejji.summary: Alaa Hejji is a Saudi Arabia central midfielder from NEOM SC who helps connect possession and support counter-pressing phases.
Alaa Hejji.note: In midfield, Hejji can keep Saudi Arabia connected and close space quickly after turnovers.
Alaa Hejji.noteZh: 在中场，赫吉能让沙特保持连接，并在丢球后快速压缩空间。

Ayman Yahya.name: Ayman Yahya
Ayman Yahya.summary: Ayman Yahya Salem Ahmed (Arabic: أَيْمَن يَحْيَى سَالِم أَحْمَد, born 14 May 2001) is a Saudi Arabian professional footballer who plays as a winger or full-back for Saudi Pro League club Al-Nassr and the Saudi Arabia national team.
Ayman Yahya.note: A flexible left-side outlet, able to carry forward from deep or defend the flank in longer spells.
Ayman Yahya.noteZh: 艾曼·叶海亚是灵活的左路出口，能从后场带球向前，也能在长时间防守阶段守住边路。

Hassan Al-Tambakti.name: Hassan Al-Tambakti
Hassan Al-Tambakti.summary: Hassan Mohammed Osama Al-Tambakti (Arabic: حسان محمد أسامة التمبكتي; born 9 February 1999) is a Saudi Arabian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for the Saudi Arabia national team and for Saudi Pro League side Al Hilal.
Hassan Al-Tambakti.note: Saudi Arabia's quickest centre-back profile, useful for defending space behind a braver line.
Hassan Al-Tambakti.noteZh: 哈桑·坦巴克蒂是沙特速度最快的中卫类型，适合保护更大胆防线身后的空间。

Hassan Kadesh.name: Hassan Kadesh
Hassan Kadesh.summary: Hassan Kadesh is a Saudi Arabia left-back from Al-Ittihad who gives the team left-footed balance, defensive experience, and set-piece presence.
Hassan Kadesh.note: A left-sided defensive veteran, useful for balancing the back line and competing at the far post.
Hassan Kadesh.noteZh: 哈桑·卡德什是左侧防守老将，适合平衡防线并在后点对抗。

Jehad Thakri.name: Jehad Thakri
Jehad Thakri.summary: Jehad Thakri is a Saudi Arabia centre-back from Al-Qadsiah who adds size, aerial defending, and squad depth.
Jehad Thakri.note: Thakri gives Saudi Arabia another centre-back body for aerial spells and late box protection.
Jehad Thakri.noteZh: 萨克里给沙特增加中卫厚度，适合应对空中球阶段和比赛末段的禁区保护。

Khalid Al-Ghannam.name: Khalid Al-Ghannam
Khalid Al-Ghannam.summary: Khalid Eissa Al-Ghannam (Arabic: خالد الغنام; born 8 November 2000) is a Saudi Arabian professional footballer who plays as a winger for Saudi Pro League side Al-Ettifaq and the Saudi Arabia national team.
Khalid Al-Ghannam.note: Al-Ghannam is a direct left-wing carrier, best when Saudi Arabia can release him into transition lanes.
Khalid Al-Ghannam.noteZh: 加纳姆是直接的左路带球手，沙特能把他送入转换通道时最有威胁。

Mohammed Abu Al-Shamat.name: Mohammed Abu Al-Shamat
Mohammed Abu Al-Shamat.summary: Mohammed Abu Al-Shamat is a Saudi Arabia right-back from Al-Qadsiah who offers recovery speed, overlap timing, and defensive energy.
Mohammed Abu Al-Shamat.note: A younger right-back option, useful when Saudi Arabia need fresh legs to overlap and recover.
Mohammed Abu Al-Shamat.noteZh: 阿布沙马特是更年轻的右后卫选择，当沙特需要套边和回追的体能时很有用。

Moteb Al-Harbi.name: Moteb Al-Harbi
Moteb Al-Harbi.summary: Moteb Al-Harbi is a Saudi Arabia left-back from Al-Hilal who brings overlap timing, recovery defending, and left-footed service.
Moteb Al-Harbi.note: Al-Harbi stretches the left side, giving Saudi Arabia width and a defender who can still recover.
Moteb Al-Harbi.noteZh: 哈比能拉开左路宽度，给沙特提供边路宽度，同时仍能回追防守。

Nasser Al-Dawsari.name: Nasser Al-Dawsari
Nasser Al-Dawsari.summary: Nasser Al-Dawsari is a Saudi Arabia central midfielder from Al-Hilal who adds coverage, passing discipline, and late shooting threat.
Nasser Al-Dawsari.note: Nasser Al-Dawsari is a practical midfield shifter, covering left-sided gaps and arriving for second balls.
Nasser Al-Dawsari.noteZh: 纳赛尔·达乌萨里是实用的中场调节者，能覆盖左侧空当并冲抢第二落点。

Nawaf Al-Aqidi.name: Nawaf Al-Aqidi
Nawaf Al-Aqidi.summary: Nawaf Dhahi Faisal Al-Suwaiti Al-Aqidi (Arabic: نواف ضاحي فيصل الشويطي العقيدي; born 10 May 2000) is a Saudi Arabian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Saudi Pro League club Al-Nassr and the Saudi Arabia national team.
Nawaf Al-Aqidi.note: Al-Aqidi is the higher-upside goalkeeper option, useful for reflex work and cleaner restarts.
Nawaf Al-Aqidi.noteZh: 阿基迪是上限更高的门将选择，适合反应扑救和更干净的后场重启。

Nawaf Boushal.name: Nawaf Boushal
Nawaf Boushal.summary: Nawaf Boushal is a Saudi Arabia right-back from Al-Nassr who brings overlap energy, recovery speed, and wide defensive bite.
Nawaf Boushal.note: Boushal gives Saudi Arabia a high-energy right-back who can join attacks and still chase back.
Nawaf Boushal.noteZh: 布沙尔给沙特带来高能量右后卫，能参与进攻，也能迅速回追。

Saleh Al-Shehri.name: Saleh Al-Shehri
Saleh Al-Shehri.summary: Saleh Khalid Mohammed Al-Shehri (Arabic: صالح خالد محمد الشهري; born 1 November 1993) is a Saudi Arabian professional football player who plays as a striker for Al-Ittihad and the Saudi Arabia national team.
Saleh Al-Shehri.note: Al-Shehri remains a box striker for Saudi Arabia, sharpest when service arrives early.
Saleh Al-Shehri.noteZh: 谢赫里仍是沙特禁区型前锋，传球早点送到时最敏锐。

Musab Al-Juwayr.name: Musab Al-Juwayr
Musab Al-Juwayr.summary: Musab Fahd Al-Juwayr (Arabic: مُصْعَب فَهْد الْجُوَيْر; born 20 June 2003) is a Saudi Arabian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Saudi Pro League club Al-Qadsiah. Since 2023, he has also played for the Saudi Arabia national team.
Musab Al-Juwayr.note: A cleaner midfield passer, able to change Saudi Arabia's tempo and deliver useful restarts.
Musab Al-Juwayr.noteZh: 穆萨布·朱韦尔是更干净的中场传球手，能改变沙特节奏并送出有用的定位球。

Ziyad Al-Johani.name: Ziyad Al-Johani
Ziyad Al-Johani.summary: Ziyad Al-Johani is a Saudi Arabia defensive midfielder from Al-Ahli who adds ball winning, central coverage, and short progression.
Ziyad Al-Johani.note: Al-Johani gives Saudi Arabia a younger defensive-midfield option for winning duels and moving play on.
Ziyad Al-Johani.noteZh: 乔哈尼给沙特提供更年轻的后腰选择，适合赢下对抗并把球继续推进。

Brian Rodriguez.name: Brian Rodriguez
Brian Rodriguez.summary: Paul Brian Rodríguez Bravo (born 20 May 2000) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a winger for Liga MX club América and the Uruguay national team.
Brian Rodriguez.note: Rodríguez changes the tempo from wide areas, especially when Uruguay can release him into open grass.
Brian Rodriguez.noteZh: 布赖恩·罗德里格斯能从边路改变节奏，尤其当乌拉圭能把他送进开阔空间时。

Emiliano Martinez.name: Emiliano Martinez
Emiliano Martinez.summary: Emiliano Martínez Toranza (born 17 August 1999) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club Palmeiras and the Uruguay national team.
Emiliano Martinez.note: Martínez gives Uruguay a sturdy midfield worker who can win loose balls and keep the next pass moving.
Emiliano Martinez.noteZh: 埃米利亚诺·马丁内斯给乌拉圭带来稳健中场工兵，能赢下松散球并让下一脚传球继续运转。

Facundo Pellistri.name: Facundo Pellistri
Facundo Pellistri.summary: Facundo Pellistri Rebollo (Spanish pronunciation: [faˈkundo peˈlistɾi]; born 20 December 2001) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a winger for Greek Super League club Panathinaikos and the Uruguay national team.
Facundo Pellistri.note: Pellistri is a natural width option, stretching the right side and still tracking runners behind him.
Facundo Pellistri.noteZh: 佩利斯特里是天然的宽度选择，能拉开右路，同时还能回追身后的跑动。

Federico Vinas.name: Federico Vinas
Federico Vinas.summary: Federico Sebastián Viñas Barboza (born 30 June 1998) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a forward for Segunda División club Real Oviedo, on loan from Liga MX club León, and the Uruguay national team.
Federico Vinas.note: Viñas is a penalty-area forward for Uruguay, useful when crosses and second balls become the route in.
Federico Vinas.noteZh: 维尼亚斯是乌拉圭禁区型前锋，当传中和第二落点成为进攻路线时很有用。

Fernando Muslera.name: Fernando Muslera
Fernando Muslera.summary: Néstor Fernando Muslera Micol (Spanish: [feɾˈnando musˈleɾa]; born 16 June 1986) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Argentine Primera División club Estudiantes and the Uruguay national team.
Fernando Muslera.note: A veteran goalkeeper presence, Muslera gives Uruguay command and calm if the match turns into survival mode.
Fernando Muslera.noteZh: 穆斯莱拉是老将门将存在感，当比赛进入守势阶段时能给乌拉圭带来指挥和冷静。

Giorgian De Arrascaeta.name: Giorgian De Arrascaeta
Giorgian De Arrascaeta.summary: Giorgian Daniel de Arrascaeta Benedetti (born 1 June 1994) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club Flamengo and the Uruguay national team.
Giorgian De Arrascaeta.note: Uruguay's clearest lock-picker, valuable when possession needs a disguised final pass or a cleaner restart.
Giorgian De Arrascaeta.noteZh: 德阿拉斯凯塔是乌拉圭最清晰的破局者，当控球需要隐蔽最后一传或更干净的定位球时很有价值。

Guillermo Varela.name: Guillermo Varela
Guillermo Varela.summary: Guillermo Varela Olivera ([ɡiˈʝeɾmo βaˈɾela oliˈβeɾa]; born 24 March 1993) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club Flamengo and the Uruguay national team.
Guillermo Varela.note: Varela is a practical right-back option, trusted for wide duels and controlled support rather than constant risk.
Guillermo Varela.noteZh: 巴雷拉是实用型右后卫，可信赖的是边路对抗和可控支援，而不是持续冒险。

Joaquin Piquerez.name: Joaquin Piquerez
Joaquin Piquerez.summary: Joaquín Piquerez Moreira (born 24 August 1998) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as an left-back for Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club Palmeiras and the Uruguay national team.
Joaquin Piquerez.note: Piquerez gives Uruguay left-footed service from deep and enough edge to defend the same flank.
Joaquin Piquerez.noteZh: 皮克雷斯给乌拉圭提供后场左脚传递，也有足够硬度守住同一侧边路。

Jose Maria Gimenez.name: Jose Maria Gimenez
Jose Maria Gimenez.summary: José María Giménez de Vargas (Spanish pronunciation: [xoˈse maˈɾi.a xiˈmenes ðe ˈβaɾɣas]; born 20 January 1995) is an Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for La Liga club Atlético Madrid and captains the Uruguay national team.
Jose Maria Gimenez.note: Giménez is Uruguay's defensive authority, especially when the box gets crowded and every header matters.
Jose Maria Gimenez.noteZh: 希门尼斯是乌拉圭防线权威，尤其在禁区拥挤、每次头球都关键时。

Juan Manuel Sanabria.name: Juan Manuel Sanabria
Juan Manuel Sanabria.summary: Juan Manuel Sanabria Magole (born 29 March 2000) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a midfielder or left-back for Major League Soccer club Real Salt Lake and the Uruguay national team.
Juan Manuel Sanabria.note: Sanabria gives Uruguay flexible left-side cover, able to step into midfield or keep the flank supplied.
Juan Manuel Sanabria.noteZh: 萨纳夫里亚给乌拉圭提供灵活左侧保障，既能进入中场，也能持续供应边路。

Manuel Ugarte.name: Manuel Ugarte
Manuel Ugarte.summary: Manuel Ugarte Ribeiro (Spanish pronunciation: [maˈnwel uˈɣaɾte]; born 11 April 2001) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Premier League club Manchester United and the Uruguay national team.
Manuel Ugarte.note: Ugarte is Uruguay's midfield bite, built for stopping counters before they become real danger.
Manuel Ugarte.noteZh: 乌加特是乌拉圭中场硬度来源，专门在反击真正形成威胁前将其截断。

Mathias Olivera.name: Mathias Olivera
Mathias Olivera.summary: Mathías Olivera Miramontes (born 31 October 1997) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a left-back or centre-back for Serie A club Napoli and the Uruguay national team.
Mathias Olivera.note: Olivera gives Uruguay a left-sided defender who can shift from full-back into a tougher back line.
Mathias Olivera.noteZh: 奥利韦拉给乌拉圭带来左侧防守者，能从边后卫转换进更硬朗的防线。

Matias Vina.name: Matias Vina
Matias Vina.summary: Matías Nicolás Viña Susperreguy (born 9 November 1997) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a left-back or left wing-back for Flamengo and the Uruguay national team.
Matias Vina.note: Viña is another left-side runner, useful when Uruguay want wing-back depth without losing recovery legs.
Matias Vina.noteZh: 比尼亚是另一名左侧跑动点，当乌拉圭想要翼卫深度又不失回追能力时很有用。

Nicolas De La Cruz.name: Nicolas De La Cruz
Nicolas De La Cruz.summary: Diego Nicolás de la Cruz Arcosa (born 1 June 1997) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Campeonato Brasileiro Serie A club Flamengo and the Uruguay national team.
Nicolas De La Cruz.note: De la Cruz is a connector with bite, linking midfield moves while still joining the first wave of pressure.
Nicolas De La Cruz.noteZh: 德拉克鲁斯是带硬度的连接者，既串联中场推进，也能加入第一波压迫。

Rodrigo Aguirre.name: Rodrigo Aguirre
Rodrigo Aguirre.summary: Rodrigo Sebastián Aguirre Soto (born 1 October 1994) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a striker for Liga MX club Tigres UANL and the Uruguay national team.
Rodrigo Aguirre.note: Aguirre is a robust striker option, useful when Uruguay need a simpler route to goal late in matches.
Rodrigo Aguirre.noteZh: 阿吉雷是强壮的前锋选择，当乌拉圭在比赛末段需要更直接的进球路线时很有用。

Rodrigo Bentancur.name: Rodrigo Bentancur
Rodrigo Bentancur.summary: Rodrigo Bentancur Colman (born 25 June 1997) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Premier League club Tottenham Hotspur and the Uruguay national team.
Rodrigo Bentancur.note: Bentancur gives Uruguay calm under pressure, turning crowded midfield touches into forward rhythm.
Rodrigo Bentancur.noteZh: 本坦库尔给乌拉圭带来压力下的冷静，能把拥挤中场触球转成向前节奏。

Rodrigo Zalazar.name: Rodrigo Zalazar
Rodrigo Zalazar.summary: Rodrigo Zalazar Martínez (born 12 August 1999) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Primeira Liga club Braga and the Uruguay national team. He will join Sporting CP on 1 July 2026.
Rodrigo Zalazar.note: Zalazar adds punch between midfield and attack, especially when Uruguay need a pass or shot through traffic.
Rodrigo Zalazar.noteZh: 萨拉萨尔给乌拉圭中前场连接增加冲击，尤其适合在人群中送出传球或射门。

Santiago Bueno.name: Santiago Bueno
Santiago Bueno.summary: Santiago Ignacio Bueno Sciutto (born 9 November 1998) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for EFL Championship club Wolverhampton Wanderers and the Uruguay national team.
Santiago Bueno.note: Bueno gives Uruguay centre-back depth for aerial spells and long defensive stretches.
Santiago Bueno.noteZh: 布埃诺给乌拉圭增加中卫深度，适合应对空中球阶段和长时间防守。

Santiago Mele.name: Santiago Mele
Santiago Mele.summary: Santiago Andrés Mele Castañero (born 6 September 1997) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Liga MX club Monterrey and the Uruguay national team.
Santiago Mele.note: Mele is a sharper goalkeeper option for reactive games, especially when crosses keep arriving.
Santiago Mele.noteZh: 梅莱是更敏捷的门将选择，尤其适合不断有传中到来的被动比赛。

Sebastian Caceres.name: Sebastian Caceres
Sebastian Caceres.summary: Sebastián Enzo Cáceres Ramos (born 18 August 1999) is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Liga MX club América and the Uruguay national team.
Sebastian Caceres.note: Cáceres adds mobile centre-back cover, useful when Uruguay need aggression without opening the back door.
Sebastian Caceres.noteZh: 卡塞雷斯增加机动中卫保障，当乌拉圭需要侵略性又不能打开身后空间时很有用。

Sergio Rochet.name: Sergio Rochet
Sergio Rochet.summary: Sergio Ramón Rochet Álvarez (born 23 March 1993) is an Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club Internacional and Uruguay national team.
Sergio Rochet.note: Rochet is Uruguay's reliable tournament goalkeeper, steady with angles and vocal in the box.
Sergio Rochet.noteZh: 罗切特是乌拉圭可靠的大赛门将，站位角度稳定，也能在禁区内出声指挥。

Alex Baena.name: Alex Baena
Alex Baena.summary: Alejandro "Álex" Baena Rodríguez (born 20 July 2001) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a left midfielder or attacking midfielder for La Liga club Atlético Madrid and the Spain national team.
Alex Baena.note: Baena gives Spain another final-pass specialist, sharp when possession reaches the left half-space.
Alex Baena.noteZh: 巴埃纳给西班牙增加又一名最后一传专家，当控球来到左半空间时很敏锐。

Alex Grimaldo.name: Alex Grimaldo
Alex Grimaldo.summary: Alejandro "Álex" Grimaldo García (born 20 September 1995) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a left wing-back for Bundesliga club Bayer Leverkusen and the Spain national team.
Alex Grimaldo.note: Grimaldo changes Spain's left side with elite delivery and the timing to arrive high without rushing.
Alex Grimaldo.noteZh: 格里马尔多用顶级传中改变西班牙左路，也能把握前插时机而不显仓促。

Aymeric Laporte.name: Aymeric Laporte
Aymeric Laporte.summary: Aymeric Jean Louis Gérard Alphonse Laporte (French pronunciation: [ɛ.mə.ʁik la.pɔʁt]; born 27 May 1994) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for La Liga club Athletic Bilbao. Born in France, he plays for the Spain national team.
Aymeric Laporte.note: Laporte is Spain's calm left-footed centre-back, important for building under pressure and defending crosses.
Aymeric Laporte.noteZh: 拉波尔特是西班牙冷静的左脚中卫，对压力下出球和防守传中都很重要。

Borja Iglesias.name: Borja Iglesias
Borja Iglesias.summary: Borja Iglesias Quintas (Spanish pronunciation: [ˈboɾxajˈɣlesjas]; born 17 January 1993) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a striker for La Liga club Celta de Vigo and the Spain national team.
Borja Iglesias.note: Borja offers Spain a more traditional box reference when the match asks for contact and early service.
Borja Iglesias.noteZh: 博尔哈给西班牙提供更传统的禁区支点，当比赛需要身体接触和早传时很有用。

Dani Olmo.name: Dani Olmo
Dani Olmo.summary: Daniel Olmo Carvajal (Spanish pronunciation: [dˈani ˈolmo]; born 7 May 1998) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or left winger for La Liga club Barcelona and the Spain national team.
Dani Olmo.note: Olmo is Spain's between-lines accelerant, turning neat possession into sudden penalty-area action.
Dani Olmo.noteZh: 奥尔莫是西班牙两线之间的加速器，能把精细控球突然转成禁区行动。

David Raya.name: David Raya
David Raya.summary: David Raya Martín (born 15 September 1995) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Premier League club Arsenal and the Spain national team.
David Raya.note: Raya lets Spain defend higher and restart cleaner, especially when opponents try to trap the first pass.
David Raya.noteZh: 拉亚让西班牙能站得更高、防线重启更干净，尤其在对手试图围堵第一脚传球时。

Eric Garcia.name: Eric Garcia
Eric Garcia.summary: Eric García is a Spain centre-back from Barcelona who gives the national team build-up passing, tactical coverage, and calm defending.
Eric Garcia.note: Eric gives Spain a cerebral defensive option, useful when the back line needs passing angles as much as duels.
Eric Garcia.noteZh: 埃里克给西班牙带来思路型防守选择，当防线既需要传球角度也需要对抗时很有用。

Fabian Ruiz.name: Fabian Ruiz
Fabian Ruiz.summary: Fabián Ruiz Peña (Spanish pronunciation: [faˈβjan rwiθ ˈpeɲa]; born 3 April 1996), also known simply as Fabián, is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Ligue 1 club Paris Saint-Germain and the Spain national team.
Fabian Ruiz.note: Fabián gives Spain rhythm with a left foot that can slow the game down or punch through midfield.
Fabian Ruiz.noteZh: 法比安用左脚给西班牙带来节奏，既能放慢比赛，也能穿透中场。

Ferran Torres.name: Ferran Torres
Ferran Torres.summary: Ferran Torres García (Spanish pronunciation: [ˈferan ˈtores]; born 29 February 2000) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a forward or winger for La Liga club Barcelona and the Spain national team.
Ferran Torres.note: Ferran is a scorer from the wing, at his best when he starts wide and finishes like a striker.
Ferran Torres.noteZh: 费兰是从边路出发的得分手，拉在外线起步、像前锋一样终结时最有效。

Gavi.name: Gavi
Gavi.summary: Pablo Martín Páez Gavira (born 5 August 2004), known as Gavi, is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for La Liga club Barcelona and the Spain national team.
Gavi.note: Gavi brings Spain's emotional voltage, squeezing loose touches and making short combinations feel urgent.
Gavi.noteZh: 加维带来西班牙的情绪电压，能压缩松散触球，并让短传配合更有急迫感。

Joan Garcia.name: Joan Garcia
Joan Garcia.summary: Joan Garcia Pons (Catalan: [ʒuˈaŋ ɡəɾˈsiə]; born 4 May 2001) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for La Liga club Barcelona and the Spain national team.
Joan Garcia.note: Joan García is the high-upside goalkeeper option, strong on reaction saves and calm enough to play short.
Joan Garcia.noteZh: 霍安·加西亚是上限很高的门将选择，反应扑救出色，也足够冷静地短传出球。

Marc Cucurella.name: Marc Cucurella
Marc Cucurella.summary: Marc Cucurella Saseta (Catalan pronunciation: [ˈmaɾ(k) kukuˈɾeʎə səˈzɛtə]; born 22 July 1998) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a left-back or left wing-back for Premier League club Chelsea and the Spain national team.
Marc Cucurella.note: Cucurella gives Spain bite on the left, pressing hard while still covering the awkward recovery run.
Marc Cucurella.noteZh: 库库雷利亚给西班牙左路带来硬度，能强力压迫，也能覆盖棘手的回追跑动。

Marc Pubill.name: Marc Pubill
Marc Pubill.summary: Marc Pubill Pagès (born 20 June 2003) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a right-back or centre-back for La Liga club Atlético Madrid and the Spain national team.
Marc Pubill.note: Pubill adds a taller right-back profile, useful when Spain want width without losing back-post size.
Marc Pubill.noteZh: 普比尔增加更高大的右后卫类型，当西班牙想要宽度又不失后点高度时很有用。

Marcos Llorente.name: Marcos Llorente
Marcos Llorente.summary: Marcos Llorente Moreno (born 30 January 1995) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder or right-back for La Liga club Atlético Madrid and the Spain national team.
Marcos Llorente.note: Llorente is Spain's vertical utility piece, valuable when a game needs running power more than extra passing.
Marcos Llorente.noteZh: 略伦特是西班牙纵向多面手，当比赛需要跑动爆发而不是更多传球时很有价值。

Martin Zubimendi.name: Martin Zubimendi
Martin Zubimendi.summary: Martín Zubimendi Ibáñez (born 2 February 1999) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Premier League club Arsenal and the Spain national team.
Martin Zubimendi.note: Zubimendi is Spain's calm central hinge, making the first pass after pressure look simple.
Martin Zubimendi.noteZh: 苏比门迪是西班牙冷静的中路铰链，让压力后的第一脚传球看起来简单。

Mikel Merino.name: Mikel Merino
Mikel Merino.summary: Mikel Merino Zazón (Spanish pronunciation: [ˈmikel meˈɾino]; born 22 June 1996) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder or striker for Premier League club Arsenal and the Spain national team.
Mikel Merino.note: Merino gives Spain height and timing from midfield, especially around second balls and back-post moments.
Mikel Merino.noteZh: 梅里诺给西班牙中场带来高度和时机，尤其在第二落点和后点场景中。

Pau Cubarsi.name: Pau Cubarsi
Pau Cubarsi.summary: Pau Cubarsí Paredes (born 22 January 2007) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for La Liga club Barcelona and the Spain national team.
Pau Cubarsi.note: Cubarsí gives Spain a young passer at centre-back, brave enough to break lines before pressure settles.
Pau Cubarsi.noteZh: 库巴西给西班牙中卫位置带来年轻传球手，敢在压力站稳前打穿线路。

Pedro Porro.name: Pedro Porro
Pedro Porro.summary: Pedro Antonio Porro Sauceda (Spanish pronunciation: [peðɾo ˈporo]; born 13 September 1999) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Premier League club Tottenham Hotspur and the Spain national team.
Pedro Porro.note: Porro gives Spain a sharper right-footed service option, especially from early crossing zones.
Pedro Porro.noteZh: 波罗给西班牙带来更犀利的右脚传中选择，尤其来自提前传中的区域。

Rodri.name: Rodri
Rodri.summary: Rodrigo Hernández Cascante (born 22 June 1996), known as Rodri or Rodrigo, is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Premier League club Manchester City and captains the Spain national team.
Rodri.note: Rodri is Spain's control tower, protecting transitions while deciding when possession should speed up.
Rodri.noteZh: 罗德里是西班牙的控制塔，既保护转换，也决定控球何时该提速。

Unai Simon.name: Unai Simon
Unai Simon.summary: Unai Simón Mendibil (born 11 June 1997) is a Spanish footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for La Liga club Athletic Bilbao and the Spain national team.
Unai Simon.note: Unai Simón is Spain's established goalkeeper, comfortable defending space and joining the first pass.
Unai Simon.noteZh: 乌奈·西蒙是西班牙稳定门将，既能防守身后空间，也能参与第一脚出球。

Victor Munoz.name: Victor Munoz
Victor Munoz.summary: Víctor Muñoz Villanueva (born 13 July 2003) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a left winger or forward for La Liga club Osasuna and the Spain national team. He will join Premier League club Liverpool on 1 July 2026.
Victor Munoz.note: Muñoz is a fresh wide runner, useful when Spain need pace and pressure from the bench.
Victor Munoz.noteZh: 穆尼奥斯是新鲜的边路跑动点，当西班牙需要替补席上的速度和压迫时很有用。

Yeremy Pino.name: Yeremy Pino
Yeremy Pino.summary: Yéremy Jesús Pino Santos (born 20 October 2002) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or winger for Premier League club Crystal Palace and the Spain national team.
Yeremy Pino.note: Yeremy gives Spain a hard-working winger who can press first and still slip inside for combinations.
Yeremy Pino.noteZh: 耶雷米给西班牙带来勤奋边锋，能先压迫，也能内收参与配合。

Ahmed Fatouh.name: Ahmed Fatouh
Ahmed Fatouh.summary: Ahmed Mohamed Aboelfatouh Mohamed (Arabic: أحمد محمد أبو الفتوح محمد; born 22 March 1998), simply known as Ahmed Fatouh (Arabic: أحمد فتوح), is an Egyptian footballer who plays for Egyptian Premier League side Zamalek and the Egypt national team as a left-back...
Ahmed Fatouh.note: Fatouh gives Egypt width from left-back, useful when Salah pulls defenders narrow and the flank opens.
Ahmed Fatouh.noteZh: 法图赫给埃及左后卫位置提供宽度，当萨拉赫把防守带向中路、边路打开时很有用。

Haissem Hassan.name: Haissem Hassan
Haissem Hassan.summary: Haissem Yousry Fouad A Hassan (Egyptian Arabic: هيثم يسري فؤاد حسن; born 8 February 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Segunda División club Real Oviedo. Born in France, he plays for the Egypt national team.
Haissem Hassan.note: Haissem gives Egypt another dribbler, dangerous when he can receive facing the full-back.
Haissem Hassan.noteZh: 海瑟姆给埃及增加又一名盘带手，能正面接球面对边后卫时很危险。

Hamdy Fathy.name: Hamdy Fathy
Hamdy Fathy.summary: Hamdy Fathy Abdelhalim Abdelfattah (Arabic: حمدي فتحي عبد الحليم عبد الفتاح; born 29 September 1994) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Qatar Stars League club Al-Wakrah and the Egypt national team.
Hamdy Fathy.note: Hamdy is a stabilizing midfield shield, built for second balls and practical passes after regains.
Hamdy Fathy.noteZh: 哈姆迪是稳定型中场屏障，适合第二落点以及抢回球后的实用传球。

Hamza Abdelkarim.name: Hamza Abdelkarim
Hamza Abdelkarim.summary: Hamza Mohamed Abdelkarim E Selim (Arabic: حمزة محمد عبد الكريم سليم; born 1 January 2008) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a striker for Segunda Federación – Group 3 club Barcelona Atlètic and the Egypt national team.
Hamza Abdelkarim.note: Abdelkarim is a youthful forward option for Egypt, useful when the front line needs fresh pressure.
Hamza Abdelkarim.noteZh: 哈姆扎·阿卜杜勒卡里姆是埃及年轻前锋选择，当锋线需要新鲜压迫时很有用。

Hossam Abdelmaguid.name: Hossam Abdelmaguid
Hossam Abdelmaguid.summary: Hossam Abdelmageed Abdelsalam Abdelmegeed (Arabic: حسام عبد المجيد عبد السلام عبد المجيد; born 30 April 2001) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Egyptian Premier League club Zamalek and the Egypt national team.
Hossam Abdelmaguid.note: Hossam gives Egypt a bigger centre-back presence for defending crosses and late pressure.
Hossam Abdelmaguid.noteZh: 霍萨姆给埃及带来更高大的中卫存在感，适合防守传中和比赛末段压力。

Ibrahim Adel.name: Ibrahim Adel
Ibrahim Adel.summary: Ibrahim Adel Aly Mohamed Hassan (Arabic: إِبْرَاهِيم عَادِل عَلِيّ مُحَمَّد حَسَن; born 23 April 2001), is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays for Danish Superliga club Nordsjælland, on loan from UAE Pro League side Al Jazira as a left winger and the...
Ibrahim Adel.note: Ibrahim Adel is one of Egypt's direct runners, able to turn a loose ball into a fast attack.
Ibrahim Adel.noteZh: 易卜拉欣·阿德尔是埃及直接冲击点之一，能把松散球转成快速进攻。

Karim Hafez.name: Karim Hafez
Karim Hafez.summary: Karim Hafez Ramadan Seifeldin (Arabic: كَرِيم حَافِظ رَمَضَان سَيْف الدِّين; born 12 March 1996) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays for Egyptian Premier League club Pyramids and the Egypt national team as a left-back.
Karim Hafez.note: Hafez gives Egypt left-side depth, with enough delivery to support attacks from deeper zones.
Karim Hafez.noteZh: 哈费兹给埃及左侧增加深度，也有足够传中能力从更深区域支援进攻。

Mahdy Soliman.name: Mahdy Soliman
Mahdy Soliman.summary: El Mahdy Mohamed Soliman Ibrahim (Arabic: المهدي محمد سليمان إبراهيم; born 8 June 1987) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for the Egyptian Premier League side Zamalek SC and the Egypt national team.
Mahdy Soliman.note: Soliman is experienced goalkeeper cover, useful if Egypt need a steady voice behind the line.
Mahdy Soliman.noteZh: 马赫迪·苏莱曼是经验型门将后备，当埃及需要防线身后的稳定声音时很有用。

Mahmoud Saber.name: Mahmoud Saber
Mahmoud Saber.summary: Mahmoud Saber Abdelmohsen Hassan Abdelmohsen (Arabic: مَحْمُود صَابِر عَبْد الْمُحْسِن حَسَنْ عَبْد الْمُحْسِن; born 30 July 2001) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Egyptian Premier League club ZED on loan from...
Mahmoud Saber.note: Saber brings midfield legs, useful when Egypt want to keep pressure alive after the first break.
Mahmoud Saber.noteZh: 萨贝尔带来中场跑动，当埃及想在第一波突破后继续保持压力时很有用。

Marawan Attia.name: Marawan Attia
Marawan Attia.summary: Marwan Attia Fahim Ghallab (Arabic: مروان عطية فاهم غلاب رشوان; born 1 August 1998) is an Egyptian footballer who plays as a midfielder for Egyptian Premier League club Al Ahly and the Egypt national team.
Marawan Attia.note: Attia is a compact midfield worker, protecting central lanes and moving the ball without fuss.
Marawan Attia.noteZh: 阿提亚是紧凑型中场工兵，能保护中路线路，并简洁地转移球权。

Mohamed Abdelmoneim.name: Mohamed Abdelmoneim
Mohamed Abdelmoneim.summary: Mohamed Abdelmoneim is an Egypt centre-back from OGC Nice who gives the national team front-foot defending, aerial power, and aggressive stepping.
Mohamed Abdelmoneim.note: Abdelmoneim is Egypt's aggressive centre-back, strong when he can step out and win the first duel.
Mohamed Abdelmoneim.noteZh: 阿卜杜勒莫奈姆是埃及侵略性中卫，能上前赢下第一下对抗时很强。

Mohamed Alaa.name: Mohamed Alaa
Mohamed Alaa.summary: Mohamed Alaaeldin Soliman M Ahmed (محمد علاء الدين سليمان أحمد; born 1 January 1999) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Egyptian Premier League club El Gouna and the Egypt national team.
Mohamed Alaa.note: Alaa gives Egypt defensive depth, useful for protecting the box when the game becomes direct.
Mohamed Alaa.noteZh: 阿拉给埃及增加防守深度，当比赛变得直接时适合保护禁区。

Mohamed El Shenawy.name: Mohamed El Shenawy
Mohamed El Shenawy.summary: Mohamed El Sayed Mohamed El Shenawy Gomaa (Arabic: محمد السيد محمد الشناوي جمعة; born 18 December 1988) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Egyptian Premier League club Al Ahly, which he captains, and the Egypt national team.
Mohamed El Shenawy.note: El Shenawy is Egypt's commanding goalkeeper, trusted for sharp saves and organizing traffic in the box.
Mohamed El Shenawy.noteZh: 埃尔谢纳维是埃及指挥型门将，敏捷扑救和组织禁区人流都值得信任。

Mohanad Lashin.name: Mohanad Lashin
Mohanad Lashin.summary: Mohanad Lashin is an Egypt defensive midfielder from Pyramids FC who gives the national team central coverage, ball winning, and simple progression.
Mohanad Lashin.note: Lashin gives Egypt central coverage, useful when the midfield needs to absorb pressure first.
Mohanad Lashin.noteZh: 拉辛给埃及提供中路覆盖，当中场需要先吸收压力时很有用。

Mostafa Shoubir.name: Mostafa Shoubir
Mostafa Shoubir.summary: Mostafa Shoubir is an Egypt goalkeeper from Al Ahly who gives the national team reaction saves, line command, and close-range stops.
Mostafa Shoubir.note: Shoubir is a younger goalkeeper option, useful for reaction saves and domestic familiarity with the back line.
Mostafa Shoubir.noteZh: 舒贝尔是更年轻的门将选择，适合反应扑救，也熟悉本土防线。

Nabil Donga.name: Nabil Donga
Nabil Donga.summary: Nabil Emad Aly Elmahdy (Arabic: نبيل عماد علي المهدي; born 6 April 1996) also known as Donga (Arabic: دونجا), is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Saudi Pro League club Al-Najma and the Egypt national team.
Nabil Donga.note: Donga adds midfield bite, winning loose balls and keeping Egypt connected after contact.
Nabil Donga.noteZh: 东加增加埃及中场硬度，能赢下松散球，并在身体对抗后保持连接。

Ramy Rabia.name: Ramy Rabia
Ramy Rabia.summary: Ramy Hisham Abdel Aziz Mostafa Rabia (Arabic: رامي هشام عبد العزيز مصطفى ربيعة; born 20 May 1993) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for UAE Pro League club Al Ain and the Egypt national team.
Ramy Rabia.note: Rabia gives Egypt veteran centre-back depth, especially useful when set pieces decide territory.
Ramy Rabia.noteZh: 拉比亚给埃及带来老将中卫深度，尤其当定位球决定场面位置时很有用。

Tarek Alaa.name: Tarek Alaa
Tarek Alaa.summary: Tarek Alaa is an Egypt right-back from ZED FC who gives the national team right-side defending, overlap energy, and recovery runs.
Tarek Alaa.note: Tarek Alaa offers right-side legs, useful when Egypt need a fresher defensive runner.
Tarek Alaa.noteZh: 塔里克·阿拉提供右侧跑动能力，当埃及需要更有活力的防守跑动点时很有用。

Yasser Ibrahim.name: Yasser Ibrahim
Yasser Ibrahim.summary: Yasser Ibrahim Ahmed El Hanafi (Arabic: يَاسِر إبرَاهِيْم أَحمَد الْحَنَفِي; born 10 February 1993) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Egyptian Premier League club Al Ahly and the Egypt national team.
Yasser Ibrahim.note: Yasser gives Egypt another physical centre-back, useful for deep defending and clearing repeat crosses.
Yasser Ibrahim.noteZh: 亚西尔给埃及增加又一名身体型中卫，适合深位防守和反复解围传中。

Zizo.name: Zizo
Zizo.summary: Ahmed Mostafa Mohamed Sayed (Arabic: أحمد مصطفى محمد سيد; born 10 January 1996) commonly known as Zizo (Arabic: زيزو), is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a winger for Egyptian Premier League club Al Ahly and the Egypt national team.
Zizo.note: Zizo gives Egypt a delivery-and-shot option from the right, valuable when Salah is tightly tracked.
Zizo.noteZh: 齐佐给埃及右路提供传球和射门选择，当萨拉赫被严密盯防时很有价值。

Ali Alipour.name: Ali Alipour
Ali Alipour.summary: Ali Alipour (Persian: علی علیپور; born 11 November 1995) is an Iranian professional footballer who plays as a Striker for Persian Gulf Pro League club Persepolis and the Iran national team.
Ali Alipour.note: Alipour gives Iran a penalty-box forward who can press first and still attack early service.
Ali Alipour.noteZh: 阿里普尔给伊朗带来禁区型前锋，能先压迫，也能冲击早传。

Ali Nemati.name: Ali Nemati
Ali Nemati.summary: Ali Nemati is an IR Iran centre-back from Foolad FC who gives the national team left-footed defending, aerial cover, and back-line depth.
Ali Nemati.note: Nemati adds defensive cover on the left, useful when Iran need a safer flank profile.
Ali Nemati.noteZh: 内马蒂增加伊朗左侧防守保障，当球队需要更稳的边路配置时很有用。

Alireza Beiranvand.name: Alireza Beiranvand
Alireza Beiranvand.summary: Alireza Safar Beiranvand (born 21 September 1992) is an Iranian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for the Persian Gulf Pro League club Tractor and the Iran national team.
Alireza Beiranvand.note: Beiranvand is Iran's commanding goalkeeper, able to turn saves into immediate long outlets.
Alireza Beiranvand.noteZh: 贝兰万德是伊朗指挥型门将，能把扑救立即转成远距离出球。

Amirhossein Hosseinzadeh.name: Amirhossein Hosseinzadeh
Amirhossein Hosseinzadeh.summary: Amirhossein Hosseinzadeh is an IR Iran forward from Tractor FC who gives the national team quick turns, final-third carrying, and attacking spark.
Amirhossein Hosseinzadeh.note: Hosseinzadeh is a small-space attacker, useful when Iran need a dribble to break a flat block.
Amirhossein Hosseinzadeh.noteZh: 侯赛因扎德是小空间攻击手，当伊朗需要盘带打破平直防线时很有用。

Amirmohammad Razaghinia.name: Amirmohammad Razaghinia
Amirmohammad Razaghinia.summary: Amirmohammad Razzaghinia is an IR Iran central midfielder from Esteghlal FC who gives the national team midfield legs, duel pressure, and simple progression.
Amirmohammad Razaghinia.note: Razaghinia gives Iran fresh midfield legs, especially for pressure and safe forward passes.
Amirmohammad Razaghinia.noteZh: 拉扎吉尼亚给伊朗中场带来新鲜跑动，尤其适合施压和安全向前传球。

Arya Yousefi.name: Arya Yousefi
Arya Yousefi.summary: Arya Yousefi is an IR Iran right-back from Sepahan FC who gives the national team overlap timing, recovery defending, and right-side energy.
Arya Yousefi.note: Yousefi is a high-energy right-side option, useful when Iran want width without losing recovery speed.
Arya Yousefi.noteZh: 优素菲是高能量右侧选择，当伊朗想要宽度又不失回追速度时很有用。

Danial Iri.name: Danial Iri
Danial Iri.summary: Danial Eiri is an IR Iran centre-back from Malavan Bandar Anzali who gives the national team centre-back depth, aerial defending, and box protection.
Danial Iri.note: Iri gives Iran centre-back depth for matches that turn into aerial and set-piece contests.
Danial Iri.noteZh: 伊里给伊朗增加中卫深度，适合比赛变成空中球和定位球对抗时。

Dennis Dargahi.name: Dennis Dargahi
Dennis Dargahi.summary: Dennis Yerai Eckert Ayensa (born 9 January 1997), also known as Dennis Dargahi, is a professional footballer who plays as a forward and midfielder for Standard Liège in the Belgian Pro League.
Dennis Dargahi.note: Dargahi offers Iran a younger forward runner, useful when the front line needs fresh chasing.
Dennis Dargahi.noteZh: 达尔加希给伊朗提供年轻前场跑动点，当锋线需要新鲜追压时很有用。

Ehsan Hajisafi.name: Ehsan Hajisafi
Ehsan Hajisafi.summary: Ehsan Hajsafi (Persian: احسان حاج‌صفی; born 25 February 1990) is an Iranian professional footballer who plays for Sepahan and the Iran national team. Hajsafi is regarded as a utility player, being able to play as a winger, left-back or defensive midfielder.
Ehsan Hajisafi.note: Hajisafi is Iran's veteran balancer, able to help at left-back or midfield depending on the game.
Ehsan Hajisafi.noteZh: 哈吉萨菲是伊朗老将平衡器，能根据比赛需要支援左后卫或中场。

Hossein Hosseini.name: Hossein Hosseini
Hossein Hosseini.summary: Seyed Hossein Hosseini (Persian: سید حسین حسینی; born 30 June 1992) is an Iranian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Persian Gulf Pro League club Sepahan and the Iran national team.
Hossein Hosseini.note: Hosseini gives Iran experienced goalkeeper cover with calm reactions in crowded areas.
Hossein Hosseini.noteZh: 侯赛尼给伊朗提供经验型门将后备，在拥挤区域反应冷静。

Hossein Kanani.name: Hossein Kanani
Hossein Kanani.summary: Mohammad Hossein Kanaanizadegan (Persian: محمد حسین کنعانی زادگان; born 23 March 1994), known as Hossein Kanaani, is an Iranian professional footballer who plays as a defender for Persian Gulf Pro League club Persepolis and Iran national team.
Hossein Kanani.note: Kanani is a physical defensive anchor for Iran, important when the box needs clearing.
Hossein Kanani.noteZh: 卡纳尼是伊朗身体型防守支柱，当禁区需要清理时很重要。

Mehdi Ghayedi.name: Mehdi Ghayedi
Mehdi Ghayedi.summary: Mehdi Ghayedi is an IR Iran winger from Al-Nasr SC who gives the national team low-centre turns, inside shots, and left-wing dribbling.
Mehdi Ghayedi.note: Ghayedi gives Iran a slippery wide attacker who can turn inside before the block resets.
Mehdi Ghayedi.noteZh: 盖耶迪给伊朗带来灵活边路攻击手，能在防线重组前内切转身。

Mehdi Torabi.name: Mehdi Torabi
Mehdi Torabi.summary: Mahdi Torabi (born 10 September 1994) is an Iranian professional footballer who plays as a winger for Persian Gulf Pro League club Tractor and the Iran national team.
Mehdi Torabi.note: Torabi adds wide delivery and restart quality, useful when Iran need service into a packed box.
Mehdi Torabi.noteZh: 托拉比增加边路传递和定位球质量，当伊朗需要向拥挤禁区送球时很有用。

Milad Mohammadi.name: Milad Mohammadi
Milad Mohammadi.summary: Milad Mohammadi Keshmarzi, known as Milad Mohammadi (Persian: ميلاد محمدی کشمرزی; born 29 September 1993) is an Iranian professional footballer who plays for Persian Gulf Pro League club Persepolis and the Iran national team.
Milad Mohammadi.note: Mohammadi gives Iran speed at left-back, stretching attacks and recovering quickly behind them.
Milad Mohammadi.noteZh: 穆罕默迪给伊朗左后卫位置带来速度，既能拉开进攻，也能快速回追。

Mohammad Ghorbani.name: Mohammad Ghorbani
Mohammad Ghorbani.summary: Mohammad Ghorbani is an IR Iran defensive midfielder from Al-Wahda FC who gives the national team central coverage, ball winning, and midfield size.
Mohammad Ghorbani.note: Ghorbani gives Iran a taller midfield shield, useful for second balls and central protection.
Mohammad Ghorbani.noteZh: 戈尔巴尼给伊朗带来更高大的中场屏障，适合第二落点和中路保护。

Payam Niazmand.name: Payam Niazmand
Payam Niazmand.summary: Payam Niazmand (Persian: پیام نیازمند; born 6 April 1995) is an Iranian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Iranian club Persepolis and the Iran national team.
Payam Niazmand.note: Niazmand gives Iran a tall goalkeeper option, useful when crosses and set pieces pile up.
Payam Niazmand.noteZh: 尼亚兹曼德给伊朗提供高大门将选择，当传中和定位球不断出现时很有用。

Roozbeh Cheshmi.name: Roozbeh Cheshmi
Roozbeh Cheshmi.summary: Roozbeh Cheshmi (born 24 July 1993) is an Iranian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder or a centre-back for Esteghlal FC in the Persian Gulf League League and the Iran national team.
Roozbeh Cheshmi.note: Cheshmi is Iran's defensive utility piece, able to add height in midfield or the back line.
Roozbeh Cheshmi.noteZh: 切什米是伊朗防守多面手，能在中场或防线增加高度。

Saeid Ezatolahi.name: Saeid Ezatolahi
Saeid Ezatolahi.summary: Saeid Ezatolahi Afagh (Persian: سعید عزت‌اللهی آفاق; born 1 October 1996) is an Iranian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for club Shabab Al Ahli in UAE Pro League and the Iran national team.
Saeid Ezatolahi.note: Ezatolahi gives Iran midfield size and passing range, useful for slowing the game down.
Saeid Ezatolahi.noteZh: 埃扎托拉希给伊朗中场带来身材和传球范围，适合让比赛慢下来。

Saleh Hardani.name: Saleh Hardani
Saleh Hardani.summary: Saleh Hardani Kherad (Persian: صالح حردانی; born 26 December 1998), also known as Saadat Hardani, is an Iranian footballer who plays as a right-back for the Persian Gulf Pro League club Esteghlal and the Iran national team.
Saleh Hardani.note: Hardani adds right-back energy, useful when Iran need to defend and press the same lane.
Saleh Hardani.noteZh: 哈达尼增加右后卫活力，当伊朗需要在同一路线防守并压迫时很有用。

Shahriyar Moghanloo.name: Shahriyar Moghanloo
Shahriyar Moghanloo.summary: Shahriyar Moghanlou (Persian: شهريار مغانلو; born 21 December 1994) is an Iranian professional footballer who plays as a centre-forward for UAE Pro League club Kalba and the Iran national team.
Shahriyar Moghanloo.note: Moghanloo gives Iran a big target, useful when the route forward becomes crosses and knockdowns.
Shahriyar Moghanloo.noteZh: 莫甘卢给伊朗带来高大支点，当进攻路线变成传中和摆渡时很有用。

Shoja Khalilzadeh.name: Shoja Khalilzadeh
Shoja Khalilzadeh.summary: Shojae Khalilzadeh (Persian: شجاع خلیل‌زاده; born 14 May 1989) is an Iranian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Persian Gulf Pro League club Tractor and Iran national team. He is known for his pace, artistic tackles and positional sense.
Shoja Khalilzadeh.note: Shoja gives Iran veteran centre-back organization, especially in long defensive spells.
Shoja Khalilzadeh.noteZh: 舒贾给伊朗带来老将中卫组织，尤其适合长时间防守阶段。

Alex Paulsen.name: Alex Paulsen
Alex Paulsen.summary: Alexander Noah Paulsen (born 4 July 2002) is a New Zealand professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for I liga club Lechia Gdańsk, on loan from Bournemouth, and the New Zealand national team.
Alex Paulsen.note: Paulsen gives New Zealand a modern goalkeeper option, comfortable reacting quickly and playing short.
Alex Paulsen.noteZh: 保尔森给新西兰带来现代门将选择，反应快，也能舒服地短传出球。

Alex Rufer.name: Alex Rufer
Alex Rufer.summary: Alex Arthur Rufer (/ˈɹuːfə(ɹ)/; born 12 June 1996) is a New Zealand professional footballer who captains and plays as a defensive midfielder for Wellington Phoenix in the A-League. Born in Switzerland, he represents the New Zealand national team.
Alex Rufer.note: Rufer is a midfield organizer, useful when New Zealand need structure around second balls.
Alex Rufer.noteZh: 鲁弗是中场组织者，当新西兰需要围绕第二落点保持结构时很有用。

Ben Old.name: Ben Old
Ben Old.summary: Benjamin Craig Old (born 13 August 2002) is a New Zealand professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Ligue 2 club Saint-Étienne and the New Zealand national team.
Ben Old.note: Old gives New Zealand a direct wide runner, especially useful for quick counters from deep.
Ben Old.noteZh: 本·奥尔德给新西兰带来直接边路跑动，尤其适合从深位发动快速反击。

Ben Waine.name: Ben Waine
Ben Waine.summary: Benjamin Peter Waine (born 11 June 2001) is a New Zealand professional footballer who plays as a forward for EFL League Two club Port Vale and the New Zealand national team.
Ben Waine.note: Waine works across the front line, pressing centre-backs and arriving for loose balls.
Ben Waine.noteZh: 韦恩能横向覆盖锋线，压迫中卫并冲抢松散球。

Callan Elliot.name: Callan Elliot
Callan Elliot.summary: Callan Rennie Elliot (born 7 July 1999) is a New Zealand professional footballer who plays as a right back for A-League club Auckland FC and the New Zealand national team.
Callan Elliot.note: Elliot adds right-side running, helpful when New Zealand need width and recovery speed together.
Callan Elliot.noteZh: 埃利奥特增加右侧跑动，当新西兰同时需要宽度和回追速度时很有帮助。

Callum McCowatt.name: Callum McCowatt
Callum McCowatt.summary: Callum William McCowatt (born 30 April 1999) is a New Zealand professional footballer who plays as a left winger for Danish Superliga club Silkeborg and the New Zealand national team.
Callum McCowatt.note: McCowatt links midfield to attack, useful for pressing and arriving as the extra runner.
Callum McCowatt.noteZh: 麦考瓦特连接中场和进攻，适合压迫并作为额外跑动点插上。

Francis De Vries.name: Francis De Vries
Francis De Vries.summary: Francis de Vries (Dutch: [ˈfrɑn.sɪs də ˈvrizə]; born 28 November 1994) is a New Zealand professional footballer who plays for A-League club Auckland FC and the New Zealand national team.
Francis De Vries.note: De Vries offers left-side balance, useful for early service and steady defensive width.
Francis De Vries.noteZh: 德弗里斯提供左侧平衡，适合早传和稳定的防守宽度。

Jesse Randall.name: Jesse Randall
Jesse Randall.summary: Jesse Carmichael Randall (born 19 August 2002) is a New Zealand professional footballer who plays as a forward for Scottish Premiership club Dundee United and the New Zealand national team.
Jesse Randall.note: Randall is a speed option from wide areas, best when New Zealand can release him into space.
Jesse Randall.noteZh: 兰德尔是边路速度选择，当新西兰能把他送入空间时最有效。

Joe Bell.name: Joe Bell
Joe Bell.summary: Joe Zen Robert Bell (born 27 April 1999) is a New Zealand professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Eliteserien club Viking and the New Zealand national team.
Joe Bell.note: Bell is New Zealand's passing rhythm player, useful for set pieces and calmer possession spells.
Joe Bell.noteZh: 乔·贝尔是新西兰传球节奏点，适合定位球和更冷静的控球阶段。

Kosta Barbarouses.name: Kosta Barbarouses
Kosta Barbarouses.summary: Konstantinos "Kosta" Barbarouses (Greek: Κωνσταντίνος "Κώστας" Μπαρμπαρούσης, pronounced [konstaˈndinos barbaruˈsis]; born 19 February 1990) is a New Zealand professional footballer who last played as a winger for A-League Men club Western Sydney Wanderers and...
Kosta Barbarouses.note: Barbarouses brings veteran timing, still useful when counters need a runner beyond Wood.
Kosta Barbarouses.noteZh: 巴巴鲁塞斯带来老将时机，当反击需要伍德之外的前插点时仍然有用。

Lachlan Bayliss.name: Lachlan Bayliss
Lachlan Bayliss.summary: Lachlan Ryan Bayliss (born 24 July 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for A-League Men side Auckland FC. Born in Australia, he represents the New Zealand national team.
Lachlan Bayliss.note: Bayliss adds midfield work rate, helping New Zealand stay compact after turnovers.
Lachlan Bayliss.noteZh: 贝利斯增加中场跑动，帮助新西兰在丢球后保持紧凑。

Logan Rogerson.name: Logan Rogerson
Logan Rogerson.summary: Logan Tipene Rogerson (Māori: [ˈti.pɛ.nɛ]; born 28 May 1998) is a New Zealand professional footballer who plays as a winger for A-League club Auckland FC and the New Zealand national team.
Logan Rogerson.note: Rogerson is a direct wide runner, useful when New Zealand want the next pass to attack space.
Logan Rogerson.noteZh: 罗杰森是直接边路跑动点，当新西兰想让下一脚传球冲击空间时很有用。

Marko Stamenic.name: Marko Stamenic
Marko Stamenic.summary: Marko Seufatu Nikola Stamenić (Serbian Cyrillic: Марко Сеуфату Никола Стаменић; born 19 February 2002) is a New Zealand professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for EFL Championship club Swansea City and the New Zealand national team.
Marko Stamenic.note: Stamenic gives New Zealand a ball-carrying midfielder who can turn pressure into territory.
Marko Stamenic.noteZh: 斯塔梅尼奇给新西兰带来能带球的中场，能把压力转成推进空间。

Max Crocombe.name: Max Crocombe
Max Crocombe.summary: Maxime Teremoana Crocombe (born 12 August 1993) is a New Zealand professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for EFL Championship club Millwall and the New Zealand national team.
Max Crocombe.note: Crocombe gives New Zealand experienced goalkeeper cover and a steady command of crosses.
Max Crocombe.noteZh: 克罗科姆给新西兰提供经验型门将后备，并能稳定处理传中。

Michael Boxall.name: Michael Boxall
Michael Boxall.summary: Michael Joseph Boxall (born 18 August 1988) is a New Zealand professional footballer who plays as a defender for Major League Soccer club Minnesota United and the New Zealand national team.
Michael Boxall.note: Boxall is a veteran defensive organizer, important when New Zealand defend repeat crosses.
Michael Boxall.noteZh: 博克索尔是老将防守组织者，当新西兰防守连续传中时很重要。

Michael Woud.name: Michael Woud
Michael Woud.summary: Michael Cornelis Woud (Dutch: [ʋʌut]; born 16 January 1999) is a New Zealand professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for A-League club Auckland FC and the New Zealand national team.
Michael Woud.note: Woud adds another goalkeeper option, useful for depth and clean restarts from the back.
Michael Woud.noteZh: 伍德增加又一名门将选择，适合门将深度和后场干净重启。

Nando Pijnaker.name: Nando Pijnaker
Nando Pijnaker.summary: Nando Zen Pijnaker (Dutch: [ˈnɑndo zɛn ˈpɛi̯.nɑ.kər]; born 25 February 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre back for A-League Men club Auckland FC. Born in the Netherlands, he represents the New Zealand national team.
Nando Pijnaker.note: Pijnaker gives New Zealand left-footed centre-back balance and simple forward passing.
Nando Pijnaker.noteZh: 皮纳克给新西兰带来左脚中卫平衡和简洁向前传球。

Ryan Thomas.name: Ryan Thomas
Ryan Thomas.summary: Ryan Jared Thomas (born 20 December 1994) is a New Zealand professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Eredivisie club PEC Zwolle and the New Zealand national team.
Ryan Thomas.note: Thomas gives New Zealand midfield experience, helping them keep the ball after the first escape.
Ryan Thomas.noteZh: 托马斯给新西兰带来中场经验，帮助球队在第一次摆脱后继续控球。

Tim Payne.name: Tim Payne
Tim Payne.summary: Tim Payne is a New Zealand right-back from Wellington Phoenix who gives the national team right-back reliability, wide defending, and overlap support.
Tim Payne.note: Payne is a reliable right-back, balancing defensive work with controlled support outside.
Tim Payne.noteZh: 佩恩是可靠右后卫，能平衡防守工作和外侧可控支援。

Tommy Smith.name: Tommy Smith
Tommy Smith.summary: Tommy Smith is a New Zealand centre-back from Auckland FC who gives the national team experience, aerial duels, and back-line organization.
Tommy Smith.note: Smith gives New Zealand experienced defensive organization, especially useful in low-block stretches.
Tommy Smith.noteZh: 汤米·史密斯给新西兰带来经验型防守组织，尤其适合低位防守阶段。

Tyler Bindon.name: Tyler Bindon
Tyler Bindon.summary: Tyler Grant Bindon (born 27 January 2005) is a New Zealand professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Premier League side Nottingham Forest, and the New Zealand national team.
Tyler Bindon.note: Bindon gives New Zealand a mobile centre-back who can defend space and pass out cleanly.
Tyler Bindon.noteZh: 宾登给新西兰带来机动中卫，能防守空间并干净出球。

Alexis Saelemaekers.name: Alexis Saelemaekers
Alexis Saelemaekers.summary: Alexis Jesse M. Saelemaekers (born 27 June 1999) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a winger or wing-back for Serie A club AC Milan and the Belgium national team.
Alexis Saelemaekers.note: Saelemaekers gives Belgium wide balance, pressing hard while still supplying useful service.
Alexis Saelemaekers.noteZh: 萨勒马科尔斯给比利时带来边路平衡，能强力压迫，也能送出有用传球。

Amadou Onana.name: Amadou Onana
Amadou Onana.summary: Amadou Ba Zeund Georges Mvom Onana (born 16 August 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Premier League club Aston Villa. Born in Senegal, he represents the Belgium national team.
Amadou Onana.note: Onana gives Belgium midfield height and bite, especially when second balls start deciding territory.
Amadou Onana.noteZh: 奥纳纳给比利时中场带来高度和硬度，尤其当第二落点开始决定场面位置时。

Arthur Theate.name: Arthur Theate
Arthur Theate.summary: Arthur Nicolas R. Theate (born 25 May 2000) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or left-back for Bundesliga club Eintracht Frankfurt and the Belgium national team.
Arthur Theate.note: Theate gives Belgium left-sided defensive strength, useful as a centre-back or wider cover.
Arthur Theate.noteZh: 蒂亚特给比利时左侧防守强度，既能踢中卫，也能提供更宽的保护。

Axel Witsel.name: Axel Witsel
Axel Witsel.summary: Axel Laurent Angel Lambert Witsel (born 12 January 1989) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder or centre-back for Segunda División club Girona and the Belgium national team.
Axel Witsel.note: Witsel is Belgium's veteran stabilizer, valuable when the game needs calm more than speed.
Axel Witsel.noteZh: 维特塞尔是比利时老将稳定器，当比赛更需要冷静而不是速度时很有价值。

Brandon Mechele.name: Brandon Mechele
Brandon Mechele.summary: Brandon Erik Mechele (born 28 January 1993) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a centre back for Belgian Pro League side Club Brugge and the Belgium national team.
Brandon Mechele.note: Mechele gives Belgium reliable centre-back depth for aerial spells and set-piece defending.
Brandon Mechele.noteZh: 梅赫勒给比利时可靠的中卫深度，适合空中球阶段和定位球防守。

Charles De Ketelaere.name: Charles De Ketelaere
Charles De Ketelaere.summary: Charles Marc S. De Ketelaere (Dutch pronunciation: [də ˈkeːtəˌlaːrə]; born 10 March 2001) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or forward for Serie A club Atalanta and the Belgium national team.
Charles De Ketelaere.note: De Ketelaere gives Belgium a tall connector, able to link attacks without losing penalty-area presence.
Charles De Ketelaere.noteZh: 德凯特拉雷给比利时带来高大连接点，能串联进攻，也不丢禁区存在感。

Diego Moreira.name: Diego Moreira
Diego Moreira.summary: Diego Manuel Jadon da Silva Moreira (Portuguese pronunciation: [diˈɛɣu muˈɾɐjɾɐ]; born 6 August 2004), also known as Moreira Jr., is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a left-back, left wing-back or left midfielder for Ligue 1 club Strasbourg and...
Diego Moreira.note: Moreira adds left-side speed, useful when Belgium want to attack before the block settles.
Diego Moreira.noteZh: 莫雷拉增加左路速度，当比利时想在防线站稳前进攻时很有用。

Dodi Lukebakio.name: Dodi Lukebakio
Dodi Lukebakio.summary: Dodi Lukébakio Ngandoli (born 24 September 1997) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a right winger or right midfielder for Primeira Liga club Benfica and the Belgium national team.
Dodi Lukebakio.note: Lukebakio gives Belgium direct power from the right, dangerous when he cuts inside early.
Dodi Lukebakio.noteZh: 卢克巴基奥给比利时右路带来直接力量，提前内切时很危险。

Hans Vanaken.name: Hans Vanaken
Hans Vanaken.summary: Hans Vanaken (born 24 August 1992) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Belgian Pro League club Club Brugge and the Belgium national team.
Hans Vanaken.note: Vanaken gives Belgium height and timing between midfield and attack, especially around the box.
Hans Vanaken.noteZh: 瓦纳肯给比利时中前场之间带来高度和时机，尤其在禁区附近。

Joaquin Seys.name: Joaquin Seys
Joaquin Seys.summary: Joaquin Ronny Seys (born 28 March 2005) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Belgian Pro League club Club Brugge and the Belgium national team.
Joaquin Seys.note: Seys adds young full-back energy, useful when Belgium need fresh legs on the outside.
Joaquin Seys.noteZh: 塞斯增加年轻边后卫活力，当比利时需要外侧新鲜跑动时很有用。

Koni De Winter.name: Koni De Winter
Koni De Winter.summary: Koni De Winter (born 12 June 2002) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as centre-back for Serie A club AC Milan and the Belgium national team.
Koni De Winter.note: De Winter gives Belgium a mobile defensive option who can pass out and cover the right channel.
Koni De Winter.noteZh: 德温特给比利时机动防守选择，能出球，也能覆盖右侧通道。

Matias Fernandez-Pardo.name: Matias Fernandez-Pardo
Matias Fernandez-Pardo.summary: Matias Fernandez-Pardo (born 3 February 2005) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a wide midfielder or forward for Ligue 1 club Lille and the Belgium national team.
Matias Fernandez-Pardo.note: Fernandez-Pardo is a fresh wide runner, useful for late speed and pressure from the bench.
Matias Fernandez-Pardo.noteZh: 费尔南德斯-帕尔多是新鲜边路跑动点，适合替补席上的末段速度和压迫。

Maxim De Cuyper.name: Maxim De Cuyper
Maxim De Cuyper.summary: Maxim Peter M. De Cuyper (Dutch pronunciation: [ˈmɑksɪm də ˈkœypər]; born 22 December 2000) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a full-back or left midfielder for Premier League club Brighton & Hove Albion and the Belgium national team.
Maxim De Cuyper.note: De Cuyper gives Belgium left-footed delivery and a cleaner route into the box from deep.
Maxim De Cuyper.noteZh: 德凯珀给比利时左脚传递，也提供从后场进入禁区的更干净路线。

Mike Penders.name: Mike Penders
Mike Penders.summary: Mike Louis Penders (born 31 July 2005) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Premier League club Chelsea and the Belgium national team.
Mike Penders.note: Penders is Belgium's young goalkeeper option, useful depth behind the established names.
Mike Penders.noteZh: 彭德斯是比利时年轻门将选择，是成名门将身后的有用深度。

Nathan Ngoy.name: Nathan Ngoy
Nathan Ngoy.summary: Nathan Ngoy (born 10 June 2003) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays for Ligue 1 club Lille and the Belgium national team.
Nathan Ngoy.note: Ngoy gives Belgium an athletic centre-back profile for defending space and repeated crosses.
Nathan Ngoy.noteZh: 恩戈伊给比利时带来运动能力强的中卫类型，适合防守空间和反复传中。

Nicolas Raskin.name: Nicolas Raskin
Nicolas Raskin.summary: Nicolas Thierry Y. Raskin (born 23 February 2001) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Scottish Premiership club Rangers and the Belgium national team.
Nicolas Raskin.note: Raskin gives Belgium midfield bite, useful when pressure has to become a forward pass.
Nicolas Raskin.noteZh: 拉斯金给比利时中场带来硬度，当压力需要转成向前传球时很有用。

Senne Lammens.name: Senne Lammens
Senne Lammens.summary: Senne Lammens (Dutch: ['sɛnə 'lɑməns]; born 7 July 2002) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Premier League club Manchester United and the Belgium national team. Lammens commenced his senior football career at Club Brugge.
Senne Lammens.note: Lammens gives Belgium a big goalkeeper profile, useful for crosses and close-range saves.
Senne Lammens.noteZh: 拉门斯给比利时带来高大门将类型，适合处理传中和近距离扑救。

Thibaut Courtois.name: Thibaut Courtois
Thibaut Courtois.summary: Thibaut Nicolas Marc Courtois (French pronunciation: [tibo kuʁtwa]; Dutch pronunciation: [ˈtiboː kurˈtʋaː]; born 11 May 1992) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for La Liga club Real Madrid and the Belgium national team.
Thibaut Courtois.note: Courtois gives Belgium elite goalkeeping security, especially when chances arrive suddenly.
Thibaut Courtois.noteZh: 库尔图瓦给比利时顶级门将安全感，尤其当机会突然出现时。

Thomas Meunier.name: Thomas Meunier
Thomas Meunier.summary: Thomas André A. Meunier (French pronunciation: [tɔma mønje]; born 12 September 1991) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Ligue 1 club Lille and the Belgium national team.
Thomas Meunier.note: Meunier gives Belgium veteran right-side experience and a back-post threat from deep.
Thomas Meunier.noteZh: 默尼耶给比利时右侧带来老将经验，也能从后场形成后点威胁。

Timothy Castagne.name: Timothy Castagne
Timothy Castagne.summary: Timothy Castagne (French pronunciation: [timɔti kastaɲ]; born 5 December 1995) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a full back for Premier League club Fulham and the Belgium national team.
Timothy Castagne.note: Castagne gives Belgium reliable full-back versatility, switching sides without changing the plan.
Timothy Castagne.noteZh: 卡斯塔涅给比利时可靠的边后卫多面性，换边也不改变战术计划。

Youri Tielemans.name: Youri Tielemans
Youri Tielemans.summary: Youri Marion A. Tielemans (born 7 May 1997) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Aston Villa and captains the Belgium national team.
Youri Tielemans.note: Tielemans gives Belgium midfield rhythm and the long shot that punishes passive defending.
Youri Tielemans.noteZh: 蒂勒曼斯给比利时中场节奏，也有能惩罚被动防守的远射。

Zeno Debast.name: Zeno Debast
Zeno Debast.summary: Zeno Koen Debast (born 24 October 2003) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays for Primeira Liga club Sporting CP and the Belgium national team. Primarily a centre-back, he can also be deployed as a defensive midfielder.
Zeno Debast.note: Debast gives Belgium a passing centre-back, important when build-up needs a cleaner first break.
Zeno Debast.noteZh: 德巴斯特给比利时传球型中卫，当后场组织需要更干净的第一下突破时很重要。

Alberto Quintero.name: Alberto Quintero
Alberto Quintero.summary: Alberto Abdiel Quintero Medina (born 18 December 1987) is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays for C.D. Plaza Amador and the Panama national team as a winger.
Alberto Quintero.note: Quintero gives Panama veteran width, useful when the match needs a direct carry and early service.
Alberto Quintero.noteZh: 金特罗给巴拿马带来老将边路宽度，当比赛需要直接带球和早传时很有用。

Andres Andrade.name: Andres Andrade
Andres Andrade.summary: Andrés Alberto Andrade Cedeño (born 16 October 1998) is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays as a defender for Austrian Football Bundesliga club LASK and the Panama national team.
Andres Andrade.note: Andrade gives Panama a composed centre-back who can defend the box and start attacks cleanly.
Andres Andrade.noteZh: 安德拉德给巴拿马带来冷静中卫，能防守禁区，也能干净发起进攻。

Anibal Godoy.name: Anibal Godoy
Anibal Godoy.summary: Aníbal Casis Godoy Lemus (Spanish: [aˈniβal ɣoˈðoj]; born 10 February 1990) is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Major League Soccer club San Diego FC and captains the Panama national team.
Anibal Godoy.note: Godoy is Panama's midfield organizer, trusted to slow the game and win contact in central areas.
Anibal Godoy.noteZh: 戈多伊是巴拿马中场组织者，可信赖地放慢比赛并赢下中路身体对抗。

Azarias Londono.name: Azarias Londono
Azarias Londono.summary: Azarias Emmanuel Londoño González (born 21 June 2001) is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays as forward for Universidad Católica, on loan from Alianza, and the Panama national team.
Azarias Londono.note: Londoño gives Panama a mobile forward option, useful for pressing and running beyond the first line.
Azarias Londono.noteZh: 隆多尼奥给巴拿马带来机动前锋选择，适合压迫并冲到第一道防线身后。

Carlos Harvey.name: Carlos Harvey
Carlos Harvey.summary: Carlos Miguel Harvey Cesneros (born 3 February 2000) is a Panamaian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Major League Soccer club Minnesota United FC and the Panama national team.
Carlos Harvey.note: Harvey gives Panama size in midfield, helping them protect counters and compete for second balls.
Carlos Harvey.noteZh: 哈维给巴拿马中场带来身材，帮助保护反击并争抢第二落点。

Cecilio Waterman.name: Cecilio Waterman
Cecilio Waterman.summary: Cecilio Alfonso Waterman Ruiz (born 13 April 1991) is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays as a striker for Chilean club Universidad de Concepción and the Panama national team.
Cecilio Waterman.note: Waterman is a physical striker option, useful when Panama want crosses and knockdowns to stick.
Cecilio Waterman.noteZh: 沃特曼是身体型前锋选择，当巴拿马希望传中和摆渡能站住时很有用。

Cesar Blackman.name: Cesar Blackman
Cesar Blackman.summary: César Rodolfo Blackman Camarena (born 2 April 1998) is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Slovak First Football League club Slovan Bratislava and the Panama national team.
Cesar Blackman.note: Blackman gives Panama pace from right-back, stretching the flank and recovering quickly behind it.
Cesar Blackman.noteZh: 布莱克曼给巴拿马右后卫位置带来速度，能拉开边路并迅速回追身后。

Cesar Samudio.name: Cesar Samudio
Cesar Samudio.summary: César Jair Samudio Murillo (born 23 February 1994) is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Honduran side Marathón and the Panama national team.
Cesar Samudio.note: Samudio gives Panama a reaction goalkeeper, useful when the back line faces close-range chances.
Cesar Samudio.noteZh: 萨穆迪奥给巴拿马带来反应型门将，当防线面对近距离机会时很有用。

Cesar Yanis.name: Cesar Yanis
Cesar Yanis.summary: César Augusto Yanis Velasco (born 28 January 1996) is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays as left winger for Chilean club Cobresal, on loan from Costa Rican club San Carlos, and the Panama national team.
Cesar Yanis.note: Yanis adds transition speed on the left, dangerous when he can drive to the line and cut service back.
Cesar Yanis.noteZh: 亚尼斯增加左路转换速度，能冲到底线并倒三角传球时很危险。

Cristian Martinez.name: Cristian Martinez
Cristian Martinez.summary: Cristian Jesús Martínez (born 6 February 1997) is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Israeli Premier League club Ironi Kiryat Shmona and the Panama national team.
Cristian Martinez.note: Martínez gives Panama a tidy midfield shield, keeping passes simple after he wins contact.
Cristian Martinez.noteZh: 马丁内斯给巴拿马整洁的中场屏障，赢下对抗后能简洁处理传球。

Edgar Yoel Barcenas.name: Edgar Yoel Barcenas
Edgar Yoel Barcenas.summary: Édgar Yoel Bárcenas Herrera (born 23 October 1993) is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays as a winger for the Panama national team.
Edgar Yoel Barcenas.note: Bárcenas gives Panama invention from wide areas, especially on restarts and inside touches.
Edgar Yoel Barcenas.noteZh: 巴尔塞纳斯给巴拿马边路创造力，尤其体现在定位球和内收触球。

Edgardo Farina.name: Edgardo Farina
Edgardo Farina.summary: Edgardo Issac Fariña Wynter (born 19 October 2001) is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Russian Premier League club Pari Nizhny Novgorod and the Panama national team.
Edgardo Farina.note: Fariña gives Panama a mobile centre-back, useful when the defensive line has to cover space.
Edgardo Farina.noteZh: 法里尼亚给巴拿马带来机动中卫，当防线需要覆盖空间时很有用。

Eric Davis.name: Eric Davis
Eric Davis.summary: Eric Javier Davis Grajales (born 31 March 1991) is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Plaza Amador and the Panama national team.
Eric Davis.note: Davis gives Panama left-side experience and set-piece quality, a steady outlet under pressure.
