Eric Davis.noteZh: 戴维斯给巴拿马左侧经验和定位球质量，是压力下稳定的出球点。

Fidel Escobar.name: Fidel Escobar
Fidel Escobar.summary: Fidel Escobar Mendieta (born 9 January 1995) is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Liga FPD club Saprissa and the Panama national team.
Fidel Escobar.note: Escobar is Panama's defensive organizer, able to clear danger and hit the first forward pass.
Fidel Escobar.noteZh: 埃斯科巴是巴拿马防守组织者，能清理危险并送出第一脚向前传球。

Jiovany Ramos.name: Jiovany Ramos
Jiovany Ramos.summary: Jiovany Javier Ramos Díaz (born 26 January 1997) is a Panamanian footballer who plays as a centre-back for Venezuelan Primera División side Puerto Cabello, on loan from CAI, and the Panama national team.
Jiovany Ramos.note: Ramos gives Panama another centre-back body for aerial spells and late defensive pressure.
Jiovany Ramos.noteZh: 拉莫斯给巴拿马增加中卫厚度，适合空中球阶段和比赛末段防守压力。

Jorge Gutierrez.name: Jorge Gutierrez
Jorge Gutierrez.summary: Jorge Abdiel Gutiérrez Cornejo (born 1 September 1998) is a Panamanian football player who plays as left-back for Deportivo La Guaira, and the Panama national team.
Jorge Gutierrez.note: Gutiérrez adds goalkeeper depth, useful for reaction saves and managing repeated crosses.
Jorge Gutierrez.noteZh: 古铁雷斯增加门将深度，适合反应扑救和处理连续传中。

Jose Cordoba.name: Jose Cordoba
Jose Cordoba.summary: José Ángel Córdoba Chambers (born 3 June 2001) is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays as a defender for EFL Championship club Norwich City and the Panama national team.
Jose Cordoba.note: Córdoba gives Panama speed at centre-back, important when they defend space behind the line.
Jose Cordoba.noteZh: 科尔多瓦给巴拿马中卫位置带来速度，对防守身后空间很重要。

Jose Fajardo.name: Jose Fajardo
Jose Fajardo.summary: José Fajardo Nelson (born 18 August 1993) is a Panamanian footballer who plays as a forward for Universidad Catolica del Ecuador on loan from CAI and the Panama national team.
Jose Fajardo.note: Fajardo is a direct striker option, attacking channels and giving Panama a target for early balls.
Jose Fajardo.noteZh: 法哈多是直接前锋选择，冲击通道，并给巴拿马早传提供目标。

Jose Luis Rodriguez.name: Jose Luis Rodriguez
Jose Luis Rodriguez.summary: José Luis Rodríguez Francis (born 19 June 1998), commonly known as Puma, is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays as a left winger for Liga MX club Juárez and the Panama national team.
Jose Luis Rodriguez.note: Rodríguez gives Panama speed on the break, especially when he can attack the outside shoulder.
Jose Luis Rodriguez.noteZh: 罗德里格斯给巴拿马反击速度，尤其能冲击外侧肩膀时很有威胁。

Luis Mejia.name: Luis Mejia
Luis Mejia.summary: Luis Ricardo Mejía Cajar (born 16 March 1991) is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Uruguayan Primera División club Nacional and the Panama national team.
Luis Mejia.note: Mejía brings goalkeeper experience, steady when Panama need calm through pressure.
Luis Mejia.noteZh: 梅希亚带来门将经验，当巴拿马需要在压力中保持冷静时很稳定。

Orlando Mosquera.name: Orlando Mosquera
Orlando Mosquera.summary: Orlando Mosquera (born 25 December 1994), commonly known as Kuty Mosquera, is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Saudi Pro League club Al-Fayha and the Panama national team.
Orlando Mosquera.note: Mosquera gives Panama reach in goal, useful when opponents start shooting through traffic.
Orlando Mosquera.noteZh: 莫斯克拉给巴拿马门前覆盖范围，当对手在人群中射门时很有用。

Roderick Miller.name: Roderick Miller
Roderick Miller.summary: Roderick Alonso Miller Molina (born 3 April 1992) is a Panamanian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Azerbaijan Premier League club Turan Tovuz and the Panama national team.
Roderick Miller.note: Miller gives Panama defensive strength, especially for aerial duels and set-piece marking.
Roderick Miller.noteZh: 米勒给巴拿马防守强度，尤其适合空中对抗和定位球盯防。

Tomas Rodriguez.name: Tomas Rodriguez
Tomas Rodriguez.summary: Tomás Abdiel Rodríguez Mena (born 9 March 1999) is a Panamanian footballer who plays as a forward for Monagas and Panama national team.
Tomas Rodriguez.note: Rodríguez gives Panama forward depth, useful when the press needs fresh legs near the box.
Tomas Rodriguez.noteZh: 托马斯·罗德里格斯给巴拿马前锋深度，当禁区附近压迫需要新鲜跑动时很有用。

Anthony Gordon.name: Anthony Gordon
Anthony Gordon.summary: Anthony Michael Gordon (born 24 February 2001) is an English professional footballer who plays primarily as a winger for Premier League club Newcastle United and the England national team.
Anthony Gordon.note: Gordon gives England left-side speed and pressure, ideal when the match needs vertical running.
Anthony Gordon.noteZh: 戈登给英格兰左路速度和压迫，当比赛需要纵向跑动时很理想。

Bukayo Saka.name: Bukayo Saka
Bukayo Saka.summary: Bukayo Ayoyinka Temidayo Moses Saka (, born 5 September 2001) is an English professional footballer who plays as a right winger for Premier League club Arsenal and the England national team.
Bukayo Saka.note: Saka is England's right-side control point, able to turn isolated touches into clean chances.
Bukayo Saka.noteZh: 萨卡是英格兰右路控制点，能把孤立触球转成清晰机会。

Dan Burn.name: Dan Burn
Dan Burn.summary: Daniel Johnson Burn (born 9 May 1992) is an English professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or left-back for Premier League club Newcastle United and the England national team.
Dan Burn.note: Burn gives England height on the left, useful for defending crosses and attacking restarts.
Dan Burn.noteZh: 伯恩给英格兰左侧带来高度，适合防守传中和进攻定位球。

Dean Henderson.name: Dean Henderson
Dean Henderson.summary: Dean Bradley Henderson (born 12 March 1997) is an English professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Premier League club Crystal Palace, whom he captains, and the England national team.
Dean Henderson.note: Henderson offers England a sharp goalkeeper option with command on crosses and fast restarts.
Dean Henderson.noteZh: 亨德森给英格兰提供敏捷门将选择，能指挥传中并快速重启。

Djed Spence.name: Djed Spence
Djed Spence.summary: Diop Tehuti Djed-Hotep Spence (born 9 August 2000) is an English professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Premier League club Tottenham Hotspur and the England national team.
Djed Spence.note: Spence gives England right-side speed, useful when the flank needs fresh running and recovery.
Djed Spence.noteZh: 斯彭斯给英格兰右侧带来速度，当边路需要新鲜跑动和回追时很有用。

Eberechi Eze.name: Eberechi Eze
Eberechi Eze.summary: Eberechi Oluchi "Ebere" Eze ( ə-BAIR-ə-tchee EZ-ə ; born 29 June 1998) is an English professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Premier League club Arsenal and the England national team.
Eberechi Eze.note: Eze gives England invention between the lines, especially when a dribble has to bend the block.
Eberechi Eze.noteZh: 埃泽给英格兰两线之间的创造力，尤其当盘带需要扭动防线时。

Elliot Anderson.name: Elliot Anderson
Elliot Anderson.summary: Elliot Junior Anderson (born 6 November 2002) is an English professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Nottingham Forest and the England national team.
Elliot Anderson.note: Anderson adds midfield legs and tidy combinations, useful for keeping pressure alive.
Elliot Anderson.noteZh: 安德森增加中场跑动和整洁配合，适合让压力持续存在。

Ezri Konsa.name: Ezri Konsa
Ezri Konsa.summary: Ezri Ngoyo Konsa (born 23 October 1997) is an English professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or right-back for Premier League club Aston Villa and the England national team.
Ezri Konsa.note: Konsa gives England calm defensive coverage, especially when the back line has to defend space.
Ezri Konsa.noteZh: 孔萨给英格兰冷静防守覆盖，尤其当防线需要防守空间时。

Ivan Toney.name: Ivan Toney
Ivan Toney.summary: Ivan Benjamin Elijah Toney (born 16 March 1996) is an English professional footballer who plays as a striker for Saudi Pro League club Al-Ahli and the England national team.
Ivan Toney.note: Toney gives England a more physical striker route when the game asks for contact and crosses.
Ivan Toney.noteZh: 托尼给英格兰更身体化的中锋路线，当比赛需要接触和传中时很有用。

James Trafford.name: James Trafford
James Trafford.summary: James Harrington Trafford (born 10 October 2002) is an English professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Premier League club Manchester City and the England national team.
James Trafford.note: Trafford adds young goalkeeper depth, useful for distribution and reaction saves.
James Trafford.noteZh: 特拉福德增加年轻门将深度，适合出球和反应扑救。

Jarell Quansah.name: Jarell Quansah
Jarell Quansah.summary: Jarell Amorin Quansah (born 29 January 2003) is an English professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Bundesliga club Bayer Leverkusen and the England national team.
Jarell Quansah.note: Quansah gives England a composed young centre-back who can pass forward and defend space.
Jarell Quansah.noteZh: 宽萨给英格兰冷静的年轻中卫，能向前传球，也能防守空间。

John Stones.name: John Stones
John Stones.summary: John Stones (born 28 May 1994) is an English professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or defensive midfielder for Premier League club Manchester City and the England national team.
John Stones.note: Stones lets England blur defence and midfield, stepping in to create a cleaner extra pass.
John Stones.noteZh: 斯通斯让英格兰模糊防线和中场，能前提制造更干净的额外传球。

Jordan Henderson.name: Jordan Henderson
Jordan Henderson.summary: Jordan Brian Henderson (born 17 June 1990) is an English professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Brentford and the England national team. He is known for his leadership, versatility, and physicality.
Jordan Henderson.note: Henderson gives England veteran organization, useful for managing pressure and game state.
Jordan Henderson.noteZh: 亨德森给英格兰老将组织力，适合管理压力和比赛状态。

Jordan Pickford.name: Jordan Pickford
Jordan Pickford.summary: Jordan Lee Pickford (né Logan; born 7 March 1994) is an English professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Premier League club Everton and the England national team.
Jordan Pickford.note: Pickford is England's tournament goalkeeper, trusted for big saves and direct distribution.
Jordan Pickford.noteZh: 皮克福德是英格兰大赛门将，关键扑救和直接出球都值得信任。

Kobbie Mainoo.name: Kobbie Mainoo
Kobbie Mainoo.summary: Kobbie Boateng Mainoo (; born 19 April 2005) is an English professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Manchester United and the England national team. He is known for his dribbling and composure.
Kobbie Mainoo.note: Mainoo gives England calm in traffic, carrying through midfield without forcing the pass.
Kobbie Mainoo.noteZh: 梅努给英格兰拥挤区域的冷静，能带球穿过中场而不勉强传球。

Marc Guehi.name: Marc Guehi
Marc Guehi.summary: Addji Keaninkin Marc-Israel Guéhi ( GAY-ee; born 13 July 2000) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Premier League club Manchester City and the England national team.
Marc Guehi.note: Guéhi gives England clean defensive timing, especially when attacks test the channel.
Marc Guehi.noteZh: 格伊给英格兰干净的防守时机，尤其当进攻冲击通道时。

Morgan Rogers.name: Morgan Rogers
Morgan Rogers.summary: Morgan Elliot Rogers (born 26 July 2002) is an English professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or winger for Premier League club Aston Villa and the England national team.
Morgan Rogers.note: Rogers adds power between the lines, useful when England need a runner through contact.
Morgan Rogers.noteZh: 罗杰斯增加两线之间的力量，当英格兰需要能顶着接触推进的跑动点时很有用。

Nico Oreilly.name: Nico Oreilly
Nico Oreilly.summary: Nico O'Reilly is an England midfielder from Manchester City who gives the national team midfield height, late box arrivals, and left-footed progression.
Nico Oreilly.note: O'Reilly gives England a tall midfield option, useful for late runs and left-footed progression.
Nico Oreilly.noteZh: 奥赖利给英格兰高大中场选择，适合后插上和左脚推进。

Noni Madueke.name: Noni Madueke
Noni Madueke.summary: Chukwunonso Azuka Tristan "Noni" Madueke (English: ; born 10 March 2002) is an English professional footballer who plays as a winger for Premier League club Arsenal and the England national team.
Noni Madueke.note: Madueke gives England another one-on-one winger, dangerous when he can isolate a full-back.
Noni Madueke.noteZh: 马杜埃凯给英格兰又一名一对一边锋，当他能单挑边后卫时很危险。

Ollie Watkins.name: Ollie Watkins
Ollie Watkins.summary: Oliver George Arthur Watkins (born 30 December 1995) is an English professional footballer who plays as a forward for Premier League club Aston Villa and the England national team.
Ollie Watkins.note: Watkins gives England constant running beyond the line and a direct finishing threat.
Ollie Watkins.noteZh: 沃特金斯给英格兰持续冲击防线身后的跑动和直接终结威胁。

Reece James.name: Reece James
Reece James.summary: Reece Lewis James (born 8 December 1999) is an English professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Premier League club Chelsea, which he captains, and the England national team.
Reece James.note: James gives England elite right-back delivery and the strength to defend the same flank.
Reece James.noteZh: 里斯·詹姆斯给英格兰顶级右后卫传球，也有力量守住同一侧边路。

Trevoh Chalobah.name: Trevoh Chalobah
Trevoh Chalobah.summary: Trevoh Tom Chalobah (born 5 July 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Premier League club Chelsea. Born in Sierra Leone, he plays for the England national team.
Trevoh Chalobah.note: Chalobah gives England defensive flexibility, able to cover centre-back or the right channel.
Trevoh Chalobah.noteZh: 查洛巴给英格兰防守灵活性，能覆盖中卫或右侧通道。

Andrej Kramaric.name: Andrej Kramaric
Andrej Kramaric.summary: Andrej Kramarić (Croatian pronunciation: [ǎndrej krǎmaritɕ]; born 19 June 1991) is a Croatian professional footballer who plays as a forward or attacking midfielder for Bundesliga club TSG Hoffenheim and the Croatia national team.
Andrej Kramaric.note: Kramarić gives Croatia a clever forward connector, drifting into pockets before arriving to finish.
Andrej Kramaric.noteZh: 克拉马里奇给克罗地亚带来聪明的前场连接点，先游到空当，再到位终结。

Dominik Kotarski.name: Dominik Kotarski
Dominik Kotarski.summary: Dominik Kotarski (Croatian pronunciation: [dôminik kôtarskiː, domǐ-]; born 10 February 2000) is a Croatian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Danish Superliga club Copenhagen and the Croatia national team.
Dominik Kotarski.note: Kotarski gives Croatia a modern goalkeeper option, useful for quick saves and tidy restarts.
Dominik Kotarski.noteZh: 科塔尔斯基给克罗地亚现代门将选择，适合快速扑救和整洁重启。

Dominik Livakovic.name: Dominik Livakovic
Dominik Livakovic.summary: Dominik Livaković (Croatian pronunciation: [dôminik liʋǎːkoʋitɕ, domǐ-]; born 9 January 1995) is a Croatian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Croatian Football League club Dinamo Zagreb, on loan from Süper Lig club Fenerbahçe, and the...
Dominik Livakovic.note: Livaković brings Croatia tournament calm, especially when knockout-style pressure piles up.
Dominik Livakovic.noteZh: 利瓦科维奇给克罗地亚带来大赛冷静，尤其当淘汰赛式压力堆积时。

Duje Caleta-Car.name: Duje Caleta-Car
Duje Caleta-Car.summary: Duje Ćaleta-Car (Croatian pronunciation: [dǔːje tɕâleta tsâr]; born 17 September 1996) is a Croatian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for La Liga club Real Sociedad, on loan from Ligue 1 club Lyon, and the Croatia national team.
Duje Caleta-Car.note: Ćaleta-Car gives Croatia size at centre-back, useful for defending crosses and direct spells.
Duje Caleta-Car.noteZh: 查莱塔-察尔给克罗地亚中卫位置带来高度，适合防守传中和直接进攻阶段。

Igor Matanovic.name: Igor Matanovic
Igor Matanovic.summary: Igor Matanović (born 31 March 2003) is a professional footballer who plays as a striker for Bundesliga club SC Freiburg. Born in Germany, he plays for the Croatia national team.
Igor Matanovic.note: Matanović gives Croatia a younger power forward who can hold contact and attack the next ball.
Igor Matanovic.noteZh: 马塔诺维奇给克罗地亚年轻力量型前锋，能扛住接触并冲击下一点。

Ivan Perisic.name: Ivan Perisic
Ivan Perisic.summary: Ivan Perišić (Croatian pronunciation: [ǐʋan pěriʃitɕ]; born 2 February 1989) is a Croatian professional footballer who plays as a winger for Eredivisie club PSV and the Croatia national team.
Ivan Perisic.note: Perišić remains Croatia's veteran wide weapon, still dangerous with either-foot service and far-post runs.
Ivan Perisic.noteZh: 佩里希奇仍是克罗地亚老将边路武器，双脚传球和后点跑动依然危险。

Ivor Pandur.name: Ivor Pandur
Ivor Pandur.summary: Ivor Pandur (born 25 March 2000) is a Croatian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Premier League club Hull City and the Croatia national team.
Ivor Pandur.note: Pandur adds goalkeeper depth, useful when Croatia need a steady presence behind the line.
Ivor Pandur.noteZh: 潘杜尔增加克罗地亚门将深度，当防线身后需要稳定存在感时很有用。

Josip Stanisic.name: Josip Stanisic
Josip Stanisic.summary: Josip Stanišić (Croatian pronunciation: [jǒsip stǎniʃitɕ]; born 2 April 2000) is a professional footballer who plays as a defender for Bundesliga club Bayern Munich. Born in Germany, he plays for the Croatia national team.
Josip Stanisic.note: Stanišić gives Croatia flexible defensive balance, switching roles without disturbing the structure.
Josip Stanisic.noteZh: 斯塔尼希奇给克罗地亚灵活防守平衡，能切换角色而不打乱结构。

Josip Sutalo.name: Josip Sutalo
Josip Sutalo.summary: Josip Šutalo (born 28 February 2000) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Eredivisie club Ajax. Born in Bosnia and Herzegovina, he plays for the Croatia national team.
Josip Sutalo.note: Šutalo gives Croatia recovery pace at centre-back and the confidence to pass through pressure.
Josip Sutalo.noteZh: 舒塔洛给克罗地亚中卫回追速度，也有信心在压力中向前传球。

Kristijan Jakic.name: Kristijan Jakic
Kristijan Jakic.summary: Kristijan Jakić (born 14 May 1997) is a Croatian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder, and can play as a centre-back and right-back for Bundesliga club FC Augsburg and the Croatia national team.
Kristijan Jakic.note: Jakić gives Croatia a combative utility piece, useful when midfield needs more bite.
Kristijan Jakic.noteZh: 亚基奇给克罗地亚对抗型多面手，当中场需要更多硬度时很有用。

Luka Sucic.name: Luka Sucic
Luka Sucic.summary: Luka Sučić (Croatian pronunciation: [lûːka sûtʃitɕ]; born 8 September 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for La Liga club Real Sociedad. Born in Austria, he plays for the Croatia national team.
Luka Sucic.note: Sučić gives Croatia a left-footed midfield punch, useful for passes and shots from the edge.
Luka Sucic.noteZh: 苏契奇给克罗地亚中场左脚冲击，适合禁区弧附近的传球和射门。

Luka Vuskovic.name: Luka Vuskovic
Luka Vuskovic.summary: Luka Vušković (born 24 February 2007) is a Croatian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Premier League club Tottenham Hotspur, and the Croatia national team.
Luka Vuskovic.note: Vušković gives Croatia elite height at centre-back and another route over pressure.
Luka Vuskovic.noteZh: 武什科维奇给克罗地亚中卫位置顶级高度，也提供越过压力的另一条路线。

Marco Pasalic.name: Marco Pasalic
Marco Pasalic.summary: Marco Pašalić (Croatian pronunciation: [mâːrko pǎʃalitɕ]; born 14 September 2000) is a professional footballer who plays as a right winger for Major League Soccer club Orlando City. Born in Germany, he plays for the Croatia national team.
Marco Pasalic.note: Marco Pašalić adds a direct right-wing shot threat when Croatia need faster end product.
Marco Pasalic.noteZh: 马尔科·帕沙利奇增加右路直接射门威胁，当克罗地亚需要更快终结时很有用。

Marin Pongracic.name: Marin Pongracic
Marin Pongracic.summary: Marin Pongračić (Croatian pronunciation: [mâriːn pǒnɡratʃitɕ]; born 11 September 1997) is a professional footballer who plays as a defender for Serie A club Fiorentina. Born in Germany, he plays for the Croatia national team.
Marin Pongracic.note: Pongračić gives Croatia another aggressive centre-back for physical and aerial matchups.
Marin Pongracic.noteZh: 庞格拉契奇给克罗地亚又一名侵略性中卫，适合身体和空中对抗。

Mario Pasalic.name: Mario Pasalic
Mario Pasalic.summary: Mario Pašalić (Croatian pronunciation: [mâːrio pǎʃalitɕ]; born 9 February 1995) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie A side Atalanta. Born in Germany, he plays for the Croatia national team.
Mario Pasalic.note: Mario Pašalić is Croatia's late-arriving midfielder, dangerous when crosses reach the second wave.
Mario Pasalic.noteZh: 马里奥·帕沙利奇是克罗地亚后插上中场，当传中来到第二波时很危险。

Martin Erlic.name: Martin Erlic
Martin Erlic.summary: Martin Erlić (Croatian pronunciation: [mǎrtin êːrlitɕ]; born 24 January 1998) is a Croatian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for the Danish club Midtjylland and the Croatia national team.
Martin Erlic.note: Erlić gives Croatia reliable centre-back depth for aerial spells and set-piece marking.
Martin Erlic.noteZh: 埃尔利奇给克罗地亚可靠中卫深度，适合空中球阶段和定位球盯防。

Nikola Moro.name: Nikola Moro
Nikola Moro.summary: Nikola Moro (Italian pronunciation: [nǐkola môːro]; born 12 March 1998) is a Croatian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Serie A club Bologna and the Croatia national team.
Nikola Moro.note: Moro adds a tidy midfield shield, useful when Croatia need safer circulation.
Nikola Moro.noteZh: 莫罗增加整洁的中场屏障，当克罗地亚需要更安全传导时很有用。

Nikola Vlasic.name: Nikola Vlasic
Nikola Vlasic.summary: Nikola Vlašić (Croatian pronunciation: [nǐkola ʋlâʃitɕ]; born 4 October 1997) is a Croatian professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Serie A club Torino and the Croatia national team.
Nikola Vlasic.note: Vlašić gives Croatia power between the lines and a shot threat from crowded zones.
Nikola Vlasic.noteZh: 弗拉希奇给克罗地亚两线之间的力量，也能在人群中形成射门威胁。

Petar Sucic.name: Petar Sucic
Petar Sucic.summary: Petar Sučić (born 25 October 2003) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie A club Inter Milan. Born in Bosnia and Herzegovina, he plays for the Croatia national team.
Petar Sucic.note: Petar Sučić gives Croatia energy in midfield, winning contact and moving the next pass.
Petar Sucic.noteZh: 佩塔尔·苏契奇给克罗地亚中场活力，能赢下对抗并送出下一脚传球。

Toni Fruk.name: Toni Fruk
Toni Fruk.summary: Toni Fruk (born 9 March 2001) is a Croatian professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or forward for Croatian Football League club Rijeka and the Croatia national team.
Toni Fruk.note: Fruk adds attacking midfield spark, especially useful on restarts and quick final passes.
Toni Fruk.noteZh: 弗鲁克增加进攻中场火花，尤其适合定位球和快速最后一传。

Aaron Tshibola.name: Aaron Tshibola
Aaron Tshibola.summary: Aaron Tshibola (born 2 January 1995) is a professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Scottish Premiership club Kilmarnock. Born in England, he represents the DR Congo national team.
Aaron Tshibola.note: Tshibola gives DR Congo midfield size, helping them compete for second balls and drive through contact.
Aaron Tshibola.noteZh: 奇博拉给刚果民主共和国中场体格，帮助球队争抢第二落点并带球穿过对抗。

Alessandro Schopf.name: Alessandro Schopf
Alessandro Schopf.summary: Alessandro André Schöpf (German pronunciation: [aleˈsandʁo ˈʃœpf]; born 7 February 1994) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Austrian Bundesliga club Wolfsberger AC and the Austria national team.
Alessandro Schopf.note: Schöpf gives Austria experienced running power, helping the midfield cover wide spaces and arrive late.
Alessandro Schopf.noteZh: 舍普夫给奥地利有经验的跑动能力，帮助中场覆盖边路空间并后插上。

Alexander Prass.name: Alexander Prass
Alexander Prass.summary: Alexander Prass (born 26 May 2001) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder or left wing-back for Bundesliga club TSG Hoffenheim and the Austria national team.
Alexander Prass.note: Prass gives Austria left-sided thrust, carrying forward and supplying early service from wide areas.
Alexander Prass.noteZh: 普拉斯给奥地利左侧推进力，能向前带球并从边路早早送出传中。

Alexander Schlager.name: Alexander Schlager
Alexander Schlager.summary: Alexander Schlager (born 1 February 1996) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Austrian Bundesliga club Red Bull Salzburg and the Austria national team.
Alexander Schlager.note: Schlager gives Austria an experienced goalkeeper option, steady when pressure arrives through crosses.
Alexander Schlager.noteZh: 施拉格给奥地利有经验的门将选择，当压力来自传中时很稳定。

Alexis Mac Allister.name: Alexis Mac Allister
Alexis Mac Allister.summary: Alexis Mac Allister (Spanish pronunciation: [a'leksis ma'kalisteɾ]; born 24 December 1998) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Liverpool and the Argentina national team.
Alexis Mac Allister.note: Mac Allister gives Argentina calm progression, receiving under pressure and turning midfield control into cleaner final-third entries.
Alexis Mac Allister.noteZh: 麦卡利斯特给阿根廷冷静推进，能在压力下接球，并把中场控制转成更清晰的前场进入。

Arthur Masuaku.name: Arthur Masuaku
Arthur Masuaku.summary: Fuka-Arthur Masuaku Kawela (born 7 November 1993) is a professional footballer who plays as a left-back or centre-back for Ligue 1 club Lens, on loan from Premier League club Sunderland. Born in France, he plays for the DR Congo national team.
Arthur Masuaku.note: Masuaku gives DR Congo left-side delivery and carrying, a route to move attacks up the flank.
Arthur Masuaku.noteZh: 马苏亚库给刚果民主共和国左路传递和带球，是沿边路推进进攻的一条路线。

Axel Tuanzebe.name: Axel Tuanzebe
Axel Tuanzebe.summary: Axel Tuanzebe (born 14 November 1997) is a Congolese professional footballer who plays as a defender for EFL Championship club Burnley and the DR Congo national team.
Axel Tuanzebe.note: Tuanzebe adds defensive recovery speed, useful when DR Congo's back line has to defend transition space.
Axel Tuanzebe.noteZh: 图安泽贝增加防守回追速度，当刚果民主共和国防线需要防守转换空间时很有用。

Brian Cipenga.name: Brian Cipenga
Brian Cipenga.summary: Brian Kibambe Cipenga (born 11 March 1998) is a Congolese footballer who plays as a left winger for Spanish club CD Castellón and the DR Congo national team.
Brian Cipenga.note: Cipenga gives DR Congo another wide runner, useful for quick breaks before the opponent's block settles.
Brian Cipenga.noteZh: 奇彭加给刚果民主共和国另一名边路跑手，适合在对手阵型站稳前快速反击。

Carney Chukwuemeka.name: Carney Chukwuemeka
Carney Chukwuemeka.summary: Carney Chibueze Chukwuemeka (; born 20 October 2003) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or left winger for Bundesliga club Borussia Dortmund and the Austria national team.
Carney Chukwuemeka.note: Chukwuemeka adds carrying power through midfield, useful when Austria need to break pressure by dribbling.
Carney Chukwuemeka.noteZh: 丘库埃梅卡增加中场带球力量，当奥地利需要用盘带破压时很有用。

Cedric Bakambu.name: Cedric Bakambu
Cedric Bakambu.summary: Cédric Bakambu (born 11 April 1991) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward or a winger for La Liga club Real Betis and the DR Congo national team.
Cedric Bakambu.note: Bakambu remains DR Congo's direct scoring threat, attacking space behind and finishing early chances.
Cedric Bakambu.noteZh: 巴坎布仍是刚果民主共和国直接得分威胁，能攻击身后空间并终结早期机会。

Chancel Mbemba.name: Chancel Mbemba
Chancel Mbemba.summary: Chancel Mangulu Mbemba (born 8 August 1994) is a Congolese professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Ligue 1 club Lille and the DR Congo national team, of which he is the captain.
Chancel Mbemba.note: Mbemba gives DR Congo defensive authority, winning aerial duels and organising tense phases.
Chancel Mbemba.noteZh: 姆本巴给刚果民主共和国防守权威，能赢下空中对抗并组织紧张阶段。

Charles Pickel.name: Charles Pickel
Charles Pickel.summary: Charles Monginda Pickel (born 15 May 1997) is a professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for La Liga club Espanyol. Born in Switzerland, he plays for the DR Congo national team.
Charles Pickel.note: Pickel gives DR Congo a midfield shield, breaking attacks and moving the first pass forward.
Charles Pickel.noteZh: 皮克尔给刚果民主共和国中场屏障，能破坏进攻并把第一脚传球向前送。

Cristian Romero.name: Cristian Romero
Cristian Romero.summary: Cristian Gabriel Romero (born 27 April 1998) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Premier League club Tottenham Hotspur, whom he captains, and the Argentina national team.
Cristian Romero.note: Romero is Argentina's front-foot centre-back, stepping into duels early and setting the defensive tone.
Cristian Romero.noteZh: 罗梅罗是阿根廷主动上抢型中卫，会提前进入对抗，并定下防线强度。

Damian Emiliano Martinez.name: Damian Emiliano Martinez
Damian Emiliano Martinez.summary: Damián Emiliano Martínez Romero (born 2 September 1992), also known as Dibu Martínez, is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Premier League club Aston Villa and the Argentina national team.
Damian Emiliano Martinez.note: Martínez gives Argentina elite tournament goalkeeping, especially when one save or penalty read can swing the tie.
Damian Emiliano Martinez.noteZh: 马丁内斯给阿根廷顶级杯赛门将能力，尤其当一次扑救或点球判断能改变比赛时。

David Affengruber.name: David Affengruber
David Affengruber.summary: David Leopold Affengruber (born 19 March 2001) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for La Liga club Elche and the Austria national team.
David Affengruber.note: Affengruber gives Austria centre-back depth, especially useful for aerial spells and low-box defending.
David Affengruber.noteZh: 阿芬格鲁伯给奥地利中卫深度，尤其适合空中球阶段和低位禁区防守。

Dejan Ljubicic.name: Dejan Ljubicic
Dejan Ljubicic.summary: Dejan Ljubičić (born 8 October 1997) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Bundesliga club Schalke 04 and the Austria national team.
Dejan Ljubicic.note: Ljubičić gives Austria flexible midfield legs, useful for pressing and covering the right channel.
Dejan Ljubicic.noteZh: 柳比契奇给奥地利灵活的中场跑动，适合压迫并覆盖右侧通道。

Dylan Batubinsika.name: Dylan Batubinsika
Dylan Batubinsika.summary: Buduka Dylan Batubinsika (born 15 February 1996) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Super League Greece club AEL. Born in France, he plays for the DR Congo national team.
Dylan Batubinsika.note: Batubinsika adds centre-back strength, useful when DR Congo need to absorb crosses and clear the box.
Dylan Batubinsika.noteZh: 巴图宾西卡增加中卫强度，当刚果民主共和国需要承受传中并清理禁区时很有用。

Edo Kayembe.name: Edo Kayembe
Edo Kayembe.summary: Edouard Kayembe (born 3 June 1998) is a Congolese professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for EFL Championship club Watford and the DR Congo national team.
Edo Kayembe.note: Kayembe gives DR Congo midfield running, covering pressure and helping the ball escape left.
Edo Kayembe.noteZh: 卡延贝给刚果民主共和国中场跑动，能覆盖压力并帮助皮球从左侧脱身。

Exequiel Palacios.name: Exequiel Palacios
Exequiel Palacios.summary: Exequiel Alejandro Palacios (Spanish pronunciation: [ekseˈkjel paˈla.sjos]; born 5 October 1998) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Bundesliga club Bayer Leverkusen and the Argentina national team.
Exequiel Palacios.note: Palacios gives Argentina a tidy midfield connector, valuable when possession needs patience and protection.
Exequiel Palacios.noteZh: 帕拉西奥斯给阿根廷细腻的中场连接，当控球需要耐心和保护时很有价值。

Facundo Medina.name: Facundo Medina
Facundo Medina.summary: Facundo Axel Medina (born 28 May 1999) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or left-back for Ligue 1 club Marseille, on loan from Lens, and the Argentina national team.
Facundo Medina.note: Medina offers left-footed defensive cover, useful when Argentina need both back-line aggression and clean exits.
Facundo Medina.noteZh: 梅迪纳提供左脚防守保护，当阿根廷需要防线侵略性和干净出球时很有用。

Fiston Mayele.name: Fiston Mayele
Fiston Mayele.summary: Mayele Fiston Kalala (born 24 June 1994), commonly known as Fiston Mayele, is a Congolese professional footballer who plays as a forward for Egyptian Premier League club Pyramids FC and the DR Congo national team.
Fiston Mayele.note: Mayele gives DR Congo a penalty-box poacher, alive to loose balls and quick service.
Fiston Mayele.noteZh: 马耶莱给刚果民主共和国禁区抢点能力，对松散球和快速传球很敏锐。

Florian Grillitsch.name: Florian Grillitsch
Florian Grillitsch.summary: Florian Grillitsch (born 7 August 1995) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder or centre back for Portuguese Primeira Liga club Braga and the Austria national team.
Florian Grillitsch.note: Grillitsch gives Austria a deeper passing base, slowing the game down and protecting the center.
Florian Grillitsch.noteZh: 格里利奇给奥地利更靠后的传球基础，能放慢比赛并保护中路。

Florian Wiegele.name: Florian Wiegele
Florian Wiegele.summary: Florian Wiegele (born 21 March 2001) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Czech First League club Viktoria Plzeň and the Austria national team.
Florian Wiegele.note: Wiegele gives Austria extra goalkeeper depth, useful insurance behind the senior options.
Florian Wiegele.noteZh: 维格勒给奥地利额外门将深度，是主力门将身后的有用保障。

Gael Kakuta.name: Gael Kakuta
Gael Kakuta.summary: Gaël Romeo Kakuta Mambenga (born 21 June 1991) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger for Greek Super League club AEL. Born in France, he represents the DR Congo national team.
Gael Kakuta.note: Kakuta gives DR Congo left-footed imagination, especially when a final pass has to break a compact block.
Gael Kakuta.noteZh: 卡库塔给刚果民主共和国左脚想象力，尤其当最后一传需要打破密集防线时。

Gedeon Kalulu.name: Gedeon Kalulu
Gedeon Kalulu.summary: Gédéon Tshingoma Kalulu Kyatengwa (born 29 August 1997) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Cypriot club Aris Limassol. Born in France, he plays for the DR Congo national team.
Gedeon Kalulu.note: Kalulu gives DR Congo right-side speed, overlapping when space opens and recovering quickly.
Gedeon Kalulu.noteZh: 卡卢卢给刚果民主共和国右路速度，能在空间打开时套上，也能快速回追。

Geronimo Rulli.name: Geronimo Rulli
Geronimo Rulli.summary: Gerónimo Rulli (Spanish pronunciation: [xeˈɾonimo ˈruli]; born 20 May 1992) is an Argentine footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Ligue 1 club Marseille and the Argentina national team.
Geronimo Rulli.note: Rulli gives Argentina experienced goalkeeper depth, comfortable managing spells when the back line has the ball.
Geronimo Rulli.noteZh: 鲁利给阿根廷有经验的门将深度，能在后场控球阶段稳住节奏。

Giovani Lo Celso.name: Giovani Lo Celso
Giovani Lo Celso.summary: Giovani Lo Celso (born 9 April 1996) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for La Liga club Real Betis and the Argentina national team.
Giovani Lo Celso.note: Lo Celso adds left-footed invention, finding pockets where Argentina can turn possession into a chance.
Giovani Lo Celso.noteZh: 洛塞尔索增加左脚创造力，能找到阿根廷把控球转成机会的空当。

Giuliano Simeone.name: Giuliano Simeone
Giuliano Simeone.summary: Giuliano Simeone Baldini (born 18 December 2002) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a winger for La Liga club Atlético Madrid and the Argentina national team.
Giuliano Simeone.note: Simeone brings front-line intensity, attacking channels and keeping defenders hurried without the ball.
Giuliano Simeone.noteZh: 小西蒙尼带来锋线强度，冲击通道，并在无球时持续逼迫防守者。

Gonzalo Montiel.name: Gonzalo Montiel
Gonzalo Montiel.summary: Gonzalo Ariel Montiel (born 1 January 1997) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as right-back for the Argentine Primera División club River Plate and the Argentina national team.
Gonzalo Montiel.note: Montiel gives Argentina a battle-tested right-back who can defend the far post and handle late pressure.
Gonzalo Montiel.noteZh: 蒙铁尔给阿根廷经过考验的右后卫，能保护后点，也能处理末段压力。

Joris Kayembe.name: Joris Kayembe
Joris Kayembe.summary: Joris Kayembe Ditu (born 8 August 1994) is a professional footballer who as a winger plays for Belgian Pro League club Genk. Born in Belgium and formerly a Belgium international in a pair of friendly matches, he plays for the DR Congo national team.
Joris Kayembe.note: Kayembe gives DR Congo width from full-back, pushing attacks up the left without losing recovery speed.
Joris Kayembe.noteZh: 约里斯·卡延贝给刚果民主共和国边后卫宽度，能从左路推进进攻且不丢回追速度。

Jose Manuel Lopez.name: Jose Manuel Lopez
Jose Manuel Lopez.summary: José Manuel Alberto López (born 6 December 2000), commonly known as Flaco López, is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a striker for Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club Palmeiras and the Argentina national team.
Jose Manuel Lopez.note: López gives Argentina a taller penalty-area option when crosses and direct service become the route.
Jose Manuel Lopez.noteZh: 洛佩斯给阿根廷更高的禁区选择，当传中和直接输送成为路线时很有用。

Juan Musso.name: Juan Musso
Juan Musso.summary: Juan Agustín Musso (born 6 May 1994) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for La Liga club Atlético Madrid and the Argentina national team.
Juan Musso.note: Musso adds experienced goalkeeper cover, steady for games that ask for crosses and set-piece command.
Juan Musso.noteZh: 穆索增加有经验的门将保障，适合需要处理传中和定位球指挥的比赛。

Kevin Danso.name: Kevin Danso
Kevin Danso.summary: Kevin Danso (born 19 September 1998) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Premier League club Tottenham Hotspur and the Austria national team.
Kevin Danso.note: Danso gives Austria pace and strength at centre-back, important when the line has to defend space.
Kevin Danso.noteZh: 丹索给奥地利中卫位置的速度和力量，当防线需要防守空间时很重要。

Lautaro Martinez.name: Lautaro Martinez
Lautaro Martinez.summary: Lautaro Javier Martínez (born 22 August 1997) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a centre-forward for Serie A club Inter Milan, which he captains, and the Argentina national team.
Lautaro Martinez.note: Lautaro is Argentina's penalty-box striker, sharp at attacking the first gap before defenders settle.
Lautaro Martinez.noteZh: 劳塔罗是阿根廷禁区前锋，擅长在防守者站稳前攻击第一道空隙。

Leandro Paredes.name: Leandro Paredes
Leandro Paredes.summary: Leandro Daniel Paredes (Spanish pronunciation: [leˈandɾo paˈɾeðes]; born 29 June 1994) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Argentine Primera División club Boca Juniors and the Argentina national team.
Leandro Paredes.note: Paredes gives Argentina a deep passing hub, useful for slowing chaos and changing the point of attack.
Leandro Paredes.noteZh: 帕雷德斯给阿根廷后腰传球枢纽，适合放慢混乱节奏并转移进攻方向。

Lionel Mpasi.name: Lionel Mpasi
Lionel Mpasi.summary: Lionnel Mpasi Nzau (born 1 August 1994) is a professional footballer who plays as goalkeeper for Ligue 1 club Le Havre. Born in France, he plays for the DR Congo national team.
Lionel Mpasi.note: Mpasi gives DR Congo a commanding goalkeeper presence, important when games become set-piece heavy.
Lionel Mpasi.noteZh: 姆帕西给刚果民主共和国有指挥力的门将存在感，当比赛充满定位球时很重要。

Lisandro Martinez.name: Lisandro Martinez
Lisandro Martinez.summary: Lisandro Martínez (born 18 January 1998) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Premier League club Manchester United and the Argentina national team. Nicknamed "The Butcher", he is known for his aggressive style of play.
Lisandro Martinez.note: Lisandro gives Argentina bite and passing from the left side of defense, helping the back line play forward.
Lisandro Martinez.noteZh: 利桑德罗给阿根廷左侧防线带来硬度和传球，帮助后场向前组织。

Marco Friedl.name: Marco Friedl
Marco Friedl.summary: Marco Friedl (born 16 March 1998) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Bundesliga club Werder Bremen, which he captains, and the Austria national team.
Marco Friedl.note: Friedl gives Austria left-sided defensive cover, helping the back line stay balanced in buildup.
Marco Friedl.noteZh: 弗里德尔给奥地利左侧防守保护，帮助后防在组织时保持平衡。

Marcos Senesi.name: Marcos Senesi
Marcos Senesi.summary: Marcos Nicolás Senesi Barón (born 10 May 1997) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Premier League club Bournemouth and the Argentina national team. He will join Tottenham Hotspur on 1 July 2026.
Marcos Senesi.note: Senesi gives Argentina another left-sided centre-back option, steady when the game asks for controlled buildup.
Marcos Senesi.noteZh: 塞内西给阿根廷另一个左侧中卫选择，当比赛需要有控制的组织时很稳定。

Matthieu Epolo.name: Matthieu Epolo
Matthieu Epolo.summary: Matthieu Epolo Luka (born 15 January 2005) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Belgian Pro League club Standard Liège. Born in Belgium, he plays for the DR Congo national team.
Matthieu Epolo.note: Epolo gives DR Congo young goalkeeper depth, useful insurance for reactive saves and distribution.
Matthieu Epolo.noteZh: 埃波洛给刚果民主共和国年轻门将深度，是反应扑救和出球方面的有用保障。

Meschack Elia.name: Meschack Elia
Meschack Elia.summary: Meschak Elia Lina (born 6 August 1997) is a Congolese professional footballer who plays as a forward for Süper Lig club Alanyaspor and the DR Congo national team.
Meschack Elia.note: Elia gives DR Congo burst speed, stretching defenders and making counters feel immediate.
Meschack Elia.noteZh: 埃利亚给刚果民主共和国爆发速度，能拉开防守者并让反击马上形成威胁。

Michael Gregoritsch.name: Michael Gregoritsch
Michael Gregoritsch.summary: Michael Gregoritsch (born 18 April 1994) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Bundesliga club FC Augsburg, and the Austria national team.
Michael Gregoritsch.note: Gregoritsch gives Austria a taller forward route, dangerous when crosses and second balls matter.
Michael Gregoritsch.noteZh: 格雷戈里奇给奥地利更高的锋线路线，当传中和第二落点重要时很危险。

Michael Svoboda.name: Michael Svoboda
Michael Svoboda.summary: Michael Svoboda (born 15 October 1998) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Serie A club Venezia and the Austria national team.
Michael Svoboda.note: Svoboda gives Austria a straightforward defensive option, useful for protecting leads and clearing pressure.
Michael Svoboda.noteZh: 斯沃博达给奥地利直接的防守选择，适合保护领先并化解压力。

Nahuel Molina.name: Nahuel Molina
Nahuel Molina.summary: Nahuel Molina Lucero (born 6 April 1998) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a right-back for La Liga club Atlético Madrid and the Argentina national team.
Nahuel Molina.note: Molina stretches Argentina's right side, timing overlaps while still recovering into the defensive line.
Nahuel Molina.noteZh: 莫利纳拉开阿根廷右路，能掌握套上时机，也能回到防线位置。

Nathanael Mbuku.name: Nathanael Mbuku
Nathanael Mbuku.summary: Nathanaël Mbuku Wa Mbuku (born 16 March 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Ligue 2 club Montpellier, on loan from Bundesliga club Augsburg. Born in France, he plays for the DR Congo national team.
Nathanael Mbuku.note: Mbuku adds wide invention, able to cut inside and turn a quiet possession into a shot.
Nathanael Mbuku.noteZh: 姆布库增加边路创造，能内切并把平静控球转成射门。

Ngalayel Mukau.name: Ngalayel Mukau
Ngalayel Mukau.summary: Ngal'ayel Mukau (born 3 November 2004) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Ligue 1 club Lille. Born in Belgium, he plays for the DR Congo national team.
Ngalayel Mukau.note: Mukau gives DR Congo midfield bite, useful for winning duels and keeping the next pass simple.
Ngalayel Mukau.noteZh: 穆考给刚果民主共和国中场硬度，适合赢下对抗并把下一脚处理简单化。

Nico Gonzalez.name: Nico Gonzalez
Nico Gonzalez.summary: Nicolás Iván González (Spanish pronunciation: [nikoˈlas iˈβaŋ ɡonˈsales]; born 6 April 1998) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a winger for La Liga club Atlético Madrid, on loan from Serie A club Juventus, and the Argentina national team.
Nico Gonzalez.note: González gives Argentina vertical wing energy, attacking the back post and working hard without the ball.
Nico Gonzalez.noteZh: 尼科·冈萨雷斯给阿根廷纵向边路活力，能攻击后点，也能无球勤奋压迫。

Nico Paz.name: Nico Paz
Nico Paz.summary: Nicolás Paz Martínez (born 8 September 2004) is a professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Serie A club Como. Born in Spain, he plays for the Argentina national team.
Nico Paz.note: Paz gives Argentina a younger creative option, comfortable receiving between lines and playing forward quickly.
Nico Paz.noteZh: 尼科·帕斯给阿根廷年轻创造力，能在两线之间接球并快速向前处理。

Nicolas Otamendi.name: Nicolas Otamendi
Nicolas Otamendi.summary: Nicolás Hernán Gonzalo Otamendi (born 12 February 1988) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Primeira Liga club Benfica, which he captains, and the Argentina national team.
Nicolas Otamendi.note: Otamendi gives Argentina veteran defensive authority, especially in aerial spells and tense late phases.
Nicolas Otamendi.noteZh: 奥塔门迪给阿根廷老将防守权威，尤其在空中球阶段和紧张末段很重要。

Nicolas Seiwald.name: Nicolas Seiwald
Nicolas Seiwald.summary: Nicolas Seiwald (born 4 May 2001) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Bundesliga club RB Leipzig and the Austria national team.
Nicolas Seiwald.note: Seiwald gives Austria midfield structure, keeping the press connected and the ball moving.
Nicolas Seiwald.noteZh: 塞瓦尔德给奥地利中场结构，能保持压迫衔接并让球运转。

Nicolas Tagliafico.name: Nicolas Tagliafico
Nicolas Tagliafico.summary: Nicolás Alejandro Tagliafico (born 31 August 1992) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Ligue 1 club Lyon and the Argentina national team.
Nicolas Tagliafico.note: Tagliafico gives Argentina a reliable left-back base, defending narrow and arriving when the far side opens.
Nicolas Tagliafico.noteZh: 塔利亚菲科给阿根廷可靠的左后卫基础，能内收防守，也能在远侧打开时前插。

Patrick Pentz.name: Patrick Pentz
Patrick Pentz.summary: Patrick Pentz (born 2 January 1997) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Danish Superliga club Brøndby and the Austria national team.
Patrick Pentz.note: Pentz gives Austria sharp shot-stopping and quick restarts when the team wants to spring forward.
Patrick Pentz.noteZh: 彭茨给奥地利敏捷扑救和快速开球，当球队想迅速向前时很有用。

Patrick Wimmer.name: Patrick Wimmer
Patrick Wimmer.summary: Patrick Wimmer (born 30 May 2001) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a right winger for Bundesliga club Hoffenheim and the Austria national team.
Patrick Wimmer.note: Wimmer gives Austria a direct wide runner, useful for pressing full-backs and driving to the byline.
Patrick Wimmer.noteZh: 维默给奥地利直接边路跑动，适合压迫边后卫并冲到底线。

Paul Wanner.name: Paul Wanner
Paul Wanner.summary: Paul Wanner (German pronunciation: [paʊ̯l ˈvanɐ]; born 23 December 2005) is a professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Eredivisie club PSV.
Paul Wanner.note: Wanner adds young creativity between the lines, giving Austria a softer touch against compact blocks.
Paul Wanner.noteZh: 万纳增加两线之间的年轻创造力，让奥地利面对密集防守时多一份细腻触球。

Philipp Lienhart.name: Philipp Lienhart
Philipp Lienhart.summary: Philipp Lienhart (born 11 July 1996) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Bundesliga club SC Freiburg and the Austria national team.
Philipp Lienhart.note: Lienhart gives Austria reliable centre-back timing, steady in aerial duels and first passes.
Philipp Lienhart.noteZh: 林哈特给奥地利可靠的中卫时机，空中对抗和第一脚传球都很稳定。

Phillip Mwene.name: Phillip Mwene
Phillip Mwene.summary: Phillipp Mwene (born 29 January 1994) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a full-back for Bundesliga club Mainz 05 and the Austria national team.
Phillip Mwene.note: Mwene gives Austria full-back flexibility, switching sides and keeping the outside lanes secure.
Phillip Mwene.noteZh: 姆韦内给奥地利边后卫灵活性，能换边并保证外侧通道安全。

Rodrigo De Paul.name: Rodrigo De Paul
Rodrigo De Paul.summary: Rodrigo Javier De Paul (Spanish pronunciation: [roˈðɾiɣo ðe pol]; born 24 May 1994) is an Argentine professional football player who plays as a midfielder for Major League Soccer club Inter Miami and the Argentina national team.
Rodrigo De Paul.note: De Paul gives Argentina the running power around Messi, covering ground and keeping attacks connected.
Rodrigo De Paul.noteZh: 德保罗给阿根廷围绕梅西的奔跑能力，覆盖空间并保持进攻衔接。

Samuel Moutoussamy.name: Samuel Moutoussamy
Samuel Moutoussamy.summary: Samuel Albert Alain Arcade Moutoussamy (born 12 August 1996) is a professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Greek Super League club Atromitos. Born in France, he plays for the DR Congo national team.
Samuel Moutoussamy.note: Moutoussamy gives DR Congo midfield coverage, helping connect defensive work to the first forward pass.
Samuel Moutoussamy.noteZh: 穆图萨米给刚果民主共和国中场覆盖，帮助把防守工作衔接到第一脚向前传球。

Simon Banza.name: Simon Banza
Simon Banza.summary: Simon Bokoté Banza (born 13 August 1996) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for UAE Pro League side Al Jazira. Born in France, he plays for the DR Congo national team.
Simon Banza.note: Banza gives DR Congo a strong box target, useful when crosses and early service become the plan.
Simon Banza.noteZh: 班扎给刚果民主共和国强力禁区目标，当传中和早传成为计划时很有用。

Stefan Posch.name: Stefan Posch
Stefan Posch.summary: Stefan Posch (German pronunciation: [ˈʃtɛfa (ː)n ˈpɔʃ]; born 14 May 1997) is an Austrian footballer who plays as a right-back or centre-back for Bundesliga club Mainz 05, on loan from Serie A club Como, and the Austria national team.
Stefan Posch.note: Posch gives Austria defensive versatility on the right, able to tuck inside and protect the box.
Stefan Posch.noteZh: 波施给奥地利右侧防守多面性，能内收并保护禁区。

Steve Kapuadi.name: Steve Kapuadi
Steve Kapuadi.summary: Steve Nkanu Kapuadi (born 30 April 1998) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Polish club Widzew Łódź. Born in France, he represents the DR Congo national team.
Steve Kapuadi.note: Kapuadi gives DR Congo extra reach in defense, valuable against crosses and direct balls.
Steve Kapuadi.noteZh: 卡普阿迪给刚果民主共和国防线额外覆盖范围，面对传中和直接球很有价值。

Theo Bongonda.name: Theo Bongonda
Theo Bongonda.summary: Théo Bongonda Mbul'Ofeko Batombo (born 20 November 1995) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger. Born in Belgium, he plays for the DR Congo national team.
Theo Bongonda.note: Bongonda gives DR Congo a true winger's threat, beating defenders wide and looking for cutbacks.
Theo Bongonda.noteZh: 邦贡达给刚果民主共和国真正的边锋威胁，能从外线过人并寻找倒三角。

Thiago Almada.name: Thiago Almada
Thiago Almada.summary: Thiago Ezequiel Almada (born 26 April 2001) is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or winger for La Liga club Atlético Madrid and the Argentina national team.
Thiago Almada.note: Almada adds another creative spark, dangerous when Argentina need a sharper pass or set-piece delivery.
Thiago Almada.noteZh: 阿尔马达增加另一处创造火花，当阿根廷需要更锋利的传球或定位球输送时很危险。

Timothy Fayulu.name: Timothy Fayulu
Timothy Fayulu.summary: Timothy Bruce Fayulu (born 24 July 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Armenian Premier League club FC Noah on loan from Sion. Born in Switzerland, he plays for the DR Congo national team.
Timothy Fayulu.note: Fayulu gives DR Congo another goalkeeper option, useful for depth and training-ground competition.
Timothy Fayulu.noteZh: 法尤卢给刚果民主共和国另一个门将选择，适合阵容深度和队内竞争。

Valentin Barco.name: Valentin Barco
Valentin Barco.summary: Valentín Barco (born 23 July 2004), better known as Colo Barco, is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Ligue 1 club Strasbourg and the Argentina national team.
Valentin Barco.note: Barco gives Argentina left-sided invention, carrying from deep and changing the angle of attacks.
Valentin Barco.noteZh: 巴尔科给阿根廷左侧创造力，能从后场带球，并改变进攻角度。

Xaver Schlager.name: Xaver Schlager
Xaver Schlager.summary: Xaver Schlager (German pronunciation: [ˈksaːvɐ ˈʃlaːɡɐ]; born 28 September 1997) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Bundesliga club RB Leipzig and the Austria national team.
Xaver Schlager.note: Schlager gives Austria midfield bite, hunting second balls and keeping pressure on the opponent's first pass.
Xaver Schlager.noteZh: 施拉格给奥地利中场硬度，争抢第二落点并持续压迫对手第一脚传球。

Sasa Kalajdzic.name: Sasa Kalajdzic
Sasa Kalajdzic.summary: Saša Kalajdžić (Serbian Cyrillic: Саша Калајџић; born 7 July 1997) is an Austrian professional footballer who plays as a striker for Austrian Bundesliga club LASK on loan from EFL Championship club Wolverhampton Wanderers and the Austria national team.
Sasa Kalajdzic.note: Kalajdžić gives Austria a true aerial target, changing the attack when direct balls become necessary.
Sasa Kalajdzic.noteZh: 卡拉季奇给奥地利真正的空中支点，当必须打直接球时能改变进攻形态。

Abdulla Abdullaev.name: Abdulla Abdullaev
Abdulla Abdullaev.summary: Abdulla Abdullaev (Uzbek: Abdulla Qahramonjon oʻgʻli Abdullayev, Абдулла Қаҳрамонжон ўғли Абдуллаев; born 1 September 1997) is an Uzbek professional footballer who plays for Dibba and the Uzbekistan national team.
Abdulla Abdullaev.note: Abdullaev gives Uzbekistan a midfield shield, useful for second balls and simple exits.
Abdulla Abdullaev.noteZh: 阿卜杜拉耶夫给乌兹别克斯坦中场屏障，适合第二落点和简单出球。

Achref Abada.name: Achref Abada
Achref Abada.summary: Achref Abada (Arabic: أشرف عبادة; born 15 June 1999) is an Algerian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Algerian Ligue Professionnelle 1 club USM Alger and the Algeria national team.
Achref Abada.note: Abada gives Algeria another goalkeeper option, useful depth for shot-stopping and managing crowded boxes.
Achref Abada.noteZh: 阿巴达给阿尔及利亚另一个门将选择，是扑救和处理拥挤禁区的有用深度。

Adil Boulbina.name: Adil Boulbina
Adil Boulbina.summary: Adil Boulbina (Arabic: عادل بولبينة; born May 2, 2003) is an Algerian professional footballer who plays as forward for Al-Duhail and the Algeria national team.
Adil Boulbina.note: Boulbina adds a young wide threat, useful when Algeria need direct carries and quick shots.
Adil Boulbina.noteZh: 布尔比纳增加年轻边路威胁，当阿尔及利亚需要直接带球和快速射门时很有用。

Aissa Mandi.name: Aissa Mandi
Aissa Mandi.summary: Aïssa Mandi (Arabic: عيسى ماندي; born 22 October 1991) is a professional footballer who plays for Ligue 1 club Lille. Born in France, he plays for the Algeria national team.
Aissa Mandi.note: Mandi gives Algeria veteran defensive balance, steady in aerial duels and first passes from the back.
Aissa Mandi.noteZh: 曼迪给阿尔及利亚老练防守平衡，空中对抗和后场第一脚传球都很稳定。

Akmal Mozgovoy.name: Akmal Mozgovoy
Akmal Mozgovoy.summary: Akmal Vladimirovich Mozgovoy (Uzbek: Akmal Mozgovoy; born 2 April 1999) is an Uzbek professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Pakhtakor and the Uzbekistan national team.
Akmal Mozgovoy.note: Mozgovoy gives Uzbekistan midfield balance, covering runners and keeping possession moving.
Akmal Mozgovoy.noteZh: 莫兹戈沃伊给乌兹别克斯坦中场平衡，能覆盖跑动并保持控球运转。

Alvaro Montero.name: Alvaro Montero
Alvaro Montero.summary: Álvaro David Montero Perales (born 29 March 1995) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Argentine Primera División club Vélez Sarsfield, on loan from Categoría Primera A club Millonarios and the Colombia national team.
Alvaro Montero.note: Montero gives Colombia a tall goalkeeper profile, useful when crosses and set pieces pile up.
Alvaro Montero.noteZh: 蒙特罗给哥伦比亚高大门将类型，当传中和定位球增多时很有用。

Andres Gomez.name: Andres Gomez
Andres Gomez.summary: Carlos Andrés Gómez Hinestroza (born 12 September 2002) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a winger or forward for Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club Vasco da Gama and the Colombia national team.
Andres Gomez.note: Gómez gives Colombia another direct wide runner, dangerous when space opens behind full-backs.
Andres Gomez.noteZh: 戈麦斯给哥伦比亚另一名直接边路跑手，当边后卫身后出现空间时很危险。

Anis Hadj Moussa.name: Anis Hadj Moussa
Anis Hadj Moussa.summary: Anis Hadj Moussa (born 11 February 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger for Eredivisie club Feyenoord. Born in France, he represents the Algeria national team.
Anis Hadj Moussa.note: Hadj Moussa gives Algeria a sharp isolation winger, dangerous when he can attack a full-back alone.
Anis Hadj Moussa.noteZh: 哈吉·穆萨给阿尔及利亚犀利的一对一边锋，当他能单挑边后卫时很危险。

Avazbek Ulmasaliyev.name: Avazbek Ulmasaliyev
Avazbek Ulmasaliyev.summary: Avazbek Alisher oʻgʻli Oʻlmasaliyev (born 27 March 2000) is an Uzbekistani professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for AGMK and the Uzbekistan national team.
Avazbek Ulmasaliyev.note: Ulmasaliyev adds defensive flexibility, helping Uzbekistan cover wide spaces and centre-back duels.
Avazbek Ulmasaliyev.noteZh: 乌尔马萨利耶夫增加防守灵活性，帮助乌兹别克斯坦覆盖边路空间和中卫对抗。

Azizbek Amonov.name: Azizbek Amonov
Azizbek Amonov.summary: Azizbek Amonov (Uzbek Cyrillic: Азизбек Аскарович Аманов; born 30 October 1997) is an Uzbek footballer who plays as a midfielder for Buxoro and the Uzbekistan national team.
Azizbek Amonov.note: Amonov gives Uzbekistan wide invention, useful when the attack needs a defender beaten cleanly.
Azizbek Amonov.noteZh: 阿莫诺夫给乌兹别克斯坦边路创造，当进攻需要干净过掉防守者时很有用。

Azizjon Ganiev.name: Azizjon Ganiev
Azizjon Ganiev.summary: Azizjon Ganiev (Uzbek: Azizjon Alijon oʻgʻli Gʻaniyev, Азизжон Алижон ўғли Ғаниев; born 22 February 1998) is an Uzbek footballer who plays as a midfielder for Al Bataeh and the Uzbekistan national team.
Azizjon Ganiev.note: Ganiev gives Uzbekistan passing rhythm, especially from deeper midfield and dead-ball moments.
Azizjon Ganiev.noteZh: 加尼耶夫给乌兹别克斯坦传球节奏，尤其来自后腰位置和定位球时刻。

Behruzjon Karimov.name: Behruzjon Karimov
Behruzjon Karimov.summary: Bekhruzdjon Karimov (Uzbek: Behruzjon Karimov, Беҳрузжон Каримов; born 7 August 2007) is an Uzbekistani professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Uzbekistan Super League club Surkhon, and the Uzbekistan national team.
Behruzjon Karimov.note: Karimov gives Uzbekistan defensive depth, useful for protecting the box and moving the ball simply.
Behruzjon Karimov.noteZh: 卡里莫夫给乌兹别克斯坦防守深度，适合保护禁区并简单转移球。

Bernardo Silva.name: Bernardo Silva
Bernardo Silva.summary: Bernardo Mota Veiga de Carvalho e Silva (Portuguese pronunciation: [bɨɾˈnaɾðu ˈsilvɐ]; born 10 August 1994) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Manchester City and the Portugal national team.
Bernardo Silva.note: Bernardo gives Portugal control on the right and inside, keeping attacks alive with small touches.
Bernardo Silva.noteZh: 贝尔纳多给葡萄牙右路和内线控制，用细小触球让进攻延续。

Botirali Ergashev.name: Botirali Ergashev
Botirali Ergashev.summary: Botirali Ergashev (Uzbek Cyrillic: Ботирали Эргашев; born 23 June 1995) is an Uzbekistani footballer who plays for Neftchi Fergana and Uzbekistan national team.
Botirali Ergashev.note: Ergashev gives Uzbekistan another goalkeeper option, steady cover across a long tournament.
Botirali Ergashev.noteZh: 埃尔加舍夫给乌兹别克斯坦另一个门将选择，是漫长赛事中的稳定保障。

Camilo Vargas.name: Camilo Vargas
Camilo Vargas.summary: Camilo Andrés Vargas Gil (born 9 March 1989) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Liga MX club Atlas and the Colombia national team.
Camilo Vargas.note: Vargas gives Colombia experienced goalkeeping security, especially in tense low-margin spells.
Camilo Vargas.noteZh: 巴尔加斯给哥伦比亚有经验的门将安全感，尤其在紧张的小比分阶段。

Cucho Hernandez.name: Cucho Hernandez
Cucho Hernandez.summary: Juan Camilo Hernández Suárez (born 20 April 1999), known simply as Cucho Hernández, is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a striker or winger for La Liga club Real Betis and the Colombia national team.
Cucho Hernandez.note: Cucho gives Colombia a hard-running finisher, pressing centre-backs and attacking early balls into the box.
Cucho Hernandez.noteZh: 库乔给哥伦比亚勤跑的终结点，能压迫中卫并攻击早传入禁区的球。

David Ospina.name: David Ospina
David Ospina.summary: David Ospina Ramírez (born 31 August 1988) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for the Colombia national team.
David Ospina.note: Ospina gives Colombia veteran tournament calm, valuable when one save has to settle the team.
David Ospina.noteZh: 奥斯皮纳给哥伦比亚老练杯赛冷静，当一次扑救需要稳住全队时很有价值。

Davinson Sanchez.name: Davinson Sanchez
Davinson Sanchez.summary: Davinson Sánchez Mina (born 12 June 1996) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Süper Lig club Galatasaray and the Colombia national team.
Davinson Sanchez.note: Sánchez gives Colombia recovery speed at centre-back, important when the line has to defend space.
Davinson Sanchez.noteZh: 达文森·桑切斯给哥伦比亚中卫回追速度，当防线需要防守空间时很重要。

Deiver Machado.name: Deiver Machado
Deiver Machado.summary: Deiver Andrés Machado Mena (born 2 September 1993) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a left-back or left wing-back for Ligue 2 club Nantes and the Colombia national team.
Deiver Machado.note: Machado gives Colombia left-side width, pushing attacks forward and supplying service from deep.
Deiver Machado.noteZh: 马查多给哥伦比亚左侧宽度，能推动进攻并从后场送出传球。

Diogo Costa.name: Diogo Costa
Diogo Costa.summary: Diogo Meireles da Costa (European Portuguese pronunciation: [diˈoɣu ˈkɔʃtɐ]; born 19 September 1999) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Primeira Liga club Porto, which he captains, and the Portugal national team.
Diogo Costa.note: Diogo Costa gives Portugal modern goalkeeping security, saving shots and starting attacks cleanly.
Diogo Costa.noteZh: 迪奥戈·科斯塔给葡萄牙现代门将安全感，能扑救，也能干净发起进攻。

Diogo Dalot.name: Diogo Dalot
Diogo Dalot.summary: José Diogo Dalot Teixeira (European Portuguese pronunciation: [diˈoɣu ðaˈlo]; born 18 March 1999) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a full-back or a wing-back for Premier League club Manchester United and the Portugal national team.
Diogo Dalot.note: Dalot gives Portugal flexible full-back cover, switching roles without breaking the structure.
Diogo Dalot.noteZh: 达洛特给葡萄牙灵活边后卫保障，能切换角色而不破坏结构。

Dostonbek Khamdamov.name: Dostonbek Khamdamov
Dostonbek Khamdamov.summary: Dostonbek Khamdamov (Uzbek: Dostonbek Xurshid oʻgʻli Xamdamov, Достонбек Хуршид ўғли Хамдамов; born 24 July 1996) is an Uzbek professional footballer who plays as a winger for Pakhtakor and the Uzbekistan national team.
Dostonbek Khamdamov.note: Khamdamov gives Uzbekistan clever wide movement, connecting counters to the final pass.
Dostonbek Khamdamov.noteZh: 哈姆达莫夫给乌兹别克斯坦聪明的边路移动，把反击衔接到最后一传。

Fares Chaibi.name: Fares Chaibi
Fares Chaibi.summary: Farès Chaïbi (Arabic: فارس شايبي; born 28 November 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a winger or attacking midfielder for Bundesliga club Eintracht Frankfurt. Born in France, he plays for the Algeria national team.
Fares Chaibi.note: Chaïbi gives Algeria delivery and invention, especially from set pieces and half-space crosses.
Fares Chaibi.noteZh: 沙伊比给阿尔及利亚传球和创造力，尤其体现在定位球和肋部传中。

Fares Ghedjemis.name: Fares Ghedjemis
Fares Ghedjemis.summary: Farès Ghedjemis (born 6 September 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Serie A club Frosinone. Born in France, he plays for the Algeria national team.
Fares Ghedjemis.note: Ghedjemis adds wide speed, useful when Algeria want to attack before the defense settles.
Fares Ghedjemis.noteZh: 格杰米斯增加边路速度，当阿尔及利亚想在防线站稳前进攻时很有用。

Farrukh Sayfiev.name: Farrukh Sayfiev
Farrukh Sayfiev.summary: Farrukh Sayfiyev (Uzbek: Farrux Sayfiyev, Фаррух Сайфиев; born 17 January 1991) is an Uzbek professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Neftchi Fergana and the Uzbekistan national team.
Farrukh Sayfiev.note: Sayfiev gives Uzbekistan experienced left-side cover, balancing overlaps with defensive recovery.
Farrukh Sayfiev.noteZh: 赛菲耶夫给乌兹别克斯坦有经验的左侧保护，平衡套上和防守回追。

Francisco Conceicao.name: Francisco Conceicao
Francisco Conceicao.summary: Francisco "Chico" Fernandes da Conceição (Portuguese pronunciation: [fɾɐ̃ˈsiʃku kõsɐjˈsɐ̃w̃]; born 14 December 2002) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a right winger for Serie A club Juventus and the Portugal national team.
Francisco Conceicao.note: Conceição gives Portugal a low-center winger, dangerous when he attacks a defender from a standstill.
Francisco Conceicao.noteZh: 孔塞桑给葡萄牙低重心边锋，当他静止起步冲击防守者时很危险。

Francisco Trincao.name: Francisco Trincao
Francisco Trincao.summary: Francisco António Machado Mota de Castro Trincão (European Portuguese: [fɾɐ̃ˈsiʃku tɾĩˈkɐ̃w̃]; born 29 December 1999) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a winger for Primeira Liga club Sporting CP and the Portugal national team.
Francisco Trincao.note: Trincão adds left-footed craft, drifting inside to combine or bend shots from the edge.
Francisco Trincao.noteZh: 特林康增加左脚技术，能内收配合或在禁区边缘兜射。

Goncalo Guedes.name: Goncalo Guedes
Goncalo Guedes.summary: Gonçalo Manuel Ganchinho Guedes (European Portuguese: [ɡõˈsalu ˈɣɛðɨʃ]; born 29 November 1996) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a winger or forward for La Liga club Real Sociedad and the Portugal national team.
Goncalo Guedes.note: Guedes gives Portugal direct attacking speed, useful when the game needs a quick route to goal.
Goncalo Guedes.noteZh: 格德斯给葡萄牙直接进攻速度，当比赛需要快速通向球门的路线时很有用。

Goncalo Inacio.name: Goncalo Inacio
Goncalo Inacio.summary: Gonçalo Bernardo Inácio (Portuguese pronunciation: [ɡõˈsalu iˈnasju]; born 25 August 2001) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Primeira Liga club Sporting CP and the Portugal national team.
Goncalo Inacio.note: Inácio gives Portugal left-footed build-up quality, opening angles from the back line.
Goncalo Inacio.noteZh: 伊纳西奥给葡萄牙左脚后场组织质量，能从防线打开角度。

Goncalo Ramos.name: Goncalo Ramos
Goncalo Ramos.summary: Gonçalo Matias Ramos (Portuguese pronunciation: [ɡõˈsalu ˈʁɐmuʃ]; born 20 June 2001) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a striker for Ligue 1 club Paris Saint-Germain and the Portugal national team.
Goncalo Ramos.note: Ramos gives Portugal a mobile striker, pressing high and attacking first-time service in the box.
Goncalo Ramos.noteZh: 拉莫斯给葡萄牙机动中锋，能高位压迫并攻击禁区内第一时间传球。

Gustavo Puerta.name: Gustavo Puerta
Gustavo Puerta.summary: Gustavo Adolfo Puerta Molano (born 23 July 2003) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Segunda División club Racing de Santander and the Colombia national team.
Gustavo Puerta.note: Puerta gives Colombia midfield composure, helping possession survive pressure and move forward.
Gustavo Puerta.noteZh: 普埃尔塔给哥伦比亚中场冷静，帮助控球承受压力并向前推进。

Hicham Boudaoui.name: Hicham Boudaoui
Hicham Boudaoui.summary: Hicham Boudaoui (Arabic: هشام بوداوي; born 23 September 1999) is an Algerian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Ligue 1 club Nice and the Algeria national team.
Hicham Boudaoui.note: Boudaoui gives Algeria midfield mobility, carrying through pressure and covering loose second balls.
Hicham Boudaoui.noteZh: 布道维给阿尔及利亚中场机动性，能带球穿过压力并覆盖松散第二落点。

Ibrahim Maza.name: Ibrahim Maza
Ibrahim Maza.summary: Ibrahim Maza (Arabic: إبراهيم مازة; born 24 November 2005) is a professional footballer who plays as a Attacking Midfielder for Bundesliga club Bayer Leverkusen. Born in Germany, he plays for the Algeria national team.
Ibrahim Maza.note: Maza adds young central creativity, useful against compact blocks that require quick touches.
Ibrahim Maza.noteZh: 马扎增加年轻中路创造力，适合面对需要快速触球破解的密集防守。

Igor Sergeev.name: Igor Sergeev
Igor Sergeev.summary: Igor Vladimirovich Sergeev (Russian: Игорь Владимирович Сергеев; born 30 April 1993) is an Uzbek professional footballer who plays as a forward for Persepolis in the Persian Gulf Pro League and the Uzbekistan national team.
Igor Sergeev.note: Sergeev gives Uzbekistan a second central-forward route, useful when direct service is needed.
Igor Sergeev.noteZh: 谢尔盖耶夫给乌兹别克斯坦第二条中锋路线，当需要直接输送时很有用。

Jakhongir Urozov.name: Jakhongir Urozov
Jakhongir Urozov.summary: Jahongir Oʻrozov (Uzbek Cyrillic: Жаҳонгир Ўрозов; born 18 January 2004) is an Uzbek professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Dinamo Samarqand and the Uzbekistan national team.
Jakhongir Urozov.note: Urozov gives Uzbekistan wide defensive energy, useful against teams that attack the flanks quickly.
Jakhongir Urozov.noteZh: 乌罗佐夫给乌兹别克斯坦边路防守活力，适合应对快速打边路的球队。

Jamshid Iskanderov.name: Jamshid Iskanderov
Jamshid Iskanderov.summary: Jamshid Mahmudovich Iskanderov (Uzbek Cyrillic: Жамшид Искандеров; born 16 October 1993) is an Uzbek professional footballer who plays for Neftchi Fergana and Uzbekistan national team.
Jamshid Iskanderov.note: Iskanderov gives Uzbekistan an attacking-midfield option who can slow down and pick a pass.
Jamshid Iskanderov.noteZh: 伊斯坎德罗夫给乌兹别克斯坦前腰选择，能放慢节奏并挑出传球。

Jaouen Hadjam.name: Jaouen Hadjam
Jaouen Hadjam.summary: Jaouen Djimmy Hadjam (Arabic: جوين حجام; born 26 March 2003) is a professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Swiss Super League club Young Boys. Born in France, he represents the Algeria national team.
Jaouen Hadjam.note: Hadjam gives Algeria left-side energy, overlapping aggressively while still recovering into shape.
Jaouen Hadjam.noteZh: 哈贾姆给阿尔及利亚左侧活力，能积极套上，同时回到阵型。

Jefferson Lerma.name: Jefferson Lerma
Jefferson Lerma.summary: Jefferson Andrés Lerma Solís (born 25 October 1994) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder or centre-back for Premier League club Crystal Palace and the Colombia national team.
Jefferson Lerma.note: Lerma gives Colombia midfield steel, winning duels and adding a set-piece target.
Jefferson Lerma.noteZh: 莱尔马给哥伦比亚中场硬度，能赢下对抗并增加定位球目标。

Jhon Arias.name: Jhon Arias
Jhon Arias.summary: Jhon Adolfo Arias Andrade (born 21 September 1997) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as wide midfielder or attacking midfielder for Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club Palmeiras and the Colombia national team.
Jhon Arias.note: Arias gives Colombia clever wide combinations, connecting midfield control to final-third movement.
Jhon Arias.noteZh: 阿里亚斯给哥伦比亚聪明的边路配合，把中场控制衔接到前场跑动。

Jhon Cordoba.name: Jhon Cordoba
Jhon Cordoba.summary: Jhon Andrés Córdoba Copete (Spanish pronunciation: [ɟʝoŋ ˈkoɾðoβa]; born 11 May 1993) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Russian Premier League club Krasnodar and the Colombia national team.
Jhon Cordoba.note: Córdoba gives Colombia a powerful central striker, pinning defenders and attacking crosses.
Jhon Cordoba.noteZh: 科尔多瓦给哥伦比亚强力中锋，能牵制后卫并攻击传中。

Jhon Lucumi.name: Jhon Lucumi
Jhon Lucumi.summary: Jhon Janer Lucumí Bonilla (born 26 June 1998) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Serie A club Bologna and the Colombia national team.
Jhon Lucumi.note: Lucumí gives Colombia left-footed defensive balance, useful for clean exits against pressure.
Jhon Lucumi.noteZh: 卢库米给哥伦比亚左脚防守平衡，适合在压力下干净出球。

Joao Cancelo.name: Joao Cancelo
Joao Cancelo.summary: João Pedro Cavaco Cancelo (born 27 May 1994) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a right-back or left-back for La Liga club Barcelona, on loan from Saudi Pro League club Al Hilal, and the Portugal national team.
Joao Cancelo.club: Barcelona (on loan from Al Hilal SFC, Al Hilal)
Joao Cancelo.note: Cancelo gives Portugal a playmaker from full-back, stepping inside to change passing angles.
Joao Cancelo.noteZh: 坎塞洛给葡萄牙边后卫位置的组织者，能内收改变传球角度。

Joao Felix.name: Joao Felix
Joao Felix.summary: João Félix Sequeira ( ZHWOWN FEH-liks; Portuguese pronunciation: [ʒuˈɐ̃w ˈfɛliks]; born 10 November 1999) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or forward for Saudi Pro League club Al-Nassr and the Portugal national team.
Joao Felix.note: Félix gives Portugal soft-touch creativity, useful when tight spaces need disguise and timing.
Joao Felix.noteZh: 菲利克斯给葡萄牙细腻创造力，当狭小空间需要伪装和时机时很有用。

Johan Mojica.name: Johan Mojica
Johan Mojica.summary: Johan Andrés Mojica Palacio (born 21 August 1992) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a left-back for La Liga club Mallorca and the Colombia national team.
Johan Mojica.note: Mojica gives Colombia experienced left-back speed, stretching the flank without losing recovery.
Johan Mojica.noteZh: 莫希卡给哥伦比亚有经验的左后卫速度，能拉开边路且不丢回追。

Jorge Carrascal.name: Jorge Carrascal
Jorge Carrascal.summary: Jorge Andrés Carrascal Guardo (born 25 May 1998) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club Flamengo and the Colombia national team.
Jorge Carrascal.note: Carrascal gives Colombia central flair, useful when a tight block needs a dribble or disguised pass.
Jorge Carrascal.noteZh: 卡拉斯卡尔给哥伦比亚中路灵气，当密集防线需要盘带或隐蔽传球时很有用。

Jose Sa.name: Jose Sa
Jose Sa.summary: José Pedro Malheiro de Sá (Portuguese pronunciation: [ʒuˈzɛ sa]; born 17 January 1993) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for EFL Championship club Wolverhampton Wanderers and the Portugal national team.
Jose Sa.note: Sá gives Portugal experienced goalkeeper depth, steady when matches ask for crosses and reactions.
Jose Sa.noteZh: 若泽·萨给葡萄牙有经验的门将深度，当比赛需要处理传中和反应时很稳定。

Juan Portilla.name: Juan Portilla
Juan Portilla.summary: Juan Camilo Portilla Orozco (born 12 September 1998) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Campeonato Brasileiro Série A club Athletico Paranaense and the Colombia national team.
Juan Portilla.note: Portilla gives Colombia midfield bite, keeping pressure connected and the next pass simple.
Juan Portilla.noteZh: 波蒂利亚给哥伦比亚中场硬度，能保持压迫衔接并把下一脚处理简单。

Juan Quintero.name: Juan Quintero
Juan Quintero.summary: Juan Fernando Quintero Paniagua, better known as Juanfer Quintero (born 18 January 1993), is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as attacking midfielder or winger for Argentine Primera División club River Plate and the Colombia national team.
Juan Quintero.note: Quintero gives Colombia a left-footed unlocker, dangerous from dead balls and clipped final passes.
Juan Quintero.noteZh: 金特罗给哥伦比亚左脚解锁者，定位球和挑传最后一传都很危险。

Kevin Castano.name: Kevin Castano
Kevin Castano.summary: Kevin Duván Castaño Gil (born 29 September 2000) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Argentine Primera División club River Plate and the Colombia national team.
Kevin Castano.note: Castaño gives Colombia a midfield screen, protecting the center and moving regained balls forward.
Kevin Castano.noteZh: 卡斯塔尼奥给哥伦比亚中场屏障，保护中路并把抢回的球向前送。

Khojiakbar Alijonov.name: Khojiakbar Alijonov
Khojiakbar Alijonov.summary: Khojiakbar Ulugbek ugli Alijonov (Uzbek: Hojiakbar Ulugʻbek oʻgʻli Alijonov; born 19 April 1997) is an Uzbek professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Pakhtakor in the Uzbekistan Super League and the Uzbekistan national team.
Khojiakbar Alijonov.note: Alijonov gives Uzbekistan right-side running, supporting attacks without abandoning recovery duties.
Khojiakbar Alijonov.noteZh: 阿利若诺夫给乌兹别克斯坦右侧跑动，能支援进攻且不放弃回追职责。

Luca Zidane.name: Luca Zidane
Luca Zidane.summary: Luca Zinedine Zidane (Arabic: لوكا زين الدين زيدان; born 13 May 1998) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Segunda División club Granada. Born in France, he plays for the Algeria national team.
Luca Zidane.note: Zidane gives Algeria a composed goalkeeper option, comfortable restarting attacks after saves.
Luca Zidane.noteZh: 齐达内给阿尔及利亚冷静的门将选择，能在扑救后舒服地重新发起进攻。

Matheus Nunes.name: Matheus Nunes
Matheus Nunes.summary: Matheus Luiz Nunes (born 27 August 1998) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back or midfielder for Premier League club Manchester City and the Portugal national team. Initially only a midfielder, he switched to right-back in the 2024–25 season.
Matheus Nunes.note: Nunes gives Portugal carrying power through midfield, changing the game with one forward surge.
Matheus Nunes.noteZh: 努内斯给葡萄牙中场带球力量，能用一次向前冲刺改变比赛。

Melvin Mastil.name: Melvin Mastil
Melvin Mastil.summary: Melvin Feyçal Mastil (born 19 February 2000) is a professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for the Swiss Challenge League club Stade Nyonnais, on loan from Lausanne-Sport. Born in France, he plays for the Algeria national team.
Melvin Mastil.note: Mastil adds goalkeeper depth, useful for training competition and cover across the tournament.
Melvin Mastil.noteZh: 马斯蒂尔增加门将深度，适合队内竞争和整届赛事的保障。

Mohamed Amine Tougai.name: Mohamed Amine Tougai
Mohamed Amine Tougai.summary: Mohamed Amine Tougai (Arabic: محمد أمين توغاي; born 22 January 2000) is an Algerian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Tunisian Ligue Professionnelle 1 club Espérance de Tunis and the Algeria national team.
Mohamed Amine Tougai.note: Tougai gives Algeria penalty-area protection, important when games turn into crosses and clearances.
Mohamed Amine Tougai.noteZh: 图盖给阿尔及利亚禁区保护，当比赛变成传中和解围时很重要。

Mohamed Amoura.name: Mohamed Amoura
Mohamed Amoura.summary: Mohamed El Amine Amoura (Arabic: محمد الأمين عمورة; born 9 May 2000) is an Algerian professional footballer who plays as a striker for 2. Bundesliga club VfL Wolfsburg and the Algeria national team.
Mohamed Amoura.note: Amoura gives Algeria explosive depth, stretching the line and turning counters into shots quickly.
Mohamed Amoura.noteZh: 阿穆拉给阿尔及利亚爆发纵深，能拉伸防线并快速把反击转成射门。

Nabil Bentaleb.name: Nabil Bentaleb
Nabil Bentaleb.summary: Nabil Bentaleb (Arabic: نَبِيل بْن طَالِب; born 24 November 1994) is a professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Ligue 1 club Lille. Born in France, he plays for the Algeria national team.
Nabil Bentaleb.note: Bentaleb gives Algeria a deeper passing base, useful for controlling rhythm and protecting the center.
Nabil Bentaleb.noteZh: 本塔莱布给阿尔及利亚更靠后的传球基础，适合控制节奏并保护中路。

Nelson Semedo.name: Nelson Semedo
Nelson Semedo.summary: Nélson Cabral Semedo (born 16 November 1993) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a right-back or right wing-back for Süper Lig club Fenerbahçe and the Portugal national team.
Nelson Semedo.note: Semedo gives Portugal recovery speed on the right, useful against counters and wide runners.
Nelson Semedo.noteZh: 塞梅多给葡萄牙右侧回追速度，适合应对反击和边路跑动者。

Odiljon Xamrobekov.name: Odiljon Xamrobekov
Odiljon Xamrobekov.summary: Odiljon Hamrobekov (born 13 February 1996) is an Uzbek professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Tractor and the Uzbekistan national team.
Odiljon Xamrobekov.note: Xamrobekov gives Uzbekistan central control, contesting duels and keeping the next pass available.
Odiljon Xamrobekov.noteZh: 哈姆罗别科夫给乌兹别克斯坦中路控制，能争抢对抗并保持下一脚传球选择。

Oston Urunov.name: Oston Urunov
Oston Urunov.summary: Oston Rustam oʻgʻli Urunov (born 19 December 2000) is an Uzbek professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Persian Gulf Pro League club Persepolis and the Uzbekistan national team.
Oston Urunov.note: Urunov gives Uzbekistan a direct wing threat, carrying inside and forcing defenders backward.
Oston Urunov.noteZh: 乌鲁诺夫给乌兹别克斯坦直接边路威胁，能内切带球并迫使防守者后退。

Otabek Shukurov.name: Otabek Shukurov
Otabek Shukurov.summary: Otabek Shukurov (born 22 June 1996) is an Uzbek professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Baniyas and the Uzbekistan national team.
Otabek Shukurov.note: Shukurov gives Uzbekistan midfield balance and delivery, useful when control has to become service.
Otabek Shukurov.noteZh: 舒库罗夫给乌兹别克斯坦中场平衡和传球，当控制需要变成输送时很有用。

Oussama Benbot.name: Oussama Benbot
Oussama Benbot.summary: Oussama Benbot (Arabic: أُسَامَة بن بُوط; born 11 October 1994) is an Algerian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for USM Alger in the Algerian Ligue Professionnelle 1 and the Algeria national team.
Oussama Benbot.note: Benbot gives Algeria domestic goalkeeper experience, useful when set pieces create pressure.
Oussama Benbot.noteZh: 本博特给阿尔及利亚本土门将经验，当定位球制造压力时很有用。

Pedro Neto.name: Pedro Neto
Pedro Neto.summary: Pedro Lomba Neto (European Portuguese: [ˈpeðɾu ˈnɛtu]; born 9 March 2000) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a winger for Premier League club Chelsea and the Portugal national team.
Pedro Neto.note: Neto gives Portugal explosive wide speed, turning early isolation into low crosses and shots.
Pedro Neto.noteZh: 内托给葡萄牙爆发边路速度，能把早期单挑转成低平传中和射门。

Rak Belghali.name: Rak Belghali
Rak Belghali.summary: Rafik Belghali (born 7 June 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Serie B club Hellas Verona. Born in Belgium, he represents the Algeria national team.
Rak Belghali.note: Belghali gives Algeria right-side running, helping stretch attacks while recovering into the back line.
Rak Belghali.noteZh: 贝尔加利给阿尔及利亚右侧跑动，能拉开进攻并回收到防线。

Ramiz Zerrouki.name: Ramiz Zerrouki
Ramiz Zerrouki.summary: Ramiz Larbi Zerrouki (Arabic: رامز العربي زروقي; born 26 May 1998) is a professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Eredivisie club Twente, on loan from Feyenoord, and the Algeria national team.
Ramiz Zerrouki.note: Zerrouki gives Algeria a midfield metronome, keeping the ball moving and contesting second balls.
Ramiz Zerrouki.noteZh: 泽鲁基给阿尔及利亚中场节拍器，能让球运转并争抢第二落点。

Ramy Bensebaini.name: Ramy Bensebaini
Ramy Bensebaini.summary: Amir Selmane Rami Bensebaini (Arabic: أمير سلمان رامي بن سبعيني; born 16 April 1995) is an Algerian professional footballer who plays as a left-back or centre-back for Bundesliga club Borussia Dortmund and the Algeria national team.
Ramy Bensebaini.note: Bensebaini gives Algeria left-side authority, defending the box and adding set-piece danger.
Ramy Bensebaini.noteZh: 本塞拜尼给阿尔及利亚左侧权威，能防守禁区并增加定位球威胁。

Rayan Ait-Nouri.name: Rayan Ait-Nouri
Rayan Ait-Nouri.summary: Rayan Aït-Nouri (Arabic: رَيَّان آيَت نُورِيّ; born 6 June 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a left-back or a left wing-back for Premier League club Manchester City. Born in France, he plays for the Algeria national team.
