Rayan Ait-Nouri.note: Aït-Nouri gives Algeria a high-upside left flank, carrying past pressure and creating from deep.
Rayan Ait-Nouri.noteZh: 艾特-努里给阿尔及利亚高上限左路，能带球摆脱压力并从后场创造。

Renato Veiga.name: Renato Veiga
Renato Veiga.summary: Renato da Palma Veiga (Portuguese pronunciation: [ʁɨˈnatuˈvɐjɡɐ]; born 29 July 2003) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays for La Liga club Villarreal and the Portugal national team.
Renato Veiga.note: Veiga gives Portugal flexible defensive cover, useful across centre-back, full-back, or midfield roles.
Renato Veiga.noteZh: 维加给葡萄牙灵活防守保障，可覆盖中卫、边后卫或中场角色。

Richard Rios.name: Richard Rios
Richard Rios.summary: Richard Ríos Montoya (born 2 June 2000) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Primeira Liga club Benfica and the Colombia national team. Ríos is renowned for his versatility and ball-winning ability.
Richard Rios.note: Ríos gives Colombia carrying power through midfield, changing tempo with one forward burst.
Richard Rios.noteZh: 里奥斯给哥伦比亚中场带球力量，能用一次向前突破改变节奏。

Ruben Neves.name: Ruben Neves
Ruben Neves.summary: Rúben Diogo da Silva Neves (Portuguese pronunciation: [nɛvʃ], born 13 March 1997) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Saudi Pro League club Al-Hilal and the Portugal national team.
Ruben Neves.note: Neves gives Portugal long-range passing and shooting, stretching opponents from deep midfield.
Ruben Neves.noteZh: 鲁本·内维斯给葡萄牙后腰位置的长传和远射，从深处拉伸对手。

Rui Silva.name: Rui Silva
Rui Silva.summary: Rui Tiago Dantas da Silva (born 7 February 1994) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Primeira Liga club Sporting CP and the Portugal national team.
Rui Silva.note: Rui Silva gives Portugal another reliable goalkeeper option for depth across the tournament.
Rui Silva.noteZh: 鲁伊·席尔瓦给葡萄牙另一个可靠门将选择，为整届赛事提供深度。

Ruslanbek Jiyanov.name: Ruslanbek Jiyanov
Ruslanbek Jiyanov.summary: Ruslanbek Muzaffar ugli Jiyanov (Uzbek: Ruslanbek Muzaffar oʻgʻli Jiyanov; born 5 June 2001) is an Uzbek professional footballer who plays for Navbahor and the Uzbekistan national team.
Ruslanbek Jiyanov.note: Jiyanov gives Uzbekistan forward depth, pressing defenders and attacking channels off Shomurodov.
Ruslanbek Jiyanov.noteZh: 吉亚诺夫给乌兹别克斯坦锋线深度，能压迫后卫并在绍穆罗多夫身边冲击通道。

Samir Chergui.name: Samir Chergui
Samir Chergui.summary: Samir Sophian Chergui (born 6 February 1999) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Ligue 1 club Paris FC. Born in France, he plays for the Algeria national team.
Samir Chergui.note: Chergui gives Algeria defensive depth, useful for aerial spells and simple buildup under pressure.
Samir Chergui.noteZh: 谢尔吉给阿尔及利亚防守深度，适合空中球阶段和压力下简单组织。

Samu Costa.name: Samu Costa
Samu Costa.summary: Samuel "Samú" de Almeida Costa (born 27 November 2000) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for La Liga club Mallorca and the Portugal national team.
Samu Costa.note: Samu gives Portugal midfield bite, useful when the game needs tackles before invention.
Samu Costa.noteZh: 萨穆给葡萄牙中场硬度，当比赛需要先抢断再创造时很有用。

Santiago Arias.name: Santiago Arias
Santiago Arias.summary: Santiago Arias Naranjo (born 13 January 1992) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Argentine Primera División club Independiente and the Colombia national team.
Santiago Arias.note: Arias gives Colombia experienced right-back cover, balancing overlap support with defensive positioning.
Santiago Arias.noteZh: 圣地亚哥·阿里亚斯给哥伦比亚有经验的右后卫保障，平衡套上支援和防守站位。

Sherzod Esanov.name: Sherzod Esanov
Sherzod Esanov.summary: Sherzod Dilshodovich Esanov (born 1 February 2003) is an Uzbekistani football player who plays as a central midfielder for Bukhara and the Uzbekistan national team.
Sherzod Esanov.note: Esanov gives Uzbekistan another wide runner, useful for late energy and transition pressure.
Sherzod Esanov.noteZh: 埃萨诺夫给乌兹别克斯坦另一名边路跑手，适合末段活力和转换压迫。

Sherzod Nasrullaev.name: Sherzod Nasrullaev
Sherzod Nasrullaev.summary: Sherzod Innatillo oʻgʻli Nasrullayev (Uzbek Cyrillic: Шерзод Иннатилло ўғли Насруллаев; born 23 July 1998) is an Uzbek professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Uzbekistan Super League club FC Nasaf and the Uzbekistan national team.
Sherzod Nasrullaev.note: Nasrullaev gives Uzbekistan left-side depth, supporting attacks while keeping the flank protected.
Sherzod Nasrullaev.noteZh: 纳斯鲁拉耶夫给乌兹别克斯坦左侧深度，能支援进攻并保护边路。

Tomas Araujo.name: Tomas Araujo
Tomas Araujo.summary: Tomás Lemos Araújo (Portuguese pronunciation: [tuˈmaz ɐɾɐˈuʒu]; born 16 May 2002) is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or a right-back for Primeira Liga club Benfica and the Portugal national team.
Tomas Araujo.note: Araújo gives Portugal mobile centre-back depth, comfortable defending space and passing out.
Tomas Araujo.noteZh: 阿劳若给葡萄牙机动中卫深度，能防守空间并舒服出球。

Umarbek Eshmurodov.name: Umarbek Eshmurodov
Umarbek Eshmurodov.summary: Umarbek Eshmurodov (born 30 November 1992) is an Uzbekistani footballer who currently plays as a centre-back for Uzbekistan Super League club Nasaf and Uzbekistan national team.
Umarbek Eshmurodov.note: Eshmurodov gives Uzbekistan defensive cover, useful when the team needs height and clearances.
Umarbek Eshmurodov.noteZh: 埃什穆罗多夫给乌兹别克斯坦防守保障，当球队需要高度和解围时很有用。

Utkir Yusupov.name: Utkir Yusupov
Utkir Yusupov.summary: Utkir Yusupov (Uzbek: Oʻtkir Yusupov, Russian: Уткир Юсупов; born 4 January 1991) is an Uzbek professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Uzbekistan Super League club Navbahor. Born in Kazakhstan, he plays for the Uzbekistan national team.
Utkir Yusupov.note: Yusupov gives Uzbekistan experienced goalkeeping depth, steady for managing difficult spells.
Utkir Yusupov.noteZh: 尤苏波夫给乌兹别克斯坦有经验的门将深度，适合管理困难阶段。

Willer Ditta.name: Willer Ditta
Willer Ditta.summary: Willer Emilio Ditta Pérez (born 23 January 1998) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Liga MX club Cruz Azul and the Colombia national team.
Willer Ditta.note: Ditta gives Colombia centre-back strength, useful when the match becomes direct and physical.
Willer Ditta.noteZh: 迪塔给哥伦比亚中卫强度，当比赛变得直接而身体化时很有用。

Yassine Titraoui.name: Yassine Titraoui
Yassine Titraoui.summary: Yacine Mohamed El Ghazali Titraoui (Arabic: ياسين محمد الغزالي تيطراوي; born 26 July 2003) is an Algerian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Belgian club Charleroi and the Algeria national team.
Yassine Titraoui.note: Titraoui adds midfield craft, helping Algeria keep the ball when pressure closes around him.
Yassine Titraoui.noteZh: 蒂特拉维增加中场技术，帮助阿尔及利亚在压力逼近时保住球权。

Yerry Mina.name: Yerry Mina
Yerry Mina.summary: Yerry Fernando Mina González (born 23 September 1994) is a Colombian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Serie A club Cagliari and the Colombia national team.
Yerry Mina.note: Mina gives Colombia aerial authority, protecting the box and attacking set pieces at the other end.
Yerry Mina.noteZh: 米纳给哥伦比亚空中权威，能保护禁区，也能在另一端攻击定位球。

Zineddine Belaid.name: Zineddine Belaid
Zineddine Belaid.summary: Zineddine Belaïd (Arabic: زَيْن الدِّين بَلْعِيد; Tamazight: ⵣⵉⵏⴷⴷⵉⵏ ⴱⵍⵄⵉⴷ; born 20 March 1999) is an Algerian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for JS Kabylie and the Algeria national team.
Zineddine Belaid.note: Belaïd gives Algeria another centre-back organiser, strong when the line must manage crosses.
Zineddine Belaid.noteZh: 贝莱德给阿尔及利亚另一名中卫组织者，当防线需要处理传中时很可靠。

Abdallah Al-Fakhori.name: Abdallah Al-Fakhori
Abdallah Al-Fakhori.summary: Abdallah Ra'ed Mahmoud Al-Fakhouri (Arabic: عَبْد الله رَائِد مَحْمُود الْفَاخُورِيّ; born January 22, 2000) is a Jordanian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Jordanian Pro League side Al-Wehdat and the Jordan national team.
Abdallah Al-Fakhori.note: Al-Fakhori gives Jordan another box-organizing goalkeeper, useful when long spells of pressure need calm handling.
Abdallah Al-Fakhori.noteZh: 法胡里给约旦另一名能组织禁区的门将，当长时间受压需要冷静处理时很有用。

Abdallah Nasib.name: Abdallah Nasib
Abdallah Nasib.summary: Abdallah Mousa Musallam Nasib (Arabic: عَبْد الله مُوسَى مُسْلِم نَصِيب; born 25 February 1994) is a Jordanian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Iraq Stars League club Al-Zawraa, on loan from Al-Hussein, and the Jordan national team.
Abdallah Nasib.note: Nasib gives Jordan centre-back size, helping them defend crosses and stay firm on set pieces.
Abdallah Nasib.noteZh: 纳西布给约旦中卫身材，帮助球队防守传中，并在定位球上保持稳固。

Abdul Fatawu.name: Abdul Fatawu
Abdul Fatawu.summary: Abdul Fatawu Issahaku (born 8 March 2004), commonly known as Abdul Fatawu, is a Ghanaian professional footballer who plays as a winger for EFL League One club Leicester City and the Ghana national team.
Abdul Fatawu.note: Fatawu gives Ghana a right-wing accelerator, beating full-backs early and turning counters into cutbacks or shots.
Abdul Fatawu.noteZh: 法塔乌给加纳右路加速器，能早点过掉边后卫，并把反击变成倒三角或射门。

Abdul Mumin.name: Abdul Mumin
Abdul Mumin.summary: Khalid Abdul Mumin Suleman (born 6 June 1998), commonly known as Abdul Mumin, is a Ghanaian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for La Liga club Rayo Vallecano and the Ghana national team.
Abdul Mumin.note: Mumin gives Ghana left-footed centre-back balance, stepping out to pass while still handling box duels.
Abdul Mumin.noteZh: 穆明给加纳左脚中卫平衡，能带出传球，同时仍能处理禁区对抗。

Ali Azaizeh.name: Ali Azaizeh
Ali Azaizeh.summary: Ali Ahmad Ali Azaizeh (Arabic: علي العزايزة; born 13 April 2004) is a Jordanian professional footballer who plays as a winger for Saudi Pro League club Al-Shabab, on loan from Kuwait Premier League club Kazma.
Ali Azaizeh.note: Azaizeh gives Jordan a right-wing outlet, pushing counters wide and cutting low service into the box.
Ali Azaizeh.noteZh: 阿扎伊泽给约旦右路出口，能把反击推向边路，并把低平传球送入禁区。

Alidu Seidu.name: Alidu Seidu
Alidu Seidu.summary: Alidu Seidu (born 4 June 2000) is a Ghanaian-French professional footballer who plays as a defender for French Ligue 1 club Rennes and the Ghana national team.
Alidu Seidu.note: Seidu gives Ghana recovery speed across the back line, especially when full-backs push high.
Alidu Seidu.noteZh: 塞杜给加纳后防线回追速度，尤其在边后卫压上时很重要。

Amer Jamous.name: Amer Jamous
Amer Jamous.summary: Amer Rasem Adel Jamous (Arabic: عَامِر رَاسِم عَادِل جَامُوس; born 3 July 2002) is a Jordanian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Iraq Stars League club Al-Zawraa, on loan from Al-Wehdat, as well as the Jordan national team.
Amer Jamous.note: Jamous gives Jordan midfield legs, closing gaps quickly and keeping recovered balls simple.
Amer Jamous.noteZh: 贾穆斯给约旦中场跑动力，能快速补上空当，并把抢回的球处理简单。

Anas Badawi.name: Anas Badawi
Anas Badawi.summary: Anas Saeed Badawi (Arabic: أنس بدوي; born 13 September 1997) is a Jordanian professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Jordanian Pro League club Al-Faisaly and the Jordan national team.
Anas Badawi.note: Badawi gives Jordan right-back energy, supporting counters without leaving the recovery lane empty.
Anas Badawi.noteZh: 巴达维给约旦右后卫活力，能支援反击，同时不把回追通道放空。

Augustine Boakye.name: Augustine Boakye
Augustine Boakye.summary: Augustine Boakye (born 3 November 2000) is a Ghanaian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Ligue 2 club Saint-Étienne and the Ghana national team.
Augustine Boakye.note: Boakye gives Ghana another right-side creator, sliding inside to combine or shoot before defenses settle.
Augustine Boakye.noteZh: 博阿基给加纳另一名右路创造点，能内收配合或在防线站稳前射门。

Baba Rahman.name: Baba Rahman
Baba Rahman.summary: Abdul Rahman Baba (born 2 July 1994), also known as Baba Rahman, is a Ghanaian professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Super League Greece club PAOK and the Ghana national team.
Baba Rahman.note: Baba gives Ghana experienced left-back width, supporting attacks with crosses and recovering into the line.
Baba Rahman.noteZh: 巴巴给加纳有经验的左后卫宽度，能用传中支援进攻，并回收到防线。

Benjamin Asare.name: Benjamin Asare
Benjamin Asare.summary: Benjamin Asare (born 13 July 1992) is a Ghanaian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Accra Hearts of Oak in the Ghana Premier League and the Ghana national team.
Benjamin Asare.note: Asare gives Ghana a domestic-league goalkeeper voice, organizing the box and staying sharp on set pieces.
Benjamin Asare.noteZh: 阿萨雷给加纳国内联赛门将声音，能组织禁区，并在定位球上保持专注。

Brandon Thomas-Asante.name: Brandon Thomas-Asante
Brandon Thomas-Asante.summary: Solomon Brandon Michael Clarke Thomas-Asante (born 29 December 1998) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre forward for Premier League club Coventry City. Born in England, he plays for the Ghana national team.
Brandon Thomas-Asante.note: Thomas-Asante gives Ghana a pressing centre-forward, forcing rushed clearances and arriving sharply in the box.
Brandon Thomas-Asante.noteZh: 托马斯-阿桑特给加纳压迫型中锋，能迫使对手仓促解围，并敏锐进入禁区。

Christopher Bonsu Baah.name: Christopher Bonsu Baah
Christopher Bonsu Baah.summary: Christopher Bonsu Baah (born 14 December 2004) is a Ghanaian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Saudi Pro League side Al-Qadsiah and the Ghana national team.
Christopher Bonsu Baah.note: Bonsu Baah gives Ghana explosive left-wing depth, attacking open grass before the opponent can reset.
Christopher Bonsu Baah.noteZh: 邦苏·巴阿给加纳爆发型左路深度，能在对手重组前冲击开阔空间。

Derrick Luckassen.name: Derrick Luckassen
Derrick Luckassen.summary: Derrick Luckassen (born 3 July 1995) is a professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Cypriot club Pafos. Born in the Netherlands, he plays for the Ghana national team.
Derrick Luckassen.note: Luckassen gives Ghana experienced defensive size, useful for organizing the line and winning high balls.
Derrick Luckassen.noteZh: 卢卡森给加纳有经验的防守身材，适合组织防线并赢下高空球。

Ehsan Haddad.name: Ehsan Haddad
Ehsan Haddad.summary: Ehsan Manial Farhan Haddad (Arabic: إِحْسَان منيل فَرْحَان حَدَّاد; born 5 February 1994) is a Jordanian footballer who plays for the Jordanian club Al-Hussein and the Jordan national team.
Ehsan Haddad.note: Haddad gives Jordan experienced right-back detail, blocking crosses and offering set-piece delivery.
Ehsan Haddad.noteZh: 哈达德给约旦有经验的右后卫细节，能封堵传中并提供定位球输送。

Elisha Owusu.name: Elisha Owusu
Elisha Owusu.summary: Elisha Owusu (born 7 November 1997) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Ligue 1 club Auxerre. Born in France, he plays for the Ghana national team.
Elisha Owusu.note: Owusu gives Ghana midfield bite, breaking counters and keeping the first pass after recovery clean.
Elisha Owusu.noteZh: 奥乌苏给加纳中场硬度，能打断反击，并把抢回球后的第一传处理干净。

Ernest Nuamah.name: Ernest Nuamah
Ernest Nuamah.summary: Ernest Nuamah Appiah (born 1 November 2003) is a Ghanaian professional footballer who plays as a winger for Ligue 1 club Lyon and the Ghana national team.
Ernest Nuamah.note: Nuamah gives Ghana a sharp wide scorer, cutting inside quickly when defenders overprotect the touchline.
Ernest Nuamah.noteZh: 努阿马给加纳犀利的边路得分手，当防守过度保护边线时能快速内切。

Gideon Mensah.name: Gideon Mensah
Gideon Mensah.summary: Gideon Mensah (born 18 July 1998) is a Ghanaian professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Ligue 1 club Auxerre and the Ghana national team.
Gideon Mensah.note: Mensah gives Ghana left-back reliability, choosing when to overlap and when to protect the far side.
Gideon Mensah.noteZh: 门萨给加纳左后卫可靠性，能判断何时套边、何时保护远端。

Husam Abu Dahab.name: Husam Abu Dahab
Husam Abu Dahab.summary: Husam Ali Mohammad Abu Dahab (Arabic: حُسَام عَلِيّ مُحَمَّد أَبُو ذَهَب, born 13 May 2000) is a Jordanian footballer who is a center-back for Jordanian Pro League club Al-Faisaly, as well as the Jordan national team.
Husam Abu Dahab.note: Abu Dahab gives Jordan a sturdy centre-back option, keeping duels simple and the first pass safe.
Husam Abu Dahab.noteZh: 阿布·达哈卜给约旦稳固中卫选择，能把对抗处理简单，并保证第一脚传球安全。

Ibrahim Sadeh.name: Ibrahim Sadeh
Ibrahim Sadeh.summary: Ibrahim Mohammad Sami Sadeh (Arabic: إبراهيم سعادة; born 27 April 2000) is a Jordanian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Iraqi Stars League side Al-Karma and the Jordan national team.
Ibrahim Sadeh.note: Sadeh gives Jordan a central release valve, helping them play out after the first defensive action.
Ibrahim Sadeh.noteZh: 萨德赫给约旦中路释放压力的出口，帮助球队在第一波防守后出球。

Jerome Opoku.name: Jerome Opoku
Jerome Opoku.summary: Jerome Osei Opoku (born 14 October 1998) is a professional footballer. He plays as a centre-back for Süper Lig club İstanbul Başakşehir.
Jerome Opoku.note: Opoku gives Ghana a composed centre-back option, helping the first pass and defending crosses.
Jerome Opoku.noteZh: 奥波库给加纳冷静的中卫选择，帮助第一脚出球并防守传中。

Jonas Adjetey.name: Jonas Adjetey
Jonas Adjetey.summary: Jonas Adjei Adjetey (born 13 December 2003) is a Ghanaian professional footballer who plays for German 2. Bundesliga side VfL Wolfsburg and the Ghana national team. He plays mainly in the position of centre-back, but can also play as full-back on either side.
Jonas Adjetey.note: Adjetey gives Ghana a physical centre-back option, useful for aerial defending and matching direct strikers.
Jonas Adjetey.noteZh: 阿杰泰给加纳身体型中卫选择，适合空中防守，并对抗直接型前锋。

Joseph Anang.name: Joseph Anang
Joseph Anang.summary: Joseph Tetteh Anang (born 8 June 2000) is a Ghanaian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for League of Ireland Premier Division club St Patrick's Athletic and the Ghana national team.
Joseph Anang.note: Anang gives Ghana a reflex goalkeeper option, useful when pressure creates close-range saves and restarts.
Joseph Anang.noteZh: 阿南给加纳反应型门将选择，当压力制造近距离扑救和快速再发动时很有用。

Kamaldeen Sulemana.name: Kamaldeen Sulemana
Kamaldeen Sulemana.summary: Kamaldeen Sulemana (born 15 February 2002), also known simply as Kamaldeen, is a Ghanaian professional footballer who plays as a left winger or a forward for Serie A club Atalanta and the Ghana national team.
Kamaldeen Sulemana.note: Sulemana gives Ghana left-wing acceleration, stretching tired defenses and carrying counters into the box.
Kamaldeen Sulemana.noteZh: 苏莱马纳给加纳左路加速度，能拉扯疲劳防线，并把反击带进禁区。

Kojo Peprah Oppong.name: Kojo Peprah Oppong
Kojo Peprah Oppong.summary: Kojo Peprah Oppong (born 4 June 2004) is a French-Ghanaian professional footballer who plays as a defender for Ligue 1 club Nice and the Ghana national team.
Kojo Peprah Oppong.note: Oppong gives Ghana a rangy young defender, covering space behind pressure and competing in the air.
Kojo Peprah Oppong.noteZh: 奥蓬给加纳覆盖范围大的年轻后卫，能补压迫身后的空间并争顶。

Kwasi Sibo.name: Kwasi Sibo
Kwasi Sibo.summary: Kwasi Sibo (born 24 June 1998) is a Ghanaian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Segunda División club Real Oviedo and the Ghana national team.
Kwasi Sibo.note: Sibo gives Ghana a central carrier, helping them win second balls and move through pressure.
Kwasi Sibo.noteZh: 西博给加纳中路带球点，帮助球队争第二落点并穿过压力。

Lawrence Ati-Zigi.name: Lawrence Ati-Zigi
Lawrence Ati-Zigi.summary: Lawrence Ati-Zigi (born 29 November 1996) is a Ghanaian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Swiss Super League club St. Gallen and the Ghana national team. Ati-Zigi has represented Ghana at under-17 and under-20 levels.
Lawrence Ati-Zigi.note: Ati-Zigi gives Ghana an experienced goalkeeper starter, organizing pressure and restarting attacks quickly.
Lawrence Ati-Zigi.noteZh: 阿蒂-齐吉给加纳有经验的主力门将，能组织压力局面并快速重新发起进攻。

Mahmoud Al-Mardi.name: Mahmoud Al-Mardi
Mahmoud Al-Mardi.summary: Mahmoud Nayef Mardi Al-Hwaitat (Arabic: مَحْمُود نَايِف مَرْضِيّ الحويطات; born 6 October 1993) is a Jordanian footballer who plays as a winger for the Jordanian club Al-Hussein and the Jordan national team.
Mahmoud Al-Mardi.note: Al-Mardi gives Jordan a left-sided scorer, arriving inside when counters pull defenders toward Al-Taamari.
Mahmoud Al-Mardi.noteZh: 马尔迪给约旦左侧得分点，当反击把防守吸向塔马里时能内收。

Marvin Senaya.name: Marvin Senaya
Marvin Senaya.summary: Marvin Senaya (born 28 January 2001) is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Ligue 1 club Auxerre. Born in France, he plays for the Ghana national team.
Marvin Senaya.note: Senaya gives Ghana right-back depth, balancing overlap timing with recovery runs into the line.
Marvin Senaya.noteZh: 塞纳亚给加纳右后卫深度，能平衡套边时机和回收到防线的跑动。

Mohammad Abu Alnadi.name: Mohammad Abu Alnadi
Mohammad Abu Alnadi.summary: Mohammad Abu Alnadi is a Jordanian centre-back for Selangor and the Jordan national team.
Mohammad Abu Alnadi.note: Abu Alnadi gives Jordan defensive cover, stepping across to protect space and clear aerial pressure.
Mohammad Abu Alnadi.noteZh: 阿布·阿尔纳迪给约旦防守覆盖，能横移保护空间并清理空中压力。

Mohammad Abu Ghoush.name: Mohammad Abu Ghoush
Mohammad Abu Ghoush.summary: Mohammad Ahmed Mohammad Taha (Arabic: محمد أحمد محمد طه; born 13 July 2005), also known as Mohammad Abu Ghoush (Arabic: محمد أبو غوش), is a Jordanian professional footballer who plays as a left back for Jordanian Pro League club Al-Hussein, on loan from Shabab...
Mohammad Abu Ghoush.note: Abu Ghoush gives Jordan left-side defensive support, holding width and recovering when counters break.
Mohammad Abu Ghoush.noteZh: 阿布·古什给约旦左侧防守支援，能保持宽度，并在反击打出时回追。

Mohammad Abu Hasheesh.name: Mohammad Abu Hasheesh
Mohammad Abu Hasheesh.summary: Mohammad Ali Hasan Abu Hashish (Arabic: مُحَمَّد عَلِيّ حَسَن أَبُو حَشِيش; born 9 May 1995) is a professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Iraq Stars League side Al-Karma. Born in Iraq, he represents the Jordan national team.
Mohammad Abu Hasheesh.note: Abu Hasheesh gives Jordan a left-back who can block service first and join attacks when space appears.
Mohammad Abu Hasheesh.noteZh: 阿布·哈希什给约旦一名左后卫，能先封堵传中，并在空间出现时参与进攻。

Mohammad Abu Zraiq.name: Mohammad Abu Zraiq
Mohammad Abu Zraiq.summary: Mohammad Faisal Yousef Abu Zrayq (Arabic: محمد فيصل يوسف أبو زريق, born 30 December 1997), popularly known as Sharara (Arabic: شرارة), is a Jordanian professional footballer who plays as a winger for Botola Pro club Raja CA and the Jordan national team.
Mohammad Abu Zraiq.note: Abu Zraiq gives Jordan a transition carrier, driving into open space before the defense can reset.
Mohammad Abu Zraiq.noteZh: 阿布·兹赖克给约旦转换推进点，能在防线重组前带球冲进开阔空间。

Mohammad Al-Daoud.name: Mohammad Al-Daoud
Mohammad Al-Daoud.summary: Mohammad Rateb Al-Dawoud (Arabic: مُحَمَّد رَاتِب الدَّاوُود; born 12 April 1992) is a Jordanian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Jordanian Pro League club Al-Wehdat and the Jordan national team.
Mohammad Al-Daoud.note: Al-Daoud gives Jordan a central connector, helping them collect second balls and keep passes moving.
Mohammad Al-Daoud.noteZh: 达乌德给约旦中路连接点，帮助球队收下第二落点并保持传球流动。

Mohannad Abu Taha.name: Mohannad Abu Taha
Mohannad Abu Taha.summary: Mohannad Mahmoud Saleh Abu Taha (Arabic: مُهَنَّد مَحْمُود صَالِح أَبُو طٰهٰ; born 2 February 2003) is a Jordanian footballer who plays as a winger or left-back for Iraq Stars League club Al-Quwa Al-Jawiya, and the Jordan national team.
Mohannad Abu Taha.note: Abu Taha gives Jordan left-side running power, useful for covering counters and sending early crosses.
Mohannad Abu Taha.noteZh: 阿布·塔哈给约旦左侧跑动力，适合覆盖反击并送出早传中。

Nizar Al-Rashdan.name: Nizar Al-Rashdan
Nizar Al-Rashdan.summary: Nizar Mahmoud Ahmed Al-Rashdan (Arabic: نزار الرشدان; born 23 March 1999) is a Jordanian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Qatar Stars League club Qatar SC and the Jordan national team.
Nizar Al-Rashdan.note: Al-Rashdan gives Jordan a midfield screen, protecting the center before finding the first forward pass.
Nizar Al-Rashdan.noteZh: 拉什丹给约旦中场屏障，先保护中路，再找到第一脚向前传球。

Nour Bani Attiah.name: Nour Bani Attiah
Nour Bani Attiah.summary: Noureddin Ziad Bani Attiah (Arabic: نُور الدِّين زِيَاد بَنِي عَطِيَّة; born 25 January 1993) is a Jordanian footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Al-Faisaly and the Jordan national team.
Nour Bani Attiah.note: Bani Attiah gives Jordan a veteran goalkeeper presence, valuable when crosses and second balls crowd the box.
Nour Bani Attiah.noteZh: 巴尼·阿蒂亚给约旦老练门将存在感，当传中和第二落点挤满禁区时很有价值。

Odeh Fakhoury.name: Odeh Fakhoury
Odeh Fakhoury.summary: Odeh Burhan Shehadeh Fakhoury (Arabic: عودة برهان شحادة الفاخوري; born 22 November 2005) is a Jordanian footballer who plays as a forward for Egyptian Premier League club Pyramids and the Jordan national team.
Odeh Fakhoury.note: Fakhoury gives Jordan left-wing support, joining counters quickly and attacking the far-side lane.
Odeh Fakhoury.noteZh: 法胡里给约旦左路支援，能快速参与反击并冲击远侧通道。

Prince Adu.name: Prince Adu
Prince Adu.summary: Prince Kwabena Adu (born 23 September 2003) is a Ghanaian footballer who plays for Viktoria Plzeň and the Ghana national team. He was included in The Guardian's "Next Generation 2020".
Prince Adu.note: Adu gives Ghana a young penalty-box runner, attacking channels and giving counters a central finish.
Prince Adu.noteZh: 阿杜给加纳年轻的禁区跑动点，能冲击肋部，并给反击提供中路终结。

Rajaei Ayed.name: Rajaei Ayed
Rajaei Ayed.summary: Raja'ei Ayed Fadel Hasan (Arabic: رَجَائِيّ عَايِد فَاضِل حَسَن; born 25 July 1993) is a Jordanian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Jordanian Pro League club Al-Hussein and the Jordan national team.
Rajaei Ayed.note: Ayed gives Jordan midfield balance, holding possession just long enough for the counter shape to form.
Rajaei Ayed.noteZh: 阿耶德给约旦中场平衡，能把球稳住到反击阵型成形。

Saed Al-Rosan.name: Saed Al-Rosan
Saed Al-Rosan.summary: Saed Ahmad Salameh Al-Rosan (Arabic: سَعْد أَحْمَد سَلَامَة الرُّوسَان; born 1 February 1997) is a Jordanian professional footballer who plays as a center-back for Jordanian Pro League side Al-Hussein and the Jordan national team.
Saed Al-Rosan.note: Al-Rosan gives Jordan another centre-back body, clearing the box when opponents attack directly.
Saed Al-Rosan.noteZh: 罗桑给约旦另一名中卫身体，当对手直接进攻时能清理禁区。

Saleem Obaid.name: Saleem Obaid
Saleem Obaid.summary: Saleem Amer Obaid (Arabic: سَلِيم عَامِر عُبَيْد; born 17 January 1992) is a Jordanian footballer who plays as a left back for Jordanian Pro League side Al-Hussein and the Jordan national team.
Saleem Obaid.note: Obaid gives Jordan centre-back depth, adding aerial cover and safe passing when protecting a result.
Saleem Obaid.noteZh: 奥贝德给约旦中卫深度，在保护结果时增加空中覆盖和安全传球。

Yazan Al-Arab.name: Yazan Al-Arab
Yazan Al-Arab.summary: Yazan Mousa Mahmoud Abu Al-Arab (Arabic: يَزَن مُوسَى مَحْمُود أَبُو الْعَرَب; born 31 January 1996) is a Jordanian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for K-League side FC Seoul and the Jordan national team.
Yazan Al-Arab.note: Al-Arab gives Jordan defensive leadership, keeping the line compact and attacking aerial balls.
Yazan Al-Arab.noteZh: 阿尔-阿拉卜给约旦防守领导力，能让防线保持紧凑并争抢高空球。

Yazeed Abulaila.name: Yazeed Abulaila
Yazeed Abulaila.summary: Yazeed Moein Hasan Abu Laila (Arabic: يَزِيد مُعِين حَسَن أَبُو لَيْلَى; born 8 January 1993) is a Jordanian footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Jordanian Pro League side Al-Hussein and the Jordan national team.
Yazeed Abulaila.note: Abulaila gives Jordan proven tournament composure in goal, organizing the box through long defensive spells.
Yazeed Abulaila.noteZh: 阿布莱拉给约旦在门前经过大赛证明的冷静，能在长时间防守中组织禁区。
